(Exo 3:13-22)
I, THE EHYEH, also controlled and influenced the minds of flies to do my judgment by inflicting only the house of Pharaoh and His servants' houses and not on the Israelites. (Exo 8:20-22)

Again, I, THE EHYEH, through the Name of THE YAHWEH ELO- HIM, controlled and influenced viruses to smite the Egyptians' cattle, horses, asses, camels, oxen, and sheep and not on those that belonged to the Israelites. (Exo 9:1-7)

I, THE EHYEH, again controlled and influenced the Egyptians' hearts and minds to show favor to the Israelites by surren- dering their jewels of silver and gold, and clothing when they requested to them as He had spoken to Moses. (Exo 11:1-3)
The dividing of the Red Sea through an east wind is another example that I, THE EHYEH, am able to control and influence non-living things to do my bidding.
Whatever I, THE EHYEH, think in my mind, it will happen with- out contest. This is what I meant by my name "THE EHYEH".
BEHOLD MY NAMES

Through the wisdom of my SON JESUS, and the understanding of THE HOLY SPIRIT, I, THE EHYEH, through the Angel of THE YAHWEH bearing the name, "THE EL", representing the might of THE YAHWEH made many worlds and uphold all things.

Heb 1:1 THE ELOHIM, who at sundry times and in divers manners spake in time past unto the fathers by the prophets, Heb 1:2 Hath in these last days spoken unto us by his Son, whom he hath appointed heir of all things, by whom also he made the worlds; Heb 1:3 Who being the brightness of his glory, and the express image of his person, and upholding all things by the word of his power, when he had by himself purged our sins, sat down on the right hand of the Majesty on high; Heb 1:4 Being made so much better than the angels, as he hath by inheritance obtained a more excellent name than they.

Through our name ,"THE ELOHIM", I, THE EHYEH, had called forth many ages. Through the name, "THE SHADDAI", I, THE EHYEH, had destroyed many also. At the beginning of Gene- sis 1:1, it is stated that THE ELOHIM created the heaven and the earth, but in Genesis 1:2, it is stated the earth was wasted and emptied of life. The earth was already destroyed through our name, "THE SHADDAI", and our HOLY SPIRIT was brooding upon the face of the water. Then, through our name, "THE ELOHIM", we called forth again our creation.
This is to help you to understand better the coming destruc- tion which is called the Day of THE YAHWEH. It will be done through the name, "THE SHADDAI", and through the hand of THE EL.

I, THE EHYEH, am the unbeatable, the incomparable, and the mastermind of every event in the many Cosmoses. I control and influence the mind of every creature, including Satan. I wrote the script of every living thing about what they should do or speak. Being acquainted with my name will change your whole life in how you see your situations in life. All the knots in your life which you find it too difficult to untie will be loos- ened when you know and truly take refuge in my name,"THE EHYEH".
THE MASTERMIND

title: THE FATHER PLAYING CHESS WITH SATAN

segments.text: THE FATHER PLAYING CHESS WITH SATAN
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the main role of Satan?

THE FATHER: The words "Satan" and "Devil" reveal its role. It is an opponent and an accuser against those who are each called to be a christ (anointed one). His main tactic is to ask for permission from THE FATHER to prove them by deceiving them into sin, and then afterward accuse them in the Heav- enly Court.

Rev 12:9 And the great (G3173 "megas" large) dragon (G1404 "drakon") was cast out, that primeval (G744 "achaios" that has been from the beginning) serpent, called the Devil, (G1228 "dia- bolos" false accuser, slanderer) and Satan (G4568 "satanas" same as H7854 "satan" an opponent"), which deceiveth the whole world: he was cast out into the earth, and his angels were cast out with him. Rev 12:10 And I heard a loud voice saying in heav- en, Now is come salvation, and power (G1411"dunamis" ), and the kingdom of our ELOHIM, and the authority (G1849 "exousia") of his Christ (G5547 "christos" anointed): for the accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our ELOHIM day and night.

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of THE FATHER playing chess with Satan. The chess pieces represent us. THE FATHER makes the first move followed by Satan. The whole scenario looks like ancient Chinese generals making tactical maneuvers in war.

THE FATHER: Every time when we decide to use someone in our plan for our purpose, Satan would try to thwart our plan. He has many devices under his sleeves because he has been provided with much information regarding our candidates through his demon informers and has been studying them and knows all the weaknesses and strengths of that person.

JESUS: One of his strategies is to send people to subtly praise and flatter that person. If the candidate is not watchful, he will permit the Leviathan spirit of pride to overwhelm him and to mutate him so as to make him haughty and thus being rejected by THE FATHER. (1Pe 5:5-10) The spirit of presumptu- ousness lurks in many unwary hearts and leads them to many errors which result in them committing great transgressions
BEHOLD MY NAMES
against my HOLY SPIRIT.

Another method is that he will send demons of intimidation, unbelief, and fear to deceive and energize the person to dis- trust the love of THE FATHER towards him. He will suggest in his mind that if THE FATHER really loves him, He would not have permitted the tribulations and persecutions to happen to him. The victim will then be made confused and discour- aged and end up losing faith in his calling. (2Ti 1:7-10)

Sometimes, Satan will use self-righteous and religious peo- ple to judge and condemn our candidates until they are so grieved and discouraged that they felt like giving up in their calling. (2Co 2:5-11)

THE FATHER: I, THE EHYEH, through THE ELOHIM, have called Satan into being and know all his thoughts. (Gen 3:1) As his cre- ator, I am able to influence him to move in the direction of our plan without letting him be aware that he is doing our bidding.

I, THE EHYEH, know the ego and the pride of Satan. Ever since his rebellion, he has never ceased to challenge me, THE EHY- EH, that man will never truly love THE FATHER and serve Him in singleness even unto death by completely submitting to His will and not being wise in their own eyes. So far, Satan had won the challenge and proved himself to be correct when he tried Adam. The reason for his endeavor is because he mea- sures them according to his standard as he himself had failed the test.
JESUS: But when I came in the flesh, I proved him wrong and he was humiliated.

My FATHER knows the frustration, jealousy, and bitterness Sa- tan has for those whom we have called into glory. He insti- gates Satan to test His righteous the same way he did to Job. So, with wisdom and subtlety, we use Satan to test our chosen candidates in order to humble them and to sift them to prove whether they are worthy of the Kingdom of my FATHER.
Job 1:8 And THE YAHWEH said unto Satan, Hast thou consid-
THE MASTERMIND

ered my servant Job, that there is none like him in the earth, a perfect and an upright man, one that feareth THE ELOHIM, and escheweth evil? Job 1:9 Then Satan answered THE YAHWEH, and said, Doth Job fear THE ELOHIM for nought? Job 1:10 Hast not thou made an hedge about him, and about his house, and about all that he hath on every side? thou hast blessed the work of his hands, and his substance is increased in the land. Job 1:11 But put forth thine hand now, and touch all that he hath, and he will curse thee to thy face. Job 1:12 And THE YAHWEH said unto Satan, Behold, all that he hath is in thy power; only upon himself put not forth thine hand. So Satan went forth from the presence of THE YAHWEH.

THE FATHER: Every man's heart is like a coin with two sides; he has both good and evil inclinations. It is I, THE EHYEH, who harden and soften every heart. I hardened Pharaoh's heart so that I could manifest our glory through the Angel of Our Pres- ence (Shekinaih, my incarnation whom we surnamed "THE TRINITY", representing us, THE TRINITY, and Aaron K David, my SON'S reincarnation whom we surnamed "THE VICTORY").
Accidents are created when I, THE EHYEH, permit them to hap- pen when the Devil/Accuser had his proposals approved by us.
SATAN IN HEAVEN

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of Satan with his demons approach- ing THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST who was sitting on His throne. Standing on the left of him were demons carrying black books of accusations and proposals to test the saints. He took the books and perused them. Some, He burned with fire; some, He tore certain pages out from them and returned to Satan approving his proposal. Following that, Satan and his demons executed the approved tests speedily.

JESUS: Satan's job is to purify the saints and punish the wicked. That is why his name is called Satan. The word "Satan" means the opponent, the adversary, or the withstander. His job is to stand against the one whom THE TRINITY wants to use, bless, or exalt. Every time when THE TRINITY wants to use or bless
BEHOLD MY NAMES

a person, Satan will stand on his right accusing him, protest- ing to me that the candidate does not deserve THE TRINITY'S blessings. There is a court case in heaven day and night con- cerning the works of the saints. The Angel of THE YAHWEH will always stand as an advocate to defend the righteous. (Zec 3:1)
Satan will not stop accusing the saints because this is his na- ture. He is called "Diabolos the Accuser", and he enjoys doing so from day to night.
DAVID: How then can we overcome him?

JESUS: You can only overcome him by partaking of my cup of suffering by going through the suffering of tribulation, perse- cution, etc., and eventually by your last word of confession in your martyrdom before you die. This is how your salvation is to be worked out if you are called to be a christ as stated in Revelation 12:10.

Rev 12:10 And I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, Now is come salvation, and power, and the kingdom of our THE ELOHIM, and the authority of his Christ: for the accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our THE ELOHIM day and night. Rev 12:11 And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their martyrdom; and they loved not their lives unto the death.

Revelation 12:10-11 is referring to the Two Witnesses. After they have finished prophesying the coming judgment of THE YAHWEH for 1,260 days, they will be martyred and resurrected and will be given the kingdoms of the world to rule with me as Mini-Christ. Satan knows that his time of reigning the world is short. Therefore, he will try to destroy as many first-borns who are destined to take over his kingdom which at present is governed by his seed.
THE FATHER: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the beginning and the end. I wrote the stories of many cosmoses, creations after creations, and the books of humanity.
JESUS: The angels are commanded to make sure that those who are called will get this book and read it despite all pro- crastinations and hindrances. THE EHYEH controls their heart.
THE MASTERMIND

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of THE LORD JESUS CHRIST reading the book of every man. In every ten pages He read, there were twists consistently throughout their lives. Every ten pages symbolize ten years of our lives.

THE FATHER: I wrote the book from Genesis to Revelation and many books from the origin to the infinite future which is an eternity. (Mal 3:16, Rev 20:11-13) The understanding of our name "THE EHYEH" is important as we will be monitoring ev- ery thought and speech in the last days when we will put ev- eryone through the testing like we tested the Israelites in the wilderness. None shall have idols in their hearts. They must trust and be at peace with our testing and not murmur.

1Co 10:11 Now all these things happened unto them for ens- amples: and they are written for our admonition, upon whom the ends of the world are come. 1Co 10:12 Wherefore let him that thinketh he standeth take heed lest he fall.1Co 10:13 There hath no temptation taken you but such as is common to man: but THE ELOHIM is faithful, who will not suffer you to be tempt- ed above that ye are able; but will with the temptation also make a way to escape, that ye may be able to bear it. 1Co 10:14 Wherefore, my dearly beloved, flee from idolatry.
My son David, would you like to share with Shekinaih your ex- perience concerning my name "THE EHYEH"?

DAVID: Understanding the meaning of the name, "THE EHY- EH", has established my faith in my walk with THE TRINITY. I am no more fearful of any danger or trouble that comes in my way. For example, many years ago, I was with Shekinaih in New Zealand on mission and she was driving the mo- tor-home we rented. At first, I was full of anxiety and fear as it was the first time she drove a motor-home. Though I was tired, I stayed awake to watch out for dangers, but THE HOLY SPIRIT whispered to my ears telling me to relax, reminding me of the name, "THE EHYEH", the mastermind who controls and influences every living and non-living thing. Nothing will happen without His approval. Being convicted that He is the mastermind of every happening in this world, I just closed my eyes and slept peacefully.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

This incident has also helped me to keep my peace and praise THE TRINITY in any trouble I encountered without losing my peace. Each time when tribulations and persecutions come, I will always comfort and encourage myself that THE EHYEH is the mastermind of the situation and is testing me whether I really know Him by His name. I will assure myself that there are no devices of Satan that can escape His knowing and nothing bad can happen without His approval. THE FATHER can do everything and there is no device against Him that He is not aware of. When THE EHYEH thinks and commands it not to happen, it will not happen. He is the Most High, both the evil and the good do His biddings.

Job 42:1 Then Job answered THE YAHWEH, and said, Job 42:2 I know that thou canst do everything, and that no thought can be withholden from thee. Job 42:3 Who is he that hideth coun- sel without knowledge? Therefore have I uttered that I under- stood not; things too wonderful for me, which I knew not.
Lam 3:37 Who is he that saith, and it cometh to pass, when THE YAHWEH commandeth it not? Lam 3:38 Out of the mouth of the most High proceedeth not evil and good?

In most cases, I will pray without being distracted and sing praises to Him and thank Him for His love in whatever sit- uations He puts me through for my good according to His determination. I am determined not to allow anxieties to quench my spirit. I will keep my mind from being defiled and deceived by any demonic suggestions of thoughts of unbe- lief or fear and hold my peace unto holiness.

1Th 5:16 Rejoice evermore. 1Th 5:17 Pray without interruption (distraction). 1Th 5:18 In everything give thanks: for this is the will of THE ELOHIM in Christ JESUS concerning you. 1Th 5:19 Quench not the spirit. 1Th 5:22 Abstain from all appearance of evil. 1Th 5:23 And the very ELOHIM of peace sanctify you whol- ly; and I pray THE ELOHIM your whole spirit and soul and body be preserved blameless unto the coming of our YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST.
I know that good shall come to me as long as I am at peace with Him and trust in His name, "THE EHYEH".
Job 22:21 Acquaint now thyself with him, and be at peace: thereby good shall come unto thee.
CHAPTER 3
THE REPRESENTATIVE OF THE EHYEH
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, could you enlighten us on the mean- ing of the third vision from the holographic projection that came out of Shekinaih's head?

THE FATHER: My representative Shekinaih has access to my brain. She has access to all the scripts written by me regard- ing all my creation in the three realms, including the heavens, galaxies, planets, earth, hell, angels, demons, humanity, and all created beings and things. She not only has access to all these scripts but also has the authority to intercede for them and propose to me to alter and make amendments to all my predestined scripts. Her intercession avails much as she is ap- pointed to represent me incarnated in this earthly realm.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
HOW THE EHYEH BRAIN OPERATES

SHEKINAIH: When the THE TRINITY appeared before me to release a decree for me to execute, and when I proclaimed the decree, I saw the above vision how the EHYEH operates through me to control every organ of each created and non-created beings including technology to act accordingly to the decree which served as a software to control and influ- ence them. Spiritual golden gadgets linked to golden cables proceeded out of my mouth attached to their brains, hearts, lungs, kidneys, reproductive organs, arms, legs, throats and etc. to control and influence them like puppets. These organs corresponds to their thoughts, their desires, their breath of life, their reasoning, their will, their doings, their paths, and their voices/speech. These controls and influences are mere- ly activated by THE EHYEH'S thoughts in my thoughts.
THE FATHER: There's no incident that happens without my knowledge and approval. All good and evil proceeds from me,
THE REPRESENTATIVE OF THE EHYEH
demons and angels do my bidding.

Job 42:1 Then Job answered THE YAHWEH, and said, Job 42:2 I know that thou canst do everything, and that no thought can be withholden from thee. Job 42:3 Who is he that hideth coun- sel without knowledge? Therefore have I uttered that I under- stood not; things too wonderful for me, which I knew not.
Lam 3:37 Who is he that saith, and it cometh to pass, when THE YAHWEH commandeth it not? Lam 3:38 Out of the mouth of the most High proceedeth not evil and good?

JESUS: Shekinaih is the Wisdom in Proverbs 8. Its parable is referring to her. She represents wisdom and you, David, rep- resent understanding. Together, you are our spokesman to the chieftains of my host. Through her, I deputize the chief- tains of my host after they have successfully ascended to the Holy Mountain through the way of righteousness unto ho- liness and entered into my house through the path of jus- tice. Through the invitation of Shekinaih and by your hand as the porter, you shall open the gate to my Holy Mountain for them. She as wisdom will call the mighty men and prophets and show them their calling. Both Shekinaih and you repre- sent the fear of THE YAHWEH. Those who are prideful, arro- gant, and crooked will be rejected by her because my counsel, sound wisdom, understanding, and might are in her. Through her, we will ordain our anointed ones, and both of you will reign and decree justice on behalf of us. Those who love her love me. Those who seek her early shall find me. Through her, my sons and daughters will receive their full inheritance from me if they walk in the preordained way of righteousness and the paths of justice which are shown to her, being my mouth piece. Those who love her will indeed inherit the Kingdom of Heaven.

Pro 8:1 Doth not wisdom proclaim? and understanding put forth his speech? Pro 8:2 She deputize (H5324 "natsab") the chief (H7218 "rosh") of the high ones (H4791 "marom"), by the way (of righteousness unto holiness) in the house (H1004) of the paths (of justice). Pro 8:3 She crieth through the hand (H3027 "yad") of the porter (H8179 "shaar"), at the entry of the city, at the com- ing in at the doors. Pro 8:4 Unto you, O mighty one (H376 "ish"),
BEHOLD MY NAMES

I call; and my voice is to the sons of Adam. Pro 8:5 O ye simple, understand wisdom: and, ye fools, be ye of an understanding heart. Pro 8:6 Hear; for I will speak of governorship (H5057 "nag- iyd"); and the opening of my lips shall be right things. Pro 8:7 For my mouth shall speak truth; and wickedness is an abomination to my lips. Pro 8:8 All the words of my mouth are in righteous- ness; there is nothing froward or perverse in them. Pro 8:9 They are all plain to him that understandeth, and right to them that find knowledge. Pro 8:10 Receive my discipline (H4148 "musar"), and not silver; and knowledge rather than choice gold. Pro 8:11 For wisdom is better than rubies; and all the things that may be desired are not to be compared to it. Pro 8:12 I wisdom dwell with prudence, and find out knowledge of witty inventions. Pro 8:13 The fear of THE YAHWEH is to hate evil: pride, and arrogan- cy, and the evil way, and the froward mouth, do I hate. Pro 8:14 Counsel is mine, and sound wisdom: I am understanding; I have strength. Pro 8:15 By me kings reign, and princes decree justice. Pro 8:16 By me princes rule, and nobles, even all the judges of the earth. Pro 8:17 I love them that love me; and those that seek me early shall find me. Pro 8:18 Riches and honour are with me; yea, durable riches and righteousness. Pro 8:19 My fruit is bet- ter than gold, yea, than fine gold; and my revenue than choice silver. Pro 8:20 I lead in the way of righteousness, in the midst of the paths of judgment: Pro 8:21 That I may cause those that love me to inherit substance; and I will fill their treasures.

Regarding Shekinaih, we have possessed her together with you as the chiefest among my host representing us. We have anointed both of you to represent us before we created the Cosmoses. Both of you were with us and by our side and was daily our delight. We have given both of you access to my mind and my heart, and both of you have the same delight as me for the Sons of Adam, my anointed ones. Those who obey her instructions and keep her way will be blessed. Those who find her will find life and shall obtain favor from us, but for those who sin against her, it is better that they are not born at all as Gehenna will be their dwelling.

Pro 8:22 THE YAHWEH possessed me as the chieftest (H7225 "reshiyth") of his way, before his works of old. Pro 8:23 I was anointed (H5258 "nasak") from everlasting, from the beginning, or ever the earth was. Pro 8:24 When there were no depths, I was brought forth; when there were no fountains abounding
THE REPRESENTATIVE OF THE EHYEH

with water. Pro 8:25 Before the mountains were settled, before the hills was I brought forth: Pro 8:26 While as yet he had not made the earth, nor the fields, nor the highest part of the dust of the world. Pro 8:27 When he prepared the heavens, I was there: when he set a compass upon the face of the depth: Pro 8:28 When he established the clouds above: when he strength- ened the fountains of the deep: Pro 8:29 When he gave to the sea his decree, that the waters should not pass his command- ment: when he appointed the foundations of the earth: Pro 8:30 Then I was by him, as one brought up with him: and I was dai- ly his delight, rejoicing always before him; Pro 8:31 Rejoicing in the habitable part of his earth; and my delights were with the sons of Adam. Pro 8:32 Now therefore hearken unto me, O ye children: for blessed are they that keep my ways. Pro 8:33 Hear instruction, and be wise, and refuse it not. Pro 8:34 Blessed is the man that heareth me, watching daily at my gates, waiting at the posts of my doors. Pro 8:35 For whoso findeth me findeth life, and shall obtain favor of THE YAHWEH. Pro 8:36 But he that sinneth against me wrongeth his own soul: all they that hate me love death.

She and you are our dove. Both of you are our wholehearted one, united in one spirit with THE HOLY SPIRIT, the Heavenly Mother Jerusalem. Shekinaih represents us as THE YAHWEH SA- BAOTH, and you, THE VICTORY, represents us as the Captain of the Hosts. Together, both of you are "she that looketh forth as the morning, fair as the moon, clear as the sun, and terrible as an army with banners." Shekinaih is fair as the moon rep- resenting our feminine aspect, and you, my VICTORY, is clear as the sun representing our masculine aspect. Together, both of you will usher my return as you lead my company of two armies of bridal warriors of 144,000 virgin brides with dancing, out of which 7,000 are my anointed ones.

Son 6:8 There are threescore queens, and fourscore concubines, and virgins without number. Son 6:9 My dove, my wholeheart- ed one (H8535 "tam") is one (H259 "echad" united) she is united (H259) with her mother, she is the choice one of her that bare her. The daughters saw her, and blessed her; yea, the queens and the concubines, and they praised her. Son 6:10 Who is she that looketh forth as the morning, fair as the moon, clear as the sun, and terrible as an army with banners? Son 6:11 I went down into the garden of nuts to see the fruits of the valley, and
BEHOLD MY NAMES

to see whether the vine flourished, and the pomegranates bud- ded. Son 6:12 Or ever I was aware, my soul made me like the chariots of Amminadib. Son 6:13 Return, return, O Shulamite; return, return, that we may look upon thee. What will ye see in the Shulamite? As it were the dancers (H4246 mecholah) of two armies.

She represents THE HOLY SPIRIT, the Mother Wisdom in Prov- erb 9. With her, I will build my house and will hew out my Seven Apostles of the Last Day Church. Together with you as THE EL SHADDAI, one to release our decree and the other to execute, shall defeat the Beast from the Sea and the Beast from the Earth and give them together with their armies to be meat for my eagle prophets.
Pro 9:1 Wisdom hath builded her house, she hath hewn out her seven pillars: Pro 9:2 She hath killed her beasts; she hath min- gled her wine; she hath also furnished her table.

She represents THE HOLY SPIRIT, the Mother Wisdom who will be justified of her children when she comes together with you, my last days' Elijah which are to come. Only those faithful children of mine who forcefully press through my strait gate of tribulations to bear the Peaceable Fruits of Righteousness unto Holiness could receive both of you as my Wisdom and my Elijah and shall be caught up to my Kingdom (Raptured). As for the ungodly, the self-righteous, and the religious last days' churches, they will not be able to perceive my Two Rep- resentatives nor the children whom I have given them, for they are for signs to be wondered.

Mat 11:11 Verily I say unto you, Among them that are born of women there hath not risen a greater than John the Baptist: notwithstanding he that is least in the kingdom of heaven is greater than he. Mat 11:12 And from the days of John the Bap- tist until now the kingdom of heaven suffereth pressing (G971 "biazo" to press by force), and the one who presseth (G973 "bi- astes" same as Lk 16:16), the same (G846 "autos" the same) will be caught up (G726 "harpazo" caught up as in 1 Thes 4:17). Mat 11:13 For all the prophets and the law prophesied until John. Mat 11:14 And if ye will receive it, this is Elias, which was for to come. Mat 11:15 He that hath ears to hear, let him hear. Mat 11:16 But whereunto shall I liken this generation? It is like unto
THE REPRESENTATIVE OF THE EHYEH

children sitting in the markets, and calling unto their fellows, Mat 11:17 And saying, We have piped unto you, and ye have not danced; we have mourned unto you, and ye have not lament- ed. Mat 11:18 For John came neither eating nor drinking, and they say, He hath a devil. Mat 11:19 The Son of man came eat- ing and drinking, and they say, Behold a man gluttonous, and a winebibber, a friend of publicans and sinners. But wisdom is justified of her children.

She is the Wisdom of THE ELOHIM who will send the prophets and apostles as instructed by me to testify against the Spiri- tual false Jews, and they will be martyred by the seed of the Beast from the Sea.

Luk 11:49 Therefore also said the wisdom of THE ELOHIM, I will send them prophets and apostles, and some of them they shall slay and persecute: Luk 11:50 That the blood of all the proph- ets, which was shed from the foundation of the world, may be required of this generation; Luk 11:51 From the blood of Abel unto the blood of Zacharias, which perished between the altar and the temple: verily I say unto you, It shall be required of this generation.

THE FATHER: The woman having an alabaster box of ointment of spikenard in Mark Chapter 14:3-7 serves as a parable of her deeds in the last days. She is to anoint you, the head, and the body and the feet which is the last days' church of my SON JESUS, which symbolizes everyone who is called to be a christ. Through these anointed ones, the true Gospel of the King- dom which are preached to them by you shall be preached throughout the whole world, and what my incarnation in Shekinaih has done shall be spoken of for a memorial.

Mar 14:8 She hath done what she could: she is come aforehand to anoint my body to the burying. Mar 14:9 Verily I say unto you, Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached throughout the whole world, this also that she hath done shall be spoken of for a memorial of her.

All my anointed ones who are anointed by her shall preach repentance because of the coming judgment of the world, but they will be killed and resurrected. They are the Jonas. Together with Shekinaih as the symbolic Queen of the South,
BEHOLD MY NAMES

they shall rise up in the judgment to judge the last days' evil and adulterous generation of the Kingdom of the Beast from the Sea which is symbolized by Nineveh the harlot. The south symbolizes the chamber of the south which refers to the 144,000 virgin brides who are not defiled by the women Nineveh, the mistress of witchcrafts.

Mat 12:39 But he answered and said unto them, An evil and adul- terous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given to it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas: Mat 12:40 For as Jonas was three days and three nights in the whale's belly; so shall the Son of Adam be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth. Mat 12:41 The men of Nineveh shall rise in judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: because they repented at the preaching of Jonas; and, behold, a greater than Jonas is here. Mat 12:42 The queen of the south shall rise up in the judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: for she came from the uttermost parts of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and, behold, a greater than Solomon is here. The rod shall be a sign against all the rebels that they will stop murmuring against both of you lest they die also. (Num 16:2-3, 17:8-10)

My blood which I have put in the cup of grape juice symbol- izes the wine of my (our) wrath. I (We) will send both of you to cause all the nations, to whom I (we) shall send to drink it, and they shall drink and be agitated violently because of the destruction I (we) will bring unto Mystery Babylon and all who worship her. (Jer 25:15-17, Rev 14:8-20, 16:17-21)
The two tablets of the Ten Commandments I (we) gave to both of you symbolize you both as the lawgiver whom I (we) have authorized to be able to save and to destroy.
Jas 4:12 There is one lawgiver, who is able to save and to de- stroy: who art thou that judgest another?

I, JESUS, will be united with you, Aaron K David, and you shall come in my name as the Name of THE YAHWEH in my second coming as the lawgiver in execution. Shekinaih will repre- sent THE HOLY SPIRIT, MOTHER ZION, in birthing you and the ass who shall accompany the colt which is you whom I in the spirit shall ride on. Both of you will usher my (our) 1,000 years reign after both of you and my (our) armies of glorified saints have defeated the armies of the Beast and the False Prophet who will be thrown into the Lake of Fire together with those that worship them and received their mark.

Gen 49:10 The sceptre shall not depart from Judah, nor a lawgiv- er from between her feet, until Shiloh come; and unto him shall the gathering of the people be. Gen 49:11 Binding his foal unto the vine, and his ass's colt unto the choice vine; he washed his garments in wine, and his clothes in the blood of grapes: Gen 49:12 His eyes shall be red with wine, and his teeth white with milk.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

THE FATHER: I (We), THE YAHWEH, again reinstate that I (we) have chosen Shekinaih to perform the role of Moses to repre- sent me (us) as THE ELOHIM, and you, Aaron K David, shall take upon the role of Aaron as her spokesman.
Exo 4:16 And he shall be thy spokesman unto the people: and he shall be, even he shall be to thee instead of a mouth, and thou shalt be to him instead of THE ELOHIM.

JESUS: The story of Moses and Aaron in Exodus did happen, but it also acts as a parable. I (We), THE YAHWEH, will again, through the Angel of My (Our) Presence, the Two Cherubim of Glory (She/He), test those who are called to be a part of the Heavenly Jerusalem.

The testings of the Israelites in the wilderness did happen but they also act as parables for my (our) people in the last days who are called to come out of the world (Egypt/Babylon) to be tested and acquainted with my (our) names.
1Co 10:11 Now all these things happened unto them for ensam- ples: and they are written for our admonition, upon whom the ends of the world are come.

THE FATHER: The rod of almond which I (we) imparted to both of you (She/He) also symbolizes that I (we), THE YAHWEH, will not sleep but will stay awake and be alert and speedily perform my (our) word through you both; to uproot, to pull down, to destroy, and to overthrow the kingdoms of the Beast from the Sea.

Jer 1:9 Then THE YAHWEH put forth his hand, and touched my mouth. And THE YAHWEH said unto me, Behold, I have put my words in thy mouth. Jer 1:10 See, I have this day set thee over the nations and over the kingdoms, to root out, and to pull down, and to destroy, and to throw down, to build, and to plant. Jer 1:11 Moreover the word of THE YAHWEH came unto me, saying, Jeremiah, what seest thou? And I said, I see a rod of an almond tree [H8247 "shaqed" from H4245 "shaqad" a primi- tive root, to be alert, that is, sleepless; hence to be on the look out (whether for good or ill): -hasten, remain, wake, watch (for).] Jer 1:12 Then said THE YAHWEH unto me, Thou hast well seen: for I will be hasten (H4245 "shaqad" a primitive root, to be alert) concerning (H5921 "al") my word to perform it.
ACT 3 SCENE 3
MacRitchie Reservoir, Singapore

Shekinaih sat on the right of THE HOLY SPIRIT who sat on the right of THE FATHER facing a lake in MacRitchie Reservoir. Among them was David who sat on the left of JESUS who sat on the left of THE FATHER. Suddenly, many glass-made church buildings in gold emerged out of the reservoir in holograph- ic form. Among these churches was a particular church that was the tallest and was surrounded by the rest of the churches that were half its height. All the churches had coni- cal roofs. Suddenly, a dragon from the sky flew down and bit off the roof of the tallest church. After this, it bit off the roofs of the rest of the churches. Without the roofs, the leaders and the congregations of all the churches became vulnera- ble to the attack of the ferocious dragon. All of a sudden, the Red Dragon plunged into the tallest church and bit off the head of the Senior Pastor who was wearing a black execu- tive's suit. It then completely gulped up fewer than ten men and woman who were also in executive suits in that church. Seeing this assault, the rest of the congregation were horri- fied and traumatized. Some were screaming with shock and some were crying over a long period of time. All this time, while the head of the Senior Pastor was in the mouth of the Red Dragon, the eyes of the Senior Pastor were still blink- ing and his mouth was still moving. There was a thread of light connecting his head with the headless body which was standing at first but later knelt down in prayer posture with
BEHOLD MY NAMES

his hands clasped together. All the time when the headless body was in this posture, the eyes from the head that were still in the Red Dragon's mouth were closed as if in prayer. This happened over a long period of time. At the same time, the dragon was resting with his eyes closed and was in that posture for a long time after the attack. Out of a sudden, the Red Dragon opened his eyes widely because he was awak- ened by a strong sensation of electric surge that proceeded out from all directions from the bitten head that was stuck in her mouth. This phenomenon was due to the prayer that proceeded out of the mouth of the bitten head as well as the prayer of his congregation. The head was struggling profuse- ly with heavy sweat as it tried to prevent itself from being swallowed down the throat into the belly of the Red Dragon. All this time the head was clinging desperately to the edge of the Red Dragon's throat against the saliva of the drag- on's slimy tongue as the Red Dragon was trying to swallow it down to her belly. Suddenly, a cracking sound was heard. The upper jaw of the Red Dragon was cracked by the power surge.

After this, another vision appeared. Shekinaih, dressed in Golden Empress' robe, was seated on a throne looking at the Red Dragon which was now inside the stomach of a Golden Dragon. They looked like miniature dragons resting on a ta- ble in front of her. THE TRINITY was standing beside Shekinaih and then pointing their fingers at her, they said to her. "Now, the decision lies with you."

Marveled over the panoramic vision he had just seen, David immediately said to THE FATHER, "ABBA FATHER, what meanest thou these visions?" JESUS answered David, "This is concerning a Senior Pastor of a Mega Church in Singapore." David said to JESUS, "Why did you show us this vision in Mac- Ritchie Reservoir?" JESUS answered David, " MacRitchie Reser- voir is a spiritual vortex where Lucifer the Red Dragon frolics when she runs to and fro from Venus to Earth and manifests herself in the Singapore arena through her many devices." David said to JESUS, "What does the golden, tall, glass church
ACT 3 SCENE 3

symbolize?" JESUS answered David, "It symbolizes a divinely appointed church which had been leavened with unsound doctrines." THE FATHER then interjected and said to David, "It is obvious of what had happened and is still happening as of now to a Mega Church in Singapore."He pointed to- ward the tallest church with the word "City Harvest Church" written on it. David then said to THE FATHER, "What does the cone roof symbolize?" JESUS answered David, "It symbolizes a worldly Church. Cone roof is slippery and it symbolizes the last days' back-slidden Thyatira Church in the Book of Reve- lation with its many works that are originated from the Tree of the Knowledge of Good and Evil with their unsound doc- trines; tolerating the spirit of Jezebel to teach and seduce my servants to backslide and to commit spiritual adultery with the ways of the world."
CHAPTER 2 JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

1Pe 4:17 For the time is come that judgment must begin at the house of THE ELOHIM: and if it first begin at us, what shall the end be of them that obey not the gospel of THE ELOHIM? 1Pe 4:18 And if the righteous scarcely be saved, where shall the un- godly and the sinner appear?

title: THE RED DRAGON ATTACKING A CHURCH

segments.text: THE RED DRAGON ATTACKING A CHURCH
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are you trying to tell us through these vision?

JESUS: Have I not spoken through Peter that judgment must begin at our house? The reason for the attack is because the pastor did not seek our counsel for the plans he executed. Sometimes, instead of inquiring from us, he ignorantly sought ungodly counsels from men of renown who are from the Syn- agogue of Satan. These false ministers infiltrated my church and are exalted and positioned in big Christian Organizations by Satan in order to mislead and destroy the body of Christ. Once the work is done, they will reveal their true allegiance to "Mystery Babylon" and further offend and stumble many in their faith. As written in Revela- tion 3:9, there will be many "Synagogues of Satan which say they are Jews and are not, but do lie." Similarly, there will be many Churches of Satan which say they are Christians and are not, but do lie.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how can we discern them?

JESUS: These false apostles and deceitful workers love to find occasions to boast and be worshipped and admired by their followers. These are the trees which my FATHER had not plant- ed. They are the modern day Pharisees who will be uprooted and thrown into Gehenna fire together with the Beast and
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
the False Prophet in the last days.

2Co 11:12 But what I do, that I will do, that I may cut off occa- sion from them which desire occasion; that wherein they glo- ry, they may be found even as we. 2Co 11:13 For such are false apostles, deceitful workers, transforming themselves into the apostles of Christ. 2Co 11:14 And no marvel; for Satan himself is transformed into an angel of light. 2Co 11:15 Therefore it is no great thing if his ministers also be transformed as the ministers of righteousness; whose end shall be according to their works.
Many of my potential brides will be deceived by them and will deny and disunite from me for the false Christ.
Mat 24:11 And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many. Mat 24:12 And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.

THE FATHER: Because they are not faithful and truthful to- ward us, we, THE YAHWEH, will permit them to be deceived by the man of perdition and his false ministers through their miracles, power, and lying signs.

2Th 2:9 Even him, whose coming is after the working of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders, 2Th 2:10 And with all deceivableness of unrighteousness in them that perish; be- cause they received not the love of the truth, that they might be saved. 2Th 2:11 And for this cause THE ELOHIM shall send them strong delusion, that they should believe a lie: 2Th 2:12 That they all might be damned who believed not the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.

JESUS: There will be increasing news of this falling away in the near future. Instead of coming out of Babylon, many of my ministers will compromise with the Woman Mystery Babylon due to pressures from those in authority in their denomina- tions who are taken over by Satanists or the New World Order thus misleading the sheep to join Mystery Babylon. They will be plagued by THE YAHWEH and go into perdition.

Rev 2:20 Notwithstanding I have a few things against thee, be- cause thou sufferest that woman Jezebel, which calleth herself a prophetess, to teach and to seduce my servants to commit fornication, and to eat things sacrificed unto idols. Rev 2:21 And I gave her space to repent of her fornication; and she repented
BEHOLD MY NAMES

not. Rev 2:22 Behold, I will cast her into a bed, and them that commit adultery with her into great tribulation, except they repent of their deeds. Rev 2:23 And I will kill her children with death; and all the churches shall know that I am he which sear- cheth the reins and hearts: and I will give unto every one of you according to your works.
I (We), THE YAHWEH, will reject them as my ministers. Together with their spiritual children, they will all be destroyed due to their lack of knowledge of my way. (Hos 4:6-10)

THE FATHER: The whole Book of Lamentation is about how we, THE YAHWEH, gave permission to the adversary to afflict Jerusalem for the multitude of her transgressions. Her chil- dren were gone into captivity before the enemy. We afflicted her in the day of our fierce anger for they had rebelled against our commandment. We covered the daughters of Zion with a cloud in our anger and had not pitied them as they no lon- ger obeyed us. Their prophets also received no vision from us so much so that they had to depend on the false prophets who had seen vain and foolish things for them and had not exposed their iniquity that they might be set free from their captivity. This is what we, THE YAHWEH, did to the rebellious daughters of Jerusalem and will again do to the rebels of Spir- itual Jerusalem in the last days.
JESUS: David, why don't you share with Shekinaih your Reve- lation regarding the chastening of THE FATHER?

DAVID: Sometimes when I am rebellious, THE YAHWEH would remind me that those who are under my care would also be punished together with me. When THE YAHWEH wanted to punish the people of Israel because their sins had reached the limit, He instigated Satan to stir King David to number the people of Israel out of pride. After numbering the people of Israel, the Angel of THE YAHWEH came to Gad to tell King David that he had sinned and Satan had won in the lawsuit. Judgment had been decreed so that he must now decide whether the punishment is seven years of famine to the peo- ple of Israel or three months of being chased by their ene- mies or three days of plagues. King David chose three days
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

of plagues and a few hundred thousand died. If THE YAHWEH has chosen us to be a general of His army, He has no room for our pride, ego, or self-righteousness. As He has dealt with King David, He will also deal with all who are called to be in the front line. There is no room for being presumptuous. We have a responsibility to those who are under us. THE YAHWEH will continue to deal with us in our self-righteousness, ego, and pride. (2Sa 24:1-25, 1Ch 21:1-30)
2Sa 24:1 And again the anger of THE YAHWEH was kindled against Israel, and he moved David against them to say, Go, number Israel and Judah.
1Ch 21:1 And Satan stood up against Israel, and provoked David to number Israel.

The Spirit of Presumptuousness is the deep thing of Lucifer. This Spirit of Arrogance which is due to the knowledge that puffs up, lurks in many hearts and will spring out stealthily to lead many into errors and great transgressions. In the last days, many religious leaders will lead their congregation on the verge of Gehenna fire for sinning against THE HOLY SPIRIT in you, Shekinaih.

Psa 19:12 Who can understand his errors? cleanse thou me from secret faults. Psa 19:13 Keep back thy servant also from presumptuous sins; let them not have dominion over me: then shall I be upright, and I shall be innocent from the great trans- gression.

JESUS: David, now I will reveal to you some of the heavenly charges and accusations against some of my ministers which I have warned to repent. However, in the fullness of time, when I press the stopwatch which symbolizes the cut off time, it shall be payback time.

I have revealed them here in order for all to learn how I deal with my lawless ministers, lest any should also fall in these same categories of deceit and delusion due to their blindness, to see the truth of my word which many have failed to see.
I (We), THE YAHWEH, the Righteous Judge, am not a respecter of person and will reward everyone according to what is in his
BEHOLD MY NAMES
heart and mind and according to his way and the fruits of his doing.

My throne is established in righteousness and justice, but I will show mercy to those who repent and walk in truth (Psa 89:14) as long as their iniquity is not yet full (Gen 15:16). But once it reaches the cut off time, my judgment must begin on them. As I had slain Eli and his sons Hophni and Phinehas for their in- iquity in its fullness, so will I slay those who lightly esteem me despite my repeated warning when their iniquity is full. As I (We) had not hesitated to deliver Jerusalem and my temple to be destroyed by the Babylonians after many years of warning through my prophets calling Jerusalem unto repentance, I will also not hesitate to surrender my people to Satan for their discipline and humiliation and ultimately for their destruction when their iniquities are in their fullness if they did not bring fruits worthy of repentance before the cut off time. Again I say: I (We), THE YAHWEH, am not a respecter of person. As I (We) did not hide the sins of my beloved servant King David, I (We) will also not hide the transgression of any of the work- ers of iniquity. I (We) did this so that many will know that our name is THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH EL; compassionate and gra- cious, long-suffering, and abundant in mercy and truth, keep- ing mercy for thousands, forgiving iniquity and transgression and sin to those who love me and take heed and observe to do what I have commanded them to do, and will by no means clear the guilty; visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, and upon the children's children, unto the third and to the fourth generation of them that hate me and lightly esteem what I have commanded them to do. (Exo 34:6-7, 20:5-6)
Verily, verily, I say unto you, I will judge my house before I judge the world of their evil.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, the Red Dragon biting off the roof of the church, what does it symbolize?
THE FATHER: The roof represents covering.
JESUS : Those who are under our covering will not be snared
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

by the fowler (Satanists) or be hurt by their curses of pesti- lences (noisome speech), or be afraid of their spirit of intimi- dation (terror by night) or accusation (arrow by day) because they abide under the shadow of the Angel of My (Our) Pres- ence who bears our name, "THE SHADDAI". But those under the covering of the conical roofed churches with unsound doctrines will be snared by the fowler (Satanists) or hurt by their curses, or be made afraid by their intimidation or accusa- tion because they abide not under the shadow of the Angel of My (Our) Presence who bears our name, "THE SHADDAI".

Psa 91:1 He that dwelleth in the secret place of the most High shall abide under the shadow of the SHADDAI. Psa 91:2 I will say of THE YAHWEH, He is my refuge and my fortress: my ELOHIM; in him will I trust. Psa 91:3 Surely he shall deliver thee from the snare of the fowler, and from the noisome pestilence (H1698 "deber" from H1696 "dabar "speech" in the sense of destroy- ing). Psa 91:4 He shall cover thee with his feathers, and under his wings shalt thou trust: his truth shall be thy shield and buckler. Psa 91:5 Thou shalt not be afraid for the terror by night; nor for the arrow that flieth by day; Psa 91:6 Nor for the pestilence that walketh in darkness; nor for the destruction that wasteth at noonday
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, the pastor whose head was bitten off by the Red Dragon, what does it symbolize?

THE FATHER: That particular person was put away by the en- emy from his leadership and was later swallowed up by the spirit of bitterness because of his misled, distorted view of me as a hard task master in demanding more works beyond what he could bear. This will lead to his defilement and separation from me which will lead to his ultimate rebellion unconscious- ly if left unchecked.
DAVID: So all the members of the church will also be attacked. In what form will they be attacked? Can you give me exam- ples, ABBA FATHER?
THE FATHER: Some will be financially robbed; physically at- tacked by sickness, diseases, and accident; spiritually attacked by hopelessness, anguish, and bitterness. Some will lose their
BEHOLD MY NAMES
faith in us, and will backslide, be defiled and finally swallowed up by the Red Dragon.

JESUS: This is due to the Right of Way Satan has through the pastor. Through his ministers who disguise as ministers of righ- teousness, Satan, through these fowler, captured the soul of the congregation and sucked them into hell through the in- vocation of curses (noisome speech) and through their Satanic hand sign and false tongues that are made and spoken in sub- tlety in front of the congregation while ministering to them. Through the Satanic hand sign and false tongue, demons of infirmities (noisome pestilences through curses in tongue), accidents, hopelessness, anguish, bitterness and spirit of un- belief (terrors by night and arrows by day) are imparted to the unwary congregation which will lead to their captivity.
David, would you like to know my judgment on my servant Kong Hee of City Harvest Church?
KONG HEE AND SUN HO

DAVID: Yes, ABBA FATHER! Recently, a lot of people are very confused about City Harvest and Kong Hee's trial. What actu- ally happened to Kong Hee? Can you enlighten us? Can you show us right from the very beginning how Kong Hee and Sun Ho ended up in this state?
The first thing I want to ask is, Is it your will for them to "CROSS OVER" to the secular world with secular music to evangelize to the world?
THE FATHER: Definitely not.

DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how come they went ahead with it? Had they not inquired from you regarding their decision? Have not Kong Hee's 3 mentors said that it was God's will by giving the same bible verses?
THE FATHER: They were deceived.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what actually happened?
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
SHEKINAIH: I see an open vision of JESUS standing in front of us holding a white board with both hands with these words: "It's a set up".
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how were they set up?

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of a man with the word "Illuminati" written on his forehead. On his table is a piece of paper with the word "New World Order" written on it. Next, I see him in- structing somebody to give him a list of all the mega-church- es in the world. Then, I see the words "City Harvest Church" are circled up with a pen together with other big churches around the world. Then, I saw these words: "Plans are being formulated".
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, may I know their plan?

SHEKINAIH: I see a high ranking Illuminati sitting on the chair in front of his table, giving documents to the 3 mentors of Kong Hee. He gave one document to Phil Pringle standing in front of him on the left, another document to AR Bernard who is standing directly in front of him, and another docu- ment to Ulf Ekman who is standing on his front right. The title of all these 3 pieces of paper is: "FORMULATED PLANS".
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, are these 3 persons Christians or not?
THE FATHER: They are wolves in sheep's skin.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you expose them so that your chil- dren may know and not be deceived by them again?

THE FATHER: Phil Pringle represents the PENTECOSTAL, AR Ber- nard represents the NEUTRAL and Ulf Ekman represents the CATHOLIC. They will be used to brainwash those who believe in them to submit to the The Babylonian Church which is un- der the New World Order of the Beast from the Sea.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is there any evidence that they are from the synagogue of Anti-Christ?
THE FATHER: If you search hard enough on the Internet, you
BEHOLD MY NAMES
can find some evidence.
DAVID: I will, ABBA FATHER! Can I know what was written on the paper they received?
SHEKINAIH: I see 3 people wearing black hooded robes with black skeleton faces chopping off Kong Hee's head.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this mean? Surely its not physical, am I right?
SHEKINAIH: I see these words: "Put Him Away".
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, so it is a plan on how they are going to put him away from leadership, am I right?
THE FATHER: That's correct.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what will happen to City Harvest Church after Kong Hee is put away?

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of Phil Pringle standing in front of Sun Ho on her left and AR Bernard standing in front of her in the center and each was holding a black remote control and these 2 remote controls' wires were linked to different or- gans of Sun Ho's body. When Phil Pringle pressed the remote, Sun Ho just moved accordingly like a puppet. I saw the words "Complete, total, 100% puppet".
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is your personal opinion regard- ing Kong Hee?
THE FATHER: Kong Hee is our most beloved, most adored, and most favored child in the whole earth.
DAVID: FATHER, your statement is a hard thing. How could anyone come to terms with this? For many will say that God is not a respecter of persons.

THE FATHER: He always pleases me and delights me and loves my commandments. He always does what I've instructed to him with great delight and thanksgiving at all times. He has a sweet spirit that is always positive regardless of what I've put him through, and he spent long hours seeking me in his earlier times. He always brings joy to my heart with sincerity,
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
guileless with singleness of heart and mind, giving his all to me. This delights me greatly.

As for those who say that I'm not a respecter of persons, they have erred in the interpretation of the scripture. I do not treat all my children equally, for I'm the righteous judge who searches the heart and try the rein and give every man accord- ing to his ways and the fruits of his doings. To the merciful I will show myself merciful; to the wholehearted I will give my all; but to the crooked I will struggle with them. (Psa 18:25-26)
David, are you now convicted?

DAVID: Yes ABBA FATHER, I'm finally at ease with your answer. If this is the case, why did you permit him to be set up by his three mentors? Couldn't you protect him? Why did you permit these things to happen to him? He and most of his supporters are thinking that they are under persecution.

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of Kong Hee and Sun Ho in their twenties kneeling down on the floor praying to THE ELOHIM. I see these words written on their hearts: "Their hearts are 100% toward THE ELOHIM".
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what happened to them in their later years? How were they deceived?
THE FATHER: In their early years, they would always seek me in fervent prayers regarding every issue, but gradually, they became less fervent.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of JESUS drawing a graph. The Y axis depicts the percentage of yieldedness and the X axis depicts the year. In the initial years of their ministry, they were 100% yielded towards THE FATHER. However, in the later years, their yieldedness declined in a 45-degree downward slope and fi- nally in a 70-degree downward slope. At the time when they were 55% yielded to THE FATHER, I saw Kong Hee and Sun Ho standing on the edge of a cliff. I saw the words "Court Case" written before them. Then, I heard JESUS saying to me, "They have two choices." I was then shown two visions:
BEHOLD MY NAMES
I saw a vision of them falling off the edge of the cliff land- ing on a rock severely injured.

I saw another vision of both our hands representing the Seven Names of THE TRINITY with the verses "Isaiah 11:1-2" in the form of light forming a spiritual staircase. I saw Kong Hee and Sun Ho walking up this spiritual staircase and finally stood before a red oriental iron door. They banged on the door with the round iron handle that was attached to it, and I saw these words: "to be continued".
JESUS: The red, oriental iron door symbolizes the Heavenly Magistrate Court's door of the Chinese Justice Bao, the Iron Face Judge.
THE FATHER: I have warned him through Shekinaih.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of myself typing a letter and send- ing it to him on 18 April 2013 warning of his imprisonment. I saw I was crying and interceding on his behalf to JESUS to re- open his case to reconsider his judgment.
These were the words JESUS wrote to him in the letter which I dictated and sent to him:
"My son, My son, Kong Hee and my daughter, Ho Yeow Sun, my heart cries and longs for you. I do not delight to put you in this situation."
I then saw JESUS tearing blood in His eyes while He sat on His throne writing these words on a piece of white paper: "Imprison him". Next, I saw him writing these words with a feather pen:

"After Shekinaih's pleading on Kong Hee's and Ho Yeow Sun's behalf, I now open the case for reconsideration. If my people who are called by my name shall humble themselves and pray and seek my face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, and will forgive their sin, and will heal their land. (2 Chro 7:14) Verily, verily, I say unto you: be really careful who you receive your counsel from, MEN (I saw it shining out) or THE ELOHIM (I saw the word "THE ELOHIM" was very small).
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
THE FATHER: Through Shekinaih, we requested him and his wife to meet up with Shekinaih and you, and we would re- consider their case.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what happened? Did he read the letter?
THE FATHER: No.
DAVID: Why didn't he read it?
SHEKINAIH: "It was too trivial in his eyes", I saw these words.
DAVID: How about his wife? What actually happened to her?
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of her in the USA. The producer and the director each have a remote control of her and these re- mote controls have strings that are linked to her organs.

DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how did they manage to control her? I understand by the Hebrew word that the kidneys figuratively represent the seat of emotion and affection, the womb fig- uratively represents compassion, the heart figuratively rep- resents the will and even the intellect, and etc.
THE FATHER: Both Sun Ho and Kong Hee have been partial- ly chipped by Satanists through spiked drinks when they at- tended one of the functions in the USA.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a man wearing a black tuxedo with these words: "Illuminati Hollywood Man" written on his body. He dissolved two packets of white powder in two wine glasses with red wine. The white powder has the word "Nanoparticles" superimposed on it. In the next vision, I saw a waiter served Kong Hee and Sun Ho these two glasses of wine and they drank it as they continued to have conver- sations with others. I saw the nanoparticles went into their stomach and entered into their bloodstreams and traveled into their hearts and brains. I also saw that both of their right brains had these nanoparticles but Sun Ho had some in her left brain as well. Next, I saw a man typed some words on the computer and hit the button "Send" to Kong Hee. After this, he also typed some words and sent them to Sun Ho. Follow- ing that, I saw the nanoparticles that were in them radiat-
BEHOLD MY NAMES
ed light in their brains suggesting to them what to do, and I also saw the particles in their hearts radiated light stirring up their emotional response.

THE FATHER: Through the vibrations of the nanoparticles in their brains and hearts, they succumbed to the suggestion and seduction of success and fame from the satanic handlers. Their handlers then proceeded to choose the outfits for Sun Ho and taught her the dance steps, movements, and the feel they wanted to come out from the dance. They portrayed her as a geisha in one of her music videos to glorify LUCIFER, MYS- TERY BABYLON THE GREAT, and THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS AND

ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH. In another music video with the satanic goat star in the background, she was dressed in black with a two horned hairdo to symbolize her as a subtle witch like Angelina Jolie in the movie "Maleficent" to symbolize her as the Bride of Satan. Satan portrayed her in this way to mock me and to boast that my favorite couple is now under their total control.

JESUS: The ultimate agenda of this conspiracy of "FORMULAT- ED PLANS" is to lead the church that is under them to com- mit spiritual adultery with the woman Mystery Babylon in the New World Order. Once Kong Hee is imprisoned, AR Bernard and Phil Pringle who are now the handlers of Sun Ho, will put into action the plan of further leavening the congregation with doctrines from the Tree of the Knowledge of Good and Evil through the spirit of world- liness to corrupt their simplicity in me and lead them to com- mit fornication with the Woman Mystery Babylon under the False Prophet (Matt 13:33, 16:6, Luk 12:1, 1 Cor 5:8-13).
DAVID: How do you feel ABBA FATHER? Why don't you put a stop to this evil deed?

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a heart inside a person wearing a white robe, and his forehead had the words "THE FATHER" written on it. I saw His heart exploded into pieces and the exploded pieces of His heart are scattered all over the floor.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
DAVID: THE FATHER'S heart exploded? I don't understand. Can't THE FATHER prevent this?
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of Satan and THE FATHER placing a bet over this couple. They threw dices to bet over them.
DAVID: So THE FATHER lost the bet.
THE FATHER: Sun Ho has a subtle idol in her heart.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the idol in her heart?
THE FATHER: To be popular and be known worldwide. This is her subtle and unspoken dream.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how about Kong Hee?

THE FATHER: He is a respecter of man. There is an inner desire in his heart to be the most influential minister in the world to impact the world with the gospel. Therefore, he seeks man's method instead of my ways of doing it. He is too busy running around, spending very little time with me in prayer, relying on the counsel of the track record of success sources. Therefore, we gave him according to the idol in his heart for permitting his heart to depart from me and trusting in man and making the flesh his arm. (Jer 17:5-10). We have permitted both of them to be deceived and be led to their destruction due to the de- ceitfulness of their hearts which no one can tell.

JESUS: In the eyes of my FATHER, a person who is a respect- er of persons is unrighteous. (Lev 19:15) My FATHER will surely reprove him who secretly is a respecter of persons. (Job 13:10) Those who are a respecter of persons and flatter others in hypocrisy will be taken away before their time. (Job 32:21-22) Those who are a respecter of persons are not walking in truth and will not teach the way of truth all the time like me but will compromise if it is to their disadvantage.(Matt 22:16) Those who are a respecter of persons sin and transgress and are guilty to be punished.(Jas 2:9) The ministers who are a respecter of per- sons in admiration because of advantages are ungodly and mock my FATHER who is not a respecter of persons.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do you think of David Yonggi Cho?
BEHOLD MY NAMES
I remember that you told me that most mega churches are infiltrated and controlled by Satan's ministers directly or in- directly.

SHEKINAIH: I see half of David Yonggi Cho's face looks like a black skeleton Satanist wearing a black hooded robe. The other half of his face looks like a normal person wearing a white hooded robe. He is 50% controlled by THE ELOHIM and 50% controlled by Satan.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you explain? I don't fully under- stand this vision.
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of various people with black hoods praying for him and their spirits flew into him. Initially, he was all white but now he is half black, half white.

JESUS: I did warn my disciples about how my kingdom is like. There will be tares who are children of the devil being secret- ly sown among the wheat who are children of THE ELOHIM. The false ministers and my true ministers will only be separat- ed during the harvest. (Matt 13:24-30) At present, most of the churches are leavened with the wrong doctrine (Matt 16:12) and the spirit of hypocrisy (Luk 12:1) which Lucifer the woman had secretly hidden in three measures of wheat meal (Mat 13:33). This explains why most ministers are not 100% controlled by us but are influenced and controlled by Lucifer in different degrees.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, so he is your son?
THE FATHER: Yes. He is.
DAVID: But he has been leavened?
THE FATHER: Confirmed. Satan now holds 50% of his remote control and JESUS holds the other 50% of his remote control through the spirits that are dwelling in him.
SHEKINAIH: I see that both THE YAHWEH JESUS and Lucifer have access to him. Each of his organs is divided into 50% black and 50% white.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why don't you warn Kong Hee through the other half of David Cho?
THE FATHER: I did, to a certain extent, but due to his busy schedule, Kong Hee couldn't hear properly even when I spoke to him. I also hinted to him through various people. Howev- er…

SHEKINAIH: I see Kong Hee in a vision standing here and he is looking at all the people who are giving him God's warnings. In his eyes, they are very small, but when he looks at another group of people, they are like giant angels wearing white. He is full of admiration for them because their bodies are made up of a multitude of small people stacking up inside them, filling up their stature.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, didn't you speak to him personally through dreams as well as through visions?
THE FATHER: They heard mixed things and saw mixed visions due to the non-clarity in both their minds and their hearts.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is their condition now?
THE FATHER: They are now 70/30. 70% black and 30% full of light in both of them.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, a lot of people criticized them on their luxurious living. What is your opinion regarding their life- style?
THE FATHER: It's indeed too lavish due to the pride of life and the fine things in life. Fame and recognition have partially blinded them to be recognized with the rich and famous.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, so what is the future for City Harvest Church?

JESUS: Bleak in my sight unless they accept my help through both of you. Otherwise, they will be derailed off the tangent of my will and be led by their two mentors to commit forni- cation with Mystery Babylon and end up tormented with fire and brimstone. (Rev 14:9-12)
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the fate of Kong Hee?
JESUS: It depends on whether he and his wife would respond to Shekinaih's letter to him this morning, dated 23rd October 2015.
DAVID: So, if they don't take the advice and go and appeal, what is the result?
SHEKINAIH: I see these words, "PRISON SENTENCE WILL BE LENGTHENED."
DAVID: By how long?
THE FATHER: Satan is demanding a maximum sentence. He is influencing the authorities to pursue to this cause.

JESUS: David, do you know the meaning why the headless body was still standing? Can you now interpret the vision of the head that was perspiring profusely as it struggled to avoid being swallowed down the throat of the Red Dragon through its saliva as his headless body in prayer posture con- tinued to pray? Do you know what the thin and light thread that joined the head and the headless body symbolize? Do you know what the power surge that broke the jaw of the Red Dragon symbolize? Can you tell me why the Red Dragon is in the stomach of the Golden Dragon and who is the Golden Dragon?"
DAVID: Oh JESUS, can you enlighten me?

JESUS: The headless body that was standing at first symbol- izes my son Kong Hee who is at present preaching without official, legal controlling right of City Harvest Church. The later prayer posture symbolizes that he is desperately praying to me that his leadership as the head/Senior Pastor shall not be completely swallowed up by the Red Dragon/Lucifer due to the moving saliva/lawsuit which is still ongoing. The thread of light attaching the headless body and the head symboliz- es his hopeful and earnest prayer. The electrical power surge that cracked the jaw of the Red Dragon symbolizes the power of true repentance if my son Kong Hee were to listen to our
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

counsel through Shekinaih and you who is my fiery phoenix. You will break the Red Dragon's jaw and get him out of be- ing swallowed into his belly for I have clothed you and Shek- inaih with a robe of righteousness and a crown of judgment to judge the Cosmoses.

Job 29:14 I put on righteousness, and it clothed me: my judg- ment was as a robe and a diadem. Job 29:15 I was eyes to the blind, and feet was I to the lame. Job 29:16 I was a father to the poor: and the cause which I knew not I searched out. Job 29:17 And I brake the jaws of the evil one, and plucked the spoil out of his teeth. Job 29:18 Then I said, I shall die in my nest, and I shall multiply my days as the phoenix (H2344 "chol" translated as phoenix according to Jewish tradition)

The Red Dragon is Lucifer and the Golden Dragon is Shekinaih. In the Book of Heaven, it is already recorded that Lucifer is subjected to Shekinaih, the Golden Empress that represents us, THE TRINITY, and we have given her full authority to decide all things on our behalf in the heavenly court.
Shekinaih, would you like to share with David what you see every morning when we instruct you to lay prostrate on your bed when you wake up?

SHEKINAIH: Every morning when I lay prostrate to bless and invite THE TRINITY and their Seven Names to arise in me, THE TRINITY would first appear before me and say, "We have aris- en in you permanently." Following that, each of the Seven Names of THE TRINITY will take turns to appear before me and say in a therapeutic, tenor voice, "We have arisen in you to do what you have requested." THE TRINITY would hold three white boards with the words "Irrevocable Approval" to seal Shekinaih's request. Hades, who would kneel in obei- sance on my left, would concurrently agree with each of the Seven Name's declaration and say with a darker voice than Darth Vader in Star Wars, "We have arisen in you to do just that". The King of Death, who would kneel in obeisance on my right, during this time would always be silent in resig- nation acknowledging what has been spoken by them. But lately, he started to speak, "I have arisen in you as well to do
BEHOLD MY NAMES
your bidding as per your request". His voice has a darker and more basso voice than the King of Hades.
DAVID: This is awesome! So, what is his fate?
THE FATHER: It depends on Kong Hee's response.
DAVID: If he won't respond to us, what is the outcome?
THE FATHER: His sentence will lengthen at this moment.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the morale of their story, this episode on Kong Hee's case and Sun Ho for the church and for the ministers? What are the lessons to be learned?

title: LESSONS TO LEARN FROM KONG HEE'S CASE

segments.text: LESSONS TO LEARN FROM KONG HEE'S CASE

THE FATHER: Do not be a respecter of man. Big congregations and famous and successful ministers are not equal to my ap- proval. One must always pray for me to send the mentors in- stead of them going around looking for a higher mentor with the physical manifestation of a bigger congregation in order to expand their church. One must always ask me for my de- tailed plan for each of their lives and their ministries, including how to expand the congregations according to my will and blueprint. My real prophets are usually the nobodies of today which most pastors will dismiss because:
They have no track record.
They are not influential.
They are nobody.
They are not comely and are despised.
They are unimpressive.
The foolish things which I ask them to do are peculiar and not acceptable to my ministers.
They are too blunt and their words are straight to the point with no bullshit, and they lack much in PR skills which my shepherds cannot accept.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

My true prophets come in these packages. That's why my shepherds and sheep who only look from their carnal eyes on the physical appearance, the size of their congregation, man- nerism, politeness, or how one carries oneself well will utterly miss my coming and counsel through these prophets/apos- tles.

However, the Satanists/goats who disguise themselves as my shepherds look very impressive and are very well behaved and non-offensive. They appear to be more loving (in disguise), us- ing psychology to win human hearts through flattery with un- truthful words and using money and influence to control my shepherds; coming with false signs and power manifestations which are not from me but look and feel like they are from me thus in subtlety deceive my sheep and my elect.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what lessons can we learn from Sun Ho's plight?
THE FATHER:
You must never have any idol in your heart, or we will per- mit you to be deceived and be led to your destruction.

You must never love the world together with its materialis- tic things more than being simple for me. One must keep their spirit man pure in order to be able to hear me accu- rately, or else, the spirit of lies will deceive you.
Take heed of my minor prophets whom we send to you because they are our true prophets; ignoring them equals signing off your demise ultimately.

DAVID: ABBA FATHER, through Kong Hee's case, how are we going to differentiate who are the real ministers and who are the wolves in sheep's skin? Does it mean that all the big churches over the world are influenced directly or indirectly by Satan?
THE FATHER: 99.999999999% are controlled by Satan either di- rectly or indirectly.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are their normal methods of infil-
BEHOLD MY NAMES
trating your church?
THE FATHER: Through associations, laying of hands, mentor- ing, counseling, impartation, financial support, etc.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where will your unfortunate son go when he dies?

THE FATHER: He will be in Level 6 of Hell/Heaven, Abraham's Creek. As far as I, THE YAHWEH, THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE, am con- cerned, he is innocent because his motive is good, and there is no greed and personal monetary gain involved. If he would humble himself and listen to my counsel through Shekinaih and Aaron K David, we would have given him the counsel to plead for mercy because he has been misled by the spirit of errors and did foolishly. I would have given him the shortest sentence, for I have the final say. Have not I spoken? I, THE YAHWEH, THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE, exercise Mercy, Justice and Righteousness in the earth. (Jer 9:23-26)
JESUS: This is in the second heaven below the third heaven Paradise.

Luk 16:22 And it came to pass, that the beggar died, and was carried by the angels into Abraham's creek (G2859 "kolpos" bay): the rich man also died, and was buried; Luk 16:23 And in hell he lift up his eyes, being in torments, and seeth Abraham afar off, and Lazarus in his creek (G2859 "kolpos" bay).
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is it right for your children to judge and condemn your misled son and his wife for their ignorance?

JESUS: It is self-righteous to be angry with your brethren when they have failed in their testing and gave an occasion for the accuser to blaspheme. Unless you do not sin at all and are im- mune from the accuser, it is better to be merciful lest you be the next to be tested. So, be merciful to them lest judgment knocks at your door and you end up in Gehenna fire with eter- nal gnashing of teeth when you yourself are accused by the Devil/Accuser in the Heavenly Tribunal.
Mat 5:21 Ye have heard that it was said by them of old time, Thou shalt not kill; and whosoever shall kill shall be in danger
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

of the judgment: Mat 5:22 But I say unto you, That whosoever is angry with his brother who fail (G1500 "eike" through the idea of failure) shall be in danger of the judgment: and whosoever shall say to his brother, Raca, shall be in danger of the council: but whosoever shall say, Thou fool, shall be in danger of Gehen- na (G1067 "geenna") hell fire.

Jas 2:10 For whosoever shall keep the whole law, and yet offend in one point, he is guilty of all. Jas 2:11 For he that said, Do not commit adultery, said also, Do not kill. Now if thou commit no adultery, yet if thou kill, thou art become a transgressor of the law. Jas 2:12 So speak ye, and so do, as they that shall be judged by the law of liberty. Jas 2:13 For he shall have judgment with- out mercy, that hath shewed no mercy; and mercy rejoiceth against judgment.
THE FATHER: JESUS, can you reveal the episode of D.G.S. Dhi- nakaran and his family to them?
D.G.S. DHINAKARAN AND PAUL DHINAKARAN
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what's wrong with D.G.S. Dhinakaran?
JESUS: David, do you know why D.G.S. Dhinakaran and his fam- ily met a terrible car accident many years ago?

THE FATHER: D.G.S. Dhinakaran was a respecter of man. He had greed in his heart. He worshipped Mammon more than me, and he didn't obey all my instructions but only some which were easier and more comfortable for him to do. His obedi- ence was conditional. I had warned him of his heart conditions and about the stronghold in his life but he had not changed.

SHEKINAIH: I saw the devil and THE FATHER making a bet on him. The devil was throwing dice over him, and I heard the devil asking from THE FATHER that if he didn't change by a certain time, then JESUS must hand him over to his hand for punishment. So JESUS did hand him over because of the "CUT OFF TIME".
