DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what were the accusations and charges that Satan had against him?
BEHOLD MY NAMES
THE FATHER: His greed and disobedience.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where is D.G.S. Dhinakaran now?
THE FATHER: He is on Level 3 of Hell/Heaven, Hades. But initial- ly, he was sent to Level 1 of Hell/Heaven, Gehenna, because of 5 reasons:
He sat under the enemy's covering in the institutional church. He knew that I detest it but he compromised.
He loves the luxury of this life more than me.
He was a stiff-necked person. He did not listen to my warn- ings and my instructions at times but only listened when it suited his style.
He was unholy in my sight. His priority in life were (in de- creasing order):
Money
Comfort
Luxury
Convenience
JESUS
He betrayed me when he betrayed my anointed.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you specify?
JESUS: When he betrayed and despised you, my son David, he betrayed and despised me.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of "$" signs written on both of Dhi- nakaran's eyes. I also saw in another vision of myself releas- ing a decree to send him to Level 1 of Hell/Heaven, which is Gehenna, while he was kneeling down weeping and crying his heart out to THE FATHER for mercy.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why must he end up in Level 1 of Hell/ Heaven, Gehenna, in the first place? What sin had he commit- ted that he deserves such a harsh punishment?
THE FATHER: All those who sit under the enemy's covering
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

will go there. I had warned him of the consequence but he ignored my warning. All those who join the Woman Mystery Babylon will be cast into Gehenna fire ultimately. All denomi- nations of Christendom, regardless of whether they are Angli- can, Pentecostal, Evangelical, etc, if they are in covenant with Mystery Babylon under the False prophet, will partake of her sin.
Rev 18:4 And I heard another voice from heaven, saying, Come out of her, my people, that ye be not partakers of her sins, and that ye receive not of her plagues.

Rev 19:20 And the beast was taken, and with him the false prophet that wrought miracles before him, with which he de- ceived them that had received the mark of the beast, and them that worshipped his image. These both were cast alive into a Lake of Fire burning with brimstone.
DAVID: Why did he die of heart and kidney ailment? Where is he now?
THE FATHER: The heart ailment symbolizes his constant rebel- lion against me in his heart. The kidney ailment symbolizes his constant striving in a tug-of-war with me in his mind.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of him, after pleading with THE FA- THER, was at last placed in Level 3 of Hell/Heaven, which is Ha- des. He was bound in iron chain, not inside an iron prison cell but in the open space. He was chained on his neck, hands and legs and his arms were hung on the arm of a rotating pole with scorching fire below him. I saw several demons piercing him on different parts of his body with long iron spears from below.

DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why do you allow such a thing to hap- pen to him? To most people, he was a saint. Who would be- lieve our report? Is it really true that once a year, he would be brought to sit in your council among the saints like Paul, Peter, etc.?
THE FATHER: Yes, in the early years of his ministry, he was brought up frequently in the spirit to heaven to be seated in my heavenly council.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, if that is true, who would believe that a man who had walked with THE ELOHIM and sat in the heaven- ly council can fall from your grace?

JESUS: Have we not spoken, "The heart is deceitful above all things, and desperately wicked: who can know it? I (We), THE YAHWEH, search the heart, try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings." (Jer 17:9-10).

Is it not stated, "Shall mortal man be more just than THE ELOAH (H433) (The Two Cherubim of Glory)? shall a man be purer than his maker? Behold, he put no trust in his servants; and his angels he charged with folly: How much less in them that dwell in houses of clay, whose foundation is in the dust, which is crushed before the moth? They are destroyed from morning to evening: they are destroyed (H6 "abad") by VICTO- RY (H5331 from H5329 "natsach" victory) without regarding it. Doth not their excellency which is in them go away? They die, even without wisdom. (Job 4:17-21).
No man or angel was purer and closer to our throne than the anointed Cherub Lucifer, and yet he fell. Why do you doubt that D.G.S. had fallen from grace?

THE FATHER: My son D.G.S. was a pampered child and did not obey what I warned him, that he shall not sit under the in- stitutional organization that is a part of the Woman Mystery Babylon. He was also covetous and esteemed Mammon more than me. Before men, he looked righteous, but in my eyes, he was an abomination.

Luk 16:13 No servant can serve two masters: for either he will hate the one, and love the other; or else he will hold to the one, and despise the other. Ye cannot serve THE ELOHIM and Mammon. Luk 16:14 And the Pharisees also, who were covet- ous, heard all these things: and they derided him. Luk 16:15 And he said unto them, Ye are they which justify yourselves before men; but THE ELOHIM knoweth your hearts: for that which is highly esteemed among men is abomination in the sight of THE ELOHIM.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, do you really want me to reveal the true fate of D.G.S. Dhinakaran in this book?

JESUS: My son David, are you prepared to be hated by the world? Are you ready to be separated from the majority of the people in Christendom and be reproached by them, casting out your name as evil for my sake and for truth's sake?

DAVID: JESUS, where can I go? For you have the word of eter- nal life. You have captivated me with your truth. I have for- saken all, and for your sake, I have borne reproach ever since I gave up everything to follow you. Shame and contempt have covered my face, and I am a scorn and a derision to my loved ones, friends, and your children. You have broken and crushed my heart, and tears have been my meat day and night and my groaning is not hidden from you in the night season. All these years of persecution wherever I went have not stopped me from trusting you. Yes, if this is your will, I will speak the truth.
JESUS: I am glad to hear that. Great shall be your reward if you continue to walk in truth and be not a respecter or a fearer of men.

Luk 6:22 Blessed are ye, when men shall hate you, and when they shall separate you from their company, and shall reproach you, and cast out your name as evil, for the Son of man's sake. Luk 6:23 Rejoice ye in that day, and leap for joy: for, behold, your reward is great in heaven: for in the like manner did their fa- thers unto the prophets. Luk 6:24 But woe unto you that are rich! for ye have received your consolation. Luk 6:25 Woe unto you that are full! for ye shall hunger. Woe unto you that laugh now! for ye shall mourn and weep. Luk 6:26 Woe unto you, when all men shall speak well of you! for so did their fathers to the false prophets.

THE FATHER: Yes, I want you to tell the truth and nothing but the truth. This is for the sake of those who do not know the seriousness when they compromise and commit spiritual for- nication with the Woman Mystery Babylon. Fear them not for there is nothing covered that shall not be revealed; and hid- den that shall not be known. What we tell you to speak, pro-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

claim boldly, for we are with you and those who come against you will be like the grass that withereth, and like the flower that fadeth before you: but you shall stand for ever. You shall straighten my people, exalt my humble ones, and every proud and lofty shall you make low: and the crooked shall you make straight, and rend asunder the dubious.

Mat 10:26 Fear them not therefore: for there is nothing covered, that shall not be revealed; and hid, that shall not be known. Mat 10:27 What I tell you in darkness, that speak ye in light: and what ye hear in the ear, that preach ye upon the housetops. Mat 10:28 And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in Gehenna.

JESUS: Yes, it is time to unfold my mysterious judgment about the fate of my son D.G.S. Dhinakaran because many of my ministers do not fear us and take our name, "THE YAHWEH THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE", seriously. They have made themselves en- emies of us without realizing it because of the idols in their hearts. Therefore, I surrendered them to my enemy to be de- ceived and led with a reprobate mind and a hardened heart to their destruction. Other than being punished with mis- fortune, disease and sickness in this life, unexpected punish- ments await them in perdition to them that love to wallow in the lust of the flesh, and the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life in this world. Because of my FATHER'S long-suffering hop- ing to lead them to repentance, his sentences against them are not executed speedily. Therefore, they continue in their lawlessness and unrighteousness and prosper through their gifts which are not instantly taken back. My son D.G.S. Dhina- karan is a classic example of how the heart is deceitful above all things, and incurable: who can know it? I (We), THE YAH- WEH, search the heart, try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings. (Jer 17: 9-10) The fruits that the people in Christendom are look- ing for in a ministry or a minister are fame, riches, and good report, but the fruits that my FATHER is looking in His real ser- vants are love out of a pure heart and of a good conscience and faith unfeigned.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
Job 31:3 Is not calamity (H343 "eyd" misfortune) to the wicked? and a strange (H5235 "neker") punishment to the workers of in- iquity?
Ecc 8:11 Because sentence against an evil work is not executed speedily, therefore the heart of the sons of Adam is fully set in them to do evil.
Jas 4:4 Ye adulterers and adulteresses, know ye not that the friendship of the world is enmity with THE ELOHIM? whosoev- er therefore will be a friend of the world is the enemy of THE ELOHIM.

Mat 7:22 Many will say to me in that day, THE YAHWEH, THE YAH- WEH, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out devils? and in thy name done many wonderful works? Mat 7:23 And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work lawlessness (G458 "anomia").
LESSON TO LEARN FROM D.G.S. DHINAKARAN'S FATE
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what can we learn from your dealing with this man?
THE FATHER:
You must not look at the other person's purse, how thick their wallet is, or their financial ability to support you when I ask you to work with them.
You must not sit under the covering of those who are part of the woman Mystery Babylon, the Great Harlot.
You must not love this world and its luxurious comfort more than loving and obeying my instructions to change.

You must understand that conditional obedience is equal to non-obedience at all in my sight. Those who practice this are barred from even reaching Level 5 of Hell/Heaven, the bright side of planet Abaddon, after they die.
You must not be a respecter of man, for I detest of this and will surely...
SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a spirit man of a person who
BEHOLD MY NAMES

was very tall in the form of light, and THE FATHER flattened him with his two palms and I heard THE FATHER speaking in Mandarin, "da hui yuan xing," if a person doesn't repent af- ter repeated warnings. This is a Chinese idiom which liter- ally means "beaten back to the original shape", figuratively means "hit back to their humble beginning".
PAUL DHINAKARAN
THE FATHER: My SON JESUS, I think it is also the time to reveal the true nature of my son, Paul Dhinakaran.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what's wrong with Paul Dhinakaran?

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision with the word "Fake" written on his forehead and the word "Hypocrite" written on his body and the back of his mind has the word "Money" written. When he prayed, it's a fake prayer; and when he pleaded for the people, at the back of his head had the words "Remember Money".
JESUS: Yes, this is what I have shown Shekinaih. When he dies, he will go to Level 2 of Hell/Heaven, Perdition.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why are you still permitting healing through him?
THE FATHER: It's for my people's sake.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do you have to say about him that we can learn?
JESUS: Be crucified in the flesh and imitate me, then you should be fine.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are his strongholds?
THE FATHER: Gluttony, luxurious life, greed, insincerity, hypoc- risy, fake, love for this world more than love for me.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are his charges by Satan before your heavenly court?
THE FATHER: His charges are:
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
He is covetous
He is materialistic
He loves luxurious life and gluttony more than me.
He evil speaks always, especially against my anointed and will not go unpunished.
SHEKINAIH: I see in a vision of JESUS pointing his finger at you, saying: "You are my anointed."

THE FATHER: 5) He is boastful and full of duplicity, putting on a mask to deceive my people using my name in vain to portray a saintly, godly character for himself but in reality he sheds crocodile's tears.
SHEKINAIH: I see a crocodile superimposed on him and when he cries, I see the words "crocodile's tears".
THE FATHER: 6) He is a great respecter of man.
SHEKINAIH: I see in a vision that he walks with his nose held high up in the air.
THE FATHER:
He is prideful and arrogant.
He has a lying spirit
He is full of hypocrisy
He has a critical spirit
He is full of envy (Jealousy spirit)
He has a mocking spirit
He is full of confusion and could not differentiate what is real and what is false from me; undiscerning in all his ways.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is his judgment?

THE FATHER: I will warn him through diseases and illness. If he still does not repent on his sick bed, I will shorten his life. He will be put in Level 2 of Hell/Heaven, Perdition, if he remains unrepentant.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

title: TAN KHIAN SENG, A TEACHER/PROPHET IN SINGAPORE

segments.text: TAN KHIAN SENG, A TEACHER/PROPHET IN SINGAPORE
THE FATHER: JESUS, Let's reveal the impending judgment on Dr Tan Khian Seng.

DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what about Dr Tan? Why did you permit him to be bitten by a centipede which resulted in his foot being amputated? Why did he die before his time and where did he go after his death? What are his charges in the heav- enly court by Satan?

THE FATHER: He was bitten because I permitted his early death before his time due to his unclean walk before me. The cen- tipede represents "unclean/death spirit". He was allotted to Level 3 of Hell/Heaven, Hades, when he died.

SHEKINAIH: On the fourth morning after he passed away, I saw an open vision of the guard of Hades brought him to me, and he knelt down before me with his two hands chained behind. I then saw a white scroll tied with a red ribbon from heaven fell into my hand and when I opened it, I saw the word "Lev- el 3, Hades" written on it. I then released the decree to the guard and commanded him to bring Dr Tan to Hades. Upon hearing his sentence, I saw him pleading with THE TRINITY in me to send him to a higher level of Hell/Heaven. I saw THE TRINITY nodded their heads to give me the liberty to decide on his case. I then gave him the following conditions to be fulfilled through his loved ones before we can consider his plead:

All his loved ones must repent for their false accusation against Shekinaih and Aaron K David, our true prophets. They must personally come to apologize to them and bring fruit worthy of their sincere repentance.
They must undo the damage they have caused because of their evil speaking toward my representatives Shekinaih and Aaron K David.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what was Satan's accusations against Dr Tan in the heavenly court?
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
THE FATHER: There were 7 accusations against him:
He was a false teacher and a compromised prophet. He taught psychology instead of teaching my words.
He manipulated my people using psychology to make his ends meet.
He sat under the covering of organizations that are con- trolled by Satan.
He was not a real son for he was full of hypocrisy and did not practice what he taught.
He was unholy.
He was rebellious.
He was full of deceit.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is happening to him in Level 3 of Hell/Heaven, Hades?
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision that he is locked up in an iron prison cell with burning fire and demons are piercing his body with spears.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, so Level 3 of Hell/Heaven, Hades, is like this?
THE FATHER: Some sections are worse than this with more piercing, while some receive less piercing from the demons.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are the lessons to be learned from your judgment on this man?
THE FATHER:
You must never take my name in vain by using psychology to manipulate others to make ends meet for I, THE YAHWEH, will not hold he that taketh my name in vain guiltless. (Exo 20:7)

You must never evil speak against my true prophets/anoint- ed because I swear that I will never spare those who criticize or evil speak against them. When they go from one nation to another, from one kingdom to another people; I, THE YAH-
BEHOLD MY NAMES
WEH, suffer no man to do them wrong: yea, I will reprove kings for their sakes; Saying, Touch not mine anointed, and do my prophets no harm. (Psa 105:13-15)
Your heart's motive must be right in everything that you do or say, or else your judgment will be more severe than it is called for.
SHEKINAIH: I see JESUS weighing a person's heart.
THE FATHER: 4) You must not teach false doctrines in place of my true doctrines, thereby leading my sheep astray.
CHURCHES THAT COME UNDER JUDGMENT

JESUS: David, I will now reveal to you how we will begin our judgment on our churches. I will first deal with all my min- isters first worldwide, then, their second tier leadership, and then the rest of their congregation. Here are some of the min- isters that will be under our judgment which I want you and Shekinaih to warn. Now, I will reveal to you the spiritual condi- tion and my judgment on those medium sized churches that were symbolized by their height which were half the height of the tallest church (City Harvest Church). These churches are also worldly churches with unsound doctrines as symbolized by their cone-shaped roofs. They are:
New Creation Church
Light House Evangelism
Faith Community Baptist Church (FCBC)
Worldwide churches and so on.
JOSEPH PRINCE OF NEW CREATION
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why are you judging Joseph Prince of New Creation?
THE FATHER: He has been chipped 100% by the enemy.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of how it happened. Five years ago, the enemy had put a thin sheet of 3 mm x 5 mm RFID chip on the right side of his brain. I saw a person wearing black hood inserting that chip into his right brain while he was ly- ing down on an operating table. I then saw another vision of the words "3 years ago" written on a wine glass containing a pink juice that looked like fruit punch. I saw someone putting nanoparticles in his drink and the nanoparticles went into his left brain.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you enlighten us?

SHEKINAIH: While he was lying down on the operating table, and there was a man in a black hooded robe standing behind his head. I saw this guy holding a black laser gun and beamed blue laser light on his head to open his skull. After that, I saw a doctor wearing white putting a slice of a chip into his brain. Then, the black hooded Satanist used another laser gun and beamed another colored light on the open wound and the wound was healed immediately like nothing ever happened.
DAVID: Was he unconscious when they did this to him? Was he drugged?
THE FATHER: He was drugged.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where did this take place?
SHEKINAIH: I see him in a vision that he was in some public gathering event, like a night party. He was wearing a black suit.
DAVID: Where was it?
SHEKINAIH: I see the words "UK/US". I see the words "UK chipped, US nanoparticles".
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why don't they chip him at one place? Why must they chip him twice at different places?
THE FATHER: He was spiritually too strong to be controlled 100% at one go.
DAVID: So they chipped him first, then they used nanoparti-
BEHOLD MY NAMES
cles to control his rational thinking.
THE FATHER: The first chip is only able to control half of his brain - his right brain. The nanoparticles were later introduced to control his left brain.
DAVID: So, through the RFID chip, they controlled his emo- tion in his right brain and then 2 years later, through the nanoparticles, they influenced his reasoning in his left brain by suggestion.
JESUS: That's right.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, so what is the enemy's agenda for Jo- seph Prince and New Creation Church?
THE FATHER: To be part of the Woman Mystery Babylon.
DAVID: What is the fate of Joseph Prince? While he is alive and after he dies, what will happen to him?
THE FATHER: He is now a 100% controlled puppet by the Illu- minati. They will terminate him at some point in time.
DAVID: Why would they terminate him, if he is 100% con- trolled by them?
THE FATHER: He is quite daring and rebellious at times.
DAVID: So, when they can no longer control him, they will terminate him by activating the chip for the kill.
JESUS: That's right.
DAVID: Won't they lose the control and influence on the churches that follow him?
JESUS: They will clone him and continue to use him to influ- ence others into error.
DAVID: So, where will he go when he dies?
SHEKINAIH: I see these words, "He is supposed to go to Level 5 of Hell/Heaven, the bright side of planet Abaddon".
But now, I see the light on Level 3 of Hell/Heaven, Hades, and Level 5, the bright side of planet Abaddon, lighting up alter-
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
nately. I reckon where he will go depends on his will to re- pent in the future so that THE FATHER can disable the influ- ence of the chip.
DAVID: Why, ABBA FATHER, did you permit him to be chipped? What are the charges against him that you permitted such a thing to happen to him?
THE FATHER: There are 50 charges against him but I will tell you only 15 main charges.
He is proud, arrogant, and haughty due to his knowledge of what he considers as revelations.
He is in self-delusion for he mixes my love versus my ap- proval of everything he did.
He is always envious of others and always put people down.
He evil speaks often against my true prophets.
He is an impatient man.
He is a disobedient child.
He loves the world with its luxurious comfort together with the fine things in life more than me.
He shows disrespect to me by mocking at my children and despising them. What he did to them, he did unto me.
He scoffs at others and elevates himself above others even to me.
He has a confused Theology.
He permits Lucifer's teaching to creep into my teaching by over emphasizing on wealth and its creation.
He is covetous.
He has a high and mighty spirit like Lucifer.
He is unholy and lives an unsanctified life.
He despises my warnings and instructions unto holiness.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what can we learn from your judgment on Joseph Prince?
THE FATHER:
You must refrain from being haughty and arrogant and over critical to others by exalting yourself and putting oth- ers down.
You must never boast, or I will make sure you will have nothing left to boast about yourself.
You must never judge another unless you are appointed as a judge by me; otherwise ten times more judgment awaits you.
You must refrain from your frivolous, unnecessary spend- ing as this will create a false doctrine about prosperity to my people.
You must not indulge yourself in overly stated (branded) material things and be filled with the pride of life, lest your love for me waxes cold eventually.
RONY TAN AND LIGHTHOUSE EVANGELISM
THE FATHER: It is the kairos time now for me to reveal to you the episode of Lighthouse Evangelism and its pastors.
DAVID: Yes ABBA FATHER, your servant is listening.
(THE FATHER then nods His head at JESUS to release the unction for Him to share.)

JESUS: We will reveal to you now the intrinsic details of Light- house Evangelism church in Singapore. Satan has won their case over the main leaders of this church. Therefore, I have handed these leaders to Satan for progressive disciplinary ac- tion which will lead to their great disasters one day. I have ap- proved Satan to remove the 3 main leaders of their church by shortening their lives. Therefore, Satan is plotting their de- struction through evil enchantment to disable the power of this church in me.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why are you permitting Satan to de- stroy your ministers in this church? Aren't they righteous ministers?
THE FATHER: I permitted this to happen because:

They had persecuted you despite me showing to them that you are my anointed and my prophet Elijah. My ven- geance is now on them. King David in the Bible knew that it was a serious sin to persecute our anointed regardless whether they fell out of our grace or not. No one shall be guiltless if they hurt them (1 Sam 24:10, 1 Sam 26:9, 2 Sam 19:21). They shall surely be put to death when their iniquity is full for they are touching our nerves, our sons. What more to those who touch the Angel of My (Our) Presence? They will all suffer worse than the fate of Nabal who despised David (1 Sam 25:38) and Shimei who cursed and threw stones at Da- vid (2 Sam 16:13, 1 Ki 2:44-46). Even the Amalekite who claimed to have killed King Saul, the rejected anointed of THE YAH- WEH, was not spared by David (2 Sam 1:16).

These are the presumptuous, lawless ministers who de- spite my HOLY SPIRIT'S constant striving with them to move in my ways. They continue to use their rational mind to make most of their decisions. They keep on grieving my Spirit and are unwilling to accept my change. They are a bunch of stiff-necked people who refuse to forsake their carnal way of thinking. Instead of spiritually grounded in me through their yielding to my spirit in every aspect of their lives, their faith is based on the carnal mind.

SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS pointing to this bible verse "My Spirit shall not always strive with men. There will be a cut off time." I saw JESUS wrote the words "Payback Time". I then saw JE- SUS, holding a stopwatch and pressed "Stop, Cut Off Line, Pay Back Time" button. Then, I saw THE TRINITY wearing white seated next to each other in front of a long table and I saw these words written on a white piece of paper "It's Time".
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how will it happen?
BEHOLD MY NAMES
THE FATHER: Satan has asked for them and I have surrendered them to him. He has asked for the permission to strike Rony Tan with a stroke & a heart attack and Clarence Goh with a car accident.
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of a man bleeding from the head sitting motionless in front of a car that got smashed in the front.

THE FATHER: As for Henry Lee, Satan has asked permission to strike him with cancer. In addition, Satan has also requested for Rony Tan's brother, Randy Tan, to have an early death due to incurable sickness. These are the current judgments for them in heaven. If they remain unrepentant, it will be worse, for sure. However, if they were to repent and bring fruits wor- thy of repentance before their (striking point) time, we will show mercy and reduce their current sentence.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, are the miracles from you in the first place?
THE FATHER: 50/50.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do you mean? Can you explain a bit more in detail so that people can understand?

THE FATHER: Their miracle rally is a mixture of both partial working of THE HOLY SPIRIT and partial energizing of the de- mons of false healing. In Rony Tan, 50% of his spirit man is black and 50% is white.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of him in the pulpit stretching out his hands to pray. I saw half of his face and body was a skele- ton man wearing black Satanist hooded robe and the other half of his body was a normally faced man wearing a white hooded robe. I saw the white being and the black being flew out from his spirit man into every person in the congrega- tion. THE YAHWEH JESUS then zoomed in my vision so that I could look at the person's skin at cellular level. I saw in the cell nucleus that there was a coiling black snake which was surrounded by the cell membrane which was in the form of light. The black area has the word "unhealed" and the light
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
area has the word "healed". So, it's partial healing with the root of the disease still lingering there.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do you think of using famous sing- ers to draw the crowd to the church?
THE FATHER: My church has no need of famous, ungodly, and worldly people from outside to usher my people into my kingdom. I alone am the drawing factor.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, then why are healing still happening in Light House Evangelism?
THE FATHER: People are desperately looking for my healing, and I will continue to show my compassion despite the law- lessness of my servants, for I am long-suffering.
DAVID: So, what is the fate of these pastors after they die if they remain unrepentant?
THE FATHER: They will go to either Level 2 of Hell/Heaven, called Perdition or Level 3 of Hell/Heaven, called Hades.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what lessons can we learn from your judgment on the pastors from Light House Evangelism?
THE FATHER:
You must never persecute my true anointed or despise my true prophets and their warnings.
You must never be stiff-necked and continue to strive with my HOLY SPIRIT, for my Spirit will not always strive with men, and there is a cut off point/time.
You must never invite unclean men/women which are perceived as famous into your church/house, or else, the whole batch of dough (church) will be defiled.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
LAWRENCE KONG OF FCBC
JESUS: Now, we will reveal to you our judgment on Lawrence Kong of Faith Community Baptist Church.

THE FATHER: He is at least more upright than most of my law- less sons. He is a very active child who can hardly sit still to seek me. He is a "Busy Martha". He is quite a disciplined man. He is disliked by people in general due to his outspoken na- ture and his quick to judge attitude.
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of him pointing his finger at the con- gregation in different directions, demanding things to be done in his ways like in the military.
THE FATHER: But not all his ways are mine.
DAVID: What are his wrong ways, where did he learn it?
THE FATHER: G12.
DAVID: Where is G12 from?
SHEKINAIH: I see the words "South America". G12 means 12 disciples.
DAVID: What wrong with G12?

THE FATHER: The G12 structure is not meant for his church be- cause it is inappropriate due to the enforcement using force- ful methods. It drives away my true disciples. His leaders were not ready. As a result, it opened many doors for the enemy to attack its sheep.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what about his Magic of Love?
THE FATHER: The Magic of Love is a deception. It is not my idea. It is a very shallow way of bringing people to me and not the best way.
DAVID: What is the best way?

THE FATHER: Through prayer, my angels will do the work for them. Through praise and worship from a sincere heart that will open the door of heaven and I will release my angels to their congregations and I will multiply their salvations.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

Through travailing for lost souls to be snatched out of the kingdom of darkness into the rock of THE ELOHIM. Through sincere sharing of your love by praying for them and genu- ine care and concern for them by loving them passionately and loving me wholeheartedly. I have differently formulated plans for different churches because each church has its own unique calling in me and not all are equal in terms of their ap- proach to evangelism as well.
DAVID: So what do you think of his endorsement as an apos- tle by Peter Wagner?
SHEKINAIH: I see these words, "Invalid Endorsement".
DAVID: Is he called to be an apostle?
THE FATHER: Yes, he is.
DAVID: So, he is endorsed by the wrong person.
THE FATHER: That is correct. He is called to be a Mini-Elijah and to be part of the 7,000 Two Witnesses.
DAVID: Will he make it?
THE FATHER: My son has to come out of Peter Wagner's cover- ing. If not, he will never make it.
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of JESUS writing on the greenboard: Peter Wagner = False Apostle.
DAVID: What are his chances?
SHEKINAIH: I saw these words, "Higher chance".
DAVID: Where will he go when he dies?
THE FATHER: He has the potential to be on Level 7 of Hell/ Heaven, Paradise, if he join us in both of you.
DAVID: That means he will die as a martyr?
THE FATHER: Yes, but he will be resurrected.
DAVID: Will he warn his people not to be a part of the Woman Mystery Babylon?
BEHOLD MY NAMES
THE FATHER: He is the most outspoken concerning his stand.
DAVID: That's good. That means he will not be part of Mystery Babylon, am I right?
THE FATHER: It is unlikely that he will join. He is one of my bet- ter children.
DAVID: So, of all the three Mega Churches' pastors, he is still better than the rest, right?
THE FATHER: He has more conviction than the rest.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, will Light House Church commit spiritu- al fornication with the woman Mystery Babylon?
THE FATHER: Yes, they will. They are a bunch of practical lead- ers who seek to survive in this worldly system.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, do you have any more word regarding Lawrence Kong?
THE FATHER: Lawrence Kong is a Wheat/Barley.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what charges have Satan raised against him in the Heavenly Court?
THE FATHER: These are the charges:
He is too boastful.

He is insensitive to his congregation's needs and reactions to his demand and implements his plans based on his inter- pretation of what is best for the church to grow. As a result, many left his congregation and those who are left behind are still grumbling and are unhappy and unsettled in their hearts.

He is too active and cannot sit still to hear my instructions. He has no time for me at all. He is full of activities. As a result of this nature of his, he has missed me quite a bit, which resulted in his misinterpretation of my instructions for him to do.
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of him wearing a white, long sleeved shirt in a hurry leaving his house before THE FATHER could open His mouth to talk to him.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
THE FATHER:
He lords over my sheep without love and many complain, grumble, and have no joy in their face in my house.
He is quick to criticize others harshly and lacking in meek- ness of love.
He interpreted his worldly methods wrongly as my backup for his endorsement for evangelism. It can be done in many other ways.
He is always having a tug of war with me about my ways and his ways. This results in a lot of unnecessary headache for him and his congregation.

He talks a lot but listens little. He needs to listen to me more than he talks. He needs to talk slowly and patiently and let his congregation digest his point and chew his words so that their spirit men can be strengthened and be edified and well nourished.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what lessons can we learn from your judgment on Lawrence Kong?
THE FATHER:
You must treat my people with respect.
You must show more love because I am Love.
You must not be overly harsh with my sheep, otherwise, they will perceive me as their tyrant.
You must be patient with them as I am patient with you.
You must spend time alone to pray more with me instead of going about with your activity without me in the midst of it which will lead to a futile effort.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
BENNY HINN
JESUS: David, now I will reveal to you what judgment awaits my son, Benny Hinn.

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision that the left side of his face is full of light but his right side is a black skeleton wearing a black hooded robe. When he prays, light beams out from the left part of his body but black smoke also comes out from the right side of his body.
DAVID: Do you really heal through him?
SHEKINAIH: I saw that the healing angels healed the deafness of a particular woman. "It's a partial healing, and the healing doesn't last," I heard JESUS said.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where did he receive the anointing?
THE FATHER: 50% of his anointing is from me and the other 50% is from Kathryn Kuhlman who was a witch.

SHEKINAIH: I saw black smoke going into him and covered half of his body, and he thought he had received the anoint- ing of Kathryn Kuhlman. I saw in his miracle meeting that some were false and some were real healing. I saw a light in the form of a figure came out from the left side of his body and dark figures came out from the right side of his body and went into the sick. The spirits of infirmity came out of the sick but later went back again to the sick that was presumed to be healed. When JESUS comes down, the healing is 100%, but if it is through healing angels, it is only partial.
DAVID: What charges are now against him, and what judg- ment awaits him?
THE FATHER: These are the charges:
He is proud and arrogant and lacks respect for my people. He is too abrupt in his speech and too sharp in his comments. Therefore, his speech cuts people's heart unnecessarily with- out love.
He has a high and mighty spirit which springs out from Lu- cifer's root. If it is not uprooted, he will become a full grown
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
Lucifer incarnated.

He is too quick to judge and criticize. Therefore, he passed judgment on my people before my time with his untimely words which I authorized him not; and these people are cry- ing out to me for their vindication.
SHEKINAIH: I see Benny Hinn in rage, holding a saber, chop- ping the heads of many people wearing white robes. This is due to the influence of Satan who controls 50% of him,
THE FATHER:
His temperamental, emotional outburst due to lack of self-control defiles many and stumbles my children unneces- sarily. He pushes many of my people from behind to fall off the cliff.
He is wise in his own eyes, doing many things without con- sulting me and is presumptuous in his ways.
He has a critical spirit and is always pointing his fingers at others.
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of him pointing his finger at differ- ent directions from the pulpit at the crowd.
THE FATHER:
He is too boastful and over exaggerates my manifestations.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what will happen to him?
THE FATHER: He will be demoted, disgraced, and humiliated if he does not repent on the above accusations that are against him.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is his fate?
THE FATHER: He will end up in Level 5 of Hell/Heaven, the bright side of planet Abaddon.
DAVID: What is the reason for him going to Level 5 of Hell/ Heaven?
THE FATHER: His sincere faith in me.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: Why does he not end up in Level 7 of Hell/Heaven, Par- adise?
THE FATHER: It is because he is only partially holy.

JESUS: Only those who are not defiled with the Woman Mys- tery Babylon and have not committed spiritual adultery with her by loving the things in the world; but remain as spiritu- al virgins in singleness towards me and without guile in their mouth and without spot or blemishes in their spirit, can go to Paradise. (Rev 14: 4-5)
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are the lesson we can learn from your judgment on Benny Hinn?
THE FATHER:
You must not be arrogant when you have my anointing or else I will permit great persecution to come your way to humble you (thorn in your flesh as in 2 Cor 12:1-7).
You must not fake my healing when there is none in some cases, for this will bring shame to my name and I will re- duce your ministry's glory.
You must not agree or bow down to the control of Satan in your life or you will be utterly destroyed in the end.
You must respect my creation or else no respect will be shown to you as well.
You must not criticize any one or else you will be criticized twenty times more.
You must not indulge in lavish living and great indulgence in material possession and luxurious comfort, for it will cor- rupt you.
You must not judge or criticize others unless I permit you to do so, otherwise, you will be judged greatly and fall into Gehenna fire.
You must not put people down or else I will personally put you down.
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN
RICK JOYNER
JESUS: David, we will now reveal to you our judgment on our son, Rick Joyner of Morningstar Ministries.
DAVID: So, Rick Joyner is one of the morning stars in Heavenly Mount Zion before the foundation of the earth? (Job 38:7)
THE FATHER: Yes, he was... until he was bought over by the reptiles.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why did he permit himself to be knight- ed? Does not he know the dire consequence?
THE FATHER: He did it for instant fame. He has an idol in his heart since the privileges are too attractive to resist.

SHEKINAIH: I saw in a vision that these people had put nanoparticles in his drinks. I saw red particles from his drink went into his blood stream from his stomach wall and then light radiated into his heart and brain. I then saw somebody sitting in front of the computer typing some words and blue light beamed out from these nanoparticles and went into his brain and heart, influencing his mind and heart. I then saw these words: "He compromised for fame's sake and was will- ing to be knighted".
DAVID: So, ABBA FATHER, all the famous and influential true ministers have been chipped, am I right?

THE FATHER: You are right to a certain extent. Only those whose hearts are pure and holy without the stain of sin in their lives will Satan have no hold in their lives (he cannot touch them). Therefore, one must ask me for the grace of pu- rity and to be completely holy with all sincerity of their heart so that they will be spared from being controlled by the ene- my even though being chipped.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of Rick Joyner inside an iron bird cage which a queen is holding. Next, I saw a long, white haired, cute puppy and the queen was stroking it. I saw the word "Rick Joyner" was written on the puppy.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are the lessons we can learn from your judgment on Rick Joyner?
THE FATHER:
Never compromise me with the Reptile's head or else doom is for you.
Never be under any organization without my permission or else your ministry will be destroyed and your life will be short- ened by a tragic death.
Do not associate with the goat or else you will be stained with their sins in your spirit man.
SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a sheep and a goat associating with one another. Next, I saw the goat's spirit superimposed on certain parts of the spirit of the sheep.
THE FATHER:
Remember, much is given, much is required, and you will be judged more severely.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is his fate?

THE FATHER: He will be sent to Tartarus after he passes away, for it is impossible for those who were once enlightened, and have tasted the heavenly gift, and were made partakers of THE HOLY GHOST, and have tasted the good word of THE ELO- HIM, and the powers of the age to come, if they shall fall away, to renew them again unto repentance; seeing they crucify to themselves the Son of THE ELOHIM afresh, and put him to an open shame. For the earth which drinketh in the rain that cometh oft upon it, and bringeth forth herbs meet for them by whom it is dressed, receiveth blessing from THE ELOHIM: but that which beareth thorns and briers (children of Belial 2 Sam 23:6-7) is rejected, and is nigh unto cursing; whose end is to be burned. (Heb 6:4-8, 2Pe 2:1-4)
JUDGMENT MUST BEGIN

title: THOSE WHO JOIN THE WOMAN MYSTERY BABYLON

segments.text: THOSE WHO JOIN THE WOMAN MYSTERY BABYLON
JESUS: David, we will now reveal to you the condition of Chris- tianity in general and what the judgment is going to be.
THE FATHER: The current church's condition is very pathetic. More than 90% of my churches will be judged severely unless they repent. My church has been presumptuous all this while.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, in what way?

THE FATHER: In their perverted doctrines which have misled many of my sheep to move out of my will for their lives. Their doctrines are merely man made instead of revelation from me. They did not seek me for them, but accepted everything that is being taught by Theological Seminars which cause them to err from my real, living words. As a result, their lives haven't changed much and are not transformed into my image at all. Since my grace period is over and my judgment season has begun, all will be confronted to change or be disposed of.

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of JESUS taking an ax and started to chop off rows and rows of trees which were lined up like as in a rubber plantation. The trees have the names: "Ministers of Unrighteousness" superimposed on them.

JESUS: Every tree which does not bear the Peaceable Fruits of Righteousness of Total Obedience of Faith will be hewn down and thrown into the everlasting fire. They shall be cursed like the fig tree that bears no fruit and be disposed before their time. (Matt 3:10, 21:19, Luk 13:6-9)

THE FATHER: Therefore, awake thou, my shepherds, from your slumber, your error, your self-delusion, and your confusion. Stop seeking the easier way out instead of spending time seeking me. All who commit spiritual adultery with the Wom- an Mystery Babylon will end up in perdition or Gehenna. Again I say, for the time is come and judgment must begin at my house before I judge the Cosmoses.
CHAPTER 3
THE SEVEN ANGELS
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the above diagram which Shekinaih saw symbolize?

JESUS: These seven legs represent my seven spirits whom we will pour out our seven thunder message of judgment in sub-categories and sub-execution power to release the dreadful last days sounding of our sub-horns. They are our seven eyes that run to and fro throughout the whole earth to demonstrate our severity on behalf of them whose heart is perfect towards us. The red shoes they are wearing symbolize the treading on the winepress of the great and dreadful Day of THE YAHWEH'S righteous justice which is powered by the wrath of THE EL SHADDAI. These are the Seven Angels of the Book of Revelation who will sub-execute my judgment in the Day of THE YAHWEH.
2Ch 16:9 For the eyes of THE YAHWEH run to and fro throughout
THE SEVEN ANGELS
the whole earth, to demonstrate our severity (H2388 "khawzak" to make severe) in the behalf of them whose heart is perfect toward him.

THE FATHER: We, THE TRINITY, all bear the name, "THE YAH- WEH", in different realms in heaven. Those who are the Spiri- tual Israel are to remember this truth, that is: THE YAHWEH our ELOHIM is one YAHWEH.
Deu 6:4 Hear, O Israel: THE YAHWEH our ELOHIM is one YAHWEH: Deu 6:5 And thou shalt love THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM with all thine heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy might.
1Jn 5:7 For there are three that bear record in heaven, the Fa- ther, the Word, and the Holy Ghost: and these three are one.
JESUS: I send the Angel of THE YAHWEH to speak and act on our behalf. He was sent to instruct John to write the Book of Revelation.

Rev 1:1 The Revelation of JESUS CHRIST, which THE ELOHIM gave unto him, to shew unto his servants things which must shortly come to pass; and he sent and symbolized it by his angel unto his servant John:

In this angel's right hand are seven stars which symbolize the Seven Messengers of the last days' Seven Churches. The An- gel of THE YAHWEH has two roles: he is the Seventh Executing Angel as well as my representative. The Book of Revelation is about him being the chief co-leader of the Seven Angels of the Seven Last Days' congregations.

Rev 1:19 Write the things which thou hast seen, and the things which are, and the things which shall be hereafter; Rev 1:20 The mystery of the seven stars which thou sawest in my right hand, and the seven golden candlesticks. The seven stars are the messengers of the seven churches: and the seven candlesticks which thou sawest are the seven churches.
THE ANGEL OF THE YAHWEH

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of you, David, like a giant angel wear- ing a white robe whose long white trains wrapped up the globe. Your height is up to the height of a heavenly throne from the Earth's realm.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

JESUS: David is my representative on Earth including the three realms. The white robe symbolizes that he is arrayed with the robe of glory. His long white trains that wrapped around the globe symbolizes his authority over all the earth and his armies are all over the globe. His height symbolizes his status in earth and heaven, including the three realms.

title: A GOLDEN SICKLE AND A PAIR OF WHITE SHOES

segments.text: A GOLDEN SICKLE AND A PAIR OF WHITE SHOES
JESUS: David, why don't you share with Shekinaih the vision I gave you regarding the sickle and the pair of white shoes?

DAVID: Many years ago, I befriended a Tibetan Monk who be- came a Christian missionary. One day, he called me from his country telling me a vision he saw regarding me. He told me that in that vision, he was standing afar looking at the Throne of JESUS. But because of the brightness of His glory, he could not see the person sitting on the throne. He only saw seven people lining up and in turn receiving something from Him who sat on the throne. When the last person stood before the throne, he was given a pair of white shoes and a gold- en sickle with the words "The Harvest" written on the blade. He then told me that as the seventh man turned his face to- wards him, he saw that it was me.

JESUS: The pair of white shoes which I gave you represents the true message of the Everlasting Gospel of Peace, which is a christ in you, being an anointed one, being redeemed and restored to your Adamic nature with a glorified body in our image. You are called to preach this true gospel to every tribe, race, tongue, and people that dwell on the earth. This gospel was hidden by the god of this world from my elect for nearly 2,000 years since the day of the mutilation of my true gospel by the Roman Church.

Rev 14:6 And I saw another angel fly in the midst of heaven, hav- ing the everlasting gospel to preach unto them that dwell on the earth, and to every nation, and kindred, and tongue, and people, Rev 14:7 Saying with a loud voice, Fear THE ELOHIM, and give glory to him; for the hour of his judgment is come: and
THE SEVEN ANGELS
worship him that made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters.

2Co 4:3 But if our gospel be hid, it is hid to them that are lost: 2Co 4:4 In whom the god of this world hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of a christ, who is the image of THE ELOHIM, should shine unto them.

The golden sickle represents the decree to harvest the 7,000 barley which has been spiritually fermented to be good wine followed by the harvesting of the 137,000 wheat which will also be spiritually fermented as good wine. Together, they make up the 144,000 virgin brides who shall be raptured by your the shout of your command. You are the one who hold the sickle mentioned in Revelation 14:14. Shekinaih is the an- gel that came out of the temple who will release our decree to you, commanding you to thrust your sickle to reap the bar- ley and the wheat.

During the time of great trouble from the Anti-Christ, my 144,000 virgin brides who have fulfilled their callings in total 100% yieldedness without questions asked to the will of my FATHER in Shekinaih will come out of the great tribulation. This is because they have refused to worship the beast or re- ceive his mark but have kept themselves pure and not defiled by the Woman Babylon's system. (Rev 14:1-13)

Subsequently, as the angel over fire, you will instruct Jose, who is one of the seven angels, to throw another sickle to harvest the good grapes and store them in their allocated heaven. Following this, the bad grapes will be destroyed in the great winepress of my wrath. These bad grapes symbolize those who are called but did not yield 100% without ques- tions asked to the will of my FATHER in Shekinaih. Some will be killed by the Anti-Christ during the great tribulation be- cause of their partial obedience to my FATHER, and some who worship the beast and receive his mark will be killed in the great winepress of my wrath.
Rev 14:14 And I looked, and behold a white cloud, and upon the cloud one sat like unto the Son of Adam, having on his head a golden crown, and in his hand a sharp sickle. Rev 14:15 And
BEHOLD MY NAMES

another angel came out of the temple, crying with a loud voice to him that sat on the cloud, Thrust in thy sickle, and reap: for the time is come for thee to reap; for the harvest of the earth is ripe. Rev 14:16 And he that sat on the cloud thrust in his sickle on the earth; and the earth was reaped. Rev 14:17 And another angel came out of the temple which is in heaven, he also hav- ing a sharp sickle. Rev 14:18 And another angel came out from the altar, which had power over fire; and cried with a loud cry to him that had the sharp sickle, saying, Thrust in thy sharp sickle, and gather the clusters of the vine of the earth; for her grapes are fully ripe. Rev 14:19 And the angel thrust in his sick- le into the earth, and gathered the vine of the earth, and cast it into the great winepress of the wrath of THE EL SHADDAI. Rev 14:20 And the winepress was trodden without the city, and blood came out of the winepress, even unto the horse bridles, by the space of a thousand and six hundred furlongs.

You will also be given the message to warn the holy ones to be faithful and patient in their tribulations, even unto death. As they keep my commands, they will enter into my rest, the Holy Mountain. The seven legs are the seven lamps of fire burning before the throne. They are the Seven Spirits of THE ELOHIM.
Rev 4:5 and out of the throne proceeded lightnings and thun- dering and voices: and there were seven lamps of fire burning before the throne, which are the seven Spirits of THE ELOHIM.
They are my runners. They are the Seven Horns/Anointed and the Seven Eyes of THE ELOHIM symbolizing the Seven Spirits of THE ELOHIM sent forth into all the earth.

Rev 5:6 And I beheld, and, lo, in the midst of the throne and of the four beasts, and in the midst of the elders, stood a Lamb as it had been slain, having seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven Spirits of THE ELOHIM sent forth into all the earth.
Zerubbabel symbolizes me but it also symbolizes you, the sev- enth angel representing me. Zerubbabel means "sown in Bab- ylon" where Babylon symbolizes the world.
You as the seventh angel of THE YAHWEH, together with the other six angels making up the seven, are called the Seven Eyes of THE YAHWEH. I will use all of you through the decree
THE SEVEN ANGELS

of My FATHER through Shekinaih to execute these decrees to punish the world for their evil and lay low the haughtiness of the Beast from the Sea. The kings of the Beast from the Sea symbolized by the mountains shall become plains. Through your hand and the other six angels, the foundation of my FA- THER'S house shall be laid and finished.

Zec 4:9 The hands of Zerubbabel have laid the foundation of this house; his hands shall also finish it; and thou shalt know that THE YAHWEH SABAOTH hath sent me unto you Zec 4:10 For who hath despised the day of small things? For they shall re- joice, and shall see the plummet in the hand of Zerubbabel with those seven; they are the eyes of THE YAHWEH, which run to and fro through the whole earth.
I will send you with Shekinaih and the six angels under you to travel throughout all the nations to demonstrate our severity through all of you to those whose heart is at peace toward me, THE YAHWEH.

Hannah prophesied about all of you in 1 Samuel Chapter 2. In verse five, the "barren that hath born seven" symbolizes Moth- er Wisdom, THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih who shall bear the Seven Spirits. I will weigh the nations through all of you. After being killed by the Beast from the Sea and made alive again, all of you shall be given the privilege to sit on the Throne of Glory. Also, as the pillars of the earth, I (We), THE YAHWEH, have appointed the world for all of you to rule. I (We) have preordained all of you to execute (by Shekinaih), co-execute (by Aaron K David), and sub-execute (by the six an- gels) my judgment on the ends of the earth on my behalf as kings of the earth. All of you are my anointed.

1Sa 2:5 they that were full have hired out themselves for bread; and they that were hungry ceased: so that the barren hath born seven; and she that hath many children is waxed feeble. 1Sa 2:6 THE YAHWEH killed, and maketh alive: he bringeth down to the grave, and bringeth up. 1Sa 2:7 THE YAHWEH maketh poor, and maketh rich: he bringeth low, and lifteth up. 1Sa 2:8 He raised up the poor out of the dust, and lifted up the beggar from the dunghill, to set them among princes, and to make them inherit the throne of glory: for the pillars of the earth are THE YAH-
BEHOLD MY NAMES
WEH'S, and he hath set the world upon them.

Proverbs 9 also talks about all of you as the seven pillars of the house of THE ELOHIM, the Heavenly Jerusalem. The ones who are slaughtered are the four beasts/living creatures as mentioned in Ezekiel's and John's vision. The bread symboliz- es the wheat and the barley which have been harvested and turned into show-bread; and the wine symbolizes the bride after they are spiritually fermented.

Pro 9:1 Wisdom hath builder her house, she hath hewn out her seven pillars: Pro 9:2 she hath slaughtered (H2874 "tebach"); she hath mingled her wine; she hath also furnished her table. Pro 9:3 She hath sent forth her maidens: she cried upon the highest places of the city, Pro 9:4 Whoso is simple, let him turn in hith- er: as for him that wanted understanding, she saith to him, Pro 9:5 Come, eat of my bread, and drink of the wine which I have mingled.

The parable of the seven brothers also refers to all of you. Af- ter the resurrection, they and you will be transformed into Shinan (angelic beings), being the children of THE ELOHIM, the children of resurrection.

Luk 20:29 there were therefore seven brethren: and the first took a wife, and died without children. Luk 20:30 and the sec- ond took her to wife, and he died childless. Luk 20:31 and the third took her; and in like manner the seven also: and they left no children, and died. Luk 20:32 Last of all the woman died also. Luk 20:33 Therefore in the resurrection whose wife of them is she? For seven had her to wife. Luk 20:34 And JESUS answering said unto them, The children of this world marry, and are given in marriage: Luk 20:35 But they which shall be accounted wor- thy to obtain that world, and the resurrection from the dead, neither marry, nor are given in marriage: Luk 20:36 Neither can they die any more: for they are equal unto the angels; and are the children of THE ELOHIM, being the children of the resurrec- tion.
Everyone of you is a christ, an anointed one.
The name "Jesse" H3448 "sashay" is from H3426 "yesh" which means "exist". Jesse symbolizes THE FATHER, THE I AM, THE EHYEH. According to 1 Chronicles 2:15, Jesse had seven sons
THE SEVEN ANGELS

and David was the seventh and it symbolizes you, who are the seventh angel. In the last days, when Anti-Christ and his kings shall come against spiritual Judah and Jerusalem, you shall represent me as THE ELOHIM and as The Angel of THE YAH- WEH and shall lead my anointed ones to smite the enemies as was prophesied by Zechariah: "In that day shall THE YAHWEH defend the inhabitants of Jerusalem; and he that is feeble among them at that day shall be as David; and the house of David shall be as THE ELOHIM; the Angel of THE YAHWEH be- fore them." (Zec 12:1-14)
I, THE YAHWEH, will establish you as the shepherd who will feed my people which consist of the Jews and the Gentiles.

Through the Four-Fold ministers called the "four winds", the spiritual Israel shall be gathered from all over the world unto me, and they will be revived spiritually. They will become the spiritual Mount Zion. I (We), THE YAHWEH, will rule over spiritu- al Jerusalem through Shekinaih and you, David, and there will be peace in the land.

Eze 37:24 And David my servant shall be king over them; and they all shall have one shepherd: they shall also walk in my judgments, and observe my statutes, and do them. Eze 37:25 And they shall dwell in the land that I have given unto Jacob my servant, wherein your fathers have dwelt; and they shall dwell therein, even they, and their children, and their children's chil- dren forever: and my servant David shall be their prince forev- er.

In that day, I (We), THE YAHWEH, will rule through Shekinaih (THE FATHER incarnated and THE HOLY SPIRIT reincarnated) who will decree and seal our decree, and David (my reincar- nate) will execute our decree, and we shall all be joined in one spirit and there shall be one YAHWEH.
Zec 14:9 And THE YAHWEH shall be king over all the earth: in that day shall there be one YAHWEH, with his name united (H259 "echad").
CHAPTER 4
FIVE-FOLD JUSTICE
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how are you going to bring justice upon the Cosmoses?

THE FATHER: As shown in the above diagram given by us to Shekinaih, We, THE TRINITY, will use these seven angels to ex- ecute the Five-Fold Justice of Our Name, THE YAHWEH. They are our true Apostles/Prophets who will execute the decrees on behalf of us, THE YAHWEH. They are our mini messengers in the execution of our decrees.
FIVE-FOLD JUSTICE

Jer 23:28 The prophet that hath a dream, let him tell a dream; and he that hath my word, let him speak my word faithfully. What is the chaff to the wheat? Saith THE YAHWEH. Jer 23:29 Is not my word like as a fire? Saith THE YAHWEH; and like a ham- mer that breaketh the rock in pieces?

They are our sons (THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST being the first begotten who was incarnated into this world). They are Min- isters of Fire. Each of them is also an anointed one and a par- taker to be a christ.

Heb 1:6 And again, when he bringeth in the firstbegotten into the world, he saith, And let all the angels of THE ELOHIM wor- ship him. Heb 1:7 And of the angels he saith, Who maketh his angels spirits, and his ministers a flame of fire. Heb 1:8 But unto the Son he saith, Thy throne, O ELOHIM, is for ever and ever: a sceptre of righteousness is the sceptre of thy kingdom. Heb 1:9 Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated iniquity; therefore THE ELOHIM, even thy ELOHIM, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy partakers.
The five hammers symbolize the Five-Fold Justice of THE YAH- WEH and they fall into five categories:
Creation in Justice
Angels in Justice
Humanity in Justice
The World in Justice
Countries in Justice
Continents in Justice
Young and Old in Justice
Galaxies in Justice
The Underworld in Justice
Re-creation in Justice
CHAPTER 5
CREATION IN JUSTICE
THE EMANATION OF LIGHT
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what happened to your original cre- ation that needed justice?
SHEKINAIH: David, JESUS just showed me the following pic- tures in answer to your questions.
CREATION IN JUSTICE

JESUS: Yes, these pictures will help you to understand what I am about to expound to you. Before there was any creation, THE TRINITY in immortality dwelt in the unapproachable light where there is no darkness at all. Through me, THE TRINITY is manifested as the King of Kings and the Lord of Lords.

1Ti 6:15 Which in his times he shall shew, who is the blessed and only Potentate, the King of kings, and the Lord of the lords; 1Ti 6:16 Who only hath immortality, dwelling in the light which no man can approach unto; whom no man hath seen, nor can see: to whom be honour and power everlasting. Amen.
THE FATHER: I, THE FATHER of Light, emanates my light to THE HOLY SPIRIT which then emanates to my SON, and from him, the light emanates to Adam and the whole of Eden.

Joh 1:1 In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with THE ELOHIM, and the Word was THE ELOHIM. Joh 1:2 The same was in the beginning with THE ELOHIM. Joh 1:3 All things were made by him; and without him was not anything made that was made. Joh 1:4 In him was life; and the life was the light of men.

From Eden it then emanates to the Cosmoses. This light is life for all creations which are in heaven, earth and beneath the earth, visible and invisible, whether they be thrones or do- minions or principalities or powers.
Joh 8:12 Then spake JESUS again unto them, saying, I am the light of the Cosmoses: he that followeth me shall not walk in darkness, but shall have the light of life.

JESUS: When Adam disobeyed us THE YAHWEH, his spiritual fuse blew and his light bulb no longer emanated the light of life to the Cosmoses. He had also lost the wisdom and under- standing of THE YAHWEH that also enabled him to intuitively understand the nature of all animals which he named accord- ing to their natures and instincts.
Pro 20:27 The spirit of Adam is the lamp of THE YAHWEH, search- ing all the inward parts of the belly.
Because of his 'missing the mark' (sin) due to him not sub- mitting to our will, this glorious light was lost in him and as a result, the whole creation of the Cosmoses fell into total dark-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

ness. The air was filled with demonic spirits. All created beings, visible and invisible, bowed down to Satan instead of Adam, and all creatures were subjected to the inclination of evil and they rebelled against THE ELOHIM.

Eph 2:1 And you hath he quickened, who were dead in trespass- es and sins; Eph 2:2 Wherein in time past ye walked according to the course of this world, according to the prince of the au- thority of the air, the spirit that now worketh in the children of disobedience:
THE TREE OF LIFE
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how was your original state of creation like?
JESUS: The above picture which I just gave to Shekinaih shows how we sustained immortality in the original creation (Pre- Fall State).
The River of THE ELOHIM and the Tree of Life are merged into one. It is the sustaining force of eternal life, the Elixir of Life Immortal. We, THE YAHWEH, sustained the fowls in the air, hu-
CREATION IN JUSTICE
manity, land and sea animals, and plants through this River of Life and the Tree of Life. The food was in the form of light.

In the original creation, all living things were in spiritual form and thus space was of no concern. Because of Adam's disobe- dience, all creations were kept away from Eden and from the Eternal River through the Flaming Sword. There was a com- plete migration to another sphere: from the Spiritual Eden which was a planet in the form of light, to a physical planet for the fallen man and all creations. The day that Adam disobeyed the will of THE YAHWEH was the day death and corruption came to the whole creation.
SATAN IN THE GARDEN OF EDEN
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you elaborate on what actually hap- pened in the Garden of Eden?
BEHOLD MY NAMES

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a serpent in a garden. As the ser- pent opened his mouth, a tanned, muscular, and hairy man in straw skirt came out of the serpent's mouth and grew larger as he walked out from the mouth of the serpent. He had two bullhorns growing on his bushy head. I saw him giving a fruit to Eve which she ate. She then gave it to Adam and he also ate it. Then I saw the light that clothed them disappeared. Then I saw them in human skins. (Gen 3:1-24)
SATAN AND JESUS BETTING
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why did you permit them to be de- ceived?

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of Satan and THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST each throwing two dice on the floor symbolizing that they are betting. I heard Satan said, "I can guarantee you that Adam, the man you planned to create to replace my role, will fall flatly under your nose and he/she will be no better than me. And if I am right, then, can I ask you to let me govern the three realms instead of him/her?" I then heard JESUS replied, "Very well. Your request is granted."
I saw a vision of the words "BACKUP PLAN" superimposed on the back of THE FATHER'S mind, followed by a printer printing a piece of white paper with the phrase "RECOVERY PLAN FOR MANKIND".

JESUS: Satan, whose real identity is the adversary, won the bet and Adam surrendered his authority over the dominion of the three realms, namely: the fish of the sea symbolizing all the spirits of the deep, and the fowls of the air symbolizing the spirits of the air, and the cattle in all the earth and every creeping thing that creeps upon the earth symbolizing all the spirits of the earth. Satan became the god of this age and the Cosmoses fell into darkness. The light of the glorious gospel of being a christ and the way to be restored to the image of THE ELOHIM was hidden from them who are called to be a christ (an anointed one).
