HUMANITY IN JUSTICE

voice, saying, Eli, Eli, lama sabachthani? that is to say, My EL, my EL, why hast thou forsaken me? Mat 27:47 Some of them that stood there, when they heard that, said, This man calleth for Elias. Mat 27:48 And straightway one of them ran, and took a spunge, and filled it with vinegar, and put it on a reed, and gave him to drink. Mat 27:49 The rest said, Let be, let us see whether Elias will come to save him. Mat 27:50 JESUS, when he had cried again with a loud voice, yielded up the ghost. Mat 27:51 And, behold, the veil of the temple was rent in twain from the top to the bottom; and the earth did quake, and the rocks rent; Mat 27:52 And the graves were opened; and many bodies of the saints which slept arose, Mat 27:53 And came out of the graves after his resurrection, and went into the holy city, and appeared unto many.
This is the angel Elijah (accompanied by THE HOLY SPIRIT) who descended from heaven with a great earthquake and resur- rected me, after I was in the grave for 3 days.

Mat 28:2 And, behold, there was a great earthquake: for the angel of THE YAHWEH descended from heaven, and came and rolled back the stone from the door, and sat upon it. Mat 28:3 His countenance was like lightning, and his raiment white as snow:

He (with THE HOLY SPIRIT) will again resurrect the Two Wit- nesses in the last days, bringing the judgment of earthquake which will kill seven thousand of the seed of Satan. He (THE ELIJAH)/She (THE HOLY SPIRIT) are the Two Cherubim of Glory of the Ark of the Covenant where lightnings, voices, thunder- ings, earthquakes, and hail usually accompany their presence.

Rev 11:13 And the same hour was there a great earthquake, and the tenth part of the city fell, and in the earthquake were slain of men seven thousand: and the remnant were affrighted, and gave glory to THE ELOHIM of heaven. Rev 11:19 And the tem- ple of THE ELOHIM was opened in heaven, and there was seen in his temple the ark of his testament: and there were lightnings, and voices, and thunderings, and an earthquake, and great hail.

In the last days, I (We), THE YAHWEH, through our mighty wind (spirit), our Two Cherubim of Glory, will punish the stars of heaven by casting them to the earth which will bring earth- quakes, volcano eruptions and tsunamis unto the cities of the
BEHOLD MY NAMES
Beast from the Sea. Therefore, She/He are the mighty wind that shakes the stars of heaven (lawless ministers) like untime- ly figs.

Rev 6:12 And I beheld when he had opened the sixth seal, and, lo, there was a great earthquake; and the sun became black as sackcloth of hair, and the moon became as blood; Rev 6:13 And the stars of heaven fell unto the earth, even as a fig tree (law- less ministers)casteth her untimely figs, when she is shaken of a mighty wind (the mighty angel).
These figs represent our naughty and unfruitful leaders, min- isters and angels both in heaven and on earth who are not fruitful in holiness.

Jer 24:8 And as the evil figs, which cannot be eaten, they are so evil; surely thus saith THE YAHWEH. So will I give Zedekiah the king of Judah, and his princes, and the residue of Jerusa- lem, that remain in this land, and them that dwell in the land of Egypt: Jer 24:9 And I will deliver them to be removed into all the kingdoms of the earth for their hurt, to be a reproach and a proverb, a taunt and a curse, in all places whither I shall drive them. Jer 24:10 And I will send the sword, the famine, and the pestilence, among them, till they be consumed from off the land that I gave unto them and to their fathers.

Luk 13:6 He spake also this parable; A certain man had a fig tree planted in his vineyard; and he came and sought fruit there- on, and found none. Luk 13:7 Then said he unto the dresser of his vineyard, Behold, these three years I come seeking fruit on this fig tree, and find none: cut it down; why cumbereth it the ground? Luk 13:8 And he answering said unto him, YAHWEH, let it alone this year also, till I shall dig about it, and dung it: Luk 13:9 And if it bear fruit, well: and if not, then after that thou shalt cut it down.

I (We), THE YAHWEH, through the Angel of My (Our) Presence, our spokesman, then through the seven angels and the glo- rified saints from Heavenly Zion, shall judge the woman Mys- tery Babylon that sits on the Beast with seven heads and ten horns. She controls the heads of seven continents and ten principalities of ten major nations; two of the ruling principal- ities are from the United Kingdom, the rest are from the Unit- ed States of America, Japan, China, Egypt, Syria, Russia, Nigeria
HUMANITY IN JUSTICE

and Germany. I (We), THE YAHWEH, shall lay the lands desolate and destroy the sinners thereof out of it. I (We) will punish the world for their evil, and the wicked for their iniquity; and will cause the arrogancy of the proud to cease, and will lay low the haughtiness of the tyrant/Anti-Christ.

Isa 13:1 The burden of Babylon, which Isaiah the son of Amoz did see. Isa 13:2 Lift ye up a banner upon the high mountain, exalt the voice unto them, shake the hand, that they may go into the gates of the nobles. Isa 13:3 I have commanded my sanctified ones, I have also called my mighty ones for mine anger, even them that rejoice in my highness. Isa 13:4 The noise of a mul- titude in the mountains, like as of a great people; a tumultu- ous noise of the kingdoms of nations gathered together: THE YAHWEH SABAOTH mustereth the host of the battle. Isa 13:5 They come from a far country, from the end of heaven, even THE YAHWEH, and the weapons of his indignation, to destroy the whole land. Isa 13:6 Howl ye; for the day of THE YAHWEH is at hand; it shall come as a destruction from THE SHADDAI. Isa
13:11 And I will punish the world for their evil, and the wicked for their iniquity; and I will cause the arrogancy of the proud to cease, and will lay low the haughtiness of the terrible.

Through the voice of my strong and mighty archangel Eli- jah (represented by Aaron K David) who receives our decree from Shekinaih who represents THE HOLY SPIRIT, I will lead my great army from my holy mountain. She/He is the Day of THE YAHWEH (LORD) and is great and very terrible; and no one can stand against Her/Him on the earth. My Elijah, the teacher of righteousness, together with Shekinaih, THE HOLY SPIRIT'S re- incarnation, will bring revival to my children and also decree and execute my vengeance on the three realms against the wicked, the ungodly and on the Man of Perdition.

Joe 2:11 And THE YAHWEH shall utter his voice before his army: for his camp is very great: for he is strong that executeth his word: for the day of THE YAHWEH is great and very terrible; and who can abide it? Joe 2:23 Be glad then, ye children of Zion,

and rejoice in THE YAHWEH your ELOHIM: for he hath given you the teacher of righteousness, and he will cause to come down for you the rain, the former rain, and the latter rain in the first month. … Joe 2:28 And it shall come to pass afterward, that I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh; and your sons and your
BEHOLD MY NAMES

daughters shall prophesy, your old men shall dream dreams, your young men shall see visions: Joe 2:29 And also upon the servants and upon the handmaids in those days will I pour out my spirit. Joe 2:30 And I will shew wonders in the heavens and in the earth, blood, and fire, and pillars of smoke. Joe 2:31 The sun shall be turned into darkness, and the moon into blood, before the great and the terrible day of THE YAHWEH come. Joe 2:32 And it shall come to pass, that whosoever shall call on the name of THE YAHWEH shall be delivered: for in mount Zion and in Jeru- salem shall be deliverance, as THE YAHWEH hath said, and in the remnant whom THE YAHWEH shall call.

I will gather all nations, and will bring them down into the valley of Jehoshaphat, and will plead with them there for my people and for my heritage Israel, whom they have scattered among the nations, and parted my land. Egypt shall be in des- olation, and Edom shall be a desolate wilderness when my seventh angel pours out his vial into the air. There will be a major catastrophic earthquake like never before; so mighty an earthquake that Jerusalem and the cities of the nations will be affected; and great Babylon will come in remembrance be- fore me to give unto her the cup of the wine of the fierce- ness of my wrath. Every island will flee and the mountains will not be found. And there will fall upon men a great hail out of heaven, every stone about the weight of a talent; and men will blaspheme me because of the plague of the hail; for the plague thereof will be exceeding great. (Joe 3:1-16)
HUMANITY IN JUSTICE
COUNTRIES THAT WILL BE JUDGED
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what countries are affected by your earthquakes?

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of major cracks in divers places of the earth due to volcano eruptions, and some lands were submerged in the sea. The earth's surface was greatly dam- aged by falling stars and earthquakes in diverse places. I saw JESUS held a globe in His hand and showed me the conti- nents and countries that will be desolated. I saw JESUS cut the globe with a knife horizontally through the Tropic of Can- cer across Taiwan and diagonally from Thirty Degrees West of Greenwich in the Southern Hemisphere to Thirty Degrees East of Greenwich in the North Hemisphere.
He then highlighted to me in another vision regarding the ser- pent and her seed.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

JESUS: The seed of Canaan (the Hittites, the Girgashites, the Amorites, the Canaanites, the Perizzites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites) and the seed of Esau (Edom) who intermarried with them are energized by Satan whom we hate will be destroyed in the last days.

Some of the mingled descendants of the Edomite tree mi- grated to Mexico and the rest to Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Nige- ria, London, United States of America and Germany. Through these nations, they control the world. Therefore, I, THE YAH- WEH, will destroy their cities in the last days with earthquakes and falling stars. As the serpent is cursed by me above all cat- tle, and above every beast of the field, so are these nations.

title: GOAT MINISTERS AND CHRISTIANS IN THE CONTINENTS

segments.text: GOAT MINISTERS AND CHRISTIANS IN THE CONTINENTS

The "goat" ministers and Christians who are unkind to my angels/messengers will also be destroyed in the last days to- gether with the devil and his evil angels into everlasting pun- ishment. They are not my children but have disguised them- selves as Christians.
Mat 25:31 When the Son of Adam shall come in his glory, and all the holy angels (G32 "angelos" messengers) with him, then shall
HUMANITY IN JUSTICE

he sit upon the throne of his glory: Mat 25:32 And before him shall be gathered all nations: and he shall separate them one from another, as a shepherd divideth his sheep from the goats: Mat 25:33 And he shall set the sheep on his right hand, but the goats on the left. Mat 25:41 Then shall he say also unto them

on the left hand, Depart from me, ye cursed, into everlasting fire, prepared for the devil and his angels: Mat 25:42 For I was an hungred, and ye gave me no meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me no drink: Mat 25:43 I was a stranger, and ye took me not in: naked, and ye clothed me not: sick, and in prison, and ye visited me not. Mat 25:44 Then shall they also answer him, saying, YAH- WEH, when saw we thee an hungred, or athirst, or a stranger, or naked, or sick, or in prison, and did not minister unto thee? Mat 25:45 Then shall he answer them, saying, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye did it not to one of the least of these, ye did it not to me. Mat 25:46 And these shall go away into everlasting punishment: but the righteous into life eternal.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the holy angels in Matthew 25:31?

JESUS: These are my prophet brothers and sisters who are sent to the world to partake of my suffering and death. Those who ill treat them in their life time will be thrown into everlasting punishment.
My unfruitful and lawless ministers will be destroyed in the Day of Judgment in those cities I've mentioned earlier. (Mar 11:12-14)

These ministers are those who, after being enlightened and having tasted of the heavenly gift and made partakers of THE HOLY GHOST; and tasted the good word of THE ELOHIM and the powers of the age to come, yet fell away and bore thorns and briers. They will be rejected by THE YAHWEH. (Heb 6:4-8)
They have become the thorns and the briers symbolizing that they have become the children of Belial. They shall be thrown into the Lake of Fire and be burned in the Day of Judgment.

2Sa 23:6 But the sons of Belial shall be all of them as thorns thrust away, because they cannot be taken with hands: 2Sa 23:7 But the man that shall touch them must be fenced with iron and the staff of a spear; and they shall be utterly burned with
BEHOLD MY NAMES
fire in the same place.

These are the false prophets and teachers who craftily intro- duce dissensions with their principle and philosophy after the tradition of men. In the last days, they will evil speak of the truth that is written in this book, bringing swift destruction upon themselves and those who follow them. Being pre- sumptuous and self-willed, they are not afraid to speak evil of those who represent the Glory of THE ELOHIM. As natural brute beasts, made to be taken and destroyed, they speak evil of the things that they understand not; and shall utterly per- ish in their own corruption. (2Pe 2:1-2)
Sectarian is a work of the flesh. It is translated as heresies in Galatians 5:20. Paul warned the Galatians that they which do this thing shall not inherit the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM.

Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies (G139 hairesies meaning sect), Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM.

In my kingdom, there are no denominations. Heaven is a place for those who are sincere in heart, who heed my words and make amendments in their lives and have it corrected from their crooked ways; acknowledging their frailty and putting my words into practice, altering their lives' courses according to my preordained path for them; seeking me in every step of the way concerning my will for them in all aspects of their lives, be it big or small, trying to follow closely in their lives' pursuit after godliness; being purified of their earthly sensual desires, walking in my holiness according to the revelation of the real Gospel and the requirements for one to enter into the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM; paying the utmost respect to my commandments in these books which I authorized Shekinaih and Aaron K David to write.
HUMANITY IN JUSTICE
YOUNG AND OLD IN JUSTICE

Exo 22:22 Ye shall not afflict any widow, or fatherless child. Exo 22:23 If thou afflict them in any wise, and they cry at all unto me, I will surely hear their cry; Exo 22:24 And my wrath shall wax hot, and I will kill you with the sword; and your wives shall be wid- ows, and your children fatherless.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, when will you punish those who abuse the elders and children who can't defend themselves?

JESUS: The majority of my creations are vulnerable to the deception and the trickery of Satan with his evil angels and their earthly representatives who control the world's affairs. Through the indoctrination of poison deemed as medicine and food genetically modified in the food chain, the fallen angels are poisoning and mutating my creations. They are al- tering the Earth's form of existence to suit their existence. At the same time, they are turning the future generation of my creations into their creations of mutated humans that will be used as slaves that are easily controllable. Through unneces- sary vaccinations, toxins, bacteria and microchips are inject- ed into babies and young children which slowly destroy their ability to connect with me spiritually. By the propaganda of transhumanism, they are indoctrinating my creations to ac- knowledge them, the fallen angels, as their life savers through their nanotechnology like the growing of organs and etc. in the guise of prolonging lives. The truth is that they are mutat- ing my creations to be hosts for them.
They inject nanoparticles into my creations to control and at worst destroy those who do not obey them.
They, through the lies of Euthanasia, on the ground of "false compassion", cover up their evil intentions of getting rid of the old who are counted as useless in today's society.
They formulated the baby milk powder which can mutate the genes of babies in order to pervert and mutate their spirit, soul, and body so that they will be disconnected from me.
They have sucked the life force of the babies and children to
BEHOLD MY NAMES
appease Molech with baby and child sacrifices.

I, THE YAHWEH, swear in my Holiness that I will not spare them anymore but will visit them and they will drink the wine of my wrath. As they have taken away years from those helpless young and old, years will also be taken out from their very own lives as well their loved ones.
GALAXIES IN JUSTICE
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why must you destroy the universe?

JESUS: There is an orderly, harmonious pattern and rhythm to the Cosmoses and the evidence for this orderliness is every- where on the earth, in the heavens, and also in the function- ing of the human organism. Everything we created is good and we have ordained certain angels to keep the order. I (We), THE YAHWEH, authorized the creation through our decrees, spoke through the Covering Cherub (Shekinaih), and the de- crees were executed by the executing angel of THE YAHWEH (Aaron K David) on our behalf in the beginning. For this, Luci- fer was very jealous. In the last days, the Cosmoses will be de- stroyed in the same manner through our Two Cherubim, one in the decreeing and the other in the execution of the decree. Meanwhile, we have delegated our authority and power to uphold the entire Cosmoses to both of your counterpart an- gels in heaven. From now onwards, Shekinaih and your coun- terpart angel in heaven will be united with both of you in one spirit. Therefore, you will realize that both your authority and power will increase beyond measure speedily. Therefore, my people must take heed that they will not offend either one of you, otherwise, their days are doomed for they will end up in Tartarus for offending our spokesman, the Name of THE YAH- WEH, whom we have placed our name and glory, above the earth and heaven.
Psa 148:1 Praise ye THE YAH. Praise ye THE YAHWEH from the heavens: praise him in the heights. Psa 148:2 Praise ye him, all his angels: praise ye him, all his hosts. Psa 148:3 Praise ye him,
HUMANITY IN JUSTICE

sun and moon: praise him, all ye stars of light. Psa 148:4 Praise him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that be above the heavens. Psa 148:5 Let them praise the Name of THE YAHWEH: for he commanded, and they were created. Psa 148:6 He hath also stablished them for ever and ever: he hath made a de- cree which shall not pass. Psa 148:7 Praise THE YAHWEH from the earth, ye dragons, and all deeps: Psa 148:8 Fire, and hail; snow, and vapour; stormy wind fulfilling his word: Psa 148:9 Mountains, and all hills; fruitful trees, and all cedars: Psa 148:10 Beasts, and all cattle; creeping things, and flying fowl: Psa 148:11 Kings of the earth, and all people; princes, and all judges of the earth: Psa 148:12 Both young men, and maidens; old men, and children: Psa 148:13 Let them praise the Name of THE YAHWEH: for his name alone is excellent; his glory is above the earth and heaven. Psa 148:14 He also exalteth the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints; even of the children of Israel, a people near unto him. Praise ye THE YAH.

But in the last days, the angels that keep the order of the plan- ets will rebel and the planets will move out of their courses colliding with one another with big and small "bangs" which will end up in total chaos with their fragments falling down to Earth.

2Pe 3:10 But the day of THE YAHWEH will come as a thief in the night; in the which the heavens shall pass away with a great noise, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat, the earth also and the works that are therein shall be burned up.

The nations of the world are governed by my angels called "Principalities". I (We), THE YAHWEH THE MOST HIGH, set the bounds of the nations according to the number of angels, but as for my people Jacob (Israel in the flesh), they became my portion and Israel (Spiritual Israel) is the line of my inheritance.

Deu 32:8 When the Most High divided the nations, when he sep- arated the sons of Adam, he set the bounds of the nations ac- cording to the number of the angels of THE ELOHIM. Deu 32:9 And his people Jacob became the portion of THE YAHWEH, Israel was the line of his inheritance. (Septuagint Version)
I, THE YAHWEH, specifically warned the Israelites that they should not worship the Sun, the Moon, or the stars which are gods of the nations.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

Deu 4:19 And lest thou lift up thine eyes unto heaven, and when thou seest the sun, and the moon, and the stars, even all the host of heaven, shouldest be driven to worship them, and serve them, which THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM hath divided unto all na- tions under the whole heaven.

I, THE YAHWEH, will judge all these gods of the nations as they have governed unjustly. After the judgment, I will again create the new heavens and earth where righteousness will again reign and I will ordain our holy ones to govern the Cosmoses.

1Co 6:2 Do ye not know that the holy ones shall judge the Cos- moses? and if the Cosmoses shall be judged by you, are ye un- worthy to judge the smallest matters? 1Co 6:3 Know ye not that we shall judge angels?

They, as my servants, shall serve us and shall see the angel of my face and my name shall be upon their foreheads, and they shall reign on behalf of me forever and ever over the new Cos- moses which are the new heavens and earth (Rev 22:2-5).

The light of my FATHER will again flow to THE HOLY SPIRIT and from THE HOLY SPIRIT to me and from me to the third Adam. The first Adam who was supposed to rule the Cosmoses lived only 930 years. King David lived 70 years as the King of Israel. But the future David (My VICTORY), who is destined to rule on behalf of us, will rule the world for 1000 years with Shekinaih (who represents THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT). This is the acceptable day of THE YAHWEH, the day of true restoration which will result in a thousand years' reign for those who are restored. He is the third Adam. He will be restored to his for- mer glory as the Angel of THE YAHWEH. This is the mystery of the last days when I, THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST, will defend the inhabitants of Jerusalem through you (the David who was prophesied) and the sons who are trained and sealed by you. They will become mighty angels like you, who will be trans- formed into the Angel of THE YAHWEH before them.

Zec 12:8 In that day shall THE YAHWEH defend the inhabitants of Jerusalem; and he that is feeble among them at that day shall be as David; the house of David shall be mighty (H430 "elohim") as the Angel of THE YAHWEH before them. Zec 12:9 And it shall
HUMANITY IN JUSTICE
come to pass in that day, that I will seek to destroy all the na- tions that come against Jerusalem.

All those who focus on the Angel/Spirit of THE YAHWEH called "the Glory of THE YAHWEH", who is the reflection of me, will be changed into the same image from glory to glory even as by the Spirit of THE YAHWEH, as the light consisting of the Sev- en Names of THE FATHER radiated from Him to them.

2Co 3:17 Now THE YAHWEH is that Spirit: and where the Spir- it of THE YAHWEH is, there is liberty. 2Co 3:18 But we all, with open face beholding as in a mirror (G2734 "katoptrizomai" mir- ror) the Glory of THE YAHWEH, are changed into the same image from glory to glory, even as by the Spirit of THE YAHWEH.
CHAPTER 8
THE UNDERWORLD IN JUSTICE
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, at present, who is in charge of the Un- derworld?
JESUS: Shekinaih and you have taken over the rule of the un- derworld which was previously ruled by Lucifer and Molech in the three realms.

THE FATHER: When my children are perfected to be my SON'S bride and partake of our holiness, all these creatures called "the beasts of the earth, stones of the field and the beasts of the field" will submit to them and be in league and at peace with them.

Job 5:22 At destruction and famine thou shalt laugh: neither shalt thou be afraid of the beasts of the earth. Job 5:23 For thou shalt be in league with the stones of the field: and the beasts of the field shall be at peace with thee.
THE UNDERWORLD IN JUSTICE

Shekinaih and you are created to represent us, THE TRINITY, to take back the authority from the Red Dragon and her com- panion Molech over the three realms. You both shall repre- sent my names. Now, the take over is complete as both of you have physically set your foot on the places where I have sent you both to the spiritual principalities in the four corners of the earth. Now, the Red Dragon and Molech are subservient to both of you and have handed over their authority and are bound to do your bidding when you both authorize them. Now you both sit spiritually in the three realms as Judge rep- resenting us, THE TRINITY.
CHAPTER 9
RE-CREATION IN JUSTICE
DAVID: How is justice to be brought to your new creation?
THE FATHER: Old things shall pass away. Behold, I will create new things to replace my old, corruptible creations.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of THE FATHER closing an old book titled "Old Creation". I saw Him threw the book into the fire in front of Him. I then saw Him taking out from His bookshelf a new book titled "Behold, a New Creation". I then saw these words: "Close of an Old Era and the Beginning of a New Era."

JESUS: The old things refer to the fallen and corruptible na- ture of Adam and the old Cosmoses. The new things refer to the new Heavenly Jerusalem which will come down to the new Earth. They are the restored Adams created in the image of THE ELOHIM and are incorruptible.

These are those who are in Christ and have each become a restored creature because ELIJAH THE CHIEF has come and re- stored everyone of them through the authority and the pow- er he received from THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih.

2Co 5:17 Therefore if any man be in Christ, he is a new creature: the chief (G744 "archaios" primeval, ancient, from G756 begin- ning, to be chief, leader, ruler) has come; behold, everyone (G3956 "pas") is (G1096 "ginomai") restored (G2537 "kainos").

Paul quoted Isaiah 42:9-10 in 2 Corinthians 5:17. This Chief is the elect servant whom I (We), THE YAHWEH, shall uphold be- cause I (we) delight in him and have put my (our) spirit (Shek- inaih representing THE HOLY SPIRIT) upon him to bring forth judgment to the Gentiles and give him for a covenant of the people and for a light to the Gentiles to open the blind eyes; to bring out the prisoners from the prison, and them that sit
BEHOLD MY NAMES

in darkness out of the prison house. She/He bears our name, "THE YAHWEH". She/He is the Angel of THE YAHWEH who will manifest my (our) Glory. She/He is the Chief/Elder/Leader that shall come and restore everyone in all nations who is called to be united with my spirit to be a christ. I (We), THE YAHWEH, shall go forth as a mighty man in him like a man of war; he shall prevail against my enemies. He shall destroy and devour and make waste mountains and hills through earthquakes and bring famine and drought like in the days of Elijah. I (We), THE YAHWEH, shall bring the blind through him by a way which they know not and will lead them in paths which they have not known. He, with the authority and power through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, will make darkness light before them and crooked things straight and will not forsake them. They shall all be taught by my HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih and THE ELIJAH in you, to be deaf and blind, that they may really see and understand spiritual things like you whom I (we), THE YAHWEH, am well pleased. I shall magnify you and make you great.
Isa 42:1 Behold my servant, whom I uphold; mine elect, in whom my soul delighteth; I have put my spirit upon him: he shall bring forth judgment to the Gentiles. Isa 42:9 Behold,

the chief (H7223) have come and restoration (H2319 "chadash" means repair, renew, restore) do I declare: before they spring forth I tell you of them. Isa 42:10 Sing unto THE YAHWEH a new (restoration) song, and his praise from the end of the earth, ye that go down to the sea, and all that is therein; the isles, and the inhabitants thereof. Isa 42:19 Who is blind, but my

servant? or deaf, as my messenger that I sent? who is blind as he that is perfect, and blind as THE YAHWEH'S servant? Isa 42:20 Seeing many things, but thou observest not; opening the ears, but he heareth not. Isa 42:21 THE YAHWEH is well pleased for his righteous one's sake; he will magnify the lawgiver, and make him great. Isa 42:22 But this is a people robbed and spoiled; they are all of them snared in holes, and they are hid in prison hous- es: they are for a prey, and none delivereth; for a spoil, and none saith, Restore.
You, through the authority and power of THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, have come to restore those who are called to be
RE-CREATION IN JUSTICE

kings and priests. They will celebrate their restoration by sing- ing a restoration song. This restoration song commemorates them becoming the Four Living Creatures as kings and priests who shall reign on the earth. They are the Four-Fold Ministry of the Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists and Pastors/Teachers.

Rev 5:8 And when he had taken the book, the four beasts and four and twenty elders fell down before the Lamb, having ev- ery one of them harps, and golden vials full of odours, which are the prayers of saints. Rev 5:9 And they sung a new (restoration) song, saying, Thou art worthy to take the book, and to open the seals thereof: for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to THE ELOHIM by thy blood out of every kindred, and tongue, and people, and nation; Rev 5:10 And hast made us unto our ELOHIM kings and priests: and we shall reign on the earth.

"elohim" was mentioned 2602 times in the Hebrew Bible (Tanakh, Old Testament). The word is used for: the true God, false gods, supernatural spirits (angels), and human leaders (kings, judges, the messiah). It is made up of the word "El" and the word "im". The oldest Semitic word meaning "God" is El. Linguists believe that its base meaning is strength or pow- er. "THE EL" is the Strong One. It was mentioned 238 times in the Bible and was first used in Genesis 14:18 in the phrase "THE EL Most High" (El Elyon). The "im" ending denotes a plu- ral masculine noun. Thus, when THE ELOHIM said let us make Adam in our image, male and female; they are telling us of their masculine and feminine aspect with the masculine as- pect being more eminent. In Genesis 1:1, it was THE ELOHIM that created the heaven and earth but in Genesis 2:1, it was THE YAHWEH ELOHIM that made the earth and the heavens.

We then formed every beast of the field, and every fowl of the air to be his helpmates but they did not meet his need. We then decided to make Eve out of Adam by cleaving them into two. Through this process, they became one part angel, one part human.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

Gen 2:21 And THE YAHWEH ELOHIM caused a deep sleep to fall upon Adam, and he slept: and he took one of his sides (H6760 "tsalah" side), and closed up the flesh instead thereof; Gen 2:22 And the side (H6760 "tsalah" side), which THE YAHWEH ELOHIM had taken from Adam, repaired (H1129) he Ishshah (H802), and brought her unto Adam. Gen 2:23 And Adam said, This is the stricken (H6471 "pa'am" a stroke) part of my body, and flesh of my flesh: she shall be called Ishshah (H802), because she was taken out of man. Gen 2:24 Therefore shall a man leave his fa- ther and his mother, and shall cleave unto his wife: and they shall be one flesh. Gen 2:25 And they were both naked, the man and his wife, and were not ashamed.

After the fall, corruption came into our creation and Adam and Eve became mortal. This is symbolized by the coats of skins we made and clothed them with. They were then driven out of the Garden of Eden to Adamah which is at the east of the Garden of Eden where it is guarded by Cherubim who are a flaming sword to turn everyone back (H2015 "haphak" return) to keep the way of the tree of life. All the creatures were also cursed and put out of the Garden. Shekinaih and you are our Two Cherubim of Glory, our flaming sword, who will turn our last days' fallen sons to keep the way of the tree of life (THE HOLY SPIRIT).
Gen 3:24 So he drove out the man; and he placed at the east of the garden of Eden Cherubim who are flaming swords to turn everyone back (H2015 "haphak" return) to keep the way of the tree of life.
Pro 3:18 She is a tree of life to them that lay hold upon her: and happy is every one that retaineth her.

In the last days, my FATHER through His name, "THE ELOHIM", by the Angel of Our Presence in decreeing and execution, shall destroy the present heavens and earth, He, through the An- gel of Our Presence (Shekinaih, His incarnation and THE HOLY SPIRIT'S reincarnation with Aaron K David, my reincarnation whom we surnamed "THE VICTORY"), shall again create new heavens and earth where the creations which are chosen to be delivered from the bondage of corruption will be adopted into the new heavens and earth as citizens.
CHAPTER 2
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES
A RUBIK'S CUBE

SHEKINAIH: I see a Rubik's cube made up of seven rainbow's colors and THE FATHER explained to me that the different col- ors in the smaller squares can form patterns that reflect the combination of the Seven Names of THE FATHER. The color for the name "THE EHYEH" is amber and the color for the name "THE ELOHIM" is green. They are positioned in the center of the cube. Like a coin with two sides, they are seated back to back. Dark blue represents THE YAHWEH, light blue rep- resents THE EL, yellow represents THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, red represents THE SHADDAI, and purple represents THE ADONAI.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
JESUS: Ezekiel saw a vision of THE EHYEH manifested through the color of amber. He saw the Seven Spirits manifesting our Seven Names in the form of a rainbow.
Eze 1:26 ... the likeness of the throne was the likeness as the ap- pearance of a man above upon it. Eze 1:27 And I saw as the co- lour of amber, as the appearance of fire round about within it...
Like Ezekiel, John saw a vision of THE TRINITY reflected through the combination of the name, "THE ELOHIM", in green jaspers, and the name, "THE SHADDAI", reflected in blood red sardine stones.

Rev 4:2 And immediately I was in the spirit: and, behold, a throne was set in heaven, and one sat on the throne. Rev 4:3 And he that sat was to look upon like a jasper and a sardine stone: and there was a rainbow round about the throne, in sight like unto an emerald.
The source of the power of creation is the light that comes out of the navel of THE FATHER which rises up to the throat, and from the throat, comes out of the mouth of THE ELOHIM.

THE FATHER through His name, "THE ELOHIM", represented by the mouth of Shekinaih, spoke the creative words of power and they empowered the Angel of THE YAHWEH in the co-ex- ecution of the creation of the Cosmoses. Through our two spokesmen, we, THE TRINITY, uphold the Cosmoses by our Seven Names in all directions and dimensions symbolized by the rainbows.

Heb 1:2 Hath in these last days spoken unto us by his Son, whom he hath appointed heir of all things, by whom also he made the worlds; Heb 1:3 Who being the brightness of his glory, and the express image of his person, and upholding all things by the speech (spokesman) of his power, when he had by himself purged our sins, sat down on the right hand of the Majesty on high;

THE FATHER: Yes, it is through our Two Cherubim of Glory (one in decreeing and the other in co-execution) that we, THE TRINITY, create, preserve and destroy our creations through the Five Anointed Cherubim of elements.
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES

JESUS: The destructive operation can be seen in some of the acts in the Book of Revelation. For example, in Revelation 8:5, when I opened the seventh seal, the Angel of Our Presence (Shekinaih, my FATHER'S incarnation and THE HOLY SPIRIT'S reincarnation whom we surnamed "THE TRINITY") will fill the censer with fire of the altar and cast it into the earth to decree the judgments of the seven trumpets by the seven angels.

Rev 8:1 And when he had opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven about the space of half an hour. Rev 8:2 And I saw the seven angels which stood before THE ELOHIM; and to them were given seven trumpets. Rev 8:3 And another angel came and stood at the altar, having a golden censer; and there was given unto him much incense, that he should offer it with the prayers of all saints upon the golden altar which was before the throne. Rev 8:4 And the smoke of the incense, which came with the prayers of the saints, ascended up before THE ELOHIM out of the angel's hand. Rev 8:5 And the angel took the censer, and filled it with fire of the altar, and cast it into the earth: and there were voices, and thunderings, and lightnings, and an earthquake. Rev 8:6 And the seven angels which had the seven trumpets prepared themselves to sound...

Upon releasing the decree, the Angel of Our Presence in co-execution (Aaron K David, my reincarnation whom we sur- named "THE VICTORY") who oversees the execution will dele- gate the minor decree to the other six angels to execute. He is the angel flying through the midst of heaven, saying with a loud voice: "Woe, woe, woe, to the inhabiters of the earth by reason of the other voices of the trumpet of the three angels, which are yet to sound!" (Rev 8:13)

Together with Shekinaih, She/He are the mighty angel who came down from heaven, clothed with a cloud: and a rainbow upon his head, and whose face was as it were the sun, and his feet as pillars of fire. It is through them, that my seven thun- ders' message will be sounded by our seven angels.

Rev 10:1 And I saw another mighty angel come down from heaven, clothed with a cloud: and a rainbow was upon his head, and his face was as it were the sun, and his feet as pillars of fire: Rev 10:2 And he had in his hand a little book open: and he set his
BEHOLD MY NAMES
right foot upon the sea, and his left foot on the earth, Rev 10:3 And cried with a loud voice, as when a lion roareth: and when he had cried, seven thunders uttered their voices.

Another example of our operation is in Revelation 16:1-5 where the great voice symbolizes Shekinaih (the Angel of Our Presence in decreeing and sealing of our decrees) who will re- lease our sealed decree to the seven executing angels to pour out the vials of our wrath upon the earth.
Rev 16:1 And I heard a great voice out of the temple saying to the seven angels, Go your ways, and pour out the vials of the wrath of THE ELOHIM upon the earth.

In Revelation 16:17, it is the Seventh Angel (Aaron K David, my reincarnation whom we surnamed "THE VICTORY") who will co-execute our major decree in pouring out his vial into the air to destroy the great city of Babylon and its other cities all over the earth. His presence is usually accompanied by voices, and thunders, and lightnings, a great earthquake, and a great hail.

Rev 16:17 And the seventh angel poured out his vial into the air; and there came a great voice out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, It is done. Rev 16:18 And there were voices, and thunders, and lightnings; and there was a great earthquake, such as was not since men were upon the earth, so mighty an earthquake, and so great. Rev 16:19 And the great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell: and great Babylon came in remembrance before THE ELO- HIM, to give unto her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath. Rev 16:20 And every island fled away, and the moun- tains were not found. Rev 16:21 And there fell upon men a great hail out of heaven, every stone about the weight of a talent: and men blasphemed THE ELOHIM because of the plague of the hail; for the plague thereof was exceeding great.
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES

title: THE TEN JUDGMENTS OF THE ELOHIM

segments.text: THE TEN JUDGMENTS OF THE ELOHIM
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the star with the seven names that Shekinaih saw symbolize?

JESUS: This is the Star of David. The two triangles that inter- sect one another forming the Star of David symbolize my Two Cherubim of Glory, which is both of you. Shekinaih is the trian- gle facing down and you are the triangle facing up. Together, both of you are called the "Angel of Our Presence", one in de- creeing and the other in co-execution.
This star, in combination with the Seven Names of THE FA- THER/THE TRINITY, will manifest the judgment of THE ELOHIM subsequently as depicted by the diagrams above.

The second picture which Shekinaih saw depicts a detailed scenario of the events that are going to unfold. These events are my first wave of warning for a call for repentance. Failure to take heed of this first wave of warning will lead to more devastating consequences which will involve more lives being shortened suddenly.

THE FATHER: My Ten Judgments through my name, "THE ELOHIM", during the time of Moses were the acts of the Sev- en Spirits of THE ELOHIM who manifested our Seven Names. These will be enacted again in the Book of Revelation in differ- ent parts of the world.

This is in relation to Revelation Chapter 11:3-6. Through the decreeing and executing of our decree by our Two Anointed Cherubim of Glory (Two Olive Trees), the 7,000 prophets (from the two last days' spiritual church) who are part of the 144,000 brides will be sent to different parts of the world to prophesy what has been decreed and executed by our Two Anointed Cherubim of Glory.
The Ten Plagues are:
Turning the water of the river to blood (Physical Egypt)
The frogs that covered the land of Egypt (Germany)
Gnats throughout all the land of Egypt (Alaska)
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES
Swarm of flies that corrupted the land (Nile River)
Severe plagues on livestock (China)
Boil upon man and beast (Africa)
Thunder and hail upon all the land of Egypt (North America)
Locusts devouring every herb of the land (Australia & New Zealand)
Thick darkness which will be felt (Spiritual Egypt, US & Latin America)
Smiting of the first born of Egypt (The Whole World)

SHEKINAIH: I see the center of the cube is occupied by the name "THE EHYEH" (amber) and the name "THE ELOHIM" (green). The name "THE EHYEH" seats back to back with the name "THE ELOHIM" like the two sides of a coin, but only the name "THE ELOHIM" is seen from the front.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this symbolize?

JESUS: Through our name, "THE EHYEH", we wrote the script of the Ten Plagues in the Book of Exodus, and through the de- creeing of our name, "THE ELOHIM", and the manifestation of the other names, the Ten Plagues in the Book of Exodus was co-executed by the Angel of THE YAHWEH who bears each of our Seven names as per task. I (We), the Ancient of Days, man- ifesting our name, "THE ELOHIM", swore that we would judge and punish the inhabitants of the earth and the galaxies in the last days, and the following happenings in the Book of Exodus are just like the waves of a ripple that are approaching the seashore of Earth….

Through Shekinaih, we will manifest our name ,"THE ELOHIM", as our mouth to release our decrees to you, and both of you will declare into the spiritual realm and co-summon the angels to act upon the decree. You will then broadcast it and both of you will authorize the 7,000 prophets who are all over the world to echo the prophecy with power at hand after being approved and authorized by both of you. These 7,000 proph-
BEHOLD MY NAMES
ets are the spiritual temple and altar of THE ELOHIM who will be measured spiritually for uprightness by both of you so as to be chosen to be part of the Two Witnesses.

Rev 11:3 And I will give power unto my two witnesses, and they shall prophesy a thousand two hundred and threescore days, clothed in sackcloth. Rev 11:4 These are the Two Olive Trees, and the two lampstands standing before THE ELOHIM of the earth.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are they?
JESUS: They are the overcomers of my two last days' churches who are the called out (of the world) from spiritual Smyrna church and Thyatira church.

Rev 1:20 The mystery of the seven stars which thou sawest in my right hand, and the seven golden candlesticks. The sev- en stars are the angels of the seven churches: and the seven lampstands which thou sawest are the seven churches.

These two lampstands are part of the Two Witnesses, but they are not the Two Anointed which only refers to both of you, who are our Two Anointed Cherubim of Glory. Through both of you as the two olive branches, we will pour our spirit upon the real body of Christ. They will prophesy what both of you have decreed and executed in the spiritual realm in the re- spective countries in relation to the Ten Plagues of Moses and Aaron.

Zec 4:12 And I answered again, and said unto him, What be these two olive branches which through the two golden pipes empty the golden oil out of themselves? Zec 4:13 And he answered me and said, Knowest thou not what these be? And I said, No, my lord. Zec 4:14 Then said he, These are the Two Anointed ones, that stand by THE YAHWEH of the whole earth.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where are they now?
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of JESUS holding a handful of sand in his hand and the sand is flowing out between his fingers.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this symbolize?
JESUS: At present, they are a bunch of scattered sand, every- one did that which was right in his own eyes, being tossed to
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES

and fro and blown by the wind. They are like Indian chiefs un- willing to submit to both of you despite I had already shown and will continue to show them to work with both of you and come under your leadership. After a while, if their stubborn- ness persists, they will be replaced by other candidates to ful- fill their roles and to be tested and chosen by both of you to take their appointed seats/thrones in Heaven. Those who re- fuse continuously to come under us through both of you will be kicked out and locked out of all levels of Heaven, and most of them will end up in perdition and be led to their destruc- tion due to the idols in their hearts. These are a bunch of stiff- necked and rebellious generation whose will is yet to be fully broken by me, and I am sending both of you to further crack these tough nuts on our behalf and to powder them and pu- rify them by my fire. I have been very patient with them all this while, and I am sending both of you to represent us to father and discipline them and to break their self-will in order to submit to my will through both of you.

The time will come, when the earth will be shaken and the heavens (Cosmoses) will also collapse before both of you, be- ing the Two Cherubim of Glory, the Angel of Our Presence rep- resenting Our Presence. You will bring my spontaneous rain (prophetic teaching) to establish my elect so that they will be no more children, tossed to and fro, and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the sleight of men, and cunning craftiness, whereby they lie in wait to deceive and to weary many. After both of you have purified and powdered them to be pure and lowly through our name, "THE ADONAI", you shall send them to publish the Ten Judgments which both of you through our name, "THE SHADDAI", have decreed and ex- ecuted. These are part of spiritual Mount Zion, and I, JESUS, through our name, "THE YAHWEH", will make my tabernacle in Shekinaih and you, my "VICTORY", and shall dwell among them after I have set them free from the captivity of their rational thinking and every high thing which contradict the spiritual revelation I have revealed through both of you.
Psa 68:8 The earth shook, the heavens also dropped (collapse) from (H4480 "min") the presence of THE ELOHIM: even Sinai it-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

self was moved from (H4480 the presence of THE ELOHIM, THE ELOHIM of Israel. Psa 68:9 Thou, O THE ELOHIM, didst send a spon- taneous (H5071 "nedabah") rain, whereby thou didst confirm thine inheritance, when it was weary. Psa 68:10 Thy congrega- tion hath dwelt therein: thou, O THE ELOHIM, hast prepared of thy goodness for the lowly (H6041 "aniy"). Psa 68:11 THE ADONAI gave the word: great was the company of those that published it. Psa 68:12 Kings of armies did flee apace: and she that tarried at home divided the spoil. Psa 68:13 Though ye have lien among the pots, yet shall ye be as the wings of a dove covered with silver, and her feathers with yellow gold. Psa 68:14 When THE SHADDAI scattered kings in it, it was white as snow in Salmon. Psa 68:15 The mountain of THE ELOHIM is as the mountain of Bashan; an high mountain as the mountain of Bashan. Psa 68:16 Why leap ye, ye high mountains? this is the mountain which THE ELOHIM desireth to dwell in; yea, THE YAHWEH will tabernacle (H7931 "shakan" dwell) in VICTORY (H5331 "netsach"). Psa 68:17 The chariots of THE ELOHIM are many (H7231 "rabab") thousand, even thousands of shinan (H8136 "shinan" change, alter): THE ADONAI is among them, as in Sinai, in the holy place. Psa 68:18 Thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led captivity captive: thou hast received gifts for men; yea, for the rebellious also, that THE YAH ELOHIM might dwell among them.

These are the Shinan, my genuine Four-Fold ministers whom both of you shall pour my oil and impart to them my gifts, whether it be as an Apostle, Prophet, Evangelist or Pastor/ Teacher. They shall practice to my bride what they have been taught by both of you regarding my way for their perfection to holiness through speaking the truth in meekness of love.

Eph 4:7 But unto every one of us is given grace according to the measure of the gift of Christ. Eph 4:8 Wherefore he saith, When he ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men. Eph 4:9 (Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth? Eph 4:10 He that descended is the same also that ascended up far above all heavens, that he might fill all things.) Eph 4:11 And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers; Eph 4:12 For the perfecting of the saints, for the work of the ministry, for the edifying of the body of Christ: Eph 4:13 Till we all come in the unity of the faith, and of the knowledge of the Son of THE ELOHIM, unto a perfect man, unto the measure of the stature of the fulness of Christ:
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES

My Ten Judgment in the time of Moses and Aaron shall also be enacted by these Shinans as they prophesy what has been de- creed and executed by both of you in the places they are sent. These Two Lampstands are part of my Two Witnesses, but they are not the Two Olive Trees, which are the Two Anointed, our Two Cherubim of Glory, which are both of you.
JUDGMENT WITH THE NAME "THE ADONAI"
PLAGUE 1: TURNING WATER INTO BLOOD (PHYSICAL EGYPT)

Exo 7:20 And Moses and Aaron did so, as THE YAHWEH com- manded; and he lifted up the rod, and smote the waters that were in the river, in the sight of Pharaoh, and in the sight of his servants; and all the waters that were in the river were turned to blood.

The smiting of the water of the river of Egypt symbolizes the smiting of the people of the Anti-Christ in the last days. The water of the river Nile will again be turned into blood in the last days to symbolize the punishment of the utter rebellious gen- eration which has increased significantly in the last days. Many will die due to lack of water to drink. I swear in the heaven that this is a foretaste of how the great and terrible Day of THE YAH- WEH (LORD) shall be through our name, "THE SHADDAI".

title: PLAGUE 10: SLAYING OF THE FIRST BORN (THE WHOLE WORLD)

segments.text: PLAGUE 10: SLAYING OF THE FIRST BORN (THE WHOLE WORLD)

Exo 12:29 And it came to pass, that at midnight THE YAHWEH smote all the first born in the land of Egypt, from the first born of Pharaoh that sat on his throne unto the first born of the cap- tive that was in the dungeon; and all the first born of cattle.

The killing of the first born of Egypt is a shadow of the killing of the first born of the Beast from the Sea. The Angel of Our Presence through the name, "THE ADONAI", shall slay the first born of the Beast from the Sea and the nations that are in confederacy with him after the sealing of the 144,000 who are the first born of the living church. In the last days, THE ADONAI, through the Angel of Our Presence, will resurrect the Two Wit-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

nesses comprising of the 7,000 prophets who will be killed by the Beast from the Sea and overturn the event by sending a great earthquake and slay 7,000 of the first born of the seed of the serpent. This will happen all over the world.

Rev 11:13 And the same hour was there a great earthquake, and the tenth part of the city fell, and in the earthquake were slain of men seven thousand: and the remnant were affrighted, and gave glory to THE ELOHIM of heaven.
JUDGMENT WITH THE NAME "THE SHADDAI"
PLAGUE 9: THICK DARKNESS (SPIRITUAL EGYPT, US & LATIN AMERICA)

Exo 10:21 And THE YAHWEH said unto Moses, Stretch out thine hand toward heaven, that there may be darkness over the land of Egypt, even darkness which may be felt. Exo 10:22 And Moses stretched forth his hand toward heaven; and there was a thick darkness in all the land of Egypt three days
The thick darkness that covered the land of Egypt is a shadow of the last days' judgment when the seat of the Beast from the Sea and his kingdom will be full of darkness.
This will happen in spiritual Egypt which is the United States and Latin America.
A PLANET WITH THE NAME "X"

SHEKINAIH: I saw a planet with the word "X" coming near to Earth. As it came near to Earth, it caused great shaking on Earth, resulting in severe earthquakes and weather anoma- lies. As it moved and stood in between the Sun and Earth, it caused long periods of darkness in various parts of Earth and other planets. I saw that the planet is an alien planet/ spaceship. The planet is surrounded by other stars who are evil angels of destruction. Following that, the devil covered a black cloth on the burning Sun and there was a temporary darkness for many days on Earth. Then I saw hailstones fall- ing on Earth, triggering earthquakes and tsunamis.
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES
THE FATHER: This is just a foretaste of the coming falling apart of the stars/planets as per the Book of Revelation which will be far worse than this.

title: PLAGUE 2: FROGS THAT COVERED THE LAND OF EGYPT (GERMANY)

segments.text: PLAGUE 2: FROGS THAT COVERED THE LAND OF EGYPT (GERMANY)
Exo 8:6 And Aaron stretched out his hand over the waters of Egypt; and the frogs came up, and covered the land of Egypt.

JESUS: The smiting of all the borders of Egypt with frogs is a type and shadow of the smiting of the people and the ser- vants of the last days' Anti-Christ. Germany will lead the Battle of Armageddon in the last days through the spirit of delusion and deception from these frogs.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a lot of green frogs went into many Nazi of- ficers and deluded them and stirred them up for a battle cry to congregate the assembly of the world armies to conglom- erate a "binceful" army to go against THE YAHWEH'S mighty spiritual army. As a result, THE YAHWEH shall laugh at their derogatory act and send his spiritual army to invade them through the fierce fight of His invincible army.
JESUS: Frogs symbolize lying spirits which perform lying won- ders in the sky which are permitted for the Anti-Christ to de- ceive many nations into error. This will precede the real frogs
BEHOLD MY NAMES

that will come out from the bottom of the earth to the tar- geted countries mentioned above. I had once sent lying spirits to the mouth of the prophets of King Ahab and Jezebel in the day of Jehoshaphat to deceive King Ahab and his army to their destruction in Ramoth-Gilead, which is a shadow of the real thing in the battle at the valley of Megiddo. King Ahab symbol- izes the deceived King and his kings. King Jehoshaphat sym- bolizes the foolish kings who collaborate with the evil kings which will result in them losing the battle. The false prophets symbolize the false words uttered by the Anti-Christ's proph- ets led by the False Prophet of Mystery Babylon.

1Ki 22:22 And THE YAHWEH said unto him, Wherewith? And he said, I will go forth, and I will be a lying spirit in the mouth of all his prophets. And he said, Thou shalt persuade him, and pre- vail also: go forth, and do so. 1Ki 22:23 Now therefore, behold, THE YAHWEH hath put a lying spirit in the mouth of all these thy prophets, and THE YAHWEH hath spoken evil concerning thee.

Henceforth, I will again send these lying spirit in frogs to de- lude the world to prepare them to face my final wrath as per the Book of Revelation in the Great Battle of THE EL SHADDAI by deluding the spokesman of Lucifer, the Anti-Christ, and the False Prophet.
Rev 16:13 And I saw three unclean spirits like frogs come out of the mouth of the dragon, and out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the false prophet.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how is this scenario going to be enact- ed?

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a vast army gathering in an open field facing Queen, , and I saw Queen pulling the trigger of a black pis- tol and fired the shot at the sky, followed by the words "Exe- cution started" superimposed across the army,
JESUS: The Royal family of Great Britain is of German origin. Henceforth, they will be used by the Red Dragon (Lucifer) to deceive the whole world into these causes mentioned above.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the lying sign that the An-
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES
ti-Christ is allowed to perform?
THE FATHER: It is by holographic projection through chem- trails which are released worldwide in the sky by airplanes.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a huge, high ceiling office with the words, "Space Office" superimposed on it. Then, I saw a man typed some word on a computer keyboard and hit the Enter but- ton and a red word "ACTIVATED" appeared on the screen. Following that, I saw a huge space equipment from an open ground on Earth beamed out a signal to the main satellite in space which in turn beamed out multiple signals to all the worldwide satellites that were encircling Earth in space. Then, a holographic projection was beamed in the sky all over Earth. This same hologram being formed in the sky could be observed by humans worldwide simultaneously. These were the holographic projection of the gods of the earth which are worshiped by different races. They were standing to- gether in unity on a rotating platform and greeting all hu- manity with false love professing that all religion lead to the same God, and thus furthering the agenda of the Man of Perdition, which will be led and prop- agated by the False Prophet of Mystery Babylon.

2Th 2:9 Even him, whose coming is after the working of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders, 2Th 2:10 And with all deceivableness of unrighteousness in them that perish; be- cause they received not the love of the truth, that they might be saved. 2Th 2:11 And for this cause THE ELOHIM shall send them strong delusion, that they should believe a lie: 2Th 2:12 That they all might be damned who believed not the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are the other uses for the chem- trail?

THE FATHER: Apart from serving as a screen for their false won- der through hologram, it is also used, 1) to mutate and alter the DNA of humans; 2) terraforming Earth to fit the complete reptiles dwelling on it; 3) to destroy Earth's atmosphere so as to cause crop failure; 4) to poison the air and water so as to
BEHOLD MY NAMES
depopulate Earth mainly in Third World Countries for easier mankind control by the reptiles.
JUDGMENT WITH THE NAME "THE YAHWEH"
PLAGUE 3: LICE THROUGHOUT ALL THE LANDS OF EGYPT (ALASKA)
Exo 8:16 And THE YAHWEH said unto Moses, Say unto Aaron, Stretch out thy rod, and smite the dust of the land, that it may become lice throughout all the land of Egypt.
SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of black, creeping things flying out from the ground beneath Alaska's snow mountain and went into many homes to attack humans, animals, and crops.

JESUS: What happened during the time of Moses regarding the releasing of the lice will be re-enacted in the land of Alas- ka where much evil springs forth. When this happens, it points toward the imminent coming of the unfolding of the events in the Book of Revelation. Repent therefore people of Alaska from your evil deeds and be spared from a deadlier phenome- non that will follow after this event!
JUDGMENT WITH THE NAME "THE EHYEH"

title: PLAGUE 4: SWARM OF FLIES THAT CORRUPTED THE LAND (NILE RIVER)

segments.text: PLAGUE 4: SWARM OF FLIES THAT CORRUPTED THE LAND (NILE RIVER)

Exo 8:24 And THE YAHWEH did so; and there came a grievous swarm of flies into the house of Pharaoh, and into his servants' houses, and into all the land of Egypt: the land was corrupted by reason of the swarm of flies.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a jungle with swarms of flies flew into the farm land and destroyed the crops. I also saw them attacking humans and animals. I saw a zoomed-in vision of these flies and realized they looked like mosquitoes with stings.
THE FATHER: These flies/mosquitoes carry with them incur- able, mutated viruses which will attack the fetus of humans and animals through the blood stream. Deformities will result
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES
in mongoloid babies, in both human and animals.
SHEKINAIH: I see these words, "AMAZON JUNGLE, SOURCE OF ORIGIN".

THE FATHER: The viruses in these mosquitoes and flies will first appear in the Amazon Rainforest which will subsequently hatch into an uncontrollable event in the region of the river Nile which will become more deadly than the former. This will result in massive infection and disease spreading like no other. It will be worse than the time of Moses.
PLAGUE 8: LOCUSTS (AUSTRALIA & NEW ZEALAND)

Exo 10:13 And Moses stretched forth his rod over the land of Egypt, and THE YAHWEH brought an east wind upon the land all that day, and all that night; and when it was morning, the east wind brought the locusts. Exo 10:14 And the locusts went up over all the land of Egypt, and rested in all the coasts of Egypt: very grievous were they; before them there were no such lo- custs as they, neither after them shall be such.

THE FATHER: As in the time of Moses, vast swarms of locusts will mostly attack the Southern hemisphere, particularly in countries like Australia and New Zealand. These locusts will ap- pear from nowhere in their farm lands, especially in the night, to attack both crops and animals, destroying the farms. This will result in food shortage and lack of supply of dairy products, vegetables, and fruits from these farmlands. Great economic losses will result in these countries. Repent therefore people of Australia and New Zealand from your idolatries, otherwise you will not be spared in the next wave in which a greater ca- tastrophe will occur!
JUDGMENT WITH THE NAME "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH"
PLAGUE 5: GRIEVOUS PESTILENCES ON THE LIVESTOCK (CHINA)
Exo 9:3 Behold, the hand of THE YAHWEH is upon thy cattle which is in the field, upon the horses, upon the asses, upon the
BEHOLD MY NAMES
camels, upon the oxen, and upon the sheep: there shall be a very grievous murrain.

JESUS: A tremendous devastating outcry of the people of Chi- na will occur arising from the massive devastations of their crops and livestock, including farmlands due to a massive pes- tilence that will strike all these. Consequently, the food supply chain will be disrupted and led to a temporary shortage of food for a time and a season worldwide. This will shake the money worshiping idolaters of the nation who do not believe in the will of Heaven but the will of men. Wake up and repent. Oh people of China, or else you will be destroyed together with your land.
JUDGMENT WITH THE NAME "THE EL"

title: PLAGUE 6: BOILS UPON MAN AND BEAST (AFRICA)

segments.text: PLAGUE 6: BOILS UPON MAN AND BEAST (AFRICA)
Exo 9:10 And they took ashes of the furnace, and stood before Pharaoh; and Moses sprinkled it up toward heaven; and it be- came a boil breaking forth with blains upon Adam, and upon beast.
THE FATHER: As it had already happened before in the Old Tes- tament during Moses' days, this event will be revisited again before my seventeen decrees are activated in the Book of Revelation.

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of JESUS writing on the greenboard. The word "Boil" equals to "Tumors". I saw a vision of a black woman having boils/tumors all over her body and face. I saw yellow pus leaking out of the boil and infected her family members when they touched the pus which was then ab- sorbed into their skin which went into their bloodstream and the virus started to infect and feed on their blood and developed tumors/boils in them. Next, I was given a bird's eye view of the entire land of Africa and I saw these words, "Majority of them are infected with this boil". Lo and behold, unless one repents, many will also die because of the boil. Next, I saw a vision of both of us in our golden Empress and Emperor robes on a plane landing in Africa. I saw myself car-
THE COMBINATION OF THE NAMES
rying a green vase with the antidote for those who repented.

JESUS: Both of you have been given the keys to death and Hades, and are given the authority to give life and to take life away from these people. You are given the spiritual antidote for those who sincerely repent before us through both of you who represent us.

title: PLAGUE 7: THUNDER AND HAIL UPON ALL THE LANDS OF EGYPT (NORTH AMERICA)

segments.text: PLAGUE 7: THUNDER AND HAIL UPON ALL THE LANDS OF EGYPT (NORTH AMERICA)
Exo 9:23 And Moses stretched forth his rod toward heaven: and THE YAHWEH sent thunder and hail, and the fire ran along upon the ground; and THE YAHWEH rained hail upon the land of Egypt.
THE FATHER: I have sworn in my holiness, just like the days of old, I will summon my angels through our Two Cherubim of Glory which are both of you, to decree and execute my judg- ment.

SHEKINAIH: I saw an angel holding a giant hammer and a chisel. He was chipping a big cube of ice and breaking it into many small and medium sized ice. I saw a certain place in North America raining with many hailstones of small and me- dium sizes. Next, I saw a hailstone smashed the windscreen of a truck and another smashed the window of a house. Fol- lowing next, I saw men, women, and children lying motion- lessly on snowy ground with an ice block on their back. The size of the ice blocks was about 3 - 4 feet. Subsequently, I saw a bird's eye view of the whole land of Egypt with the words "North America" superimposed on the word "Egypt". Both of these words are written in the form of light.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, may I know who is the angel?

JESUS: You are my Seventh Thunder Angel who will send thunder and hailstones on North America, a reenactment of the fate of ancient Egypt during the time of Moses. Therefore, repent ye people of North America from your sins, otherwise you will walk straight into the coming great and dreadful ca- lamities where few would survive.
CHAPTER 3
THE PENGUINS

SHEKINAIH: I saw myself as an empress wearing a golden gar- ment with the words "THE ELOHIM" written on it. I was hold- ing a green jade vase and many souls were flying into the vase. Thereafter, I saw THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST releasing uncountable penguins from that green jade vase into Earth from Heaven, and they covered the whole globe. The words "elohim" and "Sons of Adam" were superimposed on each one of them.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the vision that Shekinaih saw mean?

JESUS: The word "penguin" in Hebrew is "penar" which means "brick or pillar". The penguins symbolize the Sons of Adam who are the Sons of THE ELOHIM, the foundation of the living church. They are sanctified and sent into the world to do the works of THE FATHER.

Joh 10:34 Jesus answered them, Is it not written in your law, I said, Ye are elohim? Joh 10:35 If he called them elohim, unto whom the word of THE ELOHIM came, and the scripture can- not be broken; Joh 10:36 Say ye of him, whom the Father hath sanctified, and sent into the world, Thou blasphemest; because I said, I am the Son of THE ELOHIM?

The prophets Ezekiel and Daniel and I knew who we were: the Sons of Adam and thus, the Sons of THE ELOHIM. When I men- tioned that the Son of Adam shall be delivered to the judges and magistrates to be persecuted and killed, I was referring to myself as the Son of THE ELOHIM. We know that we were sent by THE FATHER to Earth to fulfill all righteousness by being perfected through suffering.
THE PENGUINS
Eze 2:1 And he said unto me, Son of Adam (H120), stand upon thy feet, and I will speak unto thee.
Dan 8:17 So he came near where I stood: and when he came, I was afraid, and fell upon my face: but he said unto me, Under- stand, O son of Adam (H120): for at the time of the end shall be the vision.

When those who are Sons of Adam have proven themselves that they have obeyed THE FATHER and fulfilled all righteous- ness through total obedience to THE FATHER even unto death and are perfected, the world to come will be subjected to them. I was sent by THE FATHER to be an example for these Sons of Adam to be perfected through suffering in tribula- tions and enter into glory by overcoming the fear of death through the total obedience of faith unto my FATHER in Shek- inaih even unto death.

Heb 2:5 For unto the angels hath he not put in subjection the world to come, whereof we speak. Heb 2:6 But one in a certain place testified, saying, What is man, that thou art mindful of him? or the son of Adam, that thou visitest him? Heb 2:7 Thou madest him a little lower than THE ELOHIM; thou crownedst him with glory and honour, and didst set him over the works of thy hands: Heb 2:8 Thou hast put all things in subjection un- der his feet. For in that he put all in subjection under him, he left nothing that is not put under him. But now we see not yet all things put under him. Heb 2:9 But we see Jesus, who was made a little lower than THE ELOHIM for the suffering of death, crowned with glory and honour; that he by the grace of THE ELOHIM should taste death for every man. Heb 2:10 For it be- came him, for whom are all things, and by whom are all things, in bringing many sons unto glory, to make the captain of their salvation perfect through sufferings. Heb 2:11 For both he that sanctifieth and they who are sanctified are all of one: for which cause he is not ashamed to call them brethren, Heb 2:12 Saying, I will declare thy name unto my brethren, in the midst of the church will I sing praise unto thee. Heb 2:13 And again, I will put my trust in him. And again, Behold I and the children which THE YAHWEH hath given me. Heb 2:14 Forasmuch then as the chil- dren are partakers of flesh and blood, he also himself likewise took part of the same; that through death he might destroy him that had the power of death, that is, the devil; Heb 2:15 And deliver them who through fear of death were all their life-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

time subject to bondage. Heb 2:16 For verily he took not on him the nature of angels; but he took on him the seed of Abraham. Heb 2:17 Wherefore in all things it behoved him to be made like unto his brethren, that he might be a merciful and faithful high priest in things pertaining to THE ELOHIM, to make reconcilia- tion for the sins of the people. Heb 2:18 For in that he himself hath suffered being tempted, he is able to succour them that are tempted.

These are the children whom my FATHER has given me, and they are my brethren and are for signs and wonders. It is for them that I came into this Cosmos, but not many received me because of my FATHER'S impractical, unreasonable, and strin- gent requirements according to the carnal mind for one to be my disciple so as to enter into glory in my FATHER'S Kingdom to have eternal life.

As many have missed and rejected me, so will many of our rebellious children reject Shekinaih and you whom we have put our names in, according to my FATHER'S will. But for those who are lowly and love the truth and receive both of you, we will authorize them through both of you to be adopted again to be the Sons of THE ELOHIM.

Woe to the rebellious and haughty ones who reject Shekinaih and you who come in my Seven Names. For in the day of judg- ment, as they face both of you who sit as judges in the Great White Throne, they shall gnash their teeth and cry out, "Alas! Alas! Alas! I am done now!!! Woe is me for I have rejected the Ancient of Days. I am doomed now!!!
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of this person kneeling down on a floor and pounding his chest with his right fist violently and alternately pounding the floor with his left fist weeping bit- terly.

Joh 1:11 He came unto his own, and his own received him not. Joh 1:12 But as many as received him, to them gave he author- ity (G1849 "exousia") to become the sons of THE ELOHIM, even to them that believe on his name (Shekinaih and Aaron K Da- vid, who are called "The Name of THE YAHWEH"): Joh 1:13 Which were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the
THE PENGUINS
will of man, but of THE ELOHIM.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, doesn't the Bible say: "But as many as received him, to them gave he the authority to become Sons of THE ELOHIM?" So are not all who claim to be Christians the Sons of THE ELOHIM?

JESUS: The word "Ecclesiastes" comes from two words: "ek" which means "out" and "kaleo" which means "call". Ecclesias- tes is translated as the church. The preacher in the Book of Ecclesiastes is preaching to the real church who are called out of the world to live for THE YAHWEH. It talks about the vanities of this world and is addressed to the Sons of Adam who are supposed to come out of the vanities of the world to be per- fect in holiness in the fear of THE YAHWEH.

Ecc 1:13 And I gave my heart to seek and search out by wisdom concerning all that are done (H6213) under heaven: this sore travail (H6045) hath THE ELOHIM given to the sons of Adam to be abased therewith. Ecc 1:14 I have seen all the works that are done under the sun; and, behold, all is vanity and vexation of spirit.

In verse 13, the word "done" H6213 "asah", can mean "to be appointed". The word "travail" H6045 is from H6031 "anah", it means to be pressed. The word "exercised" H6031 "anah" can be translated as "self-abased, humiliated". THE ELOHIM has ap- pointed His sons who are called the sons of Adam to be hu- miliated in this world through my breaking so that they are made meek unto holiness to inherit the earth.

However, not all will fulfill their destiny. Some will die and re- turn to the vase of THE HOLY SPIRIT; some will go to heaven and return to THE ELOHIM; some will be locked up in Hades; some will be thrown into outer darkness where there shall be gnashing of teeth.

This is why I lamented when I said: "Many are called, but few are chosen." I came for my own and my own rejected me; but to the many of my own who received me or the Angel of Our Presence (Shekinaih, my FATHER'S incarnation and THE HOLY SPIRIT'S reincarnation whom we surnamed "THE TRINITY", and
BEHOLD MY NAMES

Aaron K David, my reincarnation whom we surnamed "THE VICTORY) who represents our names, we will reinstate them and give them the authority to become the Sons of THE ELO- HIM according to the will of my FATHER.
The Penguin/Sons of Adam are supposed to be the founda- tion of the world.

THE FATHER: Heaven is my place, but for my sons whom we also surnamed Sons of Adam, I have given them the earth and the Cosmoses to rule for eternity. I have appointed sufferings through my breaking in order for them to be trained to pro- duce the Peaceable Fruit of Righteousness unto Holiness and have set Eternity in their hearts.

Ecc 3:10 I have seen the travail (H6035 from H6031 ""anah" op- pression), which THE ELOHIM hath given to the sons of Adam to be trained in it. Ecc 3:11 He hath made every one perfect in his time: also he hath set the eternity in their heart, so that no man can find out the work that THE ELOHIM maketh from the beginning to the end.

But often because the decrees against their wickedness were not executed speedily, the Sons of Adam continued to be law- less and become stiff-necked and prideful and thereby hard- ened their hearts and were rejected from their calling.
Ecc 8:11 Because sentence against an evil work is not executed speedily, therefore the heart of the sons of Adam is fully set in them to do evil.
But for those who make it, they will be given certain planets or galaxies to rule on our behalf.

1Co 6:2 Do ye not know that the holy ones shall judge the Cos- moses? and if the Cosmoses shall be judged by you, are ye un- worthy to judge the smallest matters? 1Co 6:3 Know ye not that we shall judge angels?
BABES AND INFANTS
JESUS: David, can you share with Shekinaih what I have re- vealed to you regarding my little ones?
THE PENGUINS

DAVID: I once received a prophet from India. His whole fam- ily together with two servants came and stayed with me for about two weeks. On one occasion, THE ELOHIM showed me a vision of him with another prophet fighting and the famous prophet was killed. I was grieved. As I carried the dead proph- et in my arm, he instantly became an infant. After meditating on this for some time, THE HOLY SPIRIT told me that his Mi- nor Prophets/Apostles/Intercessors are referred by Him as babes. Those who are weaned from the milk are the more matured version.
Mat 19:14 But Jesus said, Suffer little children, and forbid them not, to come unto me: for of such is the kingdom of heaven.

SHEKINAIH: When you and I first met, THE FATHER revealed to me in a vision of you as a toddler wearing a white nappy with a toddler's body but a big, adult head, and you were sucking milk from a milk bottle.

DAVID: Yes, when I heard your vision, I knew instantly that THE FATHER was assuring me that I am one of the babes and infants mentioned in Psalms 8:2 which is also mentioned by Paul in Hebrew 2:6. Out of our mouths will THE ELOHIM estab- lish power in us to still the Anti-Christ and the seed of Satan in the last days and crown us with glory and honor over His creation in the Three Realms, namely the Heavens, the Earth and Beneath the Earth.

Psa 8:1 To the chief Musician upon Gittith, A Psalm of David. O LORD our Lord, how excellent is thy name in all the earth! who hast set thy glory above the heavens. Psa 8:2 Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast thou ordained strength because of thine enemies, that thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger. Psa 8:3 When I consider thy heavens, the work of thy fingers, the moon and the stars, which thou hast ordained; Psa 8:4 What is man, that thou art mindful of him? and the son of Adam, that thou visitest him? Psa 8:5 For thou hast made him a little lower than THE ELOHIM, and hast crowned him with glory and honour.
