Psa 8:6 Thou madest him to have dominion over the works of thy hands; thou hast put all things under his feet: Psa 8:7 All sheep and oxen, yea, and the beasts of the field; Psa 8:8 The fowl of the air, and the fish of the sea, and whatsoever
BEHOLD MY NAMES
passeth through the paths of the seas. Psa 8:9 O LORD our Lord, how excellent is thy name in all the earth!

Because of this Revelation, I had forsaken all when THE HOLY SPIRIT called me 20 years ago after convicting me of the van- ities of this world when I was 35 years old. As a matter of fact, though I have been a Christian since I was 13 years old, my real spiritual growth began only after I started to desire the sincere milk of the Word. Through the drawing of THE HOLY SPIRIT, I stopped my business in Real Estate and entered into a period of seeking THE YAHWEH which involved 12 to 15 hours of studying the scriptures every day. This went on for more than 10 years without fail. THE HOLY SPIRIT would reveal to me through dreams, visions, and prophetic words and I would research and try to interpret them. I became addicted to this activity and devoured the words of THE ELOHIM in the scripture like a thirsty man in the desert and never seemed to be quenched of my thirst for Him. I went to the extreme of listening to the audio bible every night while I was asleep. When I was awake, I continued my bible studying. THE FA- THER through His HOLY SPIRIT captivated my heart so much so that this world became not my home, and to my wife and children, I became a stranger to them. My only consolation was that THE FATHER did not stop showing his prophets who prayed for me that THE ELOHIM had shown them that my spirit man was full of light. This had encouraged me to perse- vere in my seeking.
1Pe 2:2 As newborn babes, desire the sincere milk of the word, that ye may grow thereby: 1Pe 2:3 If so be ye have tasted that THE YAHWEH is gracious.
A SNAKE CHARMER

THE HOLY SPIRIT once showed a vision of me as a snake charm- er playing a pungi. I asked THE HOLY SPIRIT for the meaning of this vision and He told me that it was about a brother. I knew him for many years and one day, THE ELOHIM showed me his fate: Because of his lawlessness and ungodliness, THE ELOHIM
THE PENGUINS

was going to take him back soon. At present, he is sitting un- der the covering of false apostles. He once approached me to join him in the Apostolic Ministry that is ordaining minis- ters internationally. I inquired from THE TRINITY regarding His will about this institutional organization whose headquarter is in the UK, and THE FATHER gave me the following verses through a vision from this brother.

Psa 58:1 To the chief Musician, Altaschith, Michtam of David. Do ye indeed speak righteousness, O congregation? do ye judge uprightly, O ye sons of Adam? Psa 58:2 Yea, in heart ye work wickedness; ye weigh the violence of your hands in the earth. Psa 58:3 The wicked are estranged from the womb: they go astray as soon as they be born, speaking lies. Psa 58:4 Their poi- son is like the poison of a serpent: they are like the deaf adder that stoppeth her ear; Psa 58:5 Which will not hearken to the voice of charmers, charming never so wisely. Psa 58:6 Break their teeth, O ELOHIM, in their mouth: break out the great teeth of the young lions, O YAHWEH. Psa 58:7 Let them melt away as waters which run continually: when he bendeth his bow to shoot his arrows, let them be as cut in pieces. Psa 58:8 As a snail which melteth, let every one of them pass away: like the un- timely birth of a woman, that they may not see the sun. Psa 58:9 Before your pots can feel the thorns, he shall take them away as with a whirlwind, both living, and in his wrath. Psa 58:10 The righteous shall rejoice when he seeth the vengeance: he shall wash his feet in the blood of the wicked. Psa 58:11 So that a man shall say, Verily there is a reward for the righteous: verily he is THE ELOHIM that judgeth in the earth.

I knew immediately that this ministry is not of THE ELOHIM and I turned down his offer. Because of the connections and recognitions and many privileges of being an ordained minister of this internationally recognized organization, he joined them so as to be ordained and licensed by them to be able to preach in the UK and Europe and in their internation- al denomination worldwide despite THE ELOHIM'S warning through me to him. I was grieved when I knew his decision.
I remember he ever told me that when he was attending the service of a sister church in Singapore of that institutional organization, his spiritual eyes were open while the minister
BEHOLD MY NAMES

was ministering and he saw a demonic bat in human form with bat's wings and face hovering over the minister and looking at the congregation with his wings stretched cov- ering the pulpit. After that, he left the church and no longer attended the service.

I also recall an incident when I met an Australian brother who came to Singapore to visit that church while I was doing a prayer walk with a sister. While we were sitting at one of the aisles, the sister's eyes were opened and she saw at the al- tar many black hooded Satanists. As we continued to pray, they walked down the aisle and passed us. They did not see us but once they reached the entrance of the chapel, they spread their wings and flew away. Following that, THE ELO- HIM opened the sister's eyes again and she saw a vision of that church chained to one of the feet of Sir Stamford Raffles, who was a Freemason.

THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST told me that a snake can be charmed by a snake charmer but this brother is being de- ceived by the deceitfulness of riches and fame. His eyes are blind even though he has been warned several times by THE TRINITY about the background of that organization. All the while, I have been trying to talk to him and warn him of the consequences of a worker of lawlessness and unrighteous- ness but he does not like to hear. Through this, I understood that not all Sons of Adam who are called will be chosen, some will be cast into the outer darkness where there shall be gnashing of teeth. I pray that THE ELOHIM will give him an- other chance to repent, turn back, and be set free from his captivity.
Job 31:3 Is not destruction to the wicked? and a strange punish- ment to the workers of iniquity?
JESUS: David, my delightful VICTORY, what will you speak to these little ones when they are willing to hear you?
DAVID: I will not stop to admonish them that there will be great tribulations coming upon all that dwell in the earth. All the Sons of Adam will be tested in this fiery trial of faith. Only
THE PENGUINS

those with faith and patience will be able to come out of the Great Tribulation and be restored with the glory and author- ity to rule with THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST. The fishes are the brides and the birds are eagle prophets.

Ecc 9:12 For man also knoweth not his time: as the fishes that are taken in an evil net, and as the birds that are caught in the snare; so are the sons of Adam snared in an evil time, when it falleth suddenly upon them.

The Sons of Adam are advised to remember THE ELOHIM when living in peace and to fear Him and obey His commands, be- cause when the Day of THE YAHWEH comes, the Moon shall be darkened, the Sun will not give forth its light, and the stars will fall. When the Beast from the Sea starts to terrorize them, to make a stand whether to be part of Mystery Babylon or to face tribulation and persecution by those who control the world, it might be too late to make an informed decision at that moment.

I will tell them the conclusion of the whole matter: Fear THE ELOHIM, and keep His commandments, for this is the whole duty of an Adam. For THE ELOHIM shall bring every work into judgment, with every secret thing, whether it is good, or whether it is evil.

Ecc 12:1 Remember now thy Creator in the days of thy youth, while the evil days come not, nor the years draw nigh, when thou shalt say, I have no pleasure in them; Ecc 12:2 While the sun, or the light, or the moon, or the stars, be not darkened, nor the clouds return after the rain: Ecc 12:3 In the day when the keepers of the house shall tremble, and the strong men shall be subverted (H5791 "avath" subvert), and the grinders cease because they are few, and those that look out of the windows be darkened, Ecc 12:4 And the doors shall be shut in the streets, when the sound of the grinding is low, and he shall rise up at the voice of the bird, and all the daughters of musick shall be brought low; Ecc 12:5 Also when they shall be afraid of that which is high, and terror (H2849) shall be in the way, and the al- mond tree shall flourish, and the grasshopper shall be a burden, and desire shall fail: because man goeth to his long home, and the mourners go about the streets: Ecc 12:6 Or ever the silver cord be loosed, or the golden bowl be broken, or the pitch-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

er be broken at the fountain, or the wheel broken at the cis- tern. Ecc 12:7 Then shall the dust return to the earth as it was: and the spirit shall return unto THE ELOHIM who gave it. Ecc 12:8 Vanity of vanities, saith the preacher; all is vanity. Ecc 12:9 And moreover, because the preacher was wise, he still taught the people knowledge; yea, he gave good heed, and sought out, and set in order many proverbs. Ecc 12:10 The preacher sought to find out acceptable words: and that which was written was upright, even words of truth. Ecc 12:11 The words of the wise are as goads, and as nails fastened by the chief of assemblies, which are given from an united shepherd (H259). Ecc 12:12 And further, by these, my son, be admonished: of making many books there is no end; and much study is a weariness of the flesh. Ecc 12:13 Let us hear the conclusion of the whole matter: Fear ELOHIM, and keep his commandments: for this is the whole duty of man. Ecc 12:14 For THE ELOHIM shall bring every work into judgment, with every secret thing, whether it be good, or whether it be evil.

JESUS: David, do not stop warning my children of the trouble and distress that are coming upon the earth with signs of un- explained phenomena in the sky and in the sea. In that day, the power and authority of my idol shepherds (keepers of the house) and my rejected anointed ones (strong men) in their ministries will be brought down, and they will cease from their ministries and there will be very few true shepherds. In those dark hours, they will leave the sheep to fend for them- selves, but we shall arise in Shekinaih and you through our names, "THE ELOHIM" and "THE EL", as our ravenous bird from the east (Isa 46:11). My 144,000 spiritual virgin daughters of Zion shall be brought low because of the persecutions and troubles from the high ones (the kings of the earth) and be terrorized; you will have great controversies with the authorities in Chris- tendom, but I will hasten to make an end to all controversies by vindicating both of you as our incarnate and reincarnate. Many who resist both of you will die before their time togeth- er with my unfaithful brides.
David, I have given you the word of wisdom as a sharpening stick to sharpen and drive my true flock and as a nail to plant the ultimate point of their destiny in me. Shekinaih and you
THE PENGUINS
are my united shepherd, the chief of my last days' assembly.

Ask my little ones, "Do you think that you are one of the Sons of Adam? Do you think you are one of the babes and infants who will silent the enemies and the avengers? I am going to send a fire and a sword. The division will have to come. If you love your father, mother, and your children more than me, you are not worthy of me. Everybody will be tested and sifted. Beware of covetousness; life is not about the accumulation of wealth but the accumulation of light from THE FATHER of light. It is better to fear My FATHER than to be chastised by Him through disease and sickness which will end in physical and eternal damnation. Be single towards attaining the peace, righteousness and joy in THE HOLY GHOST which will lead to holiness and eternal glory. Make a stand, be quick to repent, and bring fruits unto repentance because the accuser will not fail in bringing charges against you if you sin."
CHAPTER 4
THE ELOHIM IN SHEKINAIH
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of the word "ELOHIM" enclosed in- side the word "SHEKINAIH" which is in turn enclosed within the word "FATHER."
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the vision that Shekinaih saw symbolize?

JESUS: The spiral means the going forth of creation from the source of origin. THE FATHER is the source of the creative pow- er of His name, "THE ELOHIM", and Shekinaih is THE FATHER'S representative and His incarnation whom we surnamed "THE
THE ELOHIM IN SHEKINAIH
TRINITY", representing us, "THE TRINITY".

THE FATHER: THE ELOHIM, my creative power, is fully operative in me and is in increasing measure in Shekinaih who is called to represent me to rule the heavens, earth, beneath the earth and the Cosmoses. As she is completely submerged in me, her saying has the same authority and power as if they were from my mouth in the three realms, controlling all beings therein.

The spoken word of Shekinaih is the very word that proceeds out of my mouth with my real, authorized creative power in- carnated in her. Her words have the same power and authori- ty from me to control a king's heart like a river course; to turn it whichever way as I direct it to go in an increasing measure to fulfill my purpose which I have commanded through her.
When a person misunderstands Shekinaih my incarnation, or throws a lot of accusations against her or toward THE TRINITY directly ...

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of myself as the Golden Empress seated as the Judge on the golden throne in the three realms with the word "FATHER" written on my forehead. When all the accusations against me came and landed on my table, I just stared at my accuser and they descend to Tartarus imme- diately, and I saw these words, "CANNOT BE RELEASED UNTIL SINCERE REPENTANCE." Then, I saw JESUS standing beside me holding a white sign board with these words written, "BRING FRUIT MEET FOR REPENTANCE."
Next, I saw these words, "THE ACCUSER WILL BE PUT ON THREE MONTHS PROBATION PENDING MODIFIED GOOD BEHAVIOR BE- FORE HE CAN BE TOTALLY RELEASED."

I then saw my accuser kneeling down in front of me in the court room with his hands chained from behind. Then the warden of hell loosened his chain and released him and placed him on probation and he must report to me. If he did not behave well, he would be put back into the jail again.
JESUS: NOBODY CAN LAY A CHARGE AGAINST SHEKINAIH BECAUSE SHE IS THE INCARNATION OF THE FATHER. WHOEVER LAYS A
BEHOLD MY NAMES

CHARGE AGAINST HER IS LAYING A CHARGE AGAINST THE FATHER WHICH WILL NOT STAND IN THE COURT OF HEAVEN, EARTH AND BENEATH THE EARTH, BUT 95% OF HIS SPIRIT WILL BE STRAIGHT- AWAY THROWN INTO TARTARUS UNTIL HIS SINCERE REPENTANCE AND CHANGE IN HEART'S ATTITUDE THROUGH AMENDING HIS WAYS FROM BEING USED BY THE ACCUSER AGAINST US.

title: THE WORDS "THE ELOHIM" ON THE CROSS

segments.text: THE WORDS "THE ELOHIM" ON THE CROSS
THE ELOHIM IN SHEKINAIH
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this diagram that Shekinaih saw in a vision symbolize?

THE FATHER: My power through the name, "THE ELOHIM", can only flow out from a crucified life. You both are my Two Cheru- bim of Glory who manifest the masculine and the feminine as- pects of us, THE TRINITY. Shekinaih represents THE HOLY SPIRIT endowed with the Spirit of Wisdom, the Spirit of Counsel, the Spirit of Knowledge and the Spirit of THE YAHWEH; and you represent my SON JESUS and are endowed with the Spirit of Understanding, the Spirit of Might, and the Spirit of the Fear of THE YAHWEH.

In the last days, both of you will represent us, THE TRINITY, as THE ELOHIM to judge the world as in the Book of Revelation as well as sitting on the Great White Throne to judge the dead according to the deeds that are written in their books.

Rev 20:11 And I saw a great white throne, and him that sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away; and there was found no place for them. Rev 20:12 And I saw the dead, small and great, stand before THE ELOHIM; and the books were opened: and another book was opened, which is the book of life: and the dead were judged out of those things which were written in the books, according to their works.

Lo and Behold, if my sons and daughters reject both of you, they reject us and will by no means inherit their thrones of glory with us in the third heaven but will descend into Ge- henna and the lake of fire (Tartarus). This has been decreed by us and it is unnegotiable, unless Shekinaih chooses to forgive and grant them another chance. Her decision is our seal of approval.

JESUS: Yes, Shekinaih and you represent THE ELOHIM which stands in the congregation of the mighty and judges these Mini-elohim. If they are found to be unjust and are a respect- er of persons and do not defend any of my 144,000 needy brides or deliver (relief as well) any of my 7,000 lowly anointed prophets from their persecutors when they are hungry, thirsty, homeless, naked, sick, or in prison because of the testimony
BEHOLD MY NAMES

of my word in their tribulation, I will say unto them, "You are elohim, you are the Penguins and all of you are children of the Most High who are called to inherit the earth as the pillars (foundation) of the earth, but ye shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes of the Anti-Christ."

Psa 82:1 A Psalm of Asaph. THE ELOHIM standeth in the congre- gation of the mighty; he judgeth among the elohim. Psa 82:2 How long will ye judge unjustly, and accept the persons of the wicked? Selah. Psa 82:3 Defend the poor and fatherless: do jus- tice to the lowly (H6041 "aniy") and needy. Psa 82:4 Deliver the poor and needy: rid them out of the hand of the wicked. Psa 82:5 They know not, neither will they understand; they walk on in darkness: all the foundations of the earth are out of course. Psa 82:6 I have said, Ye are elohim; and all of you are children of the most High. Psa 82:7 But ye shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes. Psa 82:8 Arise, O THE ELOHIM, judge the earth: for thou shalt inherit all nations.
PART 4
THE EL
ACT 5 SCENE 1
Las Vegas and the North Pole

At the pinnacle of the Stratosphere Casino, Hotel & Tow- er in Las Vegas, the tallest observatory tower in the United States, Shekinaih and David came out of a helicopter that had just landed. They were received by THE TRINITY who were al- ready standing on the rooftop. The helicopter then flew off leaving the silhouette of five figures on the rooftop with the noise of the propellers slowly fading away. As the sight of the helicopter was vanishing, out of the blue, a black tornado ap- peared in the sky. Superimposed on the tornado were the words "THE EL". The black tornado then came and engulfed both Shekinaih and David in it. Then, THE TRINITY stood on top of this tornado and THE FATHER said to them, "My vengeance shall proceed out of me through my HOLY SPIRIT, and flows through JESUS to all the Cosmoses. Hence, it will flow from me and THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih to JESUS in David unto all the Cosmoses." After this, the tornado of black smoke with Shekinaih and David engulfed inside and THE TRINITY above it began to encircle horizontally around the equator from West to East. After it's maneuvers, it then encircled diago- nally from North West to South East of the globe. Thereaf- ter, it changed its transit and encircled diagonally from North East to South West of the globe before it traveled vertically from North to South of the globe. The tornado then came to a stand still hovering in the sky above the North Pole. Follow- ing that, Shekinaih and David came out of the tornado and
ACT 5 SCENE 1

walked in the cloud toward a heavenly pavilion that was levi- tating in the sky. Together with THE TRINITY, they each sat on a transparent jade stool around a transparent jade table to have heavenly aromatic tea. The five then began to converse. Without further ado as usual, David began to inquire of THE TRINITY with his long list of questions.

"ABBA FATHER, why were we earlier on the pinnacle of the Stratosphere Tower?" David asked. "The reason why we brought both of you there using a helicopter is because the building is located above a vortex and the location of the tower itself is a spiritual transmitter that pulls in real phys- ical tornadoes to planet Earth. From there, the request for tornadoes are communicated to the communication space- ship of the reptiles in outer-space and the order are either executed from there or by HAARP in Alaska. The propeller of the helicopter symbolizes that my judgment time is up and it will be released in mid air through our spiritual tornado which symbolizes both of you." THE FATHER answered David. "ABBA FATHER, why is the tornado hovering over the North Pole and what is this levitating pavilion?" David said to THE FATHER. "The reason is because...." THE FATHER then whis- pered to JESUS' ear who in turn whispered to Shekinaih's ear, who in turn whispered to David's ear. After this Shekinaih said to David, "This is a secret code and it is not the time for us to reveal yet. THE TRINITY has just shown me some visions that are related to their name "THE EL" that they wanted me to draw for you." David immediately looked at the diagrams and started to inquire.
CHAPTER 1
THE MUSCLE MAN
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you further enlighten me on your name "THE EL" which was superimposed on the tornado?
JESUS: David, explain to us your understanding of our name "THE EL".

DAVID: I have researched on my own and understood a little: According to Strong's Definition, The word "EL" H410 is short- ened from H352 "ayil". It is the same as H193 "ul" from an un- used root meaning to twist, showing off your muscle i.e. (by implication) be strong; the body (as being rolled together), also powerful, mighty, strength. It is translated as God, the mighty one, power.

JESUS: David, you are not far from the truth. We, through our name, "THE EL", manifest our might. The Angel of Our Presence who manifests our name, "THE EL", is the mightiest among all the mighty gods of the nations. She/He rules and judges all the gods of might who are known as the "power". These mighty gods are the angels, the sons of THE EL who were giv- en the authority over the seventy nations.
Psa 82:1 A Psalm of Asaph. THE ELOHIM standeth in the congre- gation of the mighty (H410 "el" might); he judgeth among the gods.

In the last days, We, THE TRINITY, through our two Cherubim of Glory manifesting our name, "THE EL", shall replace them with my elect when our chosen ones have proven themselves to be able to drink the cup of suffering and to be baptized with the same death like me. They shall take over the rule from the power of the seventy nations who are the princes of this age because of their uncircumcised hearts and rebel-
THE MUSCLE MAN

lion against us. These seventy angels governing the nations will totally rebel against us and will be united with the last days' Nimrod in his One World Government. They shall defy me and blaspheme my two Cherubim of Glory who bear our names, "THE YAHWEH", and "THE EL SHADDAI", because of all the plagues that my Two Cherubim of Glory have authorized to come upon them.

David, these two Cherubim of Glory are Shekinaih's and your counterpart angel which have already joined with both of you. Through them, we locked up the Titans in Tartarus, brought the Great Flood during Noah's time, confounded the language of the inhabitants of Shinar in the tower of Babel, rained brimstone and fire out of heaven upon Sodom and Go- morrah, and will in the last days through them in both of you proclaim the day of our vengeance on the serpent and her seed and those who worship them.
DAVID: O, YAHWEH JESUS, what was the real purpose of the tower they were building during Nimrod's time?

JESUS: It was a pyramid located in an ideal geographical site where it would act as a portal for teleporting to another plan- et. Nimrod was guided by the fallen angels to build it so that they would be able to escape the judgment of THE ELOHIM should Earth be destroyed. I (We), through our two Cherubim of Glory, came down and thwarted their plan. Today, history is repeating itself. The Nimrod of today is building a time ma- chine with the nanotechnology taught by the Nephilim of old to open portals for their serpentine forefathers to teleport to and fro Earth to usher in major catastrophes so as to prepare for their complete control of Earth where more humans will be used as hosts for their disembodied spirits after they have desecrated them through mutations via the propaganda of trans-humanism. (Gen 11:1-9)
CHAPTER 2
FIVE-FOLD POWER OF HOLINESS
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the above diagram you showed to Shekinaih all about?
JESUS: Our ultimate might is manifested through perfect holi- ness. The five arms of THE EL represent:
Major/Minor Execution Power in Solitude (Formless)
Major/Minor Execution Power on the Cosmoses
Major/Minor Execution Power of the Ages
Major/Minor Execution Power of The Age to Come
Major/Minor Execution Power of the Destructive SHADDAI
FIVE-FOLD POWER OF HOLINESS

title: MAJOR/MINOR EXECUTION POWER IN SOLITUDE (FORM- LESS)

segments.text: MAJOR/MINOR EXECUTION POWER IN SOLITUDE (FORM- LESS)

Solitude is the ultimate and the solitary is the form that re- flects the solitude. Solitary means the isolated major/minor execution power that we use in the She/He, the Two Cheru- bim, to call forth and execute the ultimate spasm from noth- ing into something. However, the major EL executor in Shek- inaih, who represents "THE TRINITY", will also call forth the form of the major structure for all our creation, and you, our VICTORY, our minor executor manifesting our name, "THE EL", shall fill in the micro details in all the forms of our creation just like how this book is written. The same principle of the oper- ation of our execution also applies to the rest of our five arms manifesting the might of our name, "THE EL".

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of myself wearing a white robe with two white wings with the words "The Covering Cherub (THE FATHER)" written on my forehead. As I speak, I see the overall form and structure of creation coming into existence.

THE FATHER: Yes, and you, David, our micro executor, "THE VIC- TORY", our subservient Cherub, shall bring in all the details in all our creation. This is how we form the light, create dark- ness, make peace, and create evil through our name, "THE EL", through both your counterpart angels. Shekinaih and you, being united with your counterpart angel, shall go forth from my command in righteousness and shall not turn back to show forth my righteousness and power until every knee shall bow and every tongue shall swear that I am THE YAHWEH. All that are incensed against you shall be ashamed.

Isa 45:5 I am THE YAHWEH, and there is none else, there is no ELOHIM beside me: I girded thee, though thou hast not known me: Isa 45:6 That they may know from the rising of the sun, and from the west, that there is none beside me. I am THE YAHWEH, and there is none else. Isa 45:7 I form the light, and create dark- ness: I make peace, and create evil: I, THE YAHWEH, do all these things... Isa 45:22 Look unto me, and be ye saved, all the ends of the earth: for I am THE EL, and there is none else. Isa 45:23 I have sworn by myself, the word (H1697 "dabar" speech, spokesman)
BEHOLD MY NAMES

is gone out of my mouth in righteousness, and shall not turn back (H7725 "shub"), that unto me every knee shall bow, every tongue shall swear. Isa 45:24 Surely, shall he says, in THE YAH- WEH have I righteousness and strength: even to him shall men come; and all that are incensed against him shall be ashamed. Isa 45:25 In THE YAHWEH shall all the seed of Israel be justified, and shall glory.

Both of you are our "yachiyd", our solitary, who are united with us, THE TRINITY, in one spirit. We, THE TRINITY, have seat- ed both of you on our throne in our temple as judges to rep- resent us as fathers to our 7,000 fatherless and judges to our 144,000 widow brides.

Psa 68:4 Sing unto THE ELOHIM, sing praises to his name: extol him that rideth upon the heavens by his name JAH, and rejoice before him. Psa 68:5 A father of the fatherless, and a judge of the widows, is THE ELOHIM in his holy habitation. Psa 68:6 THE ELOHIM setteth (H3427 "yashab" to sit down specifically as a judge) the solitary (H3173 "yachiyd" united) in his temple (H1004 "bayith" house): he bringeth out those which are bound with chains: but the rebellious dwell in a dry land.
MAJOR/MINOR EXECUTION POWER ON THE COSMOSES

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of you, David, as a mighty giant hold- ing a planet with one hand and a fiery planet with the other, they are like two small balls in your palms. I see you smashing both planets together and mixing them as clay as in a pot- ter's hand. I then see you putting them in a store house.

THE FATHER: Shekinaih, who represents us, "THE TRINITY", is The Major EL who has our major authority and executing pow- er. She shall delegate the work to you, who are our Minor EL in execution. You shall gather the materials from the planets that are destroyed by you and shall preserve them against the day of our battle and war, as well as for the reconstruction in our recreation as depicted in the vision we showed to Shek- inaih.
Job 38:22 Hast thou entered into the treasures of the snow? or hast thou seen the treasures of the hail, Job 38:23 Which I have
FIVE-FOLD POWER OF HOLINESS
reserved against the time of trouble, against the day of battle and war?

title: MAJOR/MINOR EXECUTION POWER OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS

segments.text: MAJOR/MINOR EXECUTION POWER OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS
BEHOLD MY NAMES

The major/minor execution power of the ages is the pow- er of the Ancient of Days, THE TRINITY, which is the Ultimate Judge. It is represented by our two Cherubim of Glory whom we surnamed "THE TRINITY" and "THE VICTORY" as shown in the diagram. Just as my SON'S throne is located in my womb on a different heavenly plane, likewise, our angel THE VICTO- RY'S throne is located in my womb which is THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih on a different heavenly plane. I have placed Shek- inaih to sit on my GREAT WHITE THRONE to represent us as the Judge representing me to open the books of all that are to be judged, both the living and the dead in the heavens, the earth and beneath the earth. Our VICTORY angel shall record and execute most of these judgment decrees and send forth the guilty to their respective places either in different levels of heaven or hell. We, through our two Cherubim of Glory, will reward our elect who are martyred and who are counted wor- thy for our kingdom to rule the kingdoms of the Cosmoses according to their calling. The one who looked like the Son of Adam who came with the clouds of heaven symbolizes the holy one whom the Anti-Christ will make war with and pre- vail against them. They symbolize the first Adam, the second Adam and the third Adam. The first Adam is Adam, the second Adam is JESUS and the third Adam is you, Aaron K David.

Dan 7:9 I beheld till the thrones were cast down, and the An- cient of days did sit, whose garment was white as snow, and the hair of his head like the pure wool: his throne was like the fiery flame, and his wheels as burning fire. Dan 7:10 A fiery stream issued and came forth from before him: thousand thou- sands ministered unto him, and ten thousand times ten thou- sand stood before him: the judgment was set, and the books were opened. Dan 7:13 I saw in the night visions, and, behold,

one like the Son of Adam came with the clouds of heaven, and came to the Ancient of days, and they brought him near before him. Dan 7:14 And there was given him dominion, and glory, and a kingdom, that all people, nations, and languages, should serve him: his dominion is an everlasting dominion, which shall not pass away, and his kingdom that which shall not be de- stroyed. Dan 7:21 I beheld, and the same horn made war with
the holy ones, and prevailed against them; Dan 7:22 Until the
FIVE-FOLD POWER OF HOLINESS
Ancient of days came, and judgment was given to the saints of the most High; and the time came that the holy ones possessed the kingdom.
MAJOR/MINOR EXECUTION POWER OF THE AGE TO COME

SHEKINAIH: I see JESUS write these words on a greenboard: "Invincible power of EL = Incomparable, Unbeatable, Incon- testable. The Major's and the Minor's authorized power has no equal in all levels of my creation or in the Age to come".

JESUS: Yes, our Major/Minor execution powers given to our two Cherubim of glory are invincible. They are indeed incom- parable, unbeatable, and incontestable, and they have no equal in all our creations, in this age or in the age to come. As MY FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT are greater in THE EL'S power, likewise, Shekinaih, the Covering Cherub who represents THE TRINITY is greater than THE VICTORY in the co-execution pow- er in all ages, including the age to come.
MAJOR/MINOR EXECUTION POWER OF THE DESTRUC- TIVE SHADDAI

SHEKINAIH: I see JESUS writing on the greenboard these words: "These are the destructive arms of THE SHADDAI called "The Major EL (She) who shall destroy the overall, MAC- RO structure, and the Minor EL (He) who shall destroy all the MICRO internals within the overall structure".

JESUS: Yes, our two Cherubim of glory are indeed the destruc- tive arms of our name, "THE SHADDAI". Shekinaih, the Major EL, is the Major destructive arm in the overall macro structure, and you, David, the Minor EL, is the Minor destructive arm in the micro internals within the overall structures.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
THE SUN OF RIGHTEOUSNESS
SHEKINAIH: I see a Sun inside a five pointed star with wings. I see the words "She/He" written on the Sun. Inside the Sun is a cherub spreading its wing over another cherub who is kneeling before it.

THE FATHER: This symbolizes the Angel of Our Presence as the Sun of Righteousness with healing in Her/His wings as in Mala- chi 4:1-6. The five pointed star symbolizes the five horns of the anointing of the Angel of Our Presence. The five wings sym- bolize the five secrets of their power:
It is their unwavering, 100% faith in us for their destiny which is the connecting cable that brings the vision we gave them to come into existence into physical manifestation.
It is their joy in THE HOLY SPIRIT at all times which is the oil of unfathomable energizing power that propels them effort-
FIVE-FOLD POWER OF HOLINESS
lessly into great heights spiritually as well as in physical mani- festation.
It is their peace in us in all situation that is a sure win in all matters that we put them through.
It is their perseverance in never giving up that we continue to increase our power in them.
It is their patience in being fully resting assured in our promises and never-in-any-hurry attitude which will not spoil our plan that we continue to entrust them with our power.

When their wings of the above five characters continue to grow bigger, we will continue to build the muscle of their exe- cution arms so that they can reach higher to us in greater inti- macy and power. They are my Last Day's Moses and Elijah who will manifest our great and dreadful day. But before that, they will portray my manifested self in its totality to my children to turn their heart back to me. They will also teach my children how to turn my heart back to them by offering the sacrifice of righteousness unto holiness through peace in me in the tribu- lations I put them through.

Mal 4:1 For, behold, the day cometh, that shall burn as an oven; and all the proud, yea, and all that do wickedly, shall be stubble: and the day that cometh shall burn them up, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, that it shall leave them neither root nor branch. Mal 4:2 But unto you that fear my name shall the Sun of righteous- ness arise with healing in his wings; and ye shall go forth, and grow up as calves of the stall. Mal 4:3 And ye shall tread down the wicked; for they shall be ashes under the soles of your feet in the day that I shall do this, saith THE SABAOTH. Mal 4:4 Re- member ye the law of Moses my servant, which I command- ed unto him in Horeb for all Israel, with the statutes and judg- ments. Mal 4:5 Behold, I will send you Elijah the prophet before the coming of the great and dreadful day of THE YAHWEH: Mal 4:6 And he shall turn the heart of the father to the children, and the heart of the children to their father, lest I come and smite the earth with a curse.
JESUS: Yes, Shekinaih and you, David, are the Two Cherubim, our Two Anointed whom we will send in the last days. Both
BEHOLD MY NAMES

of you are indeed the Moses and the Elijah respectively. Your mission is to turn all the hearts of our children to be acquaint- ed with our seven ways/offences for their perfection by pro- ducing the peaceable fruits of righteousness unto holiness. I shall compress your spirit and fill you with my spiritual wine of psalms and hymns and spiritual songs in your heart, and you shall convey my ultimate truth to my brides in sincerity without respect of persons; teaching them to submit to my protocol in perfecting holiness in the fear of THE FATHER.

Job 32:18 For I am full of matter, the spirit within me con- straineth me. Job 32:19 Behold, my belly is as wine which hath no vent; it is ready to burst like new bottles. Job 32:20 I will speak, that I may be refreshed...

Eph 5:18 And be not drunk with wine, wherein is excess; but be filled with the Spirit; Eph 5:19 Speaking to yourselves in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing and making melody in your heart to THE YAHWEH; Eph 5:20 Giving thanks always for all things unto THE ELOHIM and the Father in the name of our YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST; Eph 5:21 Submitting yourselves one to another in the fear of THE ELOHIM.

I shall unite with you in one spirit, and you shall be the man- child that shall spiritually come out between the feet of THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih. And as the lawgiver, the Shiloh, the tranquil one, my reincarnation, you shall gather my people whom I have called after THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih have illuminated your eyes (heart) with my spiritual wine and my sincere (guileless) milk so that you can grow to be gracious like me, without malice, guile, hypocrisies, envies, and evil speak- ing, like a newborn babe. (1Pe 2:1-5)

Gen 49:9 Judah is a lion's whelp: from the prey, my son, thou art gone up: he stooped down, he couched as a lion, and as an old lion; who shall rouse him up? Gen 49:10 The sceptre shall not depart from Judah, nor a lawgiver from between her feet, un- til Shiloh ( H7886 "Shiyloh" from H7951 "shalah" to be tranquil") come; and unto him shall the gathering of the people be. Gen 49:11 Binding his foal unto the vine, and his ass's colt unto the choice vine; he washed his garments in wine, and his clothes in the blood of grapes: Gen 49:12 His eyes red (H2447 "chakliyl" darkly brilliant, as stimulated by wine) with wine, and his teeth
FIVE-FOLD POWER OF HOLINESS
white from (H4480 "min") the milk.

Afterwards, you shall give my wine of prophetic teaching in songs and my milk of spiritual nourishment to my brides. No more shall my people be robbed by the covetous false proph- ets and teachers who scam my children financially with their hype teachings that do not quicken their spirit but only acts as a placebo to their soul. As my leader and commander of my hosts, you, as my David, together with Shekinaih, will make a covenant with those whom I have called to be in the order of Melchisedek. They will know that their ways (to pay and serve under great and famous ministers) are not our ways (through true repentance and sincere obedience of faith), and their thoughts (mega churches and famous, prosperous and successful ministers are friends of THE ELOHIM, Luke 6:26), are not our thoughts (I endowed more honor to those who are despised, humble and seem to be nobody, 1 Corinthians 12:23). As our saber representing us as our spokesman, both Shekinaih and you shall effectively accomplish and prosper in leading our children in Peace and Joy through the fiery trials that are orchestrated by my FATHER in their quest to the Holy Mountain.

Isa 55:1 Ho, every one that thirsteth, come ye to the waters, and he that hath no money; come ye, buy, and eat; yea, come, buy wine and milk without money and without price.
