THE FATHER: Both of you who are my Two Cherubim of Glory whom I address as THE ELOAH (Shekinaih bearing my name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", representing me, and Aaron K Da- vid, my SON'S reincarnation, bearing my name, "THE EL"), shall manifest the power of my name, "THE EL", as you come with the cloud of my resurrected holy ones. In the brightness of my glory and power, both of you, the Angel of Our Presence, will wave at the enemy of THE ELOHIM that are gathered against my holy ones, and power shall come out of your hands to destroy them with thundering, lightnings, hailstones, earth- quakes, and tsunamis through asteroids which we have com- manded to fall. The princes of Ethiopians and the Arabs shall be dismayed with amazement and they shall tremble as like in the time of Joshua when the Sun and the Moon stood still in their course. The Mount of Olives will be broken into two parts in order for my remnants to escape into some caves which I have prepared for them to escape the effect of the heat generated by the impact of the asteroids. I will smite all the people that fought against my children (Spiritual Jerusa- lem) and their flesh shall be consumed away while they stand upon their feet, and their eyes shall be consumed away in
GLORY OF THE EL

their holes, and their tongues shall be consumed away in their mouths. There will be a great tumult and they shall lay hold everyone on the hand of his neighbor. The armies of Egypt, Ethiopia and the Arab nations will be smitten with these plagues. I shall destroy the headquarter and sub-headquarters of the Beast from the Sea that are in different cities of the world by asteroids and earthquakes. The geography of Jerusa- lem will be altered because of the earthquake and in that day, we shall rule through our representative, the spiritual King Da- vid, with his spiritual seed. Following that, all nations will have to keep the Feast of Tabernacles and any nation that came not up to keep the Feast of Tabernacles will be plagued with drought. Every one staying in Jerusalem and Judah shall be holiness unto THE YAHWEH SABAOTH and no unclean people will dwell in it. And the earth shall be filled with the knowl- edge of the Glory of the YAHWEH through His name, "THE EL", like the waters cover the sea. (Hab 3:1-19)
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is there any reference to the above in the Book of Revelation?

JESUS: This is called "the Battle of the Great Day of THE EL SHADDAI", in which the name of my FATHER, "THE EL" and "THE SHADDAI", are manifested in both of you in different degrees. Through both of you as THE EL SHADDAI, we will destroy all the kings and their armies who shall gather to war against the Angel of Our Presence and my glorified Holy Ones. (Rev 16:12-14)

This battle is also called "the Supper of the Great EL" (Rev 19:18). Both of you, as the Sun of Righteousness, shall rise with heal- ing in your wings and shall sanctify and cleanse those who fear me, and they as my holy ones shall tread down the wicked in that day, and they shall be burned with the intense heat gen- erated by the explosive impact of the asteroid in the Valley of Megiddo (Mal 4:1-6).

The dishes for the Great Supper of the Lamb (through the name "THE EL"), are the flesh of the Beast from the Sea and his armies, and the fowls of the air who are invited to the feast are my Eagle Prophets, my Holy Ones. My FATHER in Shekinaih;
BEHOLD MY NAMES

and me in you, shall sit on the white horse as THE EL SHADDAI, and both of you shall be our spokesmen (Word of THE ELO- HIM) leading our Holy Ones for the slaughter; treading in the wine press of the fierceness and wrath of THE EL SHADDAI. (Rev 19:7-21)

After the massacre, all the inhabitants of the earth shall be filled with the knowledge of my name, "THE YAHWEH, THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE", through the glory of my name, "THE EL", like the waters cover the sea; and I, THE YAHWEH, will be exalt- ed on that day.
PART 5
THE YAHWEH SABAOTH
ACT 6 SCENE 1
The Forbidden City in Beijing, China

Shekinaih and David both in Golden Emperor's costumes were seated on their respective thrones in the heavenly magistrate court. THE TRINITY was standing behind Shekinaih who was seated on a golden throne which was situated a few steps above the golden throne that David was seated. The principalities of the three realms, humans both living and dead, angels, and demons congregated in front of them. Without further ado, a hell demon which stood in front of a huge drum at the left side of the entrance of court beat the giant drum with two sticks. This sent a vibration all the way to hell. After this, many big-eared hell demons in black robes entered into the hall, each having stacks after stacks of black books of accusations against THE ELOHIM'S creation. Walking toward Shekinaih from her right, they placed those books on her table. Simultaneously, while the hell demon was beating the drum that was on the right side of the court, an angel standing on the right side of the court entrance also beat a huge drum that was in front of him and the sound vibrated to heaven and it summoned many angels in white with stacks after stacks of white books full of light of good reports of THE ELOHIM'S creation. They also placed their books on Shek- inaih's judgment table.
Then, a book was opened by Shekinaih, and a demon brought a man to kneel down before her. This man was clothed in black pajamas. The book concerning the deeds of
ACT 6 SCENE 1

this man was weighed against a white box entitled "The Stan- dard of Righteousness of THE ELOHIM", and he was found wanting. Shekinaih then wrote on a scroll the word "Hades" and threw it on the floor in front of him. This man was hor- rified upon hearing his sentence. After this, the hell demon picked up the scroll and immediately, the man who was just convicted turned into a small pool of black liquid. THE FATHER then walked down and stood between Shekinaih and David on a step and turned to the assembly from the three realms and said, "The majority of my creations are in this state when the state of their spirit man are being weighed. This man represents more than 85% of my earthly creations which in- clude those who profess my name in their mouth but in their hearts have departed from me. Therefore, I am throwing this invitation to all my creation in this earth to be enrolled in my heavenly army through both Shekinaih and Aaron K David." THE FATHER pointed at both of them as he mentioned their names. THE FATHER then held a book titled "Behold! My Mes- senger 3, Behold! My Names" and flipped to the chapter on "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" and said to the assembly, "All must go through the training which we prescribed in this book es- pecially under the chapter 'THE YAHWEH SABAOTH'. Are you ready to enroll, my creation?" Hearing this, David narrowing his eye, turned his back to look at THE FATHER and said to Him, "ABBA FATHER, how many who answered to your call will be chosen?" Walking down toward David, THE FATHER whispered in his ear, "I have my winning bets. Only 10% of those who enrolled will pass my tests and be chosen to be my archangels and be restored to be sons of heaven." Upon hearing this, David said unto Him, "ABBA FATHER, the early emperors of China professed themselves as Sons of Heaven. Is this true?" "Yes, it is true." THE FATHER said to him. "I used to rule China through those appointed vessels during the Qing dynasty and all the dynasties before her. All the rulers were appointed by me previously until......
David interjected, "ABBA FATHER, what happened?" THE FATHER stretched out His hand to pat on David's right shoul-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

der and said to him, "Satan came to bet with me over China. Over a long period of time, a lot of black books of accusations were accumulated against all my previous vessels whom I have appointed to rule on my behalf. At the cut off time of the betting, 70% of them were found lacking. Therefore, Sa- tan won his bet and China was given to him to rule with his seed." Holding a recovery plan in His left hand, which He hid behind His back, with the recovery hope in His eyes, THE FA- THER smiled at David as He placed His hand and tapped on his shoulder again. THE FATHER then turned to Shekinaih and smiled at her as He walked toward her and whispered to her left ears, "You are my winning card." Immediately, Shekinaih turned to look at THE FATHER and smiled back at Him.
ACT 6 SCENE 2
Singapore Science Park, 5 years ago

THE TRINITY, Shekinaih and David were seated each on a stone stool around a stone table. JESUS took a stack of pa- pers and dropped on Shekinaih's head and immediately these papers went inside her head. JESUS then said to Da- vid, "These are visions which I have just downloaded to Shek- inaih and they are our complete teaching of our name "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH". It includes the "MODUS OPERANDI" of my last days' army." David, upon hearing this, nodded his head and raised his eye brow to look at Shekinaih and said to her, "Shekinaih, can you share with me the visions which JESUS had just downloaded into you?" As David was anticipating for an answer, suddenly, the curtain of heaven opened and a great bright light began to shine upon them. Immediately, twelve men in white robe began to descend from a heavenly ladder and walked into Shekinaih, and after this the bright light faded away as the curtain of heaven closed.

"The mantles of the twelve apostles of my SON, JESUS, have descended into Shekinaih." THE FATHER then continued to say to David, "Upon successful enrollment of my potential last days' army, those who are called by my Name (the Angel of Our Presence, Shekinaih and Aaron K David) and have been purified and perfected by them, will be chosen and be im- parted by Shekinaih with a counterpart angel who will walk into them to work through them. These counterpart angels are the holy ones of old including the Twelve Disciples of my SON JESUS. Their mantles will be imparted through Shek-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

inaih." As THE FATHER finished His statement, He looked at the anticipating David and said to him, "Today, My SON JESUS will enrich and equip you with the spiritual science on how to muster, appoint, and oversee my last days' army. Let us begin. "
CHAPTER 1
THE THREE FUNCTIONS OF THE YAHWEH SABAOTH
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you please expand my understand- ing further concerning the full spectrum of your buffet's spread of teaching and revelation regarding your name "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH"?
SHEKINAIH: When JESUS dropped His books into my head, I saw THE YAHWEH SABAOTH standing next to me and He wrote the word "muster".
JESUS: David, look into the Strong's Concordance and read to me the meaning.

DAVID: According to Strong's Definition, the word "muster" (H6485 "paqad") has many meanings. Here are some of them: to visit, to oversee, to lay upon as a charge, care for, appoint, punish, muster, number.
JESUS: Yes, my FATHER through His name "THE YAHWEH SA- BAOTH" will muster, appoint, oversee, care for, and punish His armies.

SHEKINAIH: During the impartation of visions as the books went inside my head, I saw THE FATHER taking the gold crown from His head and put it on my head. Following that, He took the gold ring from His finger and wore it on my right middle finger. He then put a scroll on my right hand and a golden scepter on my left hand. Finally, He took out the gold medal- lion He was wearing and put it on my neck. He then showed me this picture entitled "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, THE LORD OF HOST"
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do all these symbolize?

JESUS: My FATHER has chosen Shekinaih to represent His name "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" in the three realms, namely: heaven, earth and beneath the earth. By putting His gold ring on her right middle finger, it symbolizes THE FATHER has delegated His authority over the angels, humanity, and demons to her as THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. The scroll He put in her hand sym-
THE THREE FUNCTIONS OF THE YAHWEH SABAOTH

bolizes her authority as THE YAHWEH SABAOTH in releasing my FATHER'S determinations. Lastly, the medallion which He put on her neck symbolizes her office and function as THE YAH- WEH SABAOTH over all the hosts of the three realms on behalf of THE FATHER.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do the three crosses symbolize?
JESUS: The three crosses symbolize THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE SON.
THE THREE-FOLD RULE GIVEN TO SHEKINAIH
HEAVEN

THE FATHER: Shekinaih symbolizes the last days' bride, the chief of their kind. She is used by me as a vessel where my eternal light is channeled through her to reflect in the cur- rent and future Cosmoses and to rule and govern on behalf of us. She is my new creation whom I am incarnated in and she represents my glory. I have given her the authority to rule and govern on behalf of me in the three realms as my earthly representative. I have already made known in all these realms and all the hosts of heavens have been summoned to listen to her orders at my command. I have downloaded into her all the giftings and rewards for my armies which she will release to them at my command after they have passed my tests suc- cessfully through her. She represents me as the great ELOHIM and together with my SON JESUS CHRIST who is reincarnated in you, my son Aaron K David, we will appear to all men in the last days. I and my SON JESUS will rend the Cosmoses and come down to earth and make our dwelling in both of you.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is there any biblical proof of what you have just spoken?
THE FATHER: David my son, can you read Titus 2:11-14?
Tit 2:11 For the grace of THE ELOHIM that bringeth salvation hath appeared to all men, Tit 2:12 Teaching us that, denying un- godliness and worldly lusts, we should live soberly, righteously,
BEHOLD MY NAMES

and godly, in this present world; Tit 2:13 Looking for that bless- ed hope, and the glorious appearing of the great ELOHIM (THE FATHER) and our Saviour JESUS Christ; Tit 2:14 Who gave him- self for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity, and purify unto himself a peculiar people, zealous of good works.

Every time when the word "God" is mentioned in the New Testament, it always refers to me, GOD THE FATHER. And every time the word "Lord" is mentioned, it always refers my SON JESUS CHRIST. Have I not spoken through Isaiah in Isaiah 64:1- 3 that I would rend the heavens and come down to make my name known to my adversaries and the mountains (high ones) will tremble before my presence? My name symbolizes both of you who will manifest my seven names. My presence symbolizes both of you as the Angel of Our Presence.

Isa 64:1 Oh that thou wouldest rend the heavens, that thou wouldest come down, that the mountains might flow down at thy presence, Isa 64:2 As when the melting fire burneth, the fire causeth the waters to boil, to make thy name known to thine adversaries, that the nations may tremble at thy pres- ence! Isa 64:3 When thou didst terrible things which we looked not for, thou camest down, the mountains flowed down at thy presence.

Have I not spoken in Isaiah 66:1-2 that the heaven is my throne and the earth is my footstool, but in "THE ONE" I will make my dwelling. Shekinaih and you are "THE ONE" that has been broken, and crushed by me but continued to tremble and obey my command.

Isa 66:1 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, The heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool: where is the house that ye build unto me? and where is the place of my rest? Isa 66:2 For all those things hath mine hand made, and all those things have been, saith THE YAHWEH: but to "THE ONE" (H2088 "zeh" THE ONE) will I look, even to him that is poor and of a contrite spirit, and trem- bleth at my word.

Have I not spoken in Isaiah 66:5-8 that we will appear to my children's joy through my voice, the spokesman from my temple? This is THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih and the man- child in you who are the main Heavenly Zion that will bring
THE THREE FUNCTIONS OF THE YAHWEH SABAOTH
forth our children, the minor Heavenly Zion.

Isa 66:5 Hear the word of THE YAHWEH, ye that tremble at his word; Your brethren that hated you, that cast you out for my name's sake, said, Let THE YAHWEH be glorified: but he shall ap- pear to your joy, and they shall be ashamed. Isa 66:6 A voice of noise from the city, a voice from the temple, a voice of THE YAHWEH that rendereth recompence to his enemies. Isa 66:7 Before she travailed, she brought forth; before her pain came, she was delivered of a man child. Isa 66:8 Who hath heard such a thing? who hath seen such things? Shall the earth be made to bring forth in one day? or shall a nation be born at once? for as soon as Zion travailed, she brought forth her children.
DAVID: That's wonderful, ABBA FATHER!
EARTH

THE FATHER: Woe, woe, woe to the men and women that despise look down, criticize, envy, challenge, or throw accu- sations on both of you. The time must come and is now en- forced that those who belittle both of you with the above mentioned acts, whether in their hearts, or the meditation of their mind, or verbalizing with their mouth, or in their acts shall deserve the sentence of death eternally including physi- cal death punishment.
Blessing unlimited to those who embrace both of you as unto me, for my rewards are with Shekinaih and in her safe keeping which shall be released at my command.
BENEATH THE EARTH

Shekinaih has been given the authority to sit on my throne with me to govern and rule the three realms with me. Her words are as good as my very words for she perceives my thoughts and feels my heart. She speaks on behalf of me as my mouth of authority to judge angels in heaven, mankind on earth (both living and dead), and demons beneath the earth. I have given her a throne at Level 4 of Hell/Heaven beneath the
BEHOLD MY NAMES
earth to judge the dead and the demons. I have also given her a throne on the earth to judge humans, both the living and the dead, and a throne in heaven to judge the angels.

Together with you as the Co-executing Angel who also bears my name "THE LESSER YAHWEH SABAOTH", both of you are THE MAJOR AND MINOR ADONAI that sit upon my throne and my SON JESUS' throne respectively. Both of you are the Two Cherubim of Glory whom my name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", dwells upon.

2Sa 6:2 And David arose, and went with all the people that were with him from Baale of Judah, to bring up from thence the ark of THE ELOHIM, whose name is called by the Name of THE YAH- WEH SABAOTH that dwelleth upon (H5921 "al") the cherubims.
A HORSE WHIP

SHEKINAIH: I saw a long horse whip. THE HOLY SPIRIT whis- pered to my ears telling me that it is for the taming of the wild horses who are the potential mighty men who, at pres- ent, are very rebellious and self-willed.
JESUS: If they humble themselves and continues under the chastening of my FATHER, they will be chosen to be part of my last days' glorious army.
THE FATHER: The horses that are tamed by my name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", do not need a bridle to be put on them. Wherever directions I will to turn, the horses will synchronize with him.

JESUS: These horses are supposed to be united in one spir- it with me. My FATHER through His name "THE YAHWEH SA- BAOTH" will be strict in the training and disciplining of the horses most of the time. In exceptional cases, He will be le- nient and show mercy.

THE FATHER: Once the leader of the mustang is trained, the rest of the horses will follow the leader. You, David, are the leader. A wild horse indeed, a stubborn colt indeed, which no man has sat, but there is no one that I, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH,
THE THREE FUNCTIONS OF THE YAHWEH SABAOTH

am not able to break. I will turn you into a humble and low- ly man, totally yielding to me in Shekinaih and obeying my commands through her. Without a bridle, my son will come riding on you (united with you) and appear to the daughters of spiritual Zion.
Mar 11:2 And saith unto them, Go your way into the village over against you: and as soon as ye be entered into it, ye shall find a colt tied, whereon never man sat; loose him, and bring him.

Psa 32:8 I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go: I will guide thee with mine eye. Psa 32:9 Be ye not as the horse, or as the mule, which have no understand- ing: whose mouth must be held in with bit and bridle, lest they come near unto thee.

After you are converted, you shall be the captain of my hosts and train them who are as stubborn and wild as you. Once they are fully trained and approved, they shall be the deliver- ers from Spiritual Zion. They are the horses that are prepared by both of you; representing my name as "THE MAJOR AND MI- NOR YAHWEH SABAOTH" and "THE EL" against the Day of Battle of the Great EL.
Pro 21:30 There is no wisdom nor understanding nor counsel against THE YAHWEH. Pro 21:31 The horse is prepared against the day of battle: but deliverance is of THE YAHWEH.

title: SHEKINAIH AND DAVID EACH HOLDING A ROD

segments.text: SHEKINAIH AND DAVID EACH HOLDING A ROD

SHEKINAIH: I saw you and me each carrying a rod that had multiple functions. Right in front of us were many soldiers standing according to their ranks in an orderly array. I saw us keeping the orders of the ranks. Following that, I saw my- self holding golden boxes of gifts and medals, and I passed them to you so that you would promote or commend some of the officers. Next, in another vision, I was staring at many photographs of people on a wall with their names written on top of each photograph. I saw that sometimes, we would remove the photos of some supposed officers and replace them with others.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what are our specific functions?

JESUS: The three functions of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH are: Both of you are to, firstly, train and discipline the hosts; secondly, make sure that the heavenly armies keep in their ranks; thirdly, reward, punish, and replace anyone who does not perform well.

THE FATHER: Shekinaih, you as the manifestation of my name, "THE MAJOR YAHWEH SABAOTH", through the hand of Aaron K David who represents THE MINOR YAHWEH SABAOTH, shall set free my elect from their captivity of rationalism and philoso- phy which are their strongholds (2Cor 10:4-5), and these shall be taken captive by both of you to be totally submissive to us in forsaking all, denying themselves and joyfully allowing me to crucify their flesh. Even the rebellious and the stiff-necked shall also be endowed with authority, power and their pre- destined giftings when they are converted by both of you,

Psa 68:17 The chariots of THE ELOHIM are many, even thousands of shinan: THE ADONAI is among them, as in Sinai, in the holy place. Psa 68:18 Thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led cap- tivity captive: thou hast received gifts for men; yea, for the rebellious also, that THE YAH ELOHIM might dwell among them. Psa 68:19 Blessed be THE ADONAI, who daily loadeth us with benefits, even THE EL of our salvation. Selah.

JESUS: Our army comprises of four camps. They are symbolize the Four-Fold ministry. Some are Apostles, some are Prophets, some are Evangelists and some are Pastors/Teachers. They will be taught the true gospel of perfection through suffering till each of them become a christ (anointed one). Once approved, they will be the foundation of the house of THE ELOHIM. They will in turn teach others who are called to be a christ and pre- pare them for the ministry.

Eph 4:7 But unto every one of us is given grace according to the measure of the gift of a christ. Eph 4:8 Wherefore he saith, When he ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men. Eph 4:9 (Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth? Eph 4:10 He that descended is the same also that as-
THE THREE FUNCTIONS OF THE YAHWEH SABAOTH
cended up far above all heavens, that he might complete all.) Eph 4:11 And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers;
The end time's spiritual army is made up of three major cate- gories of different levels of authority:

title: 7,000 SPIRITS OF RIGHTEOUS MADE PERFECT/MOUNT ZION

segments.text: 7,000 SPIRITS OF RIGHTEOUS MADE PERFECT/MOUNT ZION

The primary general's authority is made up of the first born from the dead who have completely surrendered their will of my FATHER to serve Him in sincerity and truth, loving Him with all their heart, all their soul, and all their might in obeying and submitting to Him without questions asked even unto death.
They are the last days' children whom THE YAHWEH has given to us for signs and wonders in Spiritual Israel, being trained by Shekinaih and you, representing us as THE YAHWEH SABAOTH.
Isa 8:18 Behold, I and the children whom THE YAHWEH hath giv- en me are for signs and for wonders in Israel from THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, which dwelleth in mount Zion.

They are the Two Witnesses consisting of 7,000 elected Apos- tles/Prophets/Intercessors who determined not to bow down to the image of the Beast from the Sea whom Baal the False Prophet of Revelation Chapter 13 has given life through his lying signs in the last days.

Rom 11:2 THE ELOHIM hath not cast away his people which he foreknew. Wot ye not what the scripture saith of Elias? how he maketh intercession to THE ELOHIM against Israel, saying, Rom 11:3 THE YAHWEH, they have killed thy prophets, and digged down thine altars; and I am left alone, and they seek my life. Rom 11:4 But what saith the answer of THE ELOHIM unto him? I have reserved to myself seven thousand men, who have not bowed the knee to the image of Baal. Rom 11:5 Even so then at this present time also there is a remnant according to the election of grace.
They will prophesy for three and a half years mostly to spiritu- al Israel about the coming judgment of THE YAHWEH. During this period, anyone who tries to hurt them will be burned by
BEHOLD MY NAMES

the fire which they caused to come down. They will prophe- sy droughts and bring down plagues like Moses, Aaron, and Elijah. They will only be killed by Baal the False Prophet after they have finished their testimony. Like me, they will be resur- rected on the third day. After the glorification, each of them, with the Angel of Our Presence, will come down and destroy the Beast from the Sea, the False Prophet, and their armies and be given the authority to rule over the kingdoms of the world as a christ, an anointed one. (Rev 11:3-15)

Rev 11:15 And the seventh angel sounded; and there were great voices in heaven, saying, The kingdoms of this world are be- come the kingdoms of our THE YAHWEH, and of his christ; and he shall reign for ever and ever.
They are the spiritual Zion, the mountain of THE ELOHIM. They are called as the spirits of righteous man made perfect.

Heb 12:22 But ye are come unto mount Sion, and unto the city of the living ELOHIM, the heavenly Jerusalem, and to an innu- merable company of angels, Heb 12:23 To the general assembly and church of the first born, which are written in heaven, and to THE ELOHIM the Judge of all, and to the spirits of just men made perfect,

title: 144,000, CHURCH OF THE FIRST BORN/HEAVENLY JERUSA- LEM

segments.text: 144,000, CHURCH OF THE FIRST BORN/HEAVENLY JERUSA- LEM

The secondary general's authority of the army of THE ELOHIM consists of the Church of the First born which is written in Heaven. They are the first fruits unto THE ELOHIM and to the lamb. (Heb 12:22-23)

They are the spiritual twelve tribes. They follow the lamb wherever He goes. They are the first fruits unto THE ELOHIM and to THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST. In their mouths were found no guile. They are blameless before the Throne of THE ELOHIM. (Rev 14:1-5)
They are my warrior brides who are made up of the 144,000 who stood firm not to come under the woman Mystery Bab-
THE THREE FUNCTIONS OF THE YAHWEH SABAOTH
ylon's worldly system and matrix and are not defiled by her leaven of wrong doctrine and the spirit of hypocrisy of insin- cerity and duplicity.

Mat 13:33 Another parable spake he unto them; The kingdom of heaven is like unto leaven, which a woman took, and hid in three measures of meal, till the whole was leavened. Mat 16:11 How is it that ye do not understand that I spake it not to you concerning bread, that ye should beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees? Mat 16:12 Then understood they how that he bade them not beware of the leaven of bread, but of the doctrine of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees.
Luk 12:1 ... Beware ye of the leaven of the Pharisees, which is hypocrisy.
1Co 5:8 Therefore let us keep the feast, not with old leaven, nei- ther with the leaven of malice and wickedness; but with the unleavened bread of sincerity and truth.

They are the virgins who always have the oil of THE HOLY SPIR- IT burning in their spirit man. They will be restored to the stat- ure of Adam before his fall so that they, with the wisdom of THE ELOHIM, will know the inner thoughts of man. They are not easily deceived during the great tribulations because they know the Seven Names of THE ELOHIM through experience for they are written upon their forehead.
Pro 20:27 The spirit of Adam is the lamp of THE YAHWEH, search- ing all the inward parts of the belly.

Upon successful purification through the great tribulation and coming out of it alive, they will be raptured to serve THE YAHWEH day and night in His temple. They shall neither hun- ger nor thirst anymore, for THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST which is in the midst of the throne shall feed them, and shall lead them unto living fountains of waters; and THE ELOHIM shall wipe away all tears from their eyes. (Rev 7:13-17)

They have become the New Jerusalem, my bride, after be- ing renovated spiritually. As overcomers, they shall inherit all things and become our children, filled with our glory. The 7,000 elected Apostles/Prophets/Intercessors of the first cate- gory of authority are part of the 144,000 virgins as my brides
BEHOLD MY NAMES
and anointed ones.
The first and second category of authority will be allotted in the third heaven, which is also called "Paradise", after glorifi- cation. (Rev 21:2-4)

The rest of the army's sub-authority consists of 600,000 sons/ daughters who managed to escape hell fire after being rep- rimanded by both of you and have repented from their re- bellious ways, and reverted to walk in their predestined path. These are the lower level angels (sons/daughters) who have passed my seven offences in my most basic training.
Exo 12:37 And the children of Israel journeyed from Rameses to Succoth, about six hundred thousand on foot that were men, beside children. Exo 12:41 And it came to pass at the end of
the four hundred and thirty years, even the selfsame day it came to pass, that all the hosts of THE YAHWEH went out from the land of Egypt.
Gen 17:14 And the uncircumcised man child whose flesh of his foreskin is not circumcised, that soul shall be cut off from his people; he hath broken my covenant.

Blessed are those who heed our admonition through both of you, our last days' Moses and Aaron, and are not like the 600,000 foot soldiers of the hosts of THE YAHWEH, who went out of Egypt, but were overthrown in the wilderness because some of them gave in to the lust of their flesh, some to the idols in their hearts, some to unfaithfulness, and some to re- bellion, and challenged Moses and Aaron, my Two Anointed who represent my Two Anointed Cherubim of Glory whom we called Christ. As for my SON JESUS, we call him "THE CHRIST".

1Co 10:1 Moreover, brethren, I would not that ye should be ig- norant, how that all our fathers were under the cloud, and all passed through the sea; 1Co 10:2 And were all baptized unto Moses in the cloud and in the sea; 1Co 10:3 And did all eat the same spiritual meat; 1Co 10:4 And did all drink the same spiritual drink: for they drank of that spiritual Rock that followed them:
THE THREE FUNCTIONS OF THE YAHWEH SABAOTH

and that Rock was Christ. 1Co 10:5 But with many of them THE ELOHIM was not well pleased: for they were overthrown in the wilderness. 1Co 10:6 Now these things were our examples, to the intent we should not lust after evil things, as they also lust- ed. 1Co 10:7 Neither be ye idolaters, as were some of them; as it is written, The people sat down to eat and drink, and rose up to play. 1Co 10:8 Neither let us commit fornication, as some of them committed, and fell in one day three and twenty thou- sand. 1Co 10:9 Neither let us tempt Christ, as some of them also tempted, and were destroyed of serpents. 1Co 10:10 Neither murmur ye, as some of them also murmured, and were de- stroyed of the destroyer. 1Co 10:11 Now all these things hap- pened unto them for ensamples: and they are written for our admonition, upon whom the ends of the world are come. 1Co 10:12 Wherefore let him that thinketh he standeth take heed lest he fall. 1Co 10:13 There hath no temptation taken you but such as is common to man: but THE ELOHIM is faithful, who will not suffer you to be tempted above that ye are able; but will with the temptation also make a way to escape, that ye may be able to bear it.

These have at last circumcised their heart to submit to the will of my FATHER in the spirit and have kept the feast with the unleavened bread of sincerity and truth and are qualified to be in the congregation in the first and second heaven which is in the fifth and sixth level of Hell/Heaven.
1Co 5:8 Therefore let us keep the feast, not with old leaven, nei- ther with the leaven of malice and wickedness; but with the un- leavened bread of sincerity and truth.
CHAPTER 2
THE FORMATION OF THE HOSTS

SHEKINAIH: I see a woman wearing a skirt that looks like a pur- ple Korean Hanbok, the traditional clothing worn by Korean women. The skirt is divided from top to bottom into twelve sections vertically by four red lines, four blue lines, and five
THE FORMATION OF THE HOSTS
purple lines. On the forehead of this woman is written the words "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH/THE FATHER/SHEKINAIH". In-

side the womb of the woman is a baby and the words "Aar- on K David/SON/JESUS CHRIST" are superimposed on it. I also see another smaller baby on her thigh lying on the lower right and has the word "Jose/Army" superimposed on it. The twelve divisions on the skirt have the names of the Twelve Apostles. After that, I saw a list of ten symbols concerning them.

JESUS: The skirt symbolizes the train of THE ADONAI that filled the temple mentioned in Isaiah 6:1. The bigger baby symboliz- es me reincarnated in Aaron K David, the man child of Revela- tion 12:5, who will be caught up unto us in heaven, and to his throne, and who is to rule all nations with a rod of iron as my future King David. The smaller baby symbolizes Jose, the gen- eral of our hosts. The twelve sections symbolize the Twelve Tribes of Spiritual Israel with their twelve leaders who submit to THE YAHWEH SABAOTH according to the Protocol of Heaven.

The color purple symbolizes Royalty. The color red symbol- izes Fiery Judgment. The color blue symbolizes Heaven. It also symbolizes the Heavenly Mandate. Therefore, Shekinaih, who represents THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT through our name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", manifests our Royalty, Fi- ery Judgment and Heavenly Mandate. As for you David, you represent me through our name, "THE EL", in executing our Heavenly Mandate while Jose represents our last days' armies which symbolizes the royal house of David, Mount Zion. The Twelve Disciples that walked into Shekinaih symbolize the mantles of the Twelve which will be imparted to those who are chosen to receive.

Isa 6:1 In the year that king Uzziah died I saw also the Lord sit- ting upon a throne, high and lifted up, and his train filled the temple. Isa 6:2 Above it stood the seraphims: each one had six wings; with twain he covered his face, and with twain he cov- ered his feet, and with twain he did fly. Isa 6:3 And one cried unto another, and said, Holy, holy, holy, is THE YAHWEH SA- BAOTH: the whole earth is full of his glory. Isa 6:4 And the posts of the door moved at the voice of him that cried, and the house was filled with smoke.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
CRITERIA TO ENLIST IN THE END TIME ARMY
THE FATHER: The criteria to be enlisted in my End Time Army are symbolized below and are expanded in the following 50 commandments:
THE FORMATION OF THE HOSTS

title: 50 COMMANDMENTS FOR THE LAST DAYS' ARMY

segments.text: 50 COMMANDMENTS FOR THE LAST DAYS' ARMY
To obey The Protocol of Heaven.
To submit to the authority above them unless the above authority disobey the instructions of THE FATHER through Shekinaih.
To respect, obey, honor, and evil speak not against the au- thority above them that honors the Protocol of Heaven.
To bridle the tongue, lest they shall transgress against the Almighty in their complaining and murmuring against us.
To profane not against our names and our representatives in Shekinaih and Aaron K David.
To envy not the gifting of others, for each vessel in my army are uniquely created to fulfill a specific role in my last days' army.
Shalom, all must keep within their line of authority and follow suit the order given to them by the people above them with a genuine and sincere heart without hypocrisy.
Be obedient to obey all instructions of the Protocol of Heaven with proper respects and the right heart attitude as unto THE TRINITY.
Judge not lest 10 times more charges are laid on you by the Accuser. Shekinaih is an exception because she rep- resents us as The Judge.
Do not point fingers at each other. Subordinate must not accuse their superior because it violates the Protocol of Heaven.
Fret not in anything, but in all things, with prayer and sup- plications with thanksgivings, let your request be made known unto THE TRINITY for He cares for you and your loved ones.
Be focused on us for all the things that we put you through. Never look at human or circumstances except on our rep- resentatives.
Be calm at all times; never argue nor defend yourself from
BEHOLD MY NAMES
fools; for if you do, you will be a fool like them.
Be gracious to each other; show mercy and judge not (ex- cept for Shekinaih who is our judge), for mercy triumphs over judgment.
Be merciful to all and mercy will be shown to you. Cover each other's transgression with love and plead for mercy for them in prayer and supplications with love for each other.
Be tangibly humble in all your endeavors toward the au- thority above you; displaying a subservient attitude as unto me.
Be soberly minded in all situations which I put you through; make sure that you always focus your eyes on me in order that you will not be overwhelmed unnecessarily.
Repent fast when I convict or confront you either directly or indirectly; or through my representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David.
Be silent as a lamb that opens not his mouth when you are being accused wrongly, for I am THE EHYEH the Master- mind who writes your script.

Abstain from mingling with the hypocrites, unrighteous children of Belial, false prophets, my lawless ministers, evil doers, defamers, accusers, those who blaspheme my name, and etc. lest you become partakers of their iniquities and be stained with their sins.
Do not be a false swearer.

Shalom and be at peace in all situations which I put you through; seeing that none should miss my promises through unbelief and evil imaginations concerning our representatives (Shekinaih and Aaron K David).
Be vigilant of the enemy who is always sneaking from be- hind when you least expect him so that he will not be able to swallow you up.
Be subservient always in your attitude towards those above you and who has charge over you.
THE FORMATION OF THE HOSTS
Be disciplined in the rules of my last days' army by practic- ing them daily in all circumstances and situations that you face.

Be alert of the enemy digging holes for your downfall due to you being wise in your own eyes should you ignore and not take heed of my counsel through my representatives (Shekinaih and Aaron K David).

Be warned that those who oppose my words, disciplines, punishments, counsels, advice, corrections, etc. through my representatives who speak on our behalf shall not go unpunished by us, this I swear by my holiness.

Do not be wise in your own eyes wallowing in your ratio- nal and in the logical suggestions of the enemy who dwell in you through the Tree of the Knowledge of Good and Evil which should be rooted out of you. Know that heed- ing such idea from the enemy will inherit curses which will lead to death eventually.
Be rooted in me and let my words be firmly engraved in you; let no man deceive you with deceiving doctrines of the enemy apart from our representatives Shekinaih and Aaron K David.
Be aware of dogs and throw not holy things unto them, for they will bite you back in return.
Be ye holy; do not transgress by crossing the line of au- thority above you through showing disrespect or dishonor to our representatives Shekinaih and Aaron K David.
Argue not, profane not, despise not, confuse not my last days' doctrine with the leavened doctrine of current Chris- tendom, but be transformed by it.
Shut up the gates of Hades by perfecting holiness in the fear of THE YAHWEH.

Work out your salvation with fear and trembling. Behold! My salvation draws near to save my children of light who are called to be partakers of my divine holiness so that they will be restored to their pre-Adamic fall state.
For as high as the heaven is above the earth, so are my
BEHOLD MY NAMES

thoughts above yours and my ways above yours. Therefore, take heed that you shall not be offended by my 7 offences or squeezes which are to bring you to the end of yourself through denying yourself, taking up your cross, and fol- lowing in the footsteps of my SON JESUS. Otherwise, you are not worthy of me!!!
Shun from all forms of evils, for verily those who practice such things shall not inherit our Kingdom.

Lo and Behold, haven't I spoken? Judge not before it is time, lest you fall into damnation when you entertain un- true reports of evil doers and liars and children of Belial and those who are influenced by them.

Behave thyself when you are in my presence through my representatives (Shekinaih and Aaron K David). Bridle your tongue, guard your heart, suffer not your mind or spirit in unbelief or rebellion against my authority in them, for Shekinaih has been given the full authority of THE FATHER to discipline my children in whatsoever ways she deems fit and in all matters of my decision through her. See that you don't disobey her, lest I deal with you severely, this I swear by my holiness. Obey also Aaron K David who represents my SON JESUS. Otherwise, you will disqualify yourself from my army and will be chastised also by us, this I swear by my holiness.
Lo and Behold, argue not among yourselves about who is greater among thee, be humble and consider others bet- ter than yourself, for I will exalt the lowly and humble the proud.
THE SHADDAI, my Destroyer, will destroy those who mur- mur against me and my representatives like in the days of old during Moses' time.

Do not judge my representatives because my ways are al- ways the ways of offence; they are my rock of stumbling which I will test the children of Zion for their upward as- cent unto Mount Zion. They are also for my signs and won- ders.
Lo and Behold, I say to you, fret not of evil doers for my
THE FORMATION OF THE HOSTS
righteous judgment will stand in the end.

Be quick to listen to my instructions and words but be slow to speak. Reflect on my teachings and my words daily and put them into practice by your actual walking it out so that my glorious image may be formed in you.
Take heed that you do not abhor or resist my breaking of you. The crushing is to make you selfless so that you will be Christ-like in your character and matured as real sons of THE FATHER.
Suffer not in bitterness when I confront you of the idols in your hearts lest you be deceived and be led unto destruc- tion which is permitted by us.
Be warned that you do not strive with me nor my repre- sentatives. For if you do, you shall be bitten by serpents (attacked by the enemy) as in the days of Moses.

Be vigilant that you do not give in to the suggestions and voices of the evil ones who will trick you into rebellion against me and my representatives; for if you do, you will be swallowed up in hell and be skipped over and be re- membered no more thereafter.

Be a fast learner in learning my ways through my teach- ing by my representatives (Shekinaih and Aaron K David) so that you will not be left behind. Be as one who presses forcefully into the Kingdom of Heaven.

Again I say unto you: respect, honor, and obey our chosen representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David, as unto us so that we will honor you after we have finished our work of perfection in you through them.
Verily, verily, verily I say unto you, for those who do prac- tice doing all the above, they will by no means lose their rewards in us.

My name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH," means me as the Com- mander-in-Chief. I, through Shekinaih, will control my armies in the three realms (Heaven, Earth and Beneath the Earth) judging and releasing my judgments to my armies. I will re- lease the decrees to Shekinaih, and she will then release the
BEHOLD MY NAMES
decrees to my son Aaron K David to execute them. I will be merciful and compassionate to the humble and to those who are quick to repent through them.
A SABER WENT INTO SHEKINAIH
SHEKINAIH: I saw THE FATHER slotted a sword/saber from the crown of my head into my spinal cord. He also slotted a small- er saber in my womb.

THE FATHER: We have put both the decreeing sword and exe- cuting saber into Shekinaih's spinal cord. The decreeing sword represents my authority in decreeing and the authority of THE HOLY SPIRIT in sealing the decree. The execution saber is the macro execution saber of THE TRINITY over the three realms: heavens, earth and beneath the earth (the Cosmoses). Through Shekinaih, the micro execution saber of JESUS in her womb will be given to David who represents my SON JESUS for co-execution.
THE FORMATION OF THE HOSTS
THE RULE OF THE GALAXY
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the above vision that Shek- inaih saw symbolize?

JESUS: David, did not Paul in the Epistle to the Corinthians wrote that the saints shall judge the Cosmoses? The real trans- lation should be "the holy ones shall judge the Cosmoses". There are many creatures in different galaxies consisting of an- gels, demons, hybrids, and elemental beings. My FATHER has determined to give the spiritual tribe of Judah, Reuben, Ben- jamin, Levi and Naphtali to sub-rule the Galaxy of Stars when they are glorified.

1Co 6:2 Do ye not know that the Holy Ones (G40 "hagios" holy) shall judge the Cosmoses (G2889 "Kosmos")? and if the Cosmos- es shall be judged by you, are ye unworthy to judge the small- est matters? 1Co 6:3 Know ye not that we shall judge angels? how much more things that pertain to this life?
CHAPTER 3
THE TWO REPRESENTATIVES
SHEKINAIH SITTING ON A THRONE

SHEKINAIH: I see myself wearing a golden Chinese Empress' robe sitting on a Golden Throne in the three realms with the words "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" written on my forehead. Sometime, the words "THE EHYEH" or "THE YAHWEH" or "THE ELOHIM" or "THE EL" or "THE SHADDAI" or "THE ADONAI" inter-
changed with "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" on my forehead. The names "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" and "THE El" are back to back like the two sides of a coin.

JESUS: David, for most of the time, you shall manifest our name, "THE EL", in mercy and gentleness while Shekinaih shall manifest our name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", in severity. Both of you are the sword, the voice, and the glory of our Excellen- cy who shall come in the Excellency of THE YAHWEH.

Rom 11:22 Behold therefore the gentleness (G5544, "chres- totes") and harshness (G663 "apotomia" severity) of THE ELOHIM: on them which fell, harshness; but toward thee, gentleness, if thou continue in his gentleness: otherwise thou also shalt be cut off.
David, why don't you share with Shekinaih the Revelation about the word "Excellency" I gave you many years ago while you were in Kansas City?

DAVID: A few years ago, I was visiting a church in Kansas City in America. During the altar call, an old couple approached me and prophesied over me. They then whispered in my ear telling me that they heard THE HOLY SPIRIT telling them that I am THE ELOHIM'S Excellency. They also advised me not to be overwhelmed by this revelation and fall into pride.
THE TWO REPRESENTATIVES
According to Strong's Definition, the word "Highness" (H1346 "gaavah") is also translated as "Excellency".
THE HOLY SPIRIT led me to many verses in the scripture men- tioning this word and it would be good for THE YAHWEH JE- SUS to illuminate us further.
MY EXCELLENCY

JESUS: Shekinaih, David and you are the right and left hand man of my FATHER: the greatness of His Excellency, the Angel of our Presence. David shall co-execute our decree that is re- leased to him by you. As the right hand of my FATHER in co-ex- ecuting His decree, he shall be expanded in power and shall be victorious against our enemies, just like how we, through him before his incarnation, vanquished Pharaoh's armies in the time of Moses when we opened the Red Sea.

Exo 15:6 Thy right hand, O YAHWEH, is become glorious (H142 "adar" meaning expanding) in power: thy right hand, O YAHWEH, hath dashed in pieces the enemy. Exo 15:7 And in the greatness (H7230 "rob" abundance) of thine excellency thou hast over- thrown them that rose up against thee: thou sentest forth thy wrath, which consumed them as stubble.
THE SWORD OF MY EXCELLENCY

THE FATHER: We, THE TRINITY, have risen from our throne and will go into Shekinaih who represents me and my womb. My SON, JESUS, will proceed out from her womb and go into you, David, our right hand man, who will co-execute our decree.

We will ride in our Excellency (Shekinaih, my FATHER'S incar- nation and my SON, JESUS, in Aaron K David, his reincarnation) and through the "sword/saber of my Excellency" will thrust out our enemy in the day of our wrath when we will tread down their high ones before our Spiritual Israel, and my chil- dren shall dwell safely alone in the last days.
Deu 33:26 There is none like unto THE EL of Jeshurun, who ri-
BEHOLD MY NAMES
deth upon the heaven in thy help, and in his excellency on the sky Deu 33:29 Happy art thou, O Israel: who is like unto thee, O

people saved by THE YAHWEH, the shield (H4043 "magen") of thy help, and who is the sword (H2719 "chereb" a cutting instru- ment, sword, knife) of thy excellency! (H1346 "gaavah" translat- ed as "Excellency"), and thine enemies shall be found liars unto thee; and thou shalt tread upon their high places.
THE VOICE OF MY EXCELLENCY
As the voice (spokesman) of my Excellency manifesting my name "THE EL", Shekinaih and you shall command my angels to bring hailstones and rain for correction, or for mercy.

Job 37:4 After it a voice roareth: he thundereth with the voice of his excellency; and he will not stay them when his voice is heard. Job 37:5 THE EL thundereth marvellously with his voice; great things doeth he, which we cannot comprehend. Job

37:9 Out of the south cometh the whirlwind: and cold out of the north. Job 37:10 By the breath of THE EL frost is given: and the breadth of the waters is straitened. Job 37:11 Also by watering he wearieth the thick cloud: he scattereth his bright cloud: Job 37:12 And it is turned round about by his counsels: that they may do whatsoever he commandeth them upon the face of the world in the earth. Job 37:13 He causeth it to come, whether for correction, or for his land, or for mercy.
THE GLORY OF MY EXCELLENCY

Together, Shekinaih and you, are the glory of my Excellency, my Two Cherubim of Glory. Through our name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", Shekinaih will release my decree, and you, who most of the time bears my name, "THE EL", will come upon every one that is proud and lofty, and every one that is lifted up; and they shall be brought low. All the kings and nobles, all the wealthy that are lifted up and the haughty shall also be brought low together with the demons which they wor- shipped in every nation. All will be terrified when we arise to shake terribly the earth through both of you.
THE TWO REPRESENTATIVES

Isa 2:10 Enter into the rock, and hide thee in the dust, for fear of THE YAHWEH, and for the glory of his Excellency. Isa 2:11 The lofty looks of man shall be humbled, and the haughtiness of men shall be bowed down, and THE YAHWEH alone shall be ex- alted in that day. Isa 2:12 For the day of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH shall be upon every one that is proud and lofty, and upon every one that is lifted up; and he shall be brought low: ... Isa 2:18 And the idols he shall utterly abolish. Isa 2:19 And they shall go into the holes of the rocks, and into the caves of the earth, for fear of THE YAHWEH, and for the glory of his Excellency, when he ariseth to shake terribly the earth.

title: IN THE EXCELLENCY OF THE NAME OF THE YAHWEH

segments.text: IN THE EXCELLENCY OF THE NAME OF THE YAHWEH
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how shall Shekinaih and I come in your Excellency?

THE FATHER: Shekinaih shall represent THE HOLY SPIRIT in birth- ing you out prophetically as my SON'S reincarnation. Together, you shall gather the remnants of Spiritual Israel. Both of you shall be established and will shepherd them in the Excellen- cy of my name. In that day, my sheep shall remain with both of you whom we will magnify throughout the world. When the Anti-Christ (symbolized by the King of Assyria) attacks my household, we shall raise seven angels/apostles (you being the seventh) to assist you to declare judgments on the cities of the Anti-Christ and his armies. I will also cut off all witchcraft and idolatry from Spiritual Israel. I, through my name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", shall arise through both of you to execute my vengeance in anger and fury upon the heathen, such as they have not heard before.

Mic 5:2 But thou, Bethlehem Ephratah, though thou be little among the thousands of Judah, yet out of thee shall he come forth unto me that is to be ruler in Israel; whose goings forth have been from of old, from everlasting. Mic 5:3 Therefore will he give them up, until the time that she which travaileth hath brought forth: then the remnant of his brethren shall return unto the children of Israel. Mic 5:4 And he shall stand and feed in the strength of THE YAHWEH, in the Excellency of the name of THE YAHWEH his ELOHIM; and they shall abide: for now shall
BEHOLD MY NAMES

he be great unto the ends of the earth. Mic 5:5 And this man shall be the peace, when the Assyrian shall come into our land: and when he shall tread in our palaces, then shall we raise against him seven shepherds, and eight principal men. Mic 5:6 And they shall waste the land of Assyria with the sword, and the land of Nimrod in the entrances thereof: thus shall he deliver us from the Assyrian, when he cometh into our land, and when he treadeth within our borders.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, are there any others whom you will send to assist us other than the seven angels/apostles?

JESUS: Yes, we will also arise through both of you to muster those who rejoice in us through both of you (My Excellency). These are my 7,000 Holy Prophets/intercessors (the Sanctified Ones) and the Apostles (the Mighty Ones) from all the nations; and as battle axes and weapons of war, we shall break the na- tions in pieces and destroy the kingdoms of the Beast from the Sea. Shekinaih manifesting our name "THE YAHWEH SA- BAOTH" and our name "THE SHADDAI" shall muster my armies and release our decrees to you, my VICTORY, and you shall co-execute our determinations on these nations.

Isa 13:1 The burden of Babylon, which Isaiah the son of Amoz did see. Isa 13:2 Lift ye up a banner upon the high mountain, exalt the voice unto them, shake the hand, that they may go into the gates of the nobles. Isa 13:3 I have commanded my sanctified ones, I have also called my mighty ones for mine anger, even them that rejoice in my Excellency (H1346 "gaavah" highness). Isa 13:4 The noise of a multitude in the mountains, like as of a great people; a tumultuous noise of the kingdoms of nations gathered together: THE YAHWEH SABAOTH mustereth the host of the battle. Isa 13:5 They come from a far country, from the end of heaven, even THE YAHWEH, and the weapons of his indig- nation, to destroy the whole land. Isa 13:6 Howl ye; for the day of THE YAHWEH is at hand; it shall come as a destruction from THE SHADDAI.
THE TWO REPRESENTATIVES
THE TWO MOUTH SWORD/SABER
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the relation between the dia- gram Shekinaih saw and the two edged sword you men- tioned in Hebrews 4:12-13?

JESUS: Both of you are our voice, our spokesman, our two- mouth sword; one tongue in releasing my decree, manifest- ing our name "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", and the other tongue manifesting our name "THE EL" in the co-execution of the de- cree. Both of you are made in the similitude of my FATHER and me, and are not like the vain idols of falsehood which have no breath. Shekinaih is indeed the incarnation of my FA- THER and the reincarnation of THE HOLY SPIRIT who first incar- nated in Mary, my physical mother; and you, David, are indeed my reincarnation.

JESUS: Shekinaih and you are my FATHER'S word and my word respectively. As our incarnation and reincarnation, the words that we speak through both of you are spirit and life which shall quicken and energize all men. Both of you shall compre- hensively expound our ways to my brothers and sisters and reach into their innermost being and hear their thoughts and the intents of their hearts. Everyone shall be naked before you for I have given both of you discerning eyes concerning them so as to prove them in the day of testing.
Heb 4:12 For the word of THE ELOHIM (Spokesman) is quicken- ing, and energising (G1756 energes), and decisive (G5114 "tomo- teros" comprehensive or decisive) than any two mouth (G1366
BEHOLD MY NAMES

"distomos" from G1364 "dis" twice, two + G1417 G4750 "stoma" mouth) sword (G3162 "machaira"), piercing even to the dividing asunder of soul and spirit, and of the joints and marrow, and is a discerner of the thoughts and intents of the heart. Heb 4:13 Neither is there any creature that is not manifest in his sight: but all things are naked and opened unto the eyes of him with whom we have discourse. (G3056 "logos" something said, in- cluding the thought).

THE FATHER: Shekinaih and you, the Angel of Our Presence, shall be my two-mouth sword/saber in the mouth of my SON, JESUS, who will decree and execute my judgment on the Cos- moses. Shekinaih is our sword in releasing my decree, and you are His saber in co-executing the decree. The angel that appeared to John in the Book of Revelation is both of your counterpart angel that appeared in androgynous form.
Rev 1:16 And he had in his right hand seven stars: and out of his mouth went a sharp two edged saber (G4501 "rhomphaia"): and his countenance was as the sun shineth in his strength.
Rev 2:16 Repent; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will fight against them with the saber (G4501 "rhomphaia") of my mouth (spokesman).

As our spokesmen, both of you shall confront and convict the seven messengers with their congregations of their sins and will call for their bringing fruits meet for repentance and be converted to walk in my ways lest they end up in Perdition.

THE FATHER: BANG! BANG!! BANG!!! Behold, I've come as a two edged sword through both of you to cut asunder the spirit and soul, and rightly divide the thoughts, deeds and the med- itation of every heart. A GIANT SABER
JESUS: David, are you quickened and energized by this reve- lation? Do you have an inner witness that you want to share with Shekinaih?

DAVID: Yes, I am very enlightened. Shekinaih, a few years ago, I was invited by a sister in Christ to a prayer tower in India. I told the secretary of the founder of the prayer tower that THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST had instructed me to have over- night prayer in the tower for three consecutive nights. She rejected my request in unbelief and told me that ever since the prayer tower was opened, no stranger had been given permission to have private overnight prayer there. I told her to inform the founder and promised her that I will not con- tinue with my endeavor if the founder said no to my request. Following that, she called the founder while I supplicated to THE FATHER to talk to the founder who was a well-known prophet regarding this matter. Shortly, she came back with
BEHOLD MY NAMES

two security guards with rifles hanging on their backs. I was a bit troubled and disappointed when I saw them, for I as- sumed that the security guards were there to lead me out of their prayer tower just in case I persisted and refused to leave. But to my astonishment, the secretary told me that the founder had inquired of THE YAHWEH JESUS and was instruct- ed by Him to receive me and treat me well. She informed me that the two security guards were there to protect me in the night as there were trouble makers from the villages that often sneaked into the prayer tower to desecrate the place with excrement and urine as well as damaging the property. I was so relieved and thankful to THE FATHER for the divine in- troduction and I started to thank the secretary and asked her to relate my appreciation to the founder. I started my prayer and fasting with the sister and two more brothers. On the second night of our prayer, while I was lying down directly under the center of the dome ceiling, one of the brothers saw a giant saber coming down and it went directly into me. I felt thick hot oil smearing my whole body. It was so thick and heavy that I could tangibly feel the heat and the sticki- ness. I laid there sleeping the whole night through, praising THE FATHER and my YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST for the anointing.

It has five moons: Charon, Nix, Hydra, Styx and Kerberos which are all figures of the underworld. Charon is the ferryman of Hades who carries the souls of the dead across the rivers Styx and Acheron while Nix is the goddess of the night, and Kerberos, which is Cerberus, is the hound of Hades.

A small, obscured town near Luxembourg

There- after, a priest in a black robe came out and walked into the Red Dragon and immediately his eyes turned red. He then stood on the pulpit and started to preach. As the priest con- tinued to discourse, spiritual fire proceeded from his mouth and went into the congregation and immediately their eyes also turned red as if being possessed by some evil.

Out of a sudden, a tumultuous lightning struck the center of the roof of this church and the building broke into two parts and collapsed.
