Exo 23:20 Behold, I send an Angel before thee, to keep thee in the way, and to bring thee into the place which I have prepared. Exo 23:21 Beware of him, and obey his voice, provoke him not; for he will not pardon your transgressions: for my name is in
THE COVENANT MAKING SHADDAI

him. Exo 23:22 But if thou shalt indeed obey his voice, and do all that I speak; then I will be an enemy unto thine enemies, and an adversary unto thine adversaries. Exo 23:23 For mine Angel shall go before thee, and bring thee in unto the Amorites, and the Hittites, and the Perizzites, and the Canaanites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites: and I will cut them off.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who and where are the Spiritual Hit- tites, Girgasites, Amorites, Canaanites, Perizzites, Hivites and Jebusites, the seven nations whom you will destroy in the last days?

THE FATHER: They are the hybrid descendants of the chief/ head of the serpent (Deu 7:1, Act 13:19). At present, they are the descendants of the rulers of Germany, United Kingdom, France, Belgium, Luxembourg, Italy, Greece, and Spain, but both of you will fulfill the prophecy of Genesis 3:15, which both of you as the Angel of Our Presence has decreed and executed on the serpent in the Garden of Eden. The serpent (Lucifer/ Molech) had always hated both of you for they knew who you both are (the woman and the man-child of Revelation 12:1-5). Yes, you shall bruise their kings and rulers (the Seven Heads), and they shall indeed persecute and trouble your heel (my last days' remnant warrior brides).

JESUS: My FATHER, through Shekinaih and you, our Angel manifesting our name, "THE SHADDAI", will first discipline our children and break their ego/pride/self-righteousness. When they repent and make good, Both of you will bless and restore them. Our purpose is to perfect the children to be as pure and white as snow and be partakers of our holiness, just as it is written, "Happy is the man whom THE ELOAH correcteth: therefore despise not thou the chastening of THE SHADDAI."

Job 5:17 Behold, happy is the man whom THE ELOAH correcteth: therefore despise not thou the chastening of THE SHADDAI: Job 5:18 For he maketh sore, and bindeth up: he woundeth, and his hands make whole.
Our name, "THE SHADDAI", manifests the masculine aspect of my FATHER in mercy as well as His feminine aspect in severity, in a proportion of one-third for mercy and two-thirds for se-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

verity. Our name, "THE EL SHADDAI", manifests the might and the destructive judgment of the wrath of my FATHER in mercy as well in severity. My FATHER, through His name, "THE SHADD- AI", will chastise His children with tribulation with the intent that through the training, they may produce the Peaceable Fruits of Righteousness and partake of His holiness.

Heb 12:6 For whom THE YAHWEH loveth he chasteneth, and scourgeth every son whom he receiveth. Heb 12:7 If ye endure chastening, THE ELOHIM dealeth with you as with sons; for what son is he whom the father chasteneth not? Heb 12:8 But if ye be without chastisement, whereof all are partakers, then are ye bastards, and not sons. Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather be in subjection unto the Father of spirits, and live? Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our prof- it, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but griev- ous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are trained (G1128 "gumnazo" train) thereby.

As the Angel of Our Presence, both of you are appointed to discipline those who are called to partake of my FATHER'S holiness without fail. Manifesting our name, "THE EL", as the disciplinary master, you shall make their heart soft; manifest- ing our name "THE SHADDAI, THE DESTROYER", you shall trou- ble them. Both of you shall be a terror to them, but happy are they who are corrected by both of you and despise not the chastisement, for though they are being made sore and wounded by both of you, they shall also be bond up and be made whole.

Job 23:14 For he performeth the thing that is appointed for me: and many such things are with him. Job 23:15 Therefore am I troubled at his presence: when I consider, I am afraid of him. Job 23:16 For THE EL maketh my heart soft, and THE SHADDAI troubleth me.
CHAPTER 2
THE FACE OF THE SHADDAI

title: THE SHADDAI SITTING ON THE THRONE

segments.text: THE SHADDAI SITTING ON THE THRONE
JESUS: David, can you share with Shekinaih your revelation re- garding the appearance of my name, "THE SHADDAI"?

DAVID: Long time ago, I knew a prophet from India whose name is D.G.S. Dhinakaran. He wrote a book about his trip to heaven. He told me that he saw God in the form of a young man about seventeen years old with rosy cheeks and that he only saw one side of his face. I kept this in my heart not know- ing how to interpret this. However, in later years, I found out by revelation that the youth he saw was Enoch who became Metatron. The word "Enoch" means initiated, set apart. The word "Meta" means "beside", "with". The word "tron" means "throne". So Enoch symbolizes the one who is set apart and initiated into the mystery of the glory of THE ELOHIM to be- come a Metatron, and made to sit beside THE YAHWEH on His Throne of Glory.
JESUS: What D.G.S saw was our masculine aspect represented by the Male Metatron, our right hand man, but our feminine aspect represented by the Female Metatron, who is our left hand, he did not see.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why did you not show him the other face who is a woman?

JESUS: If we showed him our other face, he would be shocked, startled, full of question, unbelieving, and would fall off from his chair because he would not be able to bear them. But the time has come for our manifestation to be known to our chil- dren through the Spirit of Truth.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

Joh 16:12 I have yet many things to say unto you, but ye cannot bear them now. Joh 16:13 Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come.
Both of you are the Spirit of Truth, our Two Cherubim shad- owing our mercy seat representing and manifesting our glory and are called the "Cherubim of Glory".
Heb 9:5 And over it the cherubim of glory shadowing the mer- cyseat; of which we cannot now speak particularly.

Shekinaih is one of the cherubim who represents the female aspect of my FATHER in severity and you are the other cherub who represent His mercy; and both of you manifest our name, "THE EL SHADDAI". Balaam and Ezekiel saw and heard the voice and saw the vision of THE EL SHADDAI represented by the An- gel of Our Presence.
Num 24:4 He hath said, which heard the words of THE EL, which saw the vision of THE SHADDAI, falling into a trance, but having his eyes open:
Eze 10:5 And the sound of the cherubims' wings was heard even to the outer court, as the voice of THE EL SHADDAI when he speaketh.

Together, both of you are the mouth of THE YAHWEH, our spokesman. The Glory of THE YAHWEH shall be revealed through both of you, and all flesh shall see it together. Like me, both of you are incarnated and sent to turn spiritual Zion and Jerusalem to the Way of THE YAHWEH. Both of you will exalt the humble and humiliate the proud; straighten the crooked in uprightness and make plain the haughty. Both of you are the Glory of THE YAHWEH in flesh and blood. The voice in Isaiah 40:6 that said "cry" refers to Shekinaih, the feminine aspect of our name, "THE SHADDAI", and the one who said "What shall I cry" refers to you, the masculine aspect. United, you are the Spirit of THE YAHWEH who shall feed and keep our sheep as a shepherd. Shekinaih will release the decrees of THE TRINITY and you will co-execute them. And because both of you are my spokesmen, you shall stand forever. Both of you
THE FACE OF THE SHADDAI

are my strong hand and arm, and our reward and works are with you because you stand in our counsel and whatever you do are directed by us. We have taught both of you the knowl- edge of our coming judgment and opened your eyes of un- derstanding regarding our way.

Isa 40:3 The voice of him that crieth in the wilderness, Prepare ye the Way of THE YAHWEH, make straight in the desert a high- way for our ELOHIM. Isa 40:4 Every valley shall be exalted, and ev- ery mountain and hill shall be made low: and the crooked shall be made straight, and the rough places plain: Isa 40:5 And the Glory of THE YAHWEH shall be revealed, and all flesh shall see it together: for the mouth of THE YAHWEH hath spoken it. Isa 40:6 The voice said, Cry. And he said, What shall I cry? All flesh is grass, and all the goodliness thereof is as the flower of the field: Isa 40:7 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: because the spirit of THE YAHWEH bloweth upon it: surely the people is grass. Isa 40:8 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: but the word of our ELOHIM shall stand for ever. Isa 40:9 O Zion, that bringest good tidings, get thee up into the high mountain; O Jerusalem, that bringest good tidings, lift up thy voice with strength; lift it up, be not afraid; say unto the cities of Judah, Behold your ELO- HIM! Isa 40:10 Behold, THE ADONAI YAHVIH will come with strong hand, and his arm shall rule for him: behold, his reward is with him, and his work before him. Isa 40:11 He shall feed his flock like a shepherd: he shall gather the lambs with his arm, and carry them in his bosom, and shall gently lead those that are with young. Isa 40:12 Who hath measured the waters in the hol- low of his hand, and meted out heaven with the span, and com- prehended the dust of the earth in a measure, and weighed the mountains in scales, and the hills in a balance? Isa 40:13 Who hath directed the Spirit of THE YAHWEH, or being his counsellor hath taught him? Isa 40:14 With whom took he counsel, and who instructed him, and taught him in the path of judgment, and taught him knowledge, and shewed to him the way of un- derstanding?
THE DECREE AND THE TRUMPET
SHEKINAIH: I saw a trumpet with a pair of fiery wings behind it. Superimposed on the trumpet were two scrolls tied to- gether by a ribbon forming a cross which looks like this:
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this symbolize?
JESUS: This symbolizes the Angel of Our Presence in decreeing and executing our fiery judgment.
THE FATHER: I have given Shekinaih, my representative, the authority and power to release my decree to you and em- power you to proclaim and co-execute my determination.
When the blood of my martyrs in the golden bowl is full, a more severe judgment shall proceed. All the Books of Remem-
THE FACE OF THE SHADDAI
brance will be opened and the final weighing of evil versus good will begin. All sentences are recorded in each respective book, and decrees will be released to Shekinaih for judgment.

Once the decree is released, it cannot be reversed. It is the final judgment/decision agreed by us, THE TRINITY. When Shekinaih passes the decree to you, you will then broadcast it loudly into the three realms and that which is written in the decree and whatever things that are spoken according to it will take place speedily.
You, my son Aaron K David, through the power of the Seven Names of THE TRINITY, will then co-execute the decree accord- ing to the names of THE TRINITY attached to the decree.
CHAPTER 3
THE DESTROYER
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the definition of your name, THE SHADDAI?
JESUS: David, what did you find out from Strong's Concor- dance?

DAVID: According to Strong's Concordance, the word "SHADD- AI" H7706 "shadday" is from H7703 "shadad", a primitive root properly to be burly: someone who is muscular and beefy. THE SHADDAI, therefore, can be translated as "Our Muscular One": one who is excellent in power or strength. THE SHADD- AI is excellent in power, and in judgment, and in plenty of justice: He will not be abased and is a terror to all.

Job 37:23 Touching THE SHADDAI, we cannot find him out: he is excellent in power, and in judgment, and in plenty of justice: he will not be abased. Job 37:24 Men do therefore fear him: he respecteth not any that are wise of heart.

H7703 "shadad" is also translated as "to destroy, waste or spoil". So THE SHADDAI is the hand of THE YAHWEH, His arm in executing the judgment of the fierce anger of THE YAHWEH, especially upon Babylon in the day of THE YAHWEH. Babylon symbolizes the world. The Day of THE YAHWEH comes as de- struction (H7703) from THE SHADDAI (H7706). He will punish the world for their evil, and the wicked for their iniquity. He will cause the arrogancy of the proud to cease, and will lay low the haughtiness of the terrible. He will shake the heav- ens and the earth in the day of His fierce anger.

Isa 13:6 Howl ye; for the day of THE YAHWEH is at hand; it shall come as a destruction (H7701 "shod" from H7736 "shud" to de- stroy) from THE SHADDAI (H7706 "shadday" from H7703 "shadad" destroy, laid waste).
THE DESTROYER

SHEKINAIH: David, I also saw a vision of JESUS explaining to me the meaning of their name, "THE SHADDAI" through an acronym. These are the consisting words of the acronym "SHADDAI" which THE TRINITY gave me:

The letter "S" stands for "Some"; the letter "H" stands for "Hearse", which means funerary vehicle; The letter "A" stands for "All compassing"; the letter "D" stands for "Destroyer"; the next letter "D" stands for "Dash into pieces"; the letter "A" stands for "Almighty"; and lastly the letter "I" stands for "Ruin" referring to the "i" in the word "ruin".
JESUS: Our name, "THE SHADDAI", is an acronym of "Some, Hearse, All compassing, Destroyer, Dash into pieces, Almighty, Ruin".

SHEKINAIH: In this vision, I also saw four black skeleton men wearing black hood robes each driving a black hearse con- taining many coffins which were surrounded by many black hooded skeleton men. The hearse came from North, South, East and West of Earth and the coffins were poured and bur- ied in the center of the globe.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are these four black skeleton men that are surrounded by many skeleton men? Where is this center of the globe?
BEHOLD MY NAMES

JESUS: The four black skeleton men that are surrounded by many skeleton men are spirits of death. Before I can judge the Cosmoses, I must first judge my house, for I am a righteous judge. Therefore, I will surrender them to Death and Hades. They will arrest most lukewarm Christians from the four cor- ners of the earth whom I have spewed out of my mouth to be taken to the reptiles' concentration camp for experiments, and ultimately be killed.

THE FATHER through His name, "THE SHADDAI", will decree through Shekinaih, our trustworthy and faithful chief witness, and she will release our decree to you to co-execute our de- terminations on the lukewarm Christians who have broken my covenant. Despite my warning to them through both of you, they have not repented but have trusted in their wis- dom, might, and riches, and their hearts have departed from me. They are not willing to go through the fiery trial of faith that I have put them through in order to purify and clothe them as my divine and glorious brides.

Have not I spoken, our name, "THE SHADDAI", is a jealous cov- enant keeping ELOHIM, and will not spare this faithless gen- eration, but will spew them out of my mouth (unplug them out of my kingdom through both of you)? He that has an ear, let him hear what my Spirit of Truth through both of you says unto the churches. (Rev 3:14-22)

Rev 3:14 And unto the angel of the church of the Laodiceans write; These things saith the trustworthy (G281 "amen"), the faithful and true witness, the chief (G746 "arche" chief) of the creation of THE ELOHIM;
DAVID: Oh JESUS, this revelation is hard to swallow!

JESUS: Because sentence against an evil work is not executed speedily, therefore the heart of these Sons of Adam is fully set in them to be lawless, despising my covenant and have no fear of my judgment even though being warned by both of you.
Ecc 8:11 Because sentence against an evil work is not executed speedily, therefore the heart of the sons of men is fully set in
THE DESTROYER
them to do evil. Ecc 8:12 Though a sinner do evil an hundred times, and his days be prolonged, yet surely I know that it shall be well with them that fear THE ELOHIM, which fear before him:
We, through our name. "THE SHADDAI", will visit this ungodly generation with destruction through both of you, THE ELOAH, in anger. And they shall drink the wrath of THE SHADDAI.

Job 21:17 How oft is the candle of the wicked put out and how oft cometh their destruction upon them! THE ELOAH distribu- teth sorrows in his anger. Job 21:18 They are as stubble before the wind, and as chaff that the storm carrieth away. Job 21:19 THE ELOAH layeth up his iniquity for his children: he rewardeth him, and he shall know it. Job 21:20 His eyes shall see his de- struction, and he shall drink of the wrath of THE SHADDAI.

As I had in the past destroyed many ages when wickedness was in its fullness, I will also destroy this wicked generation as I had done in the Great Flood in the time of Noah when they said unto the Angel of Our Presence in Co-execution, THE EL,
"Depart from us: what can THE SHADDAI do?"

Job 22:15 Hast thou marked the old way which wicked men have trodden? Job 22:16 Which were cut down out of time, whose foundation was overflown with a flood: Job 22:17 Which said unto THE EL, Depart from us: what can THE SHADDAI do?
CHAPTER 4
JUDGMENT ON THE HOSTS OF HEAVEN
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of a saber and a sword crossed with each other in front of a background of the Milky Way which exploded into nothingness.
THE FATHER: Through my name, "THE SHADDAI", I will punish
JUDGMENT ON THE HOSTS OF HEAVEN

the inhabitants of the galaxies, Orion and Earth for their evil, and the wicked for their iniquity. And I will cause the arrogan- cy of the proud to cease, and will lay low the haughtiness of the Beast from the Sea in the last days.
By fire, the heavens (the planets, the stars, and the galaxies) will be burned and the earth will also be shaken.
Isa 13:6 Howl ye; for the day of THE YAHWEH is at hand; it shall come as a destruction from THE SHADDAI. Isa 13:9 Behold, the

day of THE YAHWEH cometh, cruel both with wrath and fierce anger, to lay the land desolate: and he shall destroy the sinners thereof out of it. Isa 13:10 For the stars of heaven and the Orion (H3685 "kesiyl" thereof shall not give their light: the sun shall be darkened in his going forth, and the moon shall not cause her light to shine. Isa 13:11 And I will punish the world for their evil, and the wicked for their iniquity; and I will cause the arrogancy of the proud to cease, and will lay low the haughtiness of the terrible.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why must you also destroy the galax- ies?
JESUS: My creations have been corrupted and so are the in- habitants in the galaxies under Satan's rulership. That is why I am going to destroy all and make anew.

Isa 34:4 And all the host of heaven shall be dissolved, and the heavens shall be rolled together as a scroll: and all their host shall fall down, as the leaf falleth off from the vine, and as a fall- ing fig from the fig tree. Isa 34:5 For my sword shall be bathed in heaven: behold, it shall come down upon Idumea, and upon the people of my curse, to judgment.

THE FATHER: The sword and the saber are the Angel of Our Presence, our two-mouthed sword/saber. The sword symbol- izes Shekinaih in decreeing and the saber symbolizes you, my son David, who shall co-execute my decree with Shekinaih. Together, you both represent our name, "THE EL SHADDAI".
JESUS: David, tell us what you have researched on the Milky Way.
DAVID: As per my research in cosmology, our solar system is located in the outer reaches of the Milky Way which is a spi-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

ral galaxy which contains roughly 200 billion stars. Most of these stars are not visible from Earth and almost everything that we can see in the sky belongs to the Milky Way. The arms of the Milky Way are named after the constellations that are seen in those directions. The major arms of the Milky Way galaxy are the Perseus Arm, Sagittarius Arm, Centaurus Arm, and Cygnus Arm; our Solar System is in a minor arm called the Orion Spur. The central hub (or central bulge) contains old stars and at least one black hole; younger stars are in the arms, along with dust and gas that form new stars. The great rift is a series of dark, obscuring dust clouds in the Milky Way and these clouds stretch from the constellation Sagittarius to the constellation Cygnus.
JESUS: The Milky Way is Satan's sphere of rule, and she and her mate rule over all the stars in the galaxy.

DAVID: Shekinaih, as per some researchers, in Aramaic my- thology, the term "niyphelah" refers to the Constellation of Orion and Nephilim refers to the offspring of Orion. Accord- ing to Egyptian Mythology, the gods descended from the belt of Orion and Sirius - the brightest star in the sky. The ancient Egyptian Civilization firmly believed that Sirius and Orion represent Osiris and Isis, the god and the goddess from which all of the Egyptian Civilization and all of the human Civilization sprang. Egyptians believed that Osiris will return from Orion one day.

The patterns of stars in the Orion Constellation is seen in many monuments throughout the ancient world, such as the Pyr- amids of Egypt which were mapped in such a way that their constructions mimic their patterns. The whole city of Teoti- huacán seems to be aligned astronomically. It is consistently oriented 15 to 25 degrees east of true north, and the front wall of the Pyramid of the Sun is exactly perpendicular to the point on the horizon where the sun sets on the equinoxes. The rest of the ceremonial buildings were laid out at right angles to the Pyramid of the Sun. The Avenue of the Dead points at the setting of the Pleiades. Another alignment is to
JUDGMENT ON THE HOSTS OF HEAVEN
the "Dog Star" Sirius, sacred to the ancient Egyptians, which has led some to suggest a link between the great pyramids of Egypt and Mexico.

THE FATHER: I, through my name, "THE SHADDAI", by the hand of the Angel of Our Presence who bears our name, "THE EL", will execute judgment on Rahab (Lucifer), and all her helpers who are the inhabitants of the Milky Way and all the stars.

Job 9:6 Which shaketh the earth out of her place, and the pil- lars thereof tremble. Job 9:7 Which commandeth the sun, and it riseth not; and sealeth up the stars. Job 9:8 Which alone sprea- deth out the heavens, and treadeth upon the waves of the sea. Job 9:9 Which maketh Arcturus, Orion, and Pleiades, and the chambers of the south. Job 9:10 Which doeth great things past finding out; yea, and wonders without number. Job 9:11 Lo, he goeth by me, and I see him not: he passeth on also, but I per- ceive him not. Job 9:12 Behold, he taketh away, who can hinder him? who will say unto him, What doest thou? Job 9:13 If THE EL will not withdraw his anger, the Rahab helpers do stoop under him.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, if the Nephilim have their correspond- ing stars, how about your incarnated sons in the earth?

Job 38:31 Canst thou bind the sweet influences of Pleiades, or loose the bands of Orion? Job 38:32 Canst thou bring forth Mazzaroth in his season? or canst thou guide Arcturus with his sons? Job 38:33 Knowest thou the ordinances of heaven? canst thou set the dominion thereof in the earth?

JESUS: The Pleiades symbolizes the Seven Angel of Revelation. These are currently in fallen state and yet to be recovered by us through the Angel of Our Presence (Shekinaih and Aaron K David). But when perfected, they will execute my judgment as according to the Book of Revelation. Through our name, "THE SHADDAI", we will break the restraint or the bands of the Ne- philim symbolized by Orion/the Giant who are intently trying to defer the gathering of the Seven Stars that are in charge of the Seven Churches of Revelation. The Mazzaroth symbolizes the sons of Jacob, the Twelve Tribes of Israel in the flesh which will be gathered at its appointed time. These people are pre- determined to walk on the preordained path but are at pres-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

ent moving out of track. They are the rebels. Arcturus is Esau's descendants, who at present are living under another name and race. This is what we meant in Obadiah Verse 6: "How are the things of Esau searched out! How are his hidden things sought up?" They are among the wise and the powerful in the world. Like their father the Devil (Accuser), they will continue to slay all the spiritual Adam through lies and deceits; accusing, slandering and framing the anointed ones as their fathers did to the true prophets of old. They had hated me and brought false witnesses to lay false charges against me and my dis- ciples; and will continue to do this to my holy apostles and prophets whom we will send to testify against them.

Joh 8:44 Ye are of your father the devil (Accuser), and the lusts of your father ye will do. He was a murderer from the begin- ning, and abode not in the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he speaketh a lie, he speaketh of his own: for he is a liar, and the father of it.
CHAPTER 5 THE ORION

THE FATHER: When my seven incarnated angels are in league in the bond of love with the Angel of Our Presence, the Prince of Orion/the Giant with his offspring, the Nephilim, will melt before their brightness.

Amo 5:7 Ye who turn judgment to wormwood, and leave off righteousness in the earth, Amo 5:8 Seek him that maketh the seven stars (H3598 "kiymah") and Orion (H3685 "kesiyl"), and turneth the shadow of death into the morning, and maketh the day dark with night: that calleth for the waters of the sea, and poureth them out upon the face of the earth: THE YAHWEH is his name.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are these Nephilim?

JESUS: These are cold-blooded reptile creatures from another planet. They are the seed of the serpent which caused the downfall of Adam and Eve in the Garden of Eden. They walk upright on two legs and their two hands have claws. They are able to shape-shift and can camouflage themselves like cha- meleons because of their liquid crystal make up. They have cross-bred with human and other living creatures and their hybrids are immensely diverse.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, are they mentioned in the Bible?

JESUS: Yes, they are, but Satan hid them through his religious authority by changing the meaning. The word "Orion" (H3685 "kesiyl") is the same as H3684 "kesiyl" which is translated as "fool", but it means "fat", referring to their wealth. They are the wealthy sons of the Nephilim and are usually in high places. In the day of the wrath of THE SHADDAI, the wealth that they boast will not be able to save their lives. At last, they will real- ize how foolish and self-deceiving they are. Like a man awak-
BEHOLD MY NAMES

ened from a nightmare, they will soon realize that they do not live forever and are not immortal and shall die like everyone. The names and the lineages that they thrive from generations to generations will not abide forever. They will realize their folly and be awakened in a state of bewilderment once they see their cities and the infrastructure thereof in ruin together with the destruction of their sons and loved ones when the Great Earthquakes and comets come upon them.
Their descendants might be many and their wealth plentiful in this world, but they shall be destroyed forever in the day of our wrath.

Psa 92:6 A brutish man knoweth not; neither doth a kesiyl (H3684) understand this. Psa 92:7 When the wicked spring as the grass, and when all the workers of iniquity do flourish; it is that they shall be destroyed for ever.

They proudly utter and speak hard things against my FATHER and boast themselves and break and afflict my heritage. They will slay the widow (Mother Heavenly Jerusalem), the strang- ers (the 7,000 witnesses) and murder the fatherless (144,000 virgins). They have no fear of my FATHER when they sit as judges drafting perverse laws conspiring against the righteous ones and condemning the innocent.
THE FATHER: I, THE YAHWEH, the Righteous Judge, by the An- gel of Our Presence, through our name, THE EL, will surely cut them off in the day of my wrath.

Psa 94:1 O YAHWEH THE EL, to whom vengeance belongeth; O EL, to whom vengeance belongeth, shew thyself. Psa 94:2 Lift up thyself, thou judge of the earth: render a reward to the proud. Psa 94:3 YAHWEH, how long shall the wicked, how long shall the wicked triumph? Psa 94:4 How long shall they utter and speak hard things? and all the workers of iniquity boast themselves? Psa 94:5 They break in pieces thy people, O YAHWEH, and afflict thine heritage. Psa 94:6 They slay the widow and the stranger, and murder the fatherless. Psa 94:7 Yet they say, THE YAH shall not see, neither shall THE ELOHIM of Jacob regard it. Psa 94:8 Understand, ye brutish among the people: and ye kesiyl (H3684 "kesiyl"), when will ye be wise? Psa 94:9 He that planted the ear, shall he not hear? he that formed the eye, shall he not see? Psa
THE ORION

94:10 He that chastiseth the heathen, shall not he correct? he that teacheth man knowledge, shall not he know? ... Psa 94:23 And he shall bring upon them their own iniquity, and shall cut them off in their own wickedness; yea, THE YAHWEH OUR ELO- HIM shall cut them off.

JESUS: Due to their prosperity, the kesiyl did not choose the fear of us, THE YAHWEH, the Righteous Judge, or listen to our counsel, and they despised it when they were corrected and warned by my Messenger. I, THE YAHWEH, will also laugh at their calamity and will mock at them when anguish and dis- tress come upon them. They will be ashamed.

Pro 1:22 How long, ye simple ones, will ye love simplicity? and the scorners delight in their scorning, and kesiyl (H3684) hate knowledge? Pro 1:23 Turn you at my reproof: behold, I will pour out my spirit unto you, I will make known my words unto you. Pro 1:24 Because I have called, and ye refused; I have stretched out my hand, and no man regarded; Pro 1:25 But ye have set at nought all my counsel, and would none of my reproof: Pro 1:26 I also will laugh at your calamity; I will mock when your fear cometh; Pro 1:27 When your fear cometh as desolation, and your destruction cometh as a whirlwind; when distress and anguish cometh upon you. Pro 1:28 Then shall they call upon me, but I will not answer; they shall seek me early, but they shall not find me: Pro 1:29 For that they hated knowledge, and did not choose the fear of THE YAHWEH: Pro 1:30 They would none of my counsel: they despised all my reproof. Pro 1:31 Therefore shall they eat of the fruit of their own way, and be filled with their own devices. Pro 1:32 For the turning away of the simple shall slay them, and the prosperity of the kesiyl shall destroy them.
The kesiyl are hypocrites and slanderers who enjoy commit- ting evil deeds and boast about them.
Pro 10:18 He that hideth hatred with lying lips, and he that uttereth a slander, is a kesiyl (H3684).
They cannot do good as it is not their nature. Those who are companions of them shall be destroyed.
Pro 13:19 The desire accomplished is sweet to the soul: but it is abomination to kesiyl (H3684) to depart from evil. Pro 13:20 He that walketh with wise men shall be wise: but a companion of
BEHOLD MY NAMES
kesiyl shall be destroyed.
They are very confident and self-deceptive and have no fear of punishment. They are not easily convicted that there are retributions.
Pro 14:8 The wisdom of the prudent is to understand his way:
but the folly of kesiyl (H3684) is deceit.
The kesiyl are usually quarrelsome and are not interested in godly wisdom. They, like their father, will be judged in the Day of Judgment for every unprofitable word they spoke against my anointed.

Pro 18:2 A kesyil hath no delight in understanding, but that his heart may discover itself. Pro 18:6 A kesiyl's lips enter into con- tention, and his mouth calleth for strokes. Pro 18:7 A kesiyl's (H3684) mouth is his destruction, and his lips are the snare of his soul.

They are crooked in heart and perverse in their speech and love to party in their house of mirth. They are living among us and are among the elites of the world. They live in clones and hybrid mutations of the bodies of kings, captains, and mighty men of the nations and are enjoying their lives and are very powerful in the world. But we, through our name, "THE SHADDAI", by the Angel of Our Presence manifesting our might, THE EL, will visit their iniquity upon their children and their eyes shall see their destruction and they shall drink of the wrath of THE SHADDAI. (Job 21:7-34)
Pro 19:1 Better is the poor that walketh in his integrity, than he that is perverse in his lips, and is a kesiyl (H3684).
Ecc 7:4 The heart of the wise is in the house of mourning; but the heart of kesiyl is in the house of mirth.

They are the seed of the serpent, the kings and the rulers of the earth that will conspire with the wicked authorities and power of the world to go against me and my christ (anointed) in the last days. They are the real Anti-Christ, the reptile race and their hybrids in high places.
But they will not succeed and will be dashed into pieces like a
THE ORION
potter's vessel by my Decreeing and Executing Angel who will manifest my name, "THE SHADDAI".

Psa 2:1 Why do the heathen rage, and the people imagine a vain thing? Psa 2:2 The kings of the earth set themselves, and the rulers take counsel together, against THE YAHWEH, and against his anointed, saying, Psa 2:3 Let us break their bands asunder, and cast away their cords from us. Psa 2:4 He that sitteth in the heavens shall laugh: THE ADONAI shall have them in derision. Psa 2:5 Then shall he speak unto them in his wrath, and vex them in his sore displeasure. Psa 2:6 Yet have I set my king upon my holy hill of Zion. Psa 2:7 I will declare the decree: THE YAHWEH hath said unto me, Thou art my Son; this day have I begotten thee. Psa 2:8 Ask of me, and I shall give thee the heathen for thine inheritance, and the uttermost parts of the earth for thy possession. Psa 2:9 Thou shalt break them with a rod of iron; thou shalt dash them in pieces like a potter's vessel. Psa 2:10 Be wise now therefore, O ye kings: be instructed, ye judges of the earth. Psa 2:11 Serve THE YAHWEH with fear, and rejoice with trembling. Psa 2:12 Kiss the Son, lest he be angry, and ye perish from the way, when his wrath is kindled but a little. Blessed are all they that put their trust in him.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is there any reference concerning these aliens in the scripture?

JESUS: Yes, the gods of the Canaanites are alien gods (Gen 35:2). We have commanded Joshua to warn my people that I am a jealous God, if they forsake us and serve alien gods, I will turn to hurt and consume them.

Jos 24:19 And Joshua said unto the people, Ye cannot serve THE YAHWEH: for he is an holy God; he is a jealous God; he will not forgive your transgressions nor your sins. Jos 24:20 If ye forsake THE YAHWEH, and serve alien (H5236 "nekar" alien) gods, then he will turn and do you hurt, and consume you, after that he hath done you good.

In the Septuagint version of Judges 8:10, Zebah and Zalmun- na are the hybrids of the Nephilim for their hosts were called hosts of the aliens. The original word "aliens" in Judges 8:10 was replaced with the word "children of the east" by the rep- tilian Pharisee and Sadducee priests to hide themselves from being exposed.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

Jdg 8:9 And Gedeon said to the men of Phanuel, When I return in peace, I will break down this tower. Jdg 8:10 And Zebee and Salmana were in Carcar, and their host was with them, about fifteen thousand, all that were left of all the host of the aliens; and they that fell were a hundred and twenty thousand men that drew the sword. (Septuagint)

Jdg 8:10 Now Zebah and Zalmunna were in Karkor, and their hosts with them, about fifteen thousand men, all that were left of all the hosts of the children (H1121) of the east (H6924): for there fell an hundred and twenty thousand men that drew sword. (KJV)

At present, the sons of the aliens who are the elites of the world and the kings of the earth exploit humanity to live del- icately, but my FATHER has sworn by his right hand and the arm of his strength to destroy their wealth and kingdom in the last days. Shekinaih and you are our left and right hand and the arms of our strength.

Isa 62:8 THE YAHWEH hath sworn by his right hand, and by the arm of his strength, Surely I will no more give thy corn to be meat for thine enemies; and the sons of the aliens (H5236 "nekar" alien) shall not drink thy wine, for the which thou hast laboured:

The Anti-Christ in the last days will introduce their alien god to the world and many world rulers with their subjects will worship the beast and his image, and receive the mark of his name because of territorial gain.

Dan 11:38 But in his estate shall he honour the god of forces: and a god whom his fathers knew not shall he honour with gold, and silver, and with precious stones, and pleasant things. Dan 11:39 Thus shall he do in the most strong holds with an alien (H5236 "nekar" alien) god, whom he shall acknowledge and in- crease with glory: and he shall cause them to rule over many, and shall divide the land for gain.

As a matter of fact, during my earthly mission on Earth, my FATHER had told me and my cousin John that the Pharisees and Sadducees had married the daughter of an alien god. The blood of the aliens runs in them.
Mal 2:11 Judah hath dealt treacherously, and an abomination is
THE ORION
committed in Israel and in Jerusalem; for Judah hath profaned the holiness of THE YAHWEH which he loved, and hath married the daughter of an alien (H5236 "nekar" alien) god.

That is the reason why John and I exposed them and called them "offspring of vipers" for we knew that the seed of the serpent is reserved unto the wrath of my FATHER to be damned in Gehenna, the lake of fire.

Mat 3:7 But when he saw many of the Pharisees and Sadducees come to his baptism, he said unto them, O offspring (G1081 "gennema" begotten) of vipers (G2191 "echidna" poisonous snake), who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come? Mat 3:8 Bring forth therefore fruits meet for repentance: Mat 3:9 And think not to say within yourselves, We have Abraham to our father: for I say unto you, that THE ELOHIM is able of these stones to raise up children unto Abraham. Mat 3:10 And now also the ax is laid unto the root of the trees: therefore every tree which bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire.

These are the adversary and the hater of the babes and in- fants of Psalms 8 who will be established and strengthened by both of you to silence them. Hating and bearing grudges against these little ones, they, through the authorities using propaganda and false witnesses, will kill and crucify some and persecute them from city to city.

Mat 23:34 Wherefore, behold, I send unto you prophets, and wise men, and scribes: and some of them ye shall kill and cruci- fy; and some of them shall ye scourge in your synagogues, and persecute them from city to city: Mat 23:35 That upon you may come all the righteous blood Abel unto the blood of Zacharias son of Barachias, whom ye slew between the temple and the altar.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is there any scripture verse that proph- esied of their destruction?
JESUS: Yes, the reptile Pharisees and Sadducees have changed the word "aliens" to "proud" in the original Hebrew word to hide their existence, but it can be found in Malachi 4:1 of the Septuagint.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
Shekinaih and you will manifest our name, "THE EL SHADDAI", as our Two Anointed, the Moses and the Elijah, in our great and glorious day to utterly destroy these aliens.

Mal 4:1 For, behold, a day comes burning as an oven, and it shall consume them; and all the aliens, and all that do wickedly, shall be stubble: and the day that is coming shall set them on fire, saith the Lord Almighty (THE EL SHADDAI), and there shall not be left of them root or branch. (Septuagint)

Mal 4:1 For, behold, the day cometh, that shall burn as an oven; and all the proud (H2086 "zed" arrogant) , yea, and all that do wickedly, shall be stubble: and the day that cometh shall burn them up, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, that it shall leave them neither root nor branch. (KJV)
CHAPTER 6
JUDGMENT ON THE WORLD
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of lines drawn on the World Map across the nations and places that will be judged by THE EL SHADDAI in the last days.

JESUS: My FATHER, through His name "THE SHADDAI" in Shek- inaih, and through His name "THE EL", will send asteroids, comets, and giant hailstones to trigger fire, earthquakes, vol- cano eruptions, tsunamis, and floods to wipe out all the head- quarters of Lucifer and his seed that are related directly and indirectly to the Nephilim.

Countries and places from the North to the South which are affected include Norway, the Netherlands, England, Belgium, France, Spain, Algeria, Mali and their neighboring countries. Countries and places from the West to the East which are af- fected include Mexico, Bahamas, Libya, Egypt, Saudi Arabia,
BEHOLD MY NAMES
Oman, Northern India, Myanmar, Southern China, Taipei and countries near these places.
SHEKINAIH: I also saw a vision of five asteroids each hitting Alaska, Mexico, Ohio, Tianjin, and Paris. Great will be the dam- age to these places and the places nearby.
JESUS: These places are punished because of their ungodliness, idolatry, and perversion.

Rom 1:28 And even as they did not like to retain THE ELOHIM in their knowledge, THE ELOHIM gave them over to a reprobate mind, to do those things which are not convenient; Rom 1:29 Being filled with all unrighteousness, fornication, wickedness, covetousness, maliciousness; full of envy, murder, debate, de- ceit, malignity; whisperers, Rom 1:30 Backbiters, haters of THE ELOHIM, despiteful, proud, boasters, inventors of evil things, disobedient to parents, Rom 1:31 Without understanding, cov- enant-breakers, without natural affection, implacable, unmer- ciful: Rom 1:32 Who knowing the judgment of THE ELOHIM, that they which commit such things are worthy of death, not only do the same, but have pleasure in them that do them.

Witchcraft and perverse sex usually go along together as these things are energized by the Nephilim and their evil forces. This is one of the reasons why in the fullness of their iniquity, My FATHER, the Righteous Judge, will make an end to those who continue to practice them. Apart from this, their destruction is also due to their lawlessness and ungodliness; treating us as naught for it seems to them that nothing bad had happened to them or to their offspring so far and they are still prosper- ing, so they self-deceivingly believe that it will not happen to them in the future not knowing that there is a day of judg- ment for the wicked and the ungodly. They will see their de- struction and drink of the Wrath of THE SHADDAI.

Job 21:17 How oft is the candle of the wicked put out! and how oft cometh their destruction upon them! THE ELOAH distribu- teth sorrows in his anger. Job 21:18 They are as stubble before the wind, and as chaff that the storm carrieth away. Job 21:19 THE ELOAH layeth up his iniquity for his children: he rewardeth him, and he shall know it. Job 21:20 His eyes shall see his de- struction, and he shall drink of the wrath of THE SHADDAI.
CHAPTER 7
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI
BEHOLD MY NAMES

THE FATHER: My name, "THE SHADDAI", is another name for all the acts of THE DESTROYER in Revelation: The final acts of our destruction/demolition before we recreate the new heavens and earth. I gave this vision to Shekinaih which my SON JESUS will reveal to you how Shekinaih and you, as our mighty and strong one, our left and right hand man, will cast down all these calamities to the earth. Shekinaih is my spirit of judg- ment who shall sit in my throne to decree my seventeen judgments on these nations who, through their allegiance with the apostate house of Israel, the shadow government that rules this world, have increased their glory to rule over many, and divided the land for gain. And you, Aaron K David, our VICTORY, our mighty one, will strengthen and establish my little ones who are weaned from the milk and drawn from the breasts with the knowledge of our judgment and the understanding of what they are supposed to report to these countries of the calamities which have already been decreed and executed by Shekinaih and you. Many will be stumbled by their reports of woes.

As for the scornful who have made a covenant with Death (Maveth) and Hell (Sheol), thinking that they are safe from the coming calamities, I will sweep them out of their refuge of lies, and overflow their hiding place through Shekinaih and you, our rock of offence who will lay our line of judgment and our plummet of righteousness and will find them all wanting.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do you mean by their refuge of lies?
JESUS: These scornful had trusted and taken refuge in:
their latest technology;
their wealth and resources;
their monopoly of governing the earth;
their total control of the atmosphere of the earth, the ocean, the air, the earth's soil, and the rain. All these are at their mercy;
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI
their setting rules for each country under the United Na- tions;
their mutation of all humanity to eradicate the real seed of the sons of THE ELOHIM like they did to Moses and me, know- ing that they are the deliverers like us.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where's their hiding place and in what way will they be flushed out?

SHEKINAIH: I saw cracks in places all over the globe. I saw water flushing into underground tunnels and I saw aliens, humans dressed like scientists, mutated beings, etc. being flushed out from these cracks unto the surface of the oceans.

JESUS: The elites of the world and their alien master have built many underground cities beneath the mountains and under the sea, knowing that my judgment shall come upon them in near future as warned by their forefather which we have destroyed in days of old. Though their hiding places seem to be impregnable and indestructible by fire, radiation or water, they will not stand against the seventeen calamities that I will send through both of you. The seventeen calamities are our seventeen decrees (acts) through our name, "THE SHADDAI", in both of you. (Isa 28:2-29)

title: DECREE 1: THE 4TH SEAL - THE PALE HORSE

segments.text: DECREE 1: THE 4TH SEAL - THE PALE HORSE
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of a nuclear bomb with the name "Korea" written upon it, and it exploded in mid-air, involving and affecting many countries.

JESUS: David, what Shekinaih saw refers to Revelations 6:7-8. It is about the coming World War III and World War IV. World War III will involve the Middle East, Europe, and the United States. World War IV will involve North Korea and the world.

Rev 6:7 And when he had opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth beast say, Come and see. Rev 6:8 And I looked, and behold a pale horse: and his Name that sat on him. Death and Hades followed with him. And authority was given unto
BEHOLD MY NAMES
them over the fourth part of the earth, to kill with sword, and with hunger, and with death, and with the beasts of the earth.

Shekinaih and you will represent our Name that sat on the pale horse as the Angel of Our Presence in Decreeing and Ex- ecution. Can you still remember the King of Death came and put a saber through the crown on your head and it went into your spinal cord? Yes, the Angel of Death has surrendered his authority over death to you and therefore when Shekinaih releases our decree to you to co-execute it, Death and Hades will obey your command.
SHEKINAIH: I see the following script drafted by THE EHYEH for the war that is "COMING SOON", which Satan thinks are his ideas:
Characters in the Story
America plays the bad guys. Europe plays the good guys
The oil-rich Middle East plays the exploited ones.
The Plots Scene 1
America is in a crisis of being unable to meet its debt liability and is pressurized by the world to do something regarding her situation.
Scene 2
Strategy: The opening statement - "We must acquire more wealth. We must control the oil producing countries so that they become our resources."
Scene 3
America at war with Middle Eastern countries. Take over oil-rich Middle East land. These countries cry to the UN for help.
Scene 4

The UN intervenes on behalf of the affected Middle East coun- tries telling the US that they should share some of the profit from the oil fields and also return some of the oil fields back. America agrees and settlement is reached and the conflict re- solved.
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI
THE COMING NUCLEAR EXPLOSION IN OKLAHOMA CITY

SHEKINAIH: I see again a vision of a nuclear explosion with the words, "North Korea" superimposed on it. THE TRINITY shows me these words: "Oklahoma City exploded affecting one-third of North America."

title: THE COMING WAR BETWEEN THE US AND THE MIDDLE EAST

segments.text: THE COMING WAR BETWEEN THE US AND THE MIDDLE EAST

JESUS: Through the impeccable orchestration of the author- ities of Lucifer, the world plunged into the Great Depression that helped to fuel World War II. History is going to repeat itself. Although the United Nations (UN) has replaced The League of Nations, they will not prevent the coming World War that is escalating as the hand of the clock continues to tick, because Satan, who controls the world events, is responsible for ev- ery destructive war in the first place. Through his policies, he had authorized the kings of the world to act out every major conflict he staged. Although this sounds intimidating, we, THE EHYEH, are still in control of the thoughts and actions of Satan.

SHEKINAIH: THE EHYEH once showed me a vision of Him sit- ting down with Satan playing chess. Every move of Satan was energized and suggested by the All-Knowing One because Satan is His creation. Satan, who is the father of all lies, had deceived himself into thinking that he is the script writer of most of the world's scenes. THE EHYEH the mastermind said to me, "With me are strength and wisdom: the deceived and the deceivers are mine. I am the script writer as well as the director."

JESUS: My FATHER, through THE EHYEH, indeed leads coun- selors away spoiled and makes the judges fools. He loos- ens the bond of kings, and girds their loins with a girdle. He leads princes away spoiled, and overthrows the mighty. He removes away the speech of the trusty and takes away the understanding of the aged. (Job 12:16-20)
BEHOLD MY NAMES
DECREE 2: THE 6TH SEAL - ASTEROIDS AND EARTHQUAKES
THE PLANETS IN CONJUNCTION

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of many planets in their orbits in alignment. I then saw some of the planets taking turns to hit the Sun. Some of the planets broke into pieces. ¼ of the moon was chipped off, leaving a crater, and others fragments fell on Earth. I also saw other planets self-exploded into fire and the debris was also hurled unto Earth. From Earth, the stars' formations were seen to be disorientated. I saw you like a giant holding many planets in your palm as one hold- ing marble balls. I saw you hurling each planet toward the Sun. I then saw earthquakes in diverse places and many cra- ters were formed due to the falling debris on Earth. I then saw that the planets which took turns to hit the Sun were Pluto, Uranus, Mars and Venus. This resulted in an explosion of a part of the Sun that released intense heat and burned the planets near it. Earth and the Moon were not spared either. On Earth, asteroids fell and hit Alaska, Paris, Nigeria, Ohio, Mexico City, and Tianjin. I saw the asteroid that was to hit Ohio broke into 2 pieces, with one piece hitting Ohio and the other piece hitting Mexico City. Tianjin was hit the worse because it was densely populated. I saw the cities near it, like Beijing, were also affected due to its close proximity.

JESUS: Yes, you, David, the Angel of Our Presence in co-exe- cuting our decree, will cause the above incident to take place. Upon receiving our decree which is sealed and released to you from Shekinaih, you shall pass judgment on the gods of the planets. It will happen during the conjunction (planetary alignment) of the planets, but we will cause some of the plan- ets to move out of their usual paths. We will cause two or three of these strayed planets to be pulled by the gravity of the Sun and collide with it. Yes, you are the mighty wind/spir- it, our arm, that shall manifest our name "THE EL" in my wrath and accomplish our determination. As for Shekinaih, she is the spirit of judgment that sits on my FATHER'S throne, decreeing this judgment. Who shall stand before both of you when we
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI
shall arise in our wrath through both of you?

Rev 6:12 And I beheld when he had opened the sixth seal, and, lo, there was a great earthquake; and the sun became black as sackcloth of hair, and the moon became as blood; Rev 6:13 And the stars of heaven fell unto the earth, even as a fig tree casteth her untimely figs, when she is shaken of a mighty wind. Rev 6:14 And the heaven departed as a scroll when it is rolled together; and every mountain and island were moved out of their places. Rev 6:15 And the kings of the earth, and the great men, and the rich men, and the chief captains, and the mighty men, and every bondman, and every free man, hid themselves in the dens and in the rocks of the mountains; Rev 6:16 And said to the mountains and rocks, Fall on us, and hide us from the face of him that sitteth on the throne, and from the wrath of the Lamb: Rev 6:17 For the great day of his wrath is come; and who shall be able to stand?
FATE OF CHINA AND NIGERIA

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of the words "Hordes of Greed" writ- ten across the region marked "South China" on the map. I then saw the words, "Human trading for money, stealing and selling human organs without conscience, major catastro- phes due to earthquakes. Their god is money."

I also saw Nigeria being hit by asteroids. I saw the words "City of Great Robbers" on the word "Nigeria". I then saw a vision of a snake with the words "all deceit and lice" superimposed on its forehead. Following that, I saw a hammer slamming on the table and the words "will be destroyed completely for disguising my name for evil purpose" written on the ham- mer. Following that, I saw a snake moving quickly trying to escape but a hand from behind gripped it by the belly and the head, and put it into a grinder. I then saw many gold nug- gets came out of the snake. I saw the words "payback time". Subsequently, I saw an angel taking the gold nuggets to put them in a storehouse.
JESUS: Yes, My FATHER will not be mocked. The ungodly, law- less and covetous people living in the cities in South China
BEHOLD MY NAMES

who scoffed our judgment will suffer major catastrophes due to earthquakes because of their human and organ trafficking activities. Yes, I will not spare the wicked and the deceivers in Nigeria: those who masquerade themselves as my ministers to deceive and suck the money out of my children's wallets will be completely destroyed by me through catastrophes as well.
FATE OF NEW MEXICO

SHEKINAIH: I saw the words "Nephilim's Headquarter, City of Death" were written on the words, "New Mexico". I then saw a vision of a Full Moon. David, next, I saw you dressed like the Angel of THE YAHWEH striking the Moon with a saber. Next, I saw the sky raining blood and hailstones dipped in blood and they fell on the city. I saw lightning striking the land and the land cracked forming a cross. From the top view, THE TRINI- TY zoomed down and magnified my vision and I saw a crater created on the city and all its surrounding was completely ru- ined. I saw the earth under the sea cracked and water seeped into the underground cities. The major infrastructure was damaged as they were caught unprepared. One-third of the Nephilim died. The rest were badly wounded. The scheme of the Nephilim was crushed. I then saw a giant ax chop the city into many pieces, the cracks are called earthquake lines.

JESUS: This is our wrath for New Mexico in the last days on the Nephilim that are hiding in the underground cities in New Mex- ico. The Nephilim in the past, through mutation, created the dinosaurs, the Titans (giants), the grays, and the shape-shifter reptiles and their diverse hybrids that are lurking behind the elite. At present and in the future, they, with their advanced technology received from their forefathers through contacts via their Tower of Babel (observatory/star-gates), have invent- ed and will continue to perfect their invention of human-like robotoid, Transformers-like beings, mutated sea monsters like in the movie "Pacific Rim", mutant shape-shifters like Mys- tique and self-healing mutants like the Wolverine of X-Men. This sounds like Hollywood, but they are as real as you are.
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI
DECREE 3: THE 1ST TRUMPET - HAIL AND FIRE

SHEKINAIH: I saw the Earth tilting. The magnetic field in some portion of the North Pole curved inward and almost touched Earth. I saw the irradiation of the Sun heated up the rocks that came from outer space which were being drawn to Earth, and they headed toward Alaska. Next, I saw a vision of you as the Angel of THE YAHWEH taking snowballs and dip- ping them in the blood of the martyrs and hurling them to- wards a mountain range in Alaska.

JESUS: Yes, this is Alaska's Mount Hayes, the jewel of a glacial range northeast of Anchorage which houses one of the aliens' largest bases. The Nephilim and their hybrids with their hu- man cohorts will be completely wiped out by you, the Angel of Our Presence in co-execution, through our name, "THE SHADDAI".
Rev 8:7 The first angel sounded, and there followed hail and fire
BEHOLD MY NAMES
mingled with blood, and they were cast upon the earth: and the third part of trees was burnt up, and all green grass was burnt up.

title: DECREE 4: THE 2ND TRUMPET - MT. EVEREST ERUPTION

segments.text: DECREE 4: THE 2ND TRUMPET - MT. EVEREST ERUPTION

SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS lighting up the fire in the Ring of Fire and the volcanoes along the rim began to erupt one by one. Mount Everest had also erupted. There were many deaths as a result of the eruptions.

As Mount Everest exploded, I saw the words "WRATH OF THE EL SHADDAI" written on the mountain. I then saw a Red Drag- on being thrown out of the mountain into the air due to the great explosion of the volcano eruption. Following that, it fell from the air to the ground seriously wounded and was bleeding. Subsequently, I saw a person dressed like a Tibetan with the words "Red Dragon" written on his back and "half dead" written on his body. The mountain was covered with a dark smoke and above the smoke were a lot of angels shooting arrows at the mountain all at the same time. David, I saw you like a giant angel cutting the mountain into four pieces like one cutting an apple.

Rev 8:8 And the second angel sounded, and as it were a great mountain burning with fire was cast into the sea: and the third part of the sea became blood;" Rev 8:9 And the third part of the creatures which were in the sea, and had life, died; and the third part of the ships were destroyed.
DECREE 5: THE 3RD TRUMPET - WORMWOOD

JESUS: At the appointed time through the release of my FA- THER'S decree by Shekinaih, you, David, the Angel of Our Pres- ence in execution, will release Molech from the planet Pluto who will teleport himself through a portal from Pluto to Nib-
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI
iru when their paths cross. You, manifesting our name, "THE EL" who has the final say, will authorize him to release the rock Wormwood upon Earth.

SHEKINAIH: I saw that there are many rock-like lethal weap- ons within the alien spaceship Nibiru, Wormwood is only one of them. This alien-made spaceship planet will come from the planet Venus (Lucifer), which is the Mothership, through a Stargate. I saw when Venus is cut into 2 pieces like an ap- ple through a cross section, Nibiru is within the planet Venus, but once it comes out of Venus, it can expand itself larger than Venus.
JESUS: Yes, Gehenna and Tartarus are located on Venus, and Hades is located on Pluto.

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of the star Wormwood exploding as it comes down towards Earth and it broke into many pieces with the main body falling into the Yangtze river with the rest of the debris falling into the river heads of many rivers of Earth, mainly the Amazon River and the Nile River, which are the source of water for the most part of the world. Once the sources of these rivers are poisoned, multitudes will die
BEHOLD MY NAMES
of thirst.

Rev 8:10 And the third angel sounded, and there fell a great star from heaven, burning as it were a lamp, and it fell upon the third part of the rivers, and upon the fountains of waters; Rev 8:11 And the name of the star is called Wormwood: and the third part of the waters became wormwood; and many men died of the waters, because they were made bitter."

title: DECREE 6: THE 4TH TRUMPET - THIRD PART DARKENED

SHEKINAIH: I saw Pluto, Uranus and Mars being pulled by the Sun simultaneously and they collided with one another at close proximity to the Sun and their fragments hit the Moon.
I saw the Earth with the top half of the globe having light and the bottom half having no light. I saw that all the happenings above will happen during the Winter Solstice of the Southern Hemisphere.
In yet another vision, I saw superimposed on the word "Myan- mar" was the word "Earthquake".

Rev 8:12 And the fourth angel sounded, and the third part of the sun was smitten, and the third part of the moon, and the third part of the stars; so as the third part of them was dark- ened, and the day shone not for a third part of it, and the night likewise.

THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI

brought it into the house of Dagon, and set it by Dagon. 1Sa 5:3 And when they of Ashdod arose early on the morrow, behold, Dagon was fallen upon his face to the earth before the ark of THE YAHWEH. And they took Dagon, and set him in his place again. 1Sa 5:4 And when they arose early on the morrow morn- ing, behold, Dagon was fallen upon his face to the ground be- fore the ark of THE YAHWEH; and the head of Dagon and both the palms of his hands were cut off upon the threshold; only the stump of Dagon was left to him. 1Sa 5:5 Therefore neither the priests of Dagon, nor any that come into Dagon's house, tread on the threshold of Dagon in Ashdod unto this day.
DECREE 7: THE 5TH TRUMPET - LOCUSTS

SHEKINAIH: I saw the word "Tartarus" followed by a vision of a big ancient ship sinking. Following that, I saw the words "Woe, Woe, Woe". Next, I saw a green sea monster surfaced out from the sea and created a whirlpool which sunk a multi- tude of ships into a pool called "the Pit of Hell". Thereafter, I saw a flying saucer lying below the seabed and was covered by sand. I then saw these words: "Hybrid mutation well in progress, ready to launch". After that, I saw a vision of hu- man-like green figures shrinking themselves and entering into mosquito-like flies.

JESUS: The green sea monster symbolizes the Beast from the Sea, the Anti-Christ, who will drag the European Union through deceptions into the Pit of Hell. This is symbolized by the multitude of ships (Ship of Tarshish) being sucked into the whirlpool. The flying saucer lying below the seabed, covered by sand symbolizes covert alien activities in Spanish water which are kept in very low profile. Spain is one of the Nephil- im's headquarters and is a vortex transmitter in the spiritual realm. Its strategic location falls on the planetary earth grid line. Spain corresponds to the planet Uranus in the heavenly realm which corresponds to Tartarus. In ancient Greek mythol- ogy, Tartarus is a deep abyss that is used as a dungeon of tor- ment and suffering for the wicked and as the prison for the Titans.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
THE FATHER: Tartarus is the place where I lock up the most perverse haters of me. I have given them free will, but they have chosen to walk against my way.

JESUS: David, regarding my seventh calamity, Shekinaih who is the Angel of Our Presence in decreeing will give you the key to the bottomless pit and you shall release the Titans that have been locked up since their rebellion in days of old. They are the locusts mentioned in Revelation 9:11. These are the an- gels that left their dwelling and came down to Earth to have sexual intercourse with the daughters of men are all locked up and chained there. They are reserved in that place until we use them to pass judgment on those who did not keep the Protocol of Heaven just like them. (Rev 9:1-11)

In the last days, many of those whom I have called into my last days' army will not submit and obey both of you. These are my rebellious and stiff-necked children who are predestined for destruction. Some taking my grace for granted; some forni- cating with the world; some despising and evil-speaking both of you, our glory, because of jealousy; some are covetous and some are insubordinate to my order. These are murmurers, complainers, and a respecter of persons. They will be disquali- fied from being sealed by both of you on their foreheads with our names. (Jud 1:3-16)

The locust is the result of the mutation of a fly and a mosquito from covert laboratory beneath the Atlantic Ocean. The hu- man-like green figures which Shekinaih saw shrinking them- selves and entering into mosquito-like flies are the Titans that are locked up in Tartarus. They will embody in them, and as they sting, they will release eggs that multiply and break into boils. The sores are painful, itchy, and unbearable. This is an in- fectious disease, an incurable plague, and epidemic outbreak that is beyond control. There is no antibiotic that can cure it. In those days shall my ungodly and rebellious children seek death, and shall not find it; and shall desire to die, and death shall flee from them.
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI

title: DECREE 8: THE 6TH TRUMPET - A THIRD PART OF SLAIN

segments.text: DECREE 8: THE 6TH TRUMPET - A THIRD PART OF SLAIN
JESUS: David, I will execute my eighth calamity according to Revelation 9:13-21.

Rev 9:13 And the sixth angel sounded, and I heard a voice from the four horns of the golden altar which is before THE ELO- HIM, Rev 9:14 Saying to the sixth angel which had the trumpet, Loose the four angels which are bound in the great river Eu- phrates. Rev 9:15 And the four angels were loosed, which were prepared for an hour, and a day, and a month, and a year, for to slay the third part of men. Rev 9:18 By these three was the third part of men killed, by the fire, and by the smoke, and by the brimstone, which issued out of their mouths. Rev 9:19 For their authority is in their mouth, and in their tails: for their tails were like unto serpents, and had heads, and with them they do hurt. Rev 9:20 And the rest of the men which were not killed by these plagues yet repented not of the works of their hands, that they should not worship devils, and idols of gold, and sil- ver, and brass, and stone, and of wood: which neither can see, nor hear, nor walk: Rev 9:21 Neither repented they of their mur- ders, nor of their sorceries, nor of their fornication, nor of their thefts.

JESUS: David, it is you, the Angel of Our Presence, the Seventh Angel, who is the leader of my other six angels who are also executing angels. You shall command the sixth angel to loose the four angels which are bound in the great river Euphrates. These four angels are Titans which are bounded and will be loosened for 13 months; they will be instructed to slay a third part of the 200 million horsemen which are collectively from the Middle East, Siberia, Russia, East Germany, and China. This is partly due to the conflict between Syria and Israel which
BEHOLD MY NAMES
will result in a war involving the West and the Middle East.

The other group of the horsemen having the breastplates of fire and of jacinth and brimstone are mutants created by the West using Esau's bloodline. The horses whose heads are like lions and who can blow fire and smoke and brimstones out of their mouths are cross-breed hybrid of different animals through experimental mutations carried out in many secret underground facilities all over the world. New Mexico and Spain are but two of them. With the Nephilim's high-tech weapons, these horsemen can transform themselves into can- nons and are equipped with many advanced weapons of de- struction.
A ROBOTOID
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of a human wearing a business suit but beneath the human skin is a stainless steel robot.

DAVID: This is a humanoid robot or a synthetic organism de- signed to look and act like a human, having a flesh-like re- semblance. These androids which are within the domain of science fiction, frequently seen in film and television in the movie "The Machine", for example, have already existed. The elites have hidden all their agenda and advanced technology in plain sight in Box Office movies. To the general population who do not take the time to do their own research, what I have spoken will sound like fantasy. If not for the revelations, the visions, and the dreams given to us by THE TRINITY which are supported by the scripture, we would also deride what is written in this book.

title: DECREE 9: THE 7TH TRUMPET - MEXICO CITY SUNK

segments.text: DECREE 9: THE 7TH TRUMPET - MEXICO CITY SUNK
JESUS: David, in my ninth calamity, I will destroy the main seed of the serpent which propagated through Cain by sending a great earthquake.
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI

Rev 11:13 And the same hour was there a great earthquake, and the tenth part of the city fell and in the earthquake was slain of men seven thousand: and the remnant was affrighted, and gave glory to THE ELOHIM of heaven.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of Mexico sunk underwater due to a great earthquake. Next, I saw a Red Dragon falling from the sky towards the sunken city. As it dived through the center of the crushed city, it swam out towards the open sea.

JESUS: The Red Dragon is Satan, but it has seven authorities represented by the seven heads, each with a crown on their head. One of its head is in charge of Mexico. The main seed of the Serpent is staying in Mexico through Cain.
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of Eve being seduced, raped, and impregnated by the serpent who appeared to her as a man when she was sleeping.
JESUS: Yes, as THE HOLY SPIRIT was able to impregnate Mary, so was the serpent, the once anointed cherub, able to beguile and impregnate Eve.

2Co 11:2 For I am jealous over you with godly jealousy: for I have espoused you to one husband, that I may present you as a chaste virgin to Christ. 2Co 11:3 But I fear, lest by any means, as the serpent beguiled Eve through his subtilty, so your minds should be corrupted from the simplicity that is in Christ.

Eve provoked us to jealousy by giving birth to Cain (whose name means jealousy) by the spiritual seed of Satan in her dream. Although she physically copulated with Adam, a spiri- tual light of the seed of Satan went into the womb of Eve just like the light of THE HOLY SPIRIT went into Mary to make her pregnant giving birth to me.

Gen 4:1 "And Adam knew Eve his wife; and she conceived, and bare Cain (H7014 "qayin", the same as H7013 with a play upon the affinity to H7069 jealousy), and said, I have provoked jealou- sy (H7069 "qanah" provoked to jealousy) against (H854 "eth" ) THE YAHWEH by getting a man."
This is what John meant when he said that Cain is of the devil and has the seed of the evil one.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
1Jn 3:12 Not as Cain, who was of that wicked one, and slew his brother. And wherefore slew he him? Because his own works were evil, and his brother's righteous.
Because the seed of the devil was in Cain, he gave in easily to the devil despite our warning. He continued to sin and ended up killing his brother Abel out of jealousy. (Gen 4:7)

We have given Balaam a vision concerning the last days when we, through the Angel of Our Presence (Shekinaih sitting on the throne manifesting our name, THE SHADDAI, in releasing our decree; and Aaron K David, as the angel in proclaiming the decree as THE EL), will destroy the children of Moab, the chil- dren of Sheth, Edom and his descendants and the Amalekites, and the Kenites which are the descendants of Cain. The He- brew word for "Cain" H7014 "qayin" is used interchangeably with H7017 "qeyniy" Kenites in verses 21-22. They are meant to be the same people:

Num 24:16 He hath said, which heard the words of THE EL, and knew the knowledge of the most High, which saw the vision of THE SHADDAI, falling into a trance, but having his eyes open: Num 24:17 I shall see him, but not now: I shall behold him, but not nigh: there shall come a Star out of Jacob, and a Sceptre shall rise out of Israel, and shall smite … Num 24:21 And he looked on the Kenites (H7017), and took up his parable, and said, Strong is thy dwellingplace, and thou puttest thy nest in a rock. Num 24:22 Nevertheless the Kenite (H7014) shall be wasted, un- til Asshur shall carry thee away captive.

The children of Cain are called the Kenites. They were still around after the Flood and were among the nations that oc- cupied Canaan during the time of Abraham. The Kenites were made up of three tribes: the Watchers' seed with the seed of Cain, the fallen angels' seed with the seed of Cain and Cain's descendants.
THE SATANIC STAR
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of a 5 pointed star surrounded by three circles.
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI

JESUS: Earth is made up of four sections. The first section consists of solid crust; the second section is the hollow crust; the third section is fire and the fourth section is semi-hollow. Starting from the innermost, they are: Tartarus, Gehenna, Per- dition and Hades. They are Earth's correspondence to their respective planets in the Cosmoses. Satan/Baphomet, which is male and female, have their two throne seats in the center of Earth, a level above Hades where they judge the dead on behalf of us. The dotted lines that project from the five points are five major vortexes which can link to different planets and stars.
The five pointed star symbolizes the fallen angel Satan. Cain and his descendants are his seed, so are Esau and his descen- dants who intermingled with the nations living in Canaan.

The mark of Cain is "666" which stands for "the rebellious, ut- terly despised by THE ELOHIM". Cain lived like a wanted man after he killed Abel. He wandered and hid in the hollow crust as shown in the diagram. His seed spread underground all over the world. The Land of Nod is Alaska. Cain's father Baphomet was also known as Azazel. He was the one who taught Cain and his descendants how to make swords, knives, shields, and breastplates, and made known to them the metals of the earth. That is why Tubalcain was known as an instructor of ev- ery artificer in brass and iron. (Gen 4:11-24)
BEHOLD MY NAMES
Later, his descendants surfaced to the face of the earth to build cities all over the world but were all destroyed in the Flood.

SHEKINAIH: I see an angel bringing multitudes of people from all over the world, putting them in a wooden container to be pounded. Blood then flowed out of the container. (Rev 14:17- 20)

JESUS: The grapes symbolize my disqualified brides in the great winepress of my wrath. They will be surrendered to Sa- tan to be framed, accused, and tried. They will be taken to concentration camps in Siberia, Russia (Mesech), as well as some Arab countries (Kedar) for human experiments.

Psa 120:1 A Song of Ascent. In my distress I cried unto THE YAH- WEH, and he heard me. Psa 120:2 Deliver my soul, O YAHWEH, from lying lips, and from a deceitful tongue. Psa 120:3 What shall be given unto thee? or what shall be done unto thee, thou false tongue? Psa 120:4 Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper. Psa 120:5 Woe is me, that I sojourn in Mesech, which I dwell in the tents of Kedar! Psa 120:6 My soul hath long dwelt with him that hateth peace. Psa 120:7 I am for peace: but when I speak, they are for war.
THE FATHER: Judgment must begin at my house.
1Pe 4:17 For the time is come that judgment must begin at the house of THE ELOHIM: and if it first begin at us, what shall the end be of them that obey not the evangelist of THE ELOHIM?
Many of my ungodly ministers of lawlessness and worldly Christians will be offended and perplexed when this strange punishment happens to them.
Job 31:3 Is not destruction to the wicked? and a strange punish- ment to the workers of iniquity?
They are full of grief, gnashing their teeth, because they did not take heed of my warning through you both, our messen- ger of the everlasting gospel who never ceased to cry to them,
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI
"Fear THE ELOHIM, and give glory to him; for the hour of his judgment is come: and worship him that made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters."

Rev 14:6 And I saw another angel fly in the midst of heaven, having the everlasting gospel to preach unto them that dwell on the earth, and to every nation, and kindred, and tongue, and people. Rev 14:7 Saying with a loud voice, Fear THE ELOHIM, and give glory to him; for the hour of his judgment is come: and worship him that made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters.

For the first time in their lives, they will realize that only a few shall be saved and that it is necessary to strive to enter at the strait gate which symbolizes tribulation; and coming out of it in peace, joy, and complete faith, which results in holiness in order to enter into our Kingdom.

Luk 13:23 Then said one unto him, Lord, are there few that be saved? And he said unto them, Luk 13:24 Strive to enter in at the strait gate: for many, I say unto you, will seek to enter in, and shall not be able. Luk 13:25 When once the master of the house is risen up, and hath shut to the door, and ye begin to stand without, and to knock at the door, saying, Lord, Lord, open unto us; and he shall answer and say unto you, I know you not whence ye are: Luk 13:26 Then shall ye begin to say, We have eaten and drunk in thy presence, and thou hast taught in our streets. Luk 13:27 But he shall say, I tell you, I know you not whence ye are; depart from me, all ye workers of iniquity.
JESUS: David, You must not cease to tell my people that it is only through obedience of faith and patience in hope through many tribulations that they will inherit our promises.

A TWO FACED STATUE
