title: DECREE 17: THE MARRIAGE SUPPER OF THE LAMB

segments.text: DECREE 17: THE MARRIAGE SUPPER OF THE LAMB

JESUS: Our seventeenth calamity is upon all those who scoff at my judgment despite my warning through both of you. These are the ungodly and unthankful who worship my cre- ation rather than me, and commit the above acts without re-
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI
pentance.
THE FATHER: I will cause drought in the Middle East and the Euphrates River will be dried up. China and their Arab allies will cross over the river to make war with the armies of the West.

JESUS: The Mouth of the Dragon refers to the Spokesman of the Dragon who is the future religious leader whose seat will be in the Himalayas. He will have influence over Greater China and will use her to lead the East to war against me and my holy ones.

The Mouth of the Beast refers the spokesman of the ruler of this age ruling from Beijing. This refers to the last President of the People's Republic of China who will be presiding from Beijing during the time of the Battle of Armageddon.

The Mouth of the False Prophet is a religious leader over . He is the spokesman of the ruler of this age ruling the United States and Europe. The war will be craft- ily plotted by Satan to prepare the reception of the Beast from the Sea who will bring world peace. Together, these three spokesmen will gather the Kings of the West, the Kings of the Middle East and the Kings of the East to war against the Angel of Our Presence and our Holy Ones. (Rev 16:12 -16)
THE RED DRAGON
SHEKINAIH: I saw a great Red Dragon coiling round Earth.

JESUS: This means Satan's sovereign rule of Earth. There are seven sub-dragons making up the Great Dragon. They are: the dragon controlling the Monarchy of the United Kingdom, the dragon controlling Greater China, the dragon controlling Ger- many and Britain, the dragon that controls Syria, Egypt and the United States of America, the dragon controlling Nigeria, the dragon controlling Russia and the dragon controlling Ja- pan. Through them, the great Red Dragon rules the world. This control is delegated to the Beast that came out from the sea (the sea symbolizes the nations). The chief of the seven
BEHOLD MY NAMES
heads is the head that has the authority over the Monarchy of the United Kingdom.
SHEKINAIH: Next, I saw a great earthquake hitting Libya, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and Oman.
JESUS: Catastrophes will occur concurrently in all these cities; many will be struck with stroke in their mouths for their blas- phemy against my FATHER and me.

SHEKINAIH: I saw again the vision of four hearses putting dead bodies in the center of the earth. I saw the words "Sup- per of The Great EL". I saw many dead bodies spreading all over a plain. I saw me as the Golden Empress releasing a de- cree to you, who is clothed like the Angel of THE YAHWEH and you summoned the birds to eat the flesh.

JESUS: In the last days, the kings of the Red Dragon shall gath- er together to war against Shekinaih and you who are called our faithful and just one, with my resurrected and glorified holy ones, symbolized by the fowls of the air. Both of you shall call forth fire and earthquakes and the holy ones shall slaughter one-third of their army.

Rev 19:11 And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him was called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he doth judge and make war. Rev 19:12 His eyes were as a flame of fire, and on his head were many crowns; and he had a name written, that no man knew, but he himself. Rev 19:13 And he was clothed with a vesture dipped in blood: and his name is called The Word of THE ELOHIM. Rev 19:14 And the armies which were in heaven followed him upon white hors- es, clothed in fine linen, white and clean. Rev 19:15 And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sword, that with it he should smite
THE SEVENTEEN DECREES (ACTS) OF THE SHADDAI

the nations: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of THE EL SHADDAI. Rev 19:16 And he hath on his vesture and on his thigh a name written, KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS. Rev 19:17

And I saw an angel standing in the sun; and he cried with a loud voice, saying to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great EL; Rev 19:18 That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and the flesh of all men, both free and bond, both small and great. Rev 19:19 And I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gath- ered together to make war against him that sat on the horse, and against his army. Rev 19:20 And the beast was taken, and with him the false prophet that wrought miracles before him, with which he deceived them that had received the mark of the beast, and them that worshipped his image. These both were cast alive into a lake of fire burning with brimstone. Rev 19:21 And the remnant were slain with the saber of him that sat upon the horse, which sword proceeded out of his mouth: and all the fowls were filled with their flesh.
SHEKINAIH: David, I see this vision again as shown to me ear- lier.

THE DESTRUCTIVE PATTERNS OF THE SHADDAI

THE DESTRUCTIVE PATTERNS OF THE SHADDAI

The eight small diamonds (they look smaller because they are further away from Earth) symbolize the Seven Angels of the seven last day churches with Shekinaih representing THE HOLY SPIRIT as the eighth. The eight big diamonds sym- bolize the Seven Angels of the seven last day churches with you, David, representing me as the eighth.

Shekinaih will spiritually travail and bring you forth, and you shall stand and feed my remnant, and in my strength mani- festing our name, "THE EL", as the Angel of Our Presence in ex- ecution, you will raise seven shepherds (angels/apostles) from the last days' seven churches to waste the cities of the Beast from the Sea symbolized by the King of Assyria. The armies of the Anti-Christ will be destroyed and Spiritual Israel will be delivered and gathered unto you.

Mic 5:1 Now gather thyself in troops, O daughter of troops: he hath laid siege against us: they shall smite the judge of Israel with a rod upon the cheek. Mic 5:2 But thou, Bethlehem Ephra- tah, though thou be little among the thousands of Judah, yet out of thee shall he come forth unto me that is to be ruler in Israel; whose goings forth have been from of old, from everlast- ing. Mic 5:3 Therefore will he give them up, until the time that she which travaileth hath brought forth: then the remnant of his brethren shall return unto the children of Israel. Mic 5:4 And he shall stand and feed in the strength of THE YAHWEH, in the Excellency of the Name of THE YAHWEH his ELOHIM; and they shall abide: for now shall he be great unto the ends of the earth. Inside the smaller diamonds are perfected beings. They are made up of the 144,000 virgin brides. These are the mini-Shek- inaihs. Inside the bigger diamonds are also perfected beings. They are made up of the 7,000 anointed ones. These are the mini-Metatrons.

The two sets of eight big and small diamond patterns of light are like two combination locks: the smaller inner set is on top of the bigger outer set. When the desired combination pat- tern is set as a whole, both will move clockwise as the blades in a juice grinder.

We will uphold you and you shall tread down the people in our anger and make them drunk in our fury and will bring down their strength to the earth.

Isa 63:1 Who is this that cometh from Edom, with dyed garments from Bozrah? this that is glorious in his apparel, travelling in the greatness of his strength? I that speak in righteousness, mighty to save. Isa 63:2 Wherefore art thou red in thine apparel, and thy garments like him that treadeth in the winefat? Isa 63:3 I have trodden the winepress alone; and of the people there was none with me: for I will tread them in mine anger, and trample them in my fury; and their blood shall be sprinkled upon my garments, and I will stain all my raiment. Isa 63:4 For the day of vengeance is in mine heart, and the year of my redeemed is come. Isa 63:5 And I looked, and there was none to help; and I wondered that there was none to uphold: therefore mine own arm brought salvation unto me; and my fury, it upheld me. Isa 63:6 And I will tread down the people in mine anger, and make them drunk in my fury, and I will bring down their strength to the earth.
THE CATCH

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of JESUS sitting on a big boat sort- ing out a catch. In the catch are white whales, fish, snakes, octopuses, crocodiles, and all sorts of creeping things. The white whales, He appointed them as general. The small and
THE DESTRUCTIVE PATTERNS OF THE SHADDAI

medium fish, He put them in a fish tank and fed them. When they became full grown, He put them in His last days' army to fight the Battle of the Great Day of THE EL SHADDAI. As for the rest, He threw them into the lake of fire.

Be an experienced fisherman and rightly gather the fish (real Sons of Adam) among the unclean creeping creatures in their midst (the Synagogue of Satan in Christendom). Do not strive with my rebellious children whom I have called; but be patient and gentle unto them, in meekness of love and wisdom, instruct- ing them that oppose you so that they may repent and ac- knowledge the truth and recover themselves out of the snare of the devil, who takes them captive at his will.

title: A WHITE DOVE LEADING MANY SMALLER DOVES

segments.text: A WHITE DOVE LEADING MANY SMALLER DOVES
SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of the scenario of the Valley of Ar- mageddon in the last days: The word "Eloah" was written on the body of a white dove with a baby dove inside her womb.

The baby dove was full of light, beaming out his light and projected his face on the right face of the mother dove. Next, I saw my face on the left side of the face of the mother dove and your face on the right side of the face of the mother dove. I then saw the white dove leading many smaller white doves and they flew upwards to Heaven. When they touched the cloud of glory, I saw them arrayed in glorified garments and they came down to Earth in a triangular formation.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are these white doves?
JESUS: They are my martyrs who have been resurrected by both of you. They are the cloud of witnesses coming in my glory. Shekinaih and you are THE ELOAH. You are the baby dove inside the mother dove.
The name "ELOAH" can be interpreted as an acronym:
"EL" symbolizes the arm of THE TRINITY: my arm within the arm of my FATHER.
"O" symbolizes THE HOLY SPIRIT who is the source of the power of THE TRINITY
"A" symbolizes The Almighty, the Masculine and Feminine mani- festation of THE TRINITY by the name of THE SHADDAI
"H" symbolizes THE ELIJAH/the fire of THE TRINITY

United in spirit, both of you as THE ELOAH are the might of THE TRINITY; the arm of THE EL manifested through the power of THE HOLY SPIRIT. The power flows to me which then flows to both of you, our Two Cherubim who bear our name, "THE SHADDAI", in which the decree of THE TRINITY are executed through you, who is The Elijah, the fire of THE TRINITY.

THE FATHER: We, THE TRINITY, through both of you, who are THE ELOAH, shall come with all our Holy Ones (symbolized by the smaller doves) to execute judgment on the Beast from the Sea, his African and Arab allies, and his mutated hybrids of the Nephilim.
Hab 3:3 THE ELOAH came from Teman, and the holy one from mount Paran. Selah. His glory covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise. Hab 3:4 And his brightness was as
THE DESTRUCTIVE PATTERNS OF THE SHADDAI

the light; he had horns coming out of his hand: and there was the hiding of his power. Hab 3:5 Before him went the pestilence, and burning coals went forth at his feet. Hab 3:6 He stood, and measured the earth: he beheld, and drove asunder the nations; and the everlasting mountains were scattered, the perpetual hills did bow: his ways are everlasting. Hab 3:7 I saw the tents of Cushan in affliction: and the curtains of the land of Midian did tremble.
JESUS WATCHING TV

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of JESUS watching a movie on TV. In the movie, many ministers were presenting their works sym- bolized by hay, wood, copper, silver, and gold. They brought them before the Altar/Throne of THE ELOHIM in Heaven. To the hay and wood, THE TRINITY wrote, "Men's work, not THE ELOHIM'S work". THE TRINITY then blew fire out of His mouth and they were burned to ashes. As for the bronze, silver and gold, THE TRINITY again blew fire out of His mouth and the words "status quo" was seen on them. Then THE TRINITY said, "This lays its final value."

THE FATHER: We, through our name, "THE SHADDAI", shall in the last days try the works of all our ministers; based on whether they did according to what we have commanded ac- cording to the grace given to them, or according to their own will with idols in their heart, or in envy, or in strife, or in divi- sion. Those who did according to our will shall be rewarded, and those who did their own will have to go through more trials of obedience of faith. (1Co 3:8-15)

SHADDAI", will definitely execute judgment in the land of Idu- mea; the rebellious angels and human beings of the Cosmos- es, both heavens and earth through our Saber, the Angel of Our Presence (Shekinaih, My FATHER'S Incarnation whom we surnamed "THE TRINITY", representing us, THE TRINITY, and Aaron K David, My SON'S reincarnation, whom we surnamed "THE VICTORY").

Isa 34:1 Come near, ye nations, to hear; and hearken, ye peo- ple: let the earth hear, and all that is therein; the world, and all things that come forth of it. Isa 34:2 For the indignation of THE YAHWEH is upon all nations, and his fury upon all their armies: he hath utterly destroyed them, he hath delivered them to the slaughter. Isa 34:3 Their slain also shall be cast out, and their stink shall come up out of their carcases, and the mountains shall be melted with their blood. Isa 34:4 And all the host of heaven shall be dissolved, and the heavens shall be rolled to- gether as a scroll: and all their host shall fall down, as the leaf falleth off from the vine, and as a falling fig from the fig tree. Isa 34:5 For my sword shall be bathed in heaven: behold, it shall come down upon Idumea, and upon the people of my curse, to judgment.

PERSONAL JUDGMENTS
THE THREE ELEMENTS OF THE SHADDAI
