INTERCESSION: FROM THE EARTH - BLOOD OF THE MARTYRS
When the blood in the golden bowl is full, more severe judg- ments will begin. All sentences for every person on Earth are recorded in their respective books which will be decreed by Shekinaih.
JUDGMENT CALLS: SEALING AND RELEASING OF DECREES BY SHEKINAIH, REPRESENTING THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT, TO AARON K DAVID TO CO-EXECUTE.

Once the decree is released, it cannot be reversed. It's the final judgment decision agreed by us, THE TRINITY. When Shekinaih passes the decree to you to broadcast it out into the Three Realms, whatever that are written in the decree against that person will take place accordingly.
EXECUTION ACT BY AARON K DAVID REPRESENTING JESUS/ ANGEL OF THE YAHWEH
The respective power (in the Seven Spirit of THE TRINITY) need- ed to execute the decree against that person will be attached to the decree for executing the work.
PART 7
THE ADONAI
ACT 8 SCENE 1
A Mega Church in Singapore

THE TRINITY, Shekinaih and David were sitting in a heli- copter which was about to land on the roof of the largest church in Singapore. Upon landing, David was the first one to alight from the helicopter. David's eyes almost popped out when he saw the great damages on the roof of this church. He then ran quickly to stand at the edge of the center of the remaining hanging roof to peek into the church building be- low. Stunned by what he saw, with his both hand covering his mouth, he shouted in horror "Oh, my God!" He stood motion- lessly with his jaw dropped and was speechless. Upon hearing David's cry, Shekinaih ran quickly to stand next to David and looked at what lied below. She too was horrified by what she saw. A giant Red Dragon was randomly swallowing up individ- uals as it freely roamed above the congregation. The head of the headless pastor was still stuck in the Red Dragon's mouth when his head was bitten off during the attack. Surprising- ly, the headless body of the pastor was still standing on the pulpit with his wife standing beside him and they were still ministering to the congregation. They and the congrega- tion were unaware of the attack as they were all blind-fold- ed. Suddenly, the Red Dragon stopped her devouring when she noticed the presence of THE TRINITY who were hovering over the hole in the damaged roof. Upon seeing THE TRINITY, the Red Dragon immediately prostrated herself before them with her tail facing the entrance of the infiltrated and dam-
ACT 8 SCENE 1

aged church. Suddenly, the eyes of the wife of the headless Pastor was opened and she was astonished and horrified to see the Red Dragon prostrated on the floor in the auditorium with her head facing the stage where they were standing. She immediately alerted her headless husband.

THE TRINITY, Shekinaih, and David who were hovering above the damaged roof then descended and stood at the right corner of the stage. THE FATHER, who was standing be- hind JESUS, who was standing behind THE HOLY SPIRIT, who was standing behind Shekinaih, who was standing behind David, then opened His mouth and blew out a decree which landed on Shekinaih's right hand which she then passed to David to proclaim aloud. David then opened the scroll to read aloud to the Red Dragon who was still prostrated before them in a docile posture with her eyes half closed.
ACT 8 SCENE 2
Court of Appeal in Singapore

A heavenly court room suddenly descended and superim- posed onto the earthly court room. Shekinaih was seated as the judge with Aaron K David standing on her right holding a book with his left hand and a pen in his right hand as her scribe. Both of them were in ancient Chinese golden emper- or's robe. Jose, in ancient magistrate red robe with a black headgear, was holding a mallet standing on their left. Walk- ing towards the entrance of the court were Kong Hee and Sun Ho who were accompanied by reporters and photogra- phers pressing against them in hope for a last minute brief interview while they snapped pictures of the newly arrived couple.

Upon their arrival at the court room entrance, a demon and an angel who were stationed one on the left and one on the right of the entrance began to sound their huge spiritu- al drum summoning many demons and angels who brought many books of accusations and justifications respectively which they then placed on the judge's table.

The door of the court room was then opened, and those who had been queuing outside the court room earlier quick- ly chose their seat and the empty seats were fully filled. Kong Hee and Sun Ho then walked into the court room and Kong Hee was led to stand on the accused stand with Sun Ho seat- ed on the front row on the right facing the judge. Seated on
ACT 8 SCENE 2

the right of Sun Ho was Phil Pringle who was placing his left hand over her left shoulder to assure her. Then entered the judge from the left and he sat on the seat which the spirit of Shekinaih was seated, and everyone present stood up to pay respect to the judge. "Please be seated", said the judge to those present.
Jose, who was superimposed on the macer slammed the gavel and thereby announced, "The hearing now starts. "

The accuser/prosecutor who was seated on the left facing the judge then stood up to lay additional charges against the accused for his unrepentant heart. The accuser/prose- cutor thereby demanded a higher jail term for the accused. Kong Hee, who stood on the stand, raised up his right hand and said to the judge, " I object, Your Honor!" The judge then spoke to him, "Objection overruled." Then, the accused's/ defendant's lawyer proceeded with his many defenses. The heavenly court and the earthly court were running in par- allel simultaneously. The accused's/defendant's lawyer said to the judge, "Your Honor, the accused has relented for the non-transparency of the use of public money before his con- gregation. However, the accused still believes that he was fulfilling a Heavenly Mandate. We hereby appeal for leniency for this case." Immediately, the Prosecutor raised up his hand and said to the judge, "I object, Your Honor." "Objection over- ruled," said the Judge to the Prosecutor. THE TRINITY, who stood behind Shekinaih who was seated superimposed on the judge's seat, then walked toward Shekinaih to converse with her for a while and the final decision was reached. Shek- inaih then wrote the verdict and passed to Aaron K David. THE TRINITY then walked into Shekinaih to sit as the Ultimate Judge and immediately, Kong Hee was caught up in the spir- it to kneel before Shekinaih in the heavenly court, and THE FATHER said through Shekinaih to him, "Have you relented from magnifying man more than me?" "Yes, My Lord." Kong Hee answered. THE FATHER continued to question him, "Have you relented for permitting Sun Ho to be involved in the de- rogative acts of degrading my creation, thereby mocking
BEHOLD MY NAMES

me before the world?" Kong Hee bowed his head and said to THE FATHER, "ABBA FATHER, I am so sorry for degrading your creation and mocking you indirectly!" He then broke down and wept bitterly. THE FATHER then continued to question him, "Are you or are you not dishonoring me in placing your mentors above me?" Kong Hee answered THE FATHER regret- fully, "I am so sorry, ABBA FATHER, I was wrong. I hereby ac- knowledge and repent of my many sins. Would you please forgive me? I plead with you, please spare us from your great wrath!" Upon hearing Kong Hee's plead, tears began to run down from Shekinaih's eyes as she felt THE FATHER'S pain and she began to weep aloud uncontrollably. All those who were present in the heavenly court room were deeply touched by her cry and their tears began to roll down as well. Satan, the Prosecutor, who was witnessing what had just happened, relented over his accusations. Shekinaih then whispered to Aaron K David who stood on his right and said to him, "You may read our verdict aloud now." David said to Kong Hee, "Your jail term will be reduced to a minimum required sen- tence because you have realized your wrong and had truly repented." Jose then slammed the gavel and loudly declared, "Court dismissed!"
Immediately, Kong Hee was brought back to earth. With his hands cuffed, he said to the judge, "Thank you, Your Hon- or" as he bowed his head before the earthly/heavenly judge.
ACT 8 SCENE 3
Changi Beach, Singapore

THE TRINITY, Shekinaih and David were standing on a beach facing the sea waiting for the sun to rise. As the day began to break, Shekinaih began to see panoramic pictures/visions arising from the horizon of the sea. However, David was un- able to see the visions because the frequency of those vi- sions was not tuned to his eyes yet. Therefore, being curious, he pursued to ask THE FATHER with many questions to seek further understanding concerning the pictures/visions that Shekinaih had just saw. "ABBA FATHER, why brought us to Changi Beach?" David said to THE FATHER. "Changi symboliz- es the east of Planet Earth whereby my name, "THE ADONAI", through both of you as the Sun of Righteousness shall arise. You both will bring spiritual healing to my children who were oppressed by the Accuser and her presumptuous assembly of the Tyrant/Anti-Christ who seek after their soul and have not set me before their face. Through both of you, I will again turn my heart to my children and both of you shall turn their hearts toward me in perfect love out of a pure heart, with a clear conscience and in true obedience unto our command. Through both of you, I will execute terrible vengeance against the false ministers who misled my sheep. I will not spare the false witnesses that framed them, the ungodly authorities that persecuted them, and the unjust judges that unjustly convicted them. Yes, we, through our name, "THE ADONAI", will overturn the captivity of my children, and their hearts
BEHOLD MY NAMES
will again return to me instead of turning to those false spiri- tual fathers sent by Lucifer and Molech. (Mal 3:1-18, 4: 1-6)
"ABBA FATHER, what is the revelation concerning your name, 'THE ADONAI'?" David asked THE FATHER.
CHAPTER 1
THE LAST DAY ADONAI

title: THE FATHER PLAYING CARDS WITH SATAN

segments.text: THE FATHER PLAYING CARDS WITH SATAN

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of THE FATHER having a game of cards with Satan who was in their androgynous form, male and female. They later split themselves as Baal and Ashtoreth. Both of them had a card hidden behind their back and they were laughing, thinking in their hearts that they had the last winning card.

After that, the scene changed. I saw myself superimposed on THE FATHER. I was in THE FATHER playing chess with Baal and Ashtoreth. Twice, the moves of the chess pieces of THE FATHER were defeated by Baal and Ashtoreth consecutively. Looking at the whole situation, THE FATHER seemed to be los- ing. But subtly behind THE FATHER'S mind, He had foreknown their moves and had prepared His counter moves. When the time came for THE FATHER to move His chess piece, I saw the words "final laugh" written on me who was superimposed on THE FATHER. THE FATHER through me moved His chess piece and with three moves, the game was over, THE FATHER had won. I saw both Baal and Ashtoreth were in shock and unbe- lief as they lost the game.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this mean?
THE FATHER: We, through our name, "THE ADONAI", shall have the final laugh, because through our name, "THE ADONAI", we are able to overturn every event according to our delight.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the meaning of the word "ADONAI"?
JESUS: The word "ADON" means "Lord". It refers to me as well as to you, my reincarnation, our right hand man.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
Psa 110:1 A Psalm of David. THE YAHWEH said unto my Adon, Sit thou at my right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool.

The word "ADONAI" is a plural form of "ADON". Like the plu- ral form "ELOHIM", it is regularly used with singular verbs. Like Baal and Ashtoreth who represent Satan, THE FATHER uses Shekinaih and you to represent THE ADONAI. She manifests the feminine character of our name, "THE ADONAI", while you manifest the masculine character.
There are three-fold manifestations of our name, "THE ADONAI".
Firstly, THE ADONAI is the event over-turner.
Secondly, She/He has the last laugh concerning the outcome of every situation.
Thirdly, How She/He overturns the event depends on the out- come of our testing.

To the carnal eye of most men, Shekinaih and you are not only foolish, but weak in many areas, and ignoble in appearance. But my FATHER will choose both of you, the least likely candi- dates, or situations that seemed hopeless to manifest His glo- ry by shaming those who think they are wise, those who think they are great and those who think they are noble, so that they will not boast anymore after being humiliated by me. The enemy may seem to be intimidating and winning in every round, but through our name, "THE ADONAI", we will overturn the events if you pass our test of obedience of faith.

1Co 1:25 Because the foolish (G3474) of THE ELOHIM is wiser than men; and the weak (G772) of THE ELOHIM is stronger than men. 1Co 1:26 For ye see your calling, brethren, how that not many who are called are wise after the flesh, not many are mighty, not many are noble, 1Co 1:27 But THE ELOHIM hath chosen the foolish of the Cosmoses to confound the wise; and THE ELO- HIM hath chosen the weak of the Cosmoses to confound the mighty; 1Co 1:28 And the ignoble (G36) of the Cosmoses, and the despised, hath THE ELOHIM chosen, yea, and the (G3588) no- body, being a nobody (G5607) (G3361), in order (G2443) to ren- der useless (G2673) the somebody (G5607) 1Co 1:29 That no flesh should boast in his presence. (THE HOLY SPIRIT'S translation)
CHAPTER 2
THE EVENT OVER-TURNER

title: ADONAI, WILL THOU SLAY ALSO A RIGHTEOUS NATION?

segments.text: ADONAI, WILL THOU SLAY ALSO A RIGHTEOUS NATION?
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you show us some examples in the scripture which manifest your name, "THE ADONAI"?

JESUS: In Genesis, when Abraham was sojourning in Gerar, Abi- melech took Sarah, but we, through our name, "THE ADONAI", overturned the whole event by inflicting an illness on his pri- vate part so that he could not violate Sarah. The Angel of Our Presence came to him as "THE ADONAI" in a dream and warned Abimelech who then pleaded: "ADONAI, wilt thou slay also a righteous nation?" He later released Sarah and told his ser- vants about the dream and they were sore afraid. We through our name, "THE ADONAI", also turned the situation around by making Abraham richer with more sheep, oxen, menservants, womenservants and a thousand pieces of silver. (Gen 20:4-7)
Gen 20:4 But Abimelech had not come near her: and he said,
ADONAI (H136), wilt thou slay also a righteous nation?
David, why don't you share with Shekinaih your experience concerning our name, "THE ADONAI"?

DAVID: There was a time when I used to have evil imagina- tion and argued with you and you would say, "THE FATHER in me is very angry, I can feel Him!" And in unbelief, I would tell you that it was you who were angry and not THE FATHER. But as I experienced THE FATHER'S dealing with me through His name, "THE ADONAI", in you, I started to realize that THE FATHER is reminding me to fear His name, "THE ADONAI", that is manifested through you. Like Abimelech's servants, I must be like them: be sore afraid when THE FATHER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", confronts and tests me using you.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
Sometimes, I think that my barrenness might be due to my rebellion against THE ADONAI because of my lack of fear of Him through you.
Job 28:28 And unto man he said, Behold, the fear of THE ADONAI (H136), that is wisdom; and to depart from evil is understand- ing.
JESUS: Very well spoken, David.

DAVID: I am fully convicted that THE FATHER is using you as His representative, and I must not be offended like Moses when things happen in contrary to what I have been told. I know that THE FATHER will set me up in situations that seem disadvantageous, but if I submit to Him in humility and trust and obey Him wholeheartedly, He, through His name, "THE ADONAI", will overturn my situation because He through His name, "THE ADONAI", is the event over-turner.
THE FATHER: Bravo David!
SHEKINAIH: I see THE TRINITY nodding their heads in agree- ment and clapped their hands to cheer you.
DAVID: Thank you, Blessed Trinity.

title: ADONAI, WHEREFORE HAVE YOU SO EVIL TREATED THIS PEOPLE?

segments.text: ADONAI, WHEREFORE HAVE YOU SO EVIL TREATED THIS PEOPLE?

JESUS: When we called Moses to be the deliverer of Israel, he was in a difficult situation as he was not eloquent: he was slow of speech and of a slow tongue. He was already an old man and was no more the self-confident general of the army of the Egyptians. We, through our name, "THE ADONAI", had de- liberately turned his glory into shame and have crushed Moses for many years in the wilderness and Moses was then ready for the master's use. Having his self-righteousness, pride, and ego dealt with, he trembled before the Angel of Our Presence and obeyed our command.
By appointing Aaron as Moses' spokesman and appointing Moses to represent us, we pursued our plan to manifest our name, "THE ADONAI", through him. In Exodus Chapter 5, after
THE EVENT OVER-TURNER

Aaron had spoken to the children of Israel that THE YAHWEH had visited the children of Israel and had looked upon their af- fliction, they were overwhelmed with hope but it did not last long. My FATHER, through His name, "THE EHYEH", hardened the heart of Pharaoh to give no more straw to the Israelites to make bricks. They were to gather straw for themselves and he demanded more works to be laid upon the men. After receiv- ing complains from his people, Moses was disappointed and perplexed and came to the Angel of Our Presence and cried: "ADONAI, wherefore have you so evil treated this people? Why is it that you have sent me? For since I came to Pharaoh to speak in your name, he has done evil to this people; neither have you delivered your people at all!" Then we, through our angel, said unto Moses: "Now shalt thou see what I will do to Pharaoh: for with a strong hand shall he let them go, and with a strong hand shall he drive them out of his land." (Exo 5:1-6:1)
Exo 5:22 And Moses returned unto THE YAHWEH, and said, ADONAI (H136), wherefore hast thou so evil entreated this peo- ple? why is it that thou hast sent me?

My FATHER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", had turned their situation to worse than before because He had set Moses and the children of Israel up, and they had to learn to be in to- tal obedience even when things did not happen as promised by us. To cut the story short, through the Angel of Our Pres- ence with many signs and demonstrations of our power, we destroyed Egypt in the end and annihilated Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea. We, through our name, THE ADONAI, did overturn the whole situation and had the last laugh.

title: OH MY ADONAI, WHEREWITH SHALL I SAVE ISRAEL?

segments.text: OH MY ADONAI, WHEREWITH SHALL I SAVE ISRAEL?

DAVID: ABBA FATHER, most Christians know the story of Gide- on with his 300 and their exploits. But how did Gideon, with three hundred men, managed to defeat the Midianites and their allies consisting of the Amalekites and the children of the east who were of one hundred and thirty-five thousand men with swords?
BEHOLD MY NAMES

SHEKINAIH: I see you as an angel in heaven beaming green- ish yellow light on the Midianites and their allies. I see the word "CONFUSION" written across the light. Then you, like an angel in the heaven, sent lightning, thunder, whirlwind, and dark clouds to terrify and astound them so that they fought among themselves. (Jdg 6:15-22, Jdg 7:20-25)
Jdg 6:15 And he said unto him, Oh my ADONAI (H136), wherewith shall I save Israel?

JESUS: Yes, our exploits through the Angel of Our Presence during Gideon's time will be re-enacted in the last days through our name, "THE ADONAI", in Shekinaih and you, Aaron K David. We, through our name, "THE ADONAI", are more than able to overturn every event in favor of our children (if they were to trust and obey us in whatever things we command them to do despite seemingly intimidating or impossible situ- ations). My FATHER knows the end from the beginning of ev- ery matter. He knows every move of the enemy and has pre- pared His final moves for the kill. He does not need strength in number, abilities or influence to overturn any event. He only needs our total obedience of faith toward Him in whatever He commands us to do. Yes, He will again gather the present day tabernacles of Edom, Ishmaelites, Moab, Hagarenes, Geb- al, Ammon, Amalek, Philistines, and Tyre to confederate with Assur; to war against me and my anointed ones. But like what He did to the Midianites, the Angel of Our Presence shall beam our electromagnetic light and cause confusion in their armies and make them slay one another as we bring earthquakes and hailstones upon them. (Psa 83:1-18)
CHAPTER 3
SHE WHO HAS THE LAST LAUGH

title: ADONAI YAHVIH, WHAT WILT THOU GIVE ME, SEEING I GO CHILDLESS?

segments.text: ADONAI YAHVIH, WHAT WILT THOU GIVE ME, SEEING I GO CHILDLESS?
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you show us some examples that show your name, "THE ADONAI who has the Last Laugh"?

JESUS: We all know that Abram and Sarah were in difficult circumstances in Genesis 15:2 because they could not have a baby. Abram was about eighty-five years old and Sarah was seventy-six and barren. I came to Abram through the Angel of Our Presence in a vision promising to overturn the situation and to give fertility to Sarah's womb. (Gen 15:2-3)
Gen 15:2 And Abram said, ADONAI (H136) YAHVIH, what wilt thou give me, seeing I go childless, and the steward of my house is this Eliezer of Damascus?
The barrenness of Sarah was an oppression of Satan in order to prevent my birth as the Messiah from the line of Abraham.
Act 10:38 How THE ELOHIM anointed Jesus of Nazareth with THE HOLY GHOST and with power: who went about doing good, and healing all that were oppressed of the devil; for THE ELOHIM was with him.
Barrenness also applies to barrenness in ministry or any other works.

Abram and Sarah had many struggles with the prophecy given by us and had given in to the rational reasoning that we were giving them a child through Hagar. So, in the end, Abram went into Hagar and they had a child. This is what Satan always do through suggestion in my children's mind and off-track them from our promises.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

I appeared again to Abram through my angel when he was ninety-nine years old, renewing our promise by changing his name from Abram to Abraham, changing his fate prophetical- ly. Sarah heard about the renewed promises and was skeptical and laughed. When confronted of her mockery and unbelief, she replied: "After I am waxed old shall I have pleasure, my lord being old also?" But I replied through my angel: "Is any- thing too hard for THE YAHWEH? At the time appointed I will return unto thee, according to the time of life, and Sarah shall have a son." The moral of this incident is that there is a time of testing and a time of fulfillment of promises. There is nothing too hard that my FATHER, THE YAHWEH, The Righteous Judge, through His name, "THE ADONAI", cannot do. (Gen 18:11-15)

Nine months later, at the appointed time, the child was born and his name was Isaac H3327 "yitschaq" which means laugh- ter (that is, mockery), symbolizing THE ADONAI had mocked Satan with His last laugh (Gen 21:6-8).
SHEKINAIH: David, do you have anything to share with me concerning this revelation?

DAVID: Most of the time, I am disappointed and discouraged when what I am expecting does not materialize. I know this is due to my impatience or wrong interpretation of the proph- ecy or misinformation regarding the timing of its fulfillment. When it does not come to pass as what I have expected, I stumble and become sceptical to further prophecies which THE FATHER spoke through other prophets.

JESUS: David, you must understand the principle of prophecy is that my prophets know in parts and they prophesy in parts. In this way, you will not be easily overwhelmed with disap- pointments and give up hope. Many of you fall into this error and after many repeated disappointments, dare not to hope.

DAVID: Yes, I have been to many places seeking you, JESUS. Through visions and dreams, you have promised to appear to me if I obeyed your leading to seek you earnestly. I literally did crazy things. I can still recall one occasion where I jumped from one end of a cliff to another cliff in Mount Tabor just to be in the exact place where you appeared with Moses and Eli-
SHE WHO HAS THE LAST LAUGH

jah during their appearance in the Mount of Transfiguration. There was a fence to keep visitors from reaching the spot, but I climbed over it and jumped over the chasm to the other side of the cliff. It was very dangerous. But I was disappoint- ed. I was expecting to see you or be touched by your power, but you gave me only a vision and the verse Isaiah 2:10, which in my later years became the foundation of my destiny. I even went to Mount Sinai to seek your face and I thought it must be a fearful place to be. But to my surprise, I saw a black man who was also seeking you like me. He had set up a store in the mountain selling Coca-Cola and hot tea and renting blan- kets to tourists who reached the mountain every morning to see the sunrise. That was how I sought you and lived each day. Sometimes thinking about it, I will laugh at myself. We were all crazily seeking you. In the eyes of others, we were like fools; but it didn't bother me at all for I was convinced that those who seek you with all their heart, all their soul, and all their mind will eventually see you eye to eye.
JESUS: Yes, I have captivated you with my truth and you will not turn to any others but will follow me wherever I go.
Joh 6:68 Then Simon Peter answered him, Lord, to whom shall we go? thou hast the words of eternal life. Joh 6:69 And we be- lieve and are sure that thou art that Christ, the Son of the living ELOHIM.

DAVID: I am a true believer of the existence of the Devil but I am a more unwavering believer of you, JESUS. Every time when I felt defeated and discouraged, carnally I will confess these negative and discouraging words, "The devil is very real." But almost immediately, I will hear your gentle voice speaking to my spirit these words, "Am I not real also?" I will straight away be filled with your love and be empowered to be sound in my mind reminding myself that my FATHER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", will have the last laugh and will turn my situation around for good, and like Sarah, I will say, "THE ELOHIM hath made me to laugh, so that all that hear will laugh with me."
BEHOLD MY NAMES

title: THE ADONAI SHALL LAUGH AT HIM: FOR HE SEETH THAT HIS DAY IS COMING

segments.text: THE ADONAI SHALL LAUGH AT HIM: FOR HE SEETH THAT HIS DAY IS COMING

JESUS: Yes, this I swear by our holiness; but in order to enter into the Kingdom of Heaven, my FATHER has ordained many tribulations for His children to produce the Peaceable Fruits of Righteousness. You must continue to be at peace with THE FATHER even though your situations might seem to be hope- less despite your total trust and obedience to His command. These are meant to give you the opportunity to crucify your flesh with its affections and lusts. Do not fret when you see the lawless and unrighteous prosper in their devices and do not let them affect you in your peace with THE FATHER. Know this, my children have to go through the Great Tribulation by the Anti-Christ, but we will strengthen and comfort them so that they will be come out of it in peace.
THE FATHER: Yes, I through my name, "THE ADONAI", shall laugh at them for I see their day of destruction is at hand.
Psa 37:13 THE ADONAI (H136) shall laugh at him: for he seeth that his day is coming.

JESUS: David, your commitment and faith in THE FATHER'S righteousness will pay off if you faint not. Like me, you shall indeed be anointed as King and inherit the Cosmoses. The time will come when the nations that follow the Beast from the Sea will persecute and trouble my children who we have called, but my FATHER, who sits in the heavens, shall laugh, and through His name, "THE ADONAI", through the Angel of Our presence (Shekinaih, My FATHER'S incarnation whom we surnamed "THE TRINITY", representing us, THE TRINITY, and Aaron K David, my reincarnation whom we surnamed "THE VICTORY"), shall have them in derision, and shall vex them in our sole displeasure. This is our name, "THE ADONAI", which you must teach my children to trust; for we have the winning card.
Psa 2:1 Why do the heathen rage, and the people imagine a vain thing? Psa 2:2 The kings of the earth set themselves, and the rulers take counsel together, against THE YAHWEH, and against
SHE WHO HAS THE LAST LAUGH

his anointed, saying, Psa 2:3 Let us break their bands asunder, and cast away their cords from us. Psa 2:4 He that sitteth in the heavens shall laugh: THE ADONAI (H136) shall have them in de- rision. Psa 2:5 Then shall he speak unto them in his wrath, and vex them in his sore displeasure. Psa 2:6 Yet have I set my king upon my holy hill of Zion. Psa 2:7 I will declare the decree: THE YAHWEH hath said unto me, Thou art my Son; this day have I be- gotten thee. Psa 2:8 Ask of me, and I shall give thee the heathen for thine inheritance, and the uttermost parts of the earth for thy possession. Psa 2:9 Thou shalt break them with a rod of iron; thou shalt dash them in pieces like a potter's vessel. Psa 2:10 Be wise now therefore, O ye kings: be instructed, ye judges of the earth. Psa 2:11 Serve THE YAHWEH with fear, and rejoice with trembling. Psa 2:12 Kiss the Son, lest he be angry, and ye perish from the way, when his wrath is kindled but a little. Blessed are all they that put their trust in him.
CHAPTER 4
THE CONDITIONS OF THE ADONAI
THE POWER OF HOLINESS

SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of a pillar of fire coming down from heaven. It consists of two flames. The one on the left is writ- ten with the words "Fire of Holiness". The one on the right is written with the words "Power of Holiness."
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do these symbolize?

JESUS: Your holiness will result in our power being manifested through our name, "THE ADONAI", who will turn all negative situations around. Therefore, it is important for you to vol- untarily sanctify yourself to honor my FATHER in the honor of his holiness so that you can manifest our name, "THE ADONAI", to be our chief and lead my anointed ones/kings from spir- itual Zion. They will also voluntarily follow you in the order of Melchizedek (Apostle/High priest) in the honor of his holi- ness so that they might be empowered to smite the kings and rulers who confederate with the Anti-Christ in the day of our wrath. (Heb 3:1, 5:6)

Psa 110:1 A Psalm of David. THE YAHWEH said unto my ADON, Sit thou at my right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool. Psa 110:2 THE YAHWEH shall send the rod of thy strength out of Zion: rule thou in the midst of thine enemies. Psa 110:3 Thy people shall be willing in the day of thy power, in the beauties of holiness from the womb of the morning: thou hast the dew of thy youth. Psa 110:4 THE YAHWEH hath sworn, and will not repent, Thou art a priest forever after the order of Melchize- dek. Psa 110:5 THE ADONAI (H136) at thy right hand shall strike through kings in the day of his wrath. Psa 110:6 He shall judge among the heathen, he shall fill the places with the dead bod- ies; he shall wound the heads over many countries. Psa 110:7
THE CONDITIONS OF THE ADONAI
He shall drink of the brook in the way: therefore shall he exalt (H7311 "rum") the chief (H7218 "rosh").

title: O ADONAI, WHAT SHALL I SAY WHEN ISRAEL TURNETH THEIR BACKS BEFORE THEIR ENEMIES!

segments.text: O ADONAI, WHAT SHALL I SAY WHEN ISRAEL TURNETH THEIR BACKS BEFORE THEIR ENEMIES!
DAVID: ABBA Father, are there any other conditions for THE ADONAI to overturn our negative situations?

JESUS: My FATHER'S name, "THE ADONAI", will only overturn your negative situations to positive provided you keep His covenant and obey His command and walk truthfully before Him. In Joshua Chapter 5, the Angel of Our Presence who ap- peared to Moses in the Burning Bush was with Joshua ad- dressing himself as the Captain of the Host of THE YAHWEH. He warned Joshua that the city of Jericho shall be cursed and they must keep themselves from the accursed things in or- der not to be cursed and make the camp of Israel a curse and trouble it. All the silver, and gold, and vessels of brass and iron are to be consecrated unto THE YAHWEH: they shall come into the treasury of THE YAHWEH. And they shall utterly destroy all that was in the city, both man and woman, young and old, and ox, and sheep, and ass, with the edge of the sword and not to take anything from the city of Jericho but to destroy it. But Achan transgressed his covenant and coveted and stole a goodly Babylonian garment, and two hundred shekels of sil- ver, and a wedge of gold of fifty and hid in the earth in the midst of his tent, thus defiling the whole camp. Because of this, when they attacked the city of Ai, the Israelites were de- feated and fled from their enemy and the faith of Joshua and the Israelites were shaken as they were many and the peo- ple of Ai were few. When Joshua inquired from THE ADONAI why THE ADONAI had permitted their defeat, he was told that someone in the camp had sinned. Israel had been defiled and the Angel of THE YAHWEH would not be with them unless they destroy the accursed from among them. (Jos 7:7-12)
Jos 7:8 O ADONAI (H136), what shall I say, when Israel turneth their backs before their enemies!
BEHOLD MY NAMES

After they found out the culprit, Joshua, and all Israel with him, took Achan and the silver, and the garment, and the wedge of gold, and his sons, and his daughters, and his oxen, and his asses, and his sheep, and his tent, and all that he had; and they brought them unto the valley of Achor and all Isra- el stoned them with stones, and burned them with fire; and they raised over him a great heap of stones unto this day so THE YAHWEH turned from the fierceness of His anger. There- fore the name of that place was called the valley of Achor un- til today.

David, you must remind yourself and warn my last days' armies of the "Achan" (H5912, "akan") which means "the troublemak- ers". These people are covetous and easily tempted. They will usually scoff at the warning and correction of Shekinaih and you and affect many with their defilement. THE ADONAI will not be with you if you are defiled, for He is holy.
Pro 29:8 Scornful men bring a city into a snare: but wise men turn away wrath.

title: O ADONAI YAHVIH, REMEMBER ME, I PRAY THEE, AND STRENGTHEN ME

segments.text: O ADONAI YAHVIH, REMEMBER ME, I PRAY THEE, AND STRENGTHEN ME

In Judges Chapter 13, it was the Angel of Our Presence that came in our name, "THE ADONAI", that appeared to Manoah's wife who was barren. We promised her a son. We instructed her that no razor shall come on his head; for the child shall be a Nazarite unto us from the womb and he shall begin to deliv- er Israel out of the hand of the Philistines. Manoah's wife and her son also must not eat anything that is from the vine, wine or strong drink, or eat any unclean thing.

Manoah was not present when the Angel of Our Presence ap- peared to his wife. So Manoah entreated us, and said, "O my ADONAI, let the man of THE ELOHIM which thou didst send come again unto us, and teach us what we shall do unto the child that shall be born."
My FATHER hearkened to the voice of Manoah and the An-
THE CONDITIONS OF THE ADONAI

gel of Our Presence came again unto them. When asked for his name, our angel hinted to them that he was called "Won- der". Following that, he did a wonder by ascending to heaven through the flame from the altar. Manoah then realized that we have manifested ourselves through the Angel of Our Pres- ence through our name, "THE ADONAI". (Jdg 13:18-23)

Jdg 13:18 And the angel of THE YAHWEH said unto him, Why ask- est thou thus after my name, seeing it is wonder (H6383 "piliy") Jdg 13:19 So Manoah took a kid with a meat offering, and of- fered it upon a rock unto THE YAHWEH: and the angel did won- drously; and Manoah and his wife looked on.

The child Samson was set apart as holiness unto my FATHER to be a deliverer of Israel; but due to his uncircumcised heart, he was seduced, snared, defiled, and eventually lost his strength. The seven locks of hair on his head represented the Seven Spirits of THE ELOHIM. Our glory left him as his head was de- filed when his seven locks of hair were shaved.

Samson was captured and imprisoned and his eyes were blind- ed. He was taken out of the prison house to be made sport of. They set him between two pillars. Now the house was full of men and women; and all lords of the Philistines were there; and there were upon the roof about three thousand men and women. And Samson called unto our name, "THE ADONAI", to remember him and to return his strength for the last time so that he could be avenged of the Philistines for his two eyes. And Samson took hold of the two middle pillars upon which the house stood, and on which it was borne up, of the one with his right hand, and of the other with his left and he bowed himself with all his might; and the house fell upon the lords, and upon all the people that were therein. So the dead which he slew at his death were more than they which he slew in his life. (Jdg 16:28-30)

The moral of the story is that Samson, through his self-will and pride, rebelled and sinned against my FATHER by breaking his covenant in defiling himself with the unclean. Being defiled, he was no more able to deliver Israel from the Philistines. My
BEHOLD MY NAMES

FATHER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", had to powderise him and overturn his fallen condition by allowing the enemy to afflict him so as to turn him around. Samson had to learn our name, "THE ADONAI", the hard way, like Moses who proph- esied in Psalms 90:1-3:
A Prayer of Moses the man of THE ELOHIM. THE ADONAI, ... Thou turnest man to powder (H1793 "dakka" crushed, literally pow- der) and sayest, Return, ye children of Adam.

In his affliction, Samson experienced the mercy of my FATHER and started to fear His name, "THE ADONAI", after he was for- given when he repented. While in prison, out of his depres- sion, he cried out and supplicated daily to THE ADONAI to give him a last chance to fulfill his calling by destroying the Philis- tines before he dies. This was later echoed in David when he supplicated to THE ADONAI in Psalms 130:3-4:
If thou, shouldest mark iniquities, O ADONAI (H136), who shall stand. But there is forgiveness with thee, that thou mayest be feared.
THE ADONAI answered his prayer by returning to him and re- storing his strength.

Before he perished, THE ADONAI, who has the last laugh, used Samson to slay more Philistines than he slew in his life. The following verses vividly depict THE ADONAI who is able to over- turn all events because He has the last laugh.
Psa 37:12 The wicked plotteth against the just, and gnasheth upon him with his teeth. Psa 37:13 THE ADONAI shall laugh at him: for he seeth that his day is coming.

Although Satan had successfully caused the fall of Samson and seemed to be winning and was laughing, my FATHER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", is still the ultimate winner in the end because He had the last winning card.

Like King David, he cried out in humility and with a contrite heart to my FATHER, who through His name, "THE ADONAI", turned his defilement into holiness again and joined with him for the last time to turn the enemies' mirth into mourning.
THE CONDITIONS OF THE ADONAI

Psa 51:15 O ADONAI, open thou my lips; and my mouth shall shew forth thy praise. Psa 51:16 For thou desirest not sacrifice; else would I give it: thou delightest not in burnt offering. Psa 51:17 The sacrifices of THE ELOHIM are a broken spirit: a broken and a contrite heart, O ELOHIM, thou wilt not despise.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how can we keep ourselves from being defiled?

JESUS: David, let this sink deeply in your heart. I will join with you in one spirit in the day of battle, and you must never let Lucifer defile you in any way. You must flee from youthful lusts and shun from all appearance of evil, from all evil imagina- tion and evil speaking, especially against Shekinaih who rep- resents us, THE TRINITY. For out of the abundance of the heart the mouth will speak. Verily, verily, I say unto you, you are my chief, THE VICTORY, The Victorious Angel who shall invade the high ones of the serpent with my troop through the sea of nations with my horses that are prepared against the day of battle. I will surely strengthen your feet, and mount you upon high places, that you as my chief musician may conquer them as you prophesy my judgment against them in songs.
Psa 140:7 O YAHVIH THE ADONAI, the strength of my salvation, thou hast joined together (H5526 "sakak") with your chief (H7218 "rosh") in the day of battle.
Pro 21:31 A horse is prepared for the day of battle; but deliver- ance (H8668 "teshuah") is of THE YAHWEH.

Hab 3:15 Thou didst walk through the sea with thine horses, through the heap of great waters. Hab 3:16 When I heard, my belly trembled; my lips quivered at the voice: rottenness en- tered into my bones, and I trembled in myself, that I might rest in the day of trouble: when he cometh up unto the people, he will invade them with his troops. Hab 3:19 THE YAHWEH

ADONAI is my strength (H2428 "chayil" force, might, power), and he will make my feet like hinds' feet, and he will make me to walk upon mine high places. To the chief singer on my stringed instruments. (KJV)
Hab 3:19 THE ADONAI YAHWEH is my strength, and he will per- fectly strengthen my feet; he mounts me upon high places, that I may conquer by his song. (Septuagint)
CHAPTER 5
THE OTHER SIDE OF THE ADONAI
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, do you, through your name, "THE ADONAI", only turn negative events into positive?

JESUS: No, the other side of the character and works of our name, "THE ADONAI", is depicted vividly in Lamentation by Jeremiah when the Israelites sinned, rebelled, and betrayed my FATHER, THE YAHWEH, The Righteous Judge. Through His name, "THE ADONAI", by the hand of the executing angel by our name, "THE EL", we overturned all their good situations into bad and disciplined and humbled them so that they might return to us in humility and in truth. David, can you read aloud the whole of chapter 3 of Lamentation to digest and reflect how we through our name, "THE ADONAI", deal with our rebellious children?
DAVID:

I am the man that hath seen affliction by the rod of his wrath. He hath led me, and brought me into darkness, but not into light. Surely against me is he turned; he turneth his hand against me all the day. My flesh and my skin hath he made old; he hath bro- ken my bones. He hath builded against me, and compassed me with gall and travail. He hath set me in dark places, as they that be dead of old. He hath hedged me about, that I cannot get out: he hath made my chain heavy. Also when I cry and shout, he shutteth out my prayer. He hath inclosed my ways with hewn stone, he hath made my paths crooked. He was unto me as a bear lying in wait, and as a lion in secret places. He hath turned aside my ways, and pulled me in pieces: he hath made me deso- late. He hath bent his bow, and set me as a mark for the arrow. He hath caused the arrows of his quiver to enter into my reins. I was a derision to all my people; and their song all the day. He hath filled me with bitterness, he hath made me drunken with wormwood. He hath also broken my teeth with gravel stones,
THE OTHER SIDE OF THE ADONAI

he hath covered me with ashes. And thou hast removed my soul far off from peace: I forgat prosperity. And I said, My strength and my hope is perished from THE YAHWEH: Remembering mine affliction and my misery, the wormwood and the gall. My soul hath them still in remembrance, and is humbled in me. This I recall to my mind, therefore have I hope. It is of THE YAHWEH'S mercies that we are not consumed, because his compassions fail not. They are new every morning: great is thy faithfulness. THE YAHWEH is my portion, saith my soul; therefore will I hope in him. THE YAHWEH is good unto them that wait for him, to the soul that seeketh him. It is good that a man should both hope and quietly wait for the salvation of THE YAHWEH. It is good for a man that he bear the yoke in his youth. He sitteth alone and keepeth silence, because he hath borne it upon him. He putteth his mouth in the dust; if so be there may be hope. He giveth his cheek to him that smiteth him: he is filled full with reproach. For THE ADONAI will not cast off for ever: But though he cause grief, yet will he have compassion according to the multitude of his mercies. For he doth not afflict willingly nor grieve the children of men. To crush under his feet all the prisoners of the earth, To turn aside the right of a man before the face of the most High, To subvert a man in his cause, THE ADONAI ap- proveth not. Who is he that saith, and it cometh to pass, when THE ADONAI commandeth it not? Out of the mouth of the most High proceedeth not evil and good? Wherefore doth a living man complain, a man for the punishment of his sins? Let us search and try our ways, and turn again to THE YAHWEH. Let us lift up our heart with our hands unto THE EL in the heavens. We have transgressed and have rebelled: thou hast not pardoned. Thou hast covered with anger, and persecuted us: thou hast slain, thou hast not pitied.

JESUS: Yes, My FATHER, through His name, THE ADONAI, will de- liver His house to the enemy as He had done to the daughters of Jerusalem when they rebelled. He will cover them with a cloud that our prayer will not be heard because of His anger. He will be an enemy to them and destroy all their security. All these evil will happen to them for the punishment of their sins. Therefore, they must search and try their ways, and turn again to my FATHER so that through His name, "THE ADONAI", He will overturn their bad situation to good again.
In the last days, my FATHER will test the faithfulness of those
BEHOLD MY NAMES
who are called out of Babylon (the world) by putting them through the Great Tribulation like He tested Israel in the wil- derness.

In the last days, there will be a falling away as many will be- come lukewarm in their love toward us. They will be too com- fortable because of their riches and assets and will be spiri- tually blinded by the doctrine of demons thinking that their prosperity is a sign of approval from THE ELOHIM as a sign of godliness. For sure, we, through our name, "THE ADONAI", will test their patience and faith in the hour of temptation which shall come upon the entire world. We will permit the enemy to turn their riches into poverty and their complacency into urgency so that they may seek us for counsel during the reign of the Beast from the Sea in the time of the Great Tribulation. Then will they start to learn and follow after righteousness, godliness, faith, love, patience, and meekness.

Shekinaih and you, in our name, "THE ADONAI", shall decree and execute what I have revealed to both of you regarding my FATHER'S determination and you shall reveal it to our 7,000 prophets worldwide, and they shall prophesy in the nations they are authorized and sent.

Amos 3:7 Surely THE ADONAI YAHVIH will do nothing, but he re- vealeth his secret unto his servants the prophets. The lion hath roared, who will not fear? THE ADONAI YAHVIH hath spoken, who can but prophesy?
THE BRIDE OF BAAL
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of a wedding ceremony. The bride- groom is a bull-headed man.
JESUS David, why don't you share with Shekinaih what you know regarding the interpretation of this vision?

DAVID: Shekinaih, many years ago, I know a brother-in-Christ who betrayed JESUS repeatedly. Through the mercy and long-suffering of THE FATHER, I was asked to restore him again and again. One day, he told me that he saw himself
THE OTHER SIDE OF THE ADONAI

wearing a bridal gown walking with Satan, the bridegroom, in a wedding ceremony. In the last days, many potential brides of JESUS will choose to deny Him so as to be able to survive in this materialistic world and compromise with the system of the world under the reign of the Beast from the Sea. Since they chose to worship the Beast and receive his Mark, they shall be rejected by JESUS.
Mat 10:33 But whosoever shall deny me before men, him will I also deny before my Father which is in heaven.
JESUS: Yes, the word "falling away" G646 "apostasia" means to forsake. It is from G647 "apostasion" which is translated as "di- vorce". They will literally divorce me for the Man of Perdition.
2Th 2:3 Let no man deceive you by any means: for that day shall not come, except there come a falling away (G646 "apostasia") first, and that man of sin be revealed, the son of perdition;

Because of their unfaithfulness, I will harden their heart and give them a reprobate mind so that they will be deceived by the false prophets and become lawless and end up in Perdi- tion with the Man of Perdition.

Mat 24:11 And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many. Mat 24:12 And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold. Mat 24:13 But he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.

But for those who will repent of their spiritual adultery, my FATHER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", will purge their blood through both of you, the Angel of Our Presence, by the spirit of judgment and burning and restore them. After that, as in the time of Moses, through both of you as the Angel of Our Presence, we will be a cloud and smoke by day and the shining of a flaming fire by night to defend them.

Isa 4:1 And in that day seven women shall take hold of one man, saying, We will eat our own bread, and wear our own apparel: only let us be called by thy name, to take away our reproach. Isa 4:2 In that day shall the branch of THE YAHWEH be beautiful and glorious, and the fruit of the earth shall be excellent and comely for them that are escaped of Israel. Isa 4:3 And it shall come to pass, that he that is left in Zion, and he that remaineth
BEHOLD MY NAMES

in Jerusalem, shall be called holy, even every one that is written among the living in Jerusalem: Isa 4:4 When THE ADONAI (H136) shall have washed away the filth of the daughters of Zion, and shall have purged the blood of Jerusalem from the midst thereof by the spirit of judgment, and by the spirit of burning. Isa 4:5 And THE YAHWEH will create upon every dwelling place of mount Zion, and upon her assemblies, a cloud and smoke by day, and the shining of a flaming fire by night: for upon all the glory shall be a defence. Isa 4:6 And there shall be a tabernacle for a shadow in the daytime from the heat, and for a place of refuge, and for a covert from storm and from rain.

Both of you as the Angel of Our Presence, through the name "THE ADONAI", shall turn the captivity of Spiritual Zion and again gather the remnant from all over the world. They shall be gathered from Russia (even from Siberia), China, Algeria, the United Kingdom, the Middle East, the European Union and etc., and they shall be part of the spiritual Mount Zion as my brides.

Isa 11:10 And in that day there shall be a root of Jesse, which shall stand for an ensign of the people; to it shall the Gentiles seek: and his rest shall be glorious. Isa 11:11 And it shall come to pass in that day, that THE ADONAI shall set his hand again the second time to recover the remnant of his people, which shall be left, from Assyria, and from Egypt, and from Pathros, and from Cush, and from Elam, and from Shinar, and from Ha- math, and from the islands of the sea. Isa 11:12 And he shall set up an ensign for the nations, and shall assemble the outcasts of Israel, and gather together the dispersed of Judah from the four corners of the earth.

Through our name, "THE ADONAI", my FATHER will turn the Cosmoses upside down as He, through you, the Angel of Our Presence in execution, smites the Galaxy and overturn the rule of Satan in the Cosmoses and the earth.

Isa 28:2 Behold, THE ADONAI hath a mighty and strong one, which as a tempest of hail and a destroying storm, as a flood of mighty waters overflowing, shall cast down to the earth with the hand. … Isa 28:5 In that day shall THE YAHWEH SABAOTH be for a crown of glory, and for a diadem of beauty, unto the residue of his people Isa 28:6 And for a spirit of judgment to him that sitteth in judgment, and for strength to them that
THE OTHER SIDE OF THE ADONAI

turn the battle to the gate" … Isa 28:22 Now therefore be ye not mockers, lest your bands be made strong: for I have heard from THE ADONAI YAHVIH SABAOTH a consumption, even determined upon the whole earth

Shekinaih and you, being the two Cherubim of Our Glory, shall be revealed to all flesh. As our strong hand, you shall turn our people to our way of holiness again and exalt the humble and bring low the proud and straighten the crooked. As our shep- herd, you shall guide and train the elect and turn them into mighty men of the host of THE YAHWEH.

Isa 40:3 The voice of him that crieth in the wilderness, Prepare ye the Way of THE YAHWEH, make straight in the desert a high- way for our ELOHIM. Isa 40:4 Every valley shall be exalted, and ev- ery mountain and hill shall be made low: and the crooked shall be made straight, and the rough places plain: Isa 40:5 And the Glory of THE YAHWEH shall be revealed, and all flesh shall see it together: for the mouth of THE YAHWEH hath spoken it. Isa

40:10 Behold, THE ADONAI YAHVIH will come with strong hand, and his arm shall rule for him: behold, his reward is with him, and his work before him. Isa 40:11 He shall feed his flock like a shepherd: he shall gather the lambs with his arm, and carry them in his bosom, and shall gently lead those that are with young … Isa 40:18 To whom then will ye liken THE EL? or what likeness will ye compare unto him … Isa 40:25 To whom then will ye liken me, or shall I be equal? saith the Holy One. Isa 40:26 Lift up your eyes on high, and behold who hath created these things that bringeth out their host by number: he calleth them all by names by the greatness of his might, for that he is strong in power; not one faileth.

After the heavens and the earth have been destroyed, My FA- THER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", will turn the whole event around to create new heavens and new earth and His elect will live in peace among the nations, and their life span will be like a tree that lives for thousands of years. They have become the spiritual Mount Zion.
CHAPTER 6
THE PERFECT DIAMOND
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the above symbol which Shekinaih saw symbolize?

JESUS: In the Star of David, the triangles marked 1, 2, 3 and 4 represent the Four Living Creatures as seen by Ezekiel in Eze- kiel 1:28 and John in Revelation 4:4-9. They represent the Four Priests that carried the Ark of the Covenant as in Joshua 3:3. They are the Fourfold Ministries. The two diamonds symbolize Shekinaih and you after being perfected. After being perfect- ed through suffering, tribulation, persecution and oppression and yet totally yielding in faith toward my FATHER, both of you shall be exalted to be the Two Cherubim of Glory whom our name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", shall dwell upon.
Both of you are the Ark of the Covenant. Shekinaih is the
THE PERFECT DIAMOND

inner diamond as a Shekinah (tabernacle) where the names "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" and "THE ADONAI" will be manifest- ed prominently. She represents the All-knowing Eyes of THE TRINITY and the words "THE ADONAI" with their brilliant light beams out from her. Shekinaih is our eyes because of the Spir- its of Wisdom, Counsel, and Knowledge that are upon her.

You are the outer diamond that refracts the light from her, and our eyebrow, because of the Spirits of Understanding, Might, and the Fear of THE YAHWEH that are upon you in the role of executing the decrees released to you through Shek- inaih.

Together, you will manifest our name "THE ADONAI": she in re- leasing our decree and you in executing them. Together with our Four Priests representing the Four-Fold Ministries, our four camps of spiritual Israel, you shall wage wars against our enemy.
David, would you like to share with Shekinaih my processes of perfection?

DAVID: Many years ago, the late D.G.S Dhinakaran, a Prophet of THE ELOHIM from India, visited me and stayed in my house for two weeks. On the last day of his stay, he gave me a piece of paper with the following points written which THE YAH- WEH instructed him to write down and explain to me. Firstly, he told me that THE YAHWEH had sent two angels to protect me so that I will live to fulfill my destiny. Secondly, he told me that THE YAHWEH would test me like He tested Job in the Bible and gave me Job 1:1 and Job 42:11-12. Finally, he told me that after I have been approved, THE YAHWEH will make me a voice of influence and my name will be a household name in the Outreach Ministry. In my later years working with you, THE HOLY SPIRIT revealed to me that the two angels that
D.G.S. Dhinakaran saw were the Two Cherubim of the Ark of the Covenant, and the male Cherub was my counterpart an- gel.
This prophecy is still fresh in my mind, and as I look back, I
BEHOLD MY NAMES
have indeed suffered much reproach for obeying THE YAH- WEH. I was derided by enemies that I did not know and my name was defamed by those whom I treated as my acquain- tance.
Psa 31:11 I was a reproach among all mine enemies, but espe- cially among my neighbours, and a fear to mine acquaintance: they that did see me without fled from me.
There were years where I used to roar at night. Crying was my meat all day long. THE YAHWEH had put me through scorning and even the people I love despised me.

Psa 22:6 But I am a worm, and no man; a reproach of men, and despised of the people. Psa 22:7 All they that see me laugh me to scorn: they shoot out the lip, they shake the head, saying, Psa 22:8 He trusted on THE YAHWEH that he would deliver him: let him deliver him, seeing he delighted in him.
Those were the periods when I was so downcast that I could not even sleep at night but would be lamenting, hoping to be comforted.
Psa 42:5 Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why art thou disquieted in me? hope thou in THE ELOHIM: for I shall yet praise him for the help of his countenance.
I was so full of shame that I could not look at my siblings, my wife, or my children with dignity.
Psa 69:7 Because for thy sake I have borne reproach; shame hath covered my face. Psa 69:8 I am become a stranger unto my brethren, and an alien unto my mother's children.
THE YAHWEH had indeed broken my heart by putting me through many misunderstandings which resulted in insults and shames.
Psa 69:20 Reproach hath broken my heart; and I am full of heavi- ness: and I looked for some to take pity, but there was none; and for comforters, but I found none.
THE PERFECT DIAMOND

title: A SMASHED HEART TURNED INTO DIAMOND

segments.text: A SMASHED HEART TURNED INTO DIAMOND
JESUS: David, why don't you share with Shekinaih the broken heart vision I gave you through Daniel?

DAVID: Many years ago, I prayed with a brother who was a seer. As I cried for THE FATHER to mend my broken heart, the brother told me that he saw the hands of THE FATHER coming down toward my heart. When I heard that, I was comforted at first. While anticipating my healing, he told me that he saw the hands of THE FATHER crushing my heart. Then, He pulled it out and smashed it unto the floor and stomped it with his feet. My heart was shattered into a billion minute pieces. I was horrified and devastated, and I cried out to THE FATHER for mercy. After that, the brother told me that he saw the hand of THE FATHER picking up the broken minute pieces of my heart and breathed on it and it became a diamond. While meditating on the vision, THE HOLY SPIRIT told me that THE EHYEH the Mastermind who has written my script had con- trolled the mind of Satan to test whether I would still love and fear Him and keep myself from all evil thoughts regard- ing His dealing with me. THE HOLY SPIRIT also spoke to my spirit that THE ADONAI would turn my fragile heart into a dia- mond to radiate His glory and power. Diamond is not only the hardest stone but it also refracts a tremendous amount of light, giving it exceptional brilliance.

JESUS: Yes, Shekinaih is the perfected inner diamond and is the tabernacle where our names, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" and "THE ADONAI", will dwell and be manifested prominently. She represents the All-knowing Eyes of THE TRINITY because of the Spirits of Wisdom, Counsel, and Knowledge that are upon her.

Yes, you, David, are the perfected outer diamond that refracts the light from her and our eyebrow because of the Spirits of Understanding, Might, and Fear of THE YAHWEH that are upon you in the role of executing the decree.
As the two Cherubim of Glory, the earth will shake and the heavens also will drop at your presence.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

Shekinaih, through our name, "THE ADONAI", will release our decree to you who, through our name, "THE EL", will train a great company of anointed ones who will be scattered throughout the whole world after they have been made as white as snow. These are the Spiritual Zion, the 144,000 brides that have been redeemed as silver of which 7,000 in the midst of them are my anointed that have also been made divine as gold.

Psa 68:11 THE ADONAI (H136) gave the word: great was the com- pany of those that published it. Psa 68:12 Kings of armies did flee apace: and she that tarried at home divided the spoil. Psa 68:13 Though ye have lien among the pots, yet shall ye be as the wings of a dove covered with silver, and her feathers with yellow gold. Psa 68:14 When THE SHADDAI scattered kings in it, it was white as snow in Salmon.

The Four Priests carrying the Ark symbolizing the Chariot of THE ELOHIM are called the "Shinan" (H8136, meaning changed or altered). When perfected, they will be transformed into the Four Living Creatures, the angel like beings with the face of a lion symbolizing the Apostle, the face of an eagle symboliz- ing the Prophet, the face of an ox symbolizing the Evangelist and the face of a man symbolizing the Pastor/Teacher. After setting them free from the stronghold of false teaching in their minds, THE ADONAI, through the Angel of THE YAHWEH bearing the name "THE EL", will equip them with the doctrine of holiness and power. Through both of you, we will anoint them and give true spiritual gifts of power and send them to the nations.

Psa 68:17 The chariots of THE ELOHIM are twenty thousand, even thousands of Shinan (H8136, meaning changed or al- tered): THE ADONAI is among them, as in Sinai, in the holy place. Psa 68:18 Thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led captivity captive: thou hast received gifts for men; yea, for the rebellious also, that THE YAH ELOHIM might dwell among them. Psa 68:19 Blessed be THE ADONAI (H136), who daily loadeth us with gifts, even THE EL of our salvation. Selah.
Eph 4:7 But unto every one of us is given grace according to the measure of the gift of a christ. Eph 4:8 Wherefore he saith,
THE PERFECT DIAMOND

When he ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men. Eph 4:9 (Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth? Eph 4:10 He that descended is the same also that ascend- ed up far above all heavens, that he might perfect (G4137 'ple- roo" complete) all.) Eph 4:11 And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers;
DOUBLE COVENANT OF THE ADONAI
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the above diagram that Shekinaih saw symbolize?
JESUS: One pair of the wings represents Shekinaih and the other pair represents you. The rainbow represents the cove- nant of THE TRINITY between Shekinaih and you. We call it the "Double Covenant."

THE FATHER: I have vowed that the works and the power of THE TRINITY through my name, "THE ADONAI", will be more eminently manifested in both of you as you two rise higher and higher in the spiritual flight of holiness.
BEHOLD MY NAMES
THE PROPELLER OF THE ADONAI
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the other symbol symbolize?

JESUS: The four-sided star symbolizes a propeller that we, THE ELOHIM, through our name, "THE ADONAI", will use to overturn the plots of the Nephilim who devised against my 144,000 brides and the 7,000 anointed ones to prevent them from taking over their rule of the Cosmoses. We, through the destructive decree of our name "THE SHADDAI", and by the hand of our name, "THE EL", will turn the captivity of the 7,000 spiritual daughters of Zion and the 144,000 spiritual brides of Jerusalem and purify their spirit, soul, and body by the Spirit of Judgment and the Spirit of Burning so that they will return to my FATHER in holiness.
THE PERFECT DIAMOND

My FATHER, the Righteous Judge, through His name, "THE ADONAI", will once again dwell in His tabernacle, the Two Cher- ubim of Glory, one as a cloud and smoke by day, the other as a shining flaming fire by night, to represent His Glory to defend Spiritual Zion and Jerusalem.

Isa 4:3 And it shall come to pass, that he that is left in Zion, and he that remaineth in Jerusalem, shall be called holy, even ev- ery one that is written among the living in Jerusalem: Isa 4:4 When THE ADONAI (H136) shall have washed away the filth of the daughters of Zion, and shall have purged the blood of Jeru- salem from the midst thereof by the spirit of judgment, and by the spirit of burning. Isa 4:5 And THE YAHWEH will create upon every dwelling place of mount Zion, and upon her assemblies, a cloud and smoke by day, and the shining of a flaming fire by night: for upon all the glory shall be a defence. Isa 4:6 And there shall be a tabernacle for a shadow in the daytime from the heat, and for a place of refuge, and for a covert from storm and from rain.
CHAPTER 7
THE OFFENCES OF THE ADONAI
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this torn fan symbolize?

JESUS: This is the tattered fan of Ji Gong which symbolizes the tattered life of a bride/anointed. The tattered corners of the fan symbolize the depressions of their life on Earth at different phases. The hammer superimposed on this tattered fan sym- bolizes the Seven Offences through our name, "THE ADONAI" through both of you that will break the hardened stronghold hidden in my children's hearts which were hardened in their imperfect character and in their carnal mind. You both will of- fend their minds and expose what were in their hearts that need to be uprooted for their successful ascent unto holiness to be part of the Heavenly Zion.
THE OFFENCES OF THE ADONAI
Jer 23:29 Is not my word like as a fire? saith THE YAHWEH; and
like a hammer that breaketh the rock in pieces?

Yes, as our spokesman (the word of THE YAHWEH), nothing shall be hidden from both of you, for we will disclose all their thoughts and the intents of their hearts through our seven stretches (financial, physical, mental, emotional, ridiculous, impossible, completely out of this world), unfair treatments, offences and unreasonable demands through both of you. On behalf of us, you shall confront, expose, demolish, and crush their self righteousness, pride, and carnal minds and show them where they are found wanting by us through these of- fences. If they will acknowledge their sin, humble themselves, and in true repentance ask both of you for help by circumcis- ing their heart and surrender their will unto us in crucifying their flesh with its affections and lusts, they shall also enter into my rest as I had denied myself, crucified my flesh from all its works and entered into the rest of my FATHER. (Heb 4:10-11, Gal 5:24)
Yes, those who are refined and purified by our testings through both of you shall be used as a light to the nations to magnify my glory in the last days.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what has Ji Gong to do with your name, "THE ADONAI"?
JESUS: My FATHER uses earthly things to teach heavenly things. (Jon 3:12) David, can you tell Shekinaih what you know about Ji Gong?"

DAVID : According to Chinese folklore, this monk is known as the "Legendary Monk with a Magical Fan". This is because that he is usually portrayed as a monk holding a tattered fan and sometimes with a bottle of wine. He was an eccentric person with an unusual and peculiar personality. He was an expelled Buddhist monk but was later deified as a Taoist god of wealth. Like Samuel whom My FATHER gave to Hannah his mother who was barren, a god gave Ji Gong to his barren mother after she prayed to it in a temple.
BEHOLD MY NAMES

Roaming on the streets, he was often mistaken as a beggar monk because of his Buddhist robes. His eccentricity was known on the streets, but so did his kindness and compas- sionate heart. Though he looked poor, he never begged for money. He would often approach beggars on the streets and other poor families to listen to their plight. He would crack a joke, then murmur a prayer, after which he would use his fan to fan them a little. Sometimes, He would rub some dirt under his armpit, spit some saliva on it, and roll it with his palms into a pill to give to those who came to him for healing to eat.
Lord JESUS, this reminds me of you spitting on the ground, and made clay of the spittle and anointed the eyes of a blind man and healed him in John 9:6.
JESUS: I did what I saw my FATHER did in vision. This had al- ways offended those who were carnally minded, and it ex- posed the evilness in their hearts.

DAVID: Some would be turned off by his eccentricity but some would consume it in humility and faith. Soon after this weird ritual, those who had received him were healed and some even prospered in fortune. By and by, he earned the title of"Ji Gong Huofo", which means the "Living Buddha Ji Gong".
ABBA FATHER, what are you trying to teach us?
JESUS: My FATHER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", also uses strange ways and people to offend the mind and expose the intent of the heart before He turns things around; for good or for bad.

THE FATHER: That is the reason why I have chosen Shekinaih and you to represent us, THE TRINITY, because both of you are as eccentric as Ji Gong and are extreme in certain ways. I, through my name, "THE ADONAI", through both of you, will have my ultimate laugh be heard aloud across the universe in the three realms.
SHEKINAIH: I see a vision of beings in the three realms trem-
THE OFFENCES OF THE ADONAI
bling and extremely tensed up, grasping their chairs very tightly when THE ADONAI is about to turn the table.

JESUS: Strange as it may sound, it had always been my FA- THER'S way to test people and bless people through offenc- es. Many shall stumble and be offended with the teaching of those books that we directed you both to write, but those who humble themselves and receive both of you who come in our Seven Names shall be converted as babes and infants to enter into the Holy Mountain which is the Kingdom of Heav- en, and they shall be ordained with strength to put away the enemy Baal and Ashtoreth, and the avenger, their trans-hu- man seed.
Through Shekinaih and you, we will lead our army to make war with the Beast of the Sea Ashtoreth and the False Prophet Baal and their kings and armies.

This will fulfill the prophecy regarding the seed of spiritual Eve whose heel symbolizes the last generation that is called and chosen whom I coined "the last shall be the first". They shall bruise the seed of the Serpent represented by Baal and Ash- toreth in its male and female form whose head are the kings, captains, and mighty men of the nations.
Gen 3:15 And I will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed; it shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise his heel.
Understanding the offensive ways of THE ADONAI will save many from scoffing and despising those whom my FATHER will use.
WHEREFORE CAME THIS MAD FELLOW TO THEE?
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, could you show us some examples in the scripture where your ways of offences can be substanti- ated?
JESUS: One of the children of the prophets whom Elisha sent to prophesy over Jehu and anoint him to be king was called
BEHOLD MY NAMES
a mad fellow by some of the servants of Jehu because of his eccentric speech. Yes, most of our prophets were considered as mad because of our training. (2Ki 9:11-13)
2Ki 9:11 Then Jehu came forth to the servants of his lord: and one said unto him, Is all well? wherefore came this mad fellow to thee? And he said unto them, Ye know the man, and his com- munication.
AND HE DID SO, WALKING NAKED AND BAREFOOTED

Isaiah must have been mistaken as a madman when he walked naked and barefooted for three years in Israel after being com- manded by us to symbolize the captivity of Egypt and Ethio- pia in shame as the prisoners of the King of Assyria. Our true prophets are trained to deny themselves and not to be con- cerned about their reputation. As slaves, they are trained to obey us as the master even unto death, doing things that do not make sense to the carnal mind. That is why we, through our name, "THE ADONAI", will use them as signs and wonders to those whom they are sent. The Way of THE ADONAI is of- fensive. To the carnal mind, our command to Isaiah was out of this world, unreasonable, absurd, mad, questionable, and mentally, emotionally, and physical taxing. (Isa 20:1-6)

Isa 20:2 At the same time spake THE YAHWEH by Isaiah the son of Amoz, saying, Go and loose the sackcloth from off thy loins, and put off thy shoe from thy foot. And he did so, walking na- ked and barefoot.
THE ADULTEROUS ACTS OF HOSEA
Hosea was another eccentric prophet who obeyed us to marry a prostitute to symbolize the whoredom of Jerusalem.

Hos 1:2 The beginning of the word of THE YAHWEH by Hosea. And THE YAHWEH said to Hosea, Go, take unto thee a wife of whore- doms and children of whoredoms: for the land hath committed great whoredom, departing from THE YAHWEH.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, wasn't Hosea a priest and what you
THE OFFENCES OF THE ADONAI
have commanded him to do was against the law?
THE FATHER: We are above the Law.

JESUS: Can you remember the confrontation of the Pharisees with me when my disciples broke the law by plucking the ears of corn to eat on Sabbath Day. Did not I reply to them: "I will have mercy and not sacrifice, and ye would not have con- demned the guiltless. For the Son of Adam is Lord even of the Sabbath day." (Mat 12:1-8)

In another occasion, as commanded by my FATHER, Hosea did another unorthodox act by paying an adulteress fifteen piec- es of silver and one and a half homer of barley with the condi- tion that she would only sleep with him and not with others symbolizing the children of Israel returning and seeking THE YAHWEH their ELOHIM. This does not sound right to most of us and it surely is offensive (Hos 3:1-5).

Hos 3:1 Then said THE YAHWEH unto me, Go yet, love a woman beloved of her friend, yet an adulteress, according to the love of THE YAHWEH toward the children of Israel, who look to other gods, and love flagons of wine.
OFFENCES WILL COME

I, JESUS, like the true prophets of old, was trained in the of- fensive ways of THE ADONAI. I had warned my disciples that it is impossible that THE ADONAI will not use offences to test their hearts, for it is a necessity.
Mat 18:7 Woe unto the Cosmoses because of offences! for it must needs be that offences come; but woe to that man by whom the offence cometh!

David, had not most of your friends, loved ones, and relatives felt offended by you when I commanded you to do certain things that did not make sense to them? Shekinaih and you were rejected by my children even though our word of wis- dom is manifested in both of you. And because of this, they are deprived of our counsel and deliverance through both of you. (Mat 13:54-58)
BEHOLD MY NAMES
Mat 13:57 And they were offended in him. But Jesus said unto them, A prophet is not without honour, save in his own country, and in his own house.
A ROCK OF OFFENCE
Yes, I was born to be a rock of offence even before I was incar- nated as the son of a carpenter.
Rom 9:33 As it is written, Behold, I lay in Sion a stumblingstone and rock of offence: and whosoever believeth on him shall not be ashamed.

My genealogy was made possible through the adultery of Tamar with her father-in-law Judah begetting Phares (Gen 38:1- 30); the unholy union of Salmon with the prostitute Rahab be- getting Boaz (Jos 2:1); the breaking of the commandment of THE YAHWEH by Boaz in marrying Ruth who was a Moabite; the murder of Uriah and the adultery of David with Bathsheba begetting Solomon. (Mat 1:1-21)
Mat 1:3 And Judas begat Phares and Zara of Thamar; and Phares begat Esrom; and Esrom begat Aram;

Mat 1:5 And Salmon begat Booz of Rachab; and Booz begat Obed of Ruth; and Obed begat Jesse; Mat 1:6 And Jesse begat David the king; and David the king begat Solomon of her that had been the wife of Urias;
Mat 1:16 And Jacob begat Joseph the husband of Mary, of whom was born Jesus, who is called Christ.
Deu 23:3 An Ammonite or Moabite shall not enter into the con- gregation of THE YAHWEH; even to their tenth generation shall they not enter into the congregation of THE YAHWEH for ever:

From all I have mentioned in summary, one of my ancestors was born of an incestuous relationship; two from foreign women, one of whom had been a prostitute and the other from an enemy forever excluded from the Israeli communi- ty. Furthermore, there were adulterous man and woman who became the parents of Solomon! How can my FATHER choose the Messiah to come from this lineage? To finally nail the of-
THE OFFENCES OF THE ADONAI
fences of THE ADONAI, I was branded as a bastard by the Phar- isees because it was true to the carnal mind that Mary had conceived me before she married Joseph.
Joh 8:41 Ye do the deeds of your father. Then said they to him, We be not born of fornication; we have one Father, even THE ELOHIM.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, many self righteous people will ques- tion why you had allowed such sinful people to be a part of the Messiah's lineage.
